author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: emuva,” kusho uBroos kwabezindaba eKapa ngenyanga edlule. “Kabadingeki abagadli abama ndawonye ngoba lokhu kunqinda abasezimpondweni amathuba okusivumela ukuthi sidlale ngendlela esiyijwayele,” kuqhuba yena. Okwagqama ngale ncazelo kaBroos yomgadli amfunayo yindlela yokudlala kaRayners okunguyena ozihola phambili ngamagoli angu-11 kwiBetway Premiership kubagadli baseNingizimu Afrika. Kule sizini unamagoli angu-15 emidlalweni engu-28 emiqhudelwaneni ehlukene. Kwi-Afcon wayekubadlali okwakucushwe ngabo. Unamagoli amahlanu kwiBafana emidlalweni engu-18.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Manqoba Mngqithi uManqoba Mngqithi umqeqeshi weGolden Arrows IPHINI lomqeqeshi weLamontville Golden Arrows, uMusa Bilankulu, libuyelwa yithemba ngenkulumo kaManqoba Mngqithi obona bezoqeda isizini ezayo sebenenye indebe ekhabetheni. UMngqithi uhola ithimba labaqeqeshi be-Arrows elithakwe ngoBilankulu noKagiso Dikgacoi ababengabadlali bakhe kuBafana Bes'thende eminyakeni edlule. Bobathathu babekhona kwi-Arrows ngesikhathi iwina indebe yeMTN8 ngo-2009. I-Arrows ibingelinye lamaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal abedlala emqhudelwaneni iKZN Premier's Cup eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay, ngempelasonto edlule. Ikhishwe ekuseni ngaMaZulu ngo 3-2. UMngqithi, otakule leli qembu kukubi ngesizini edlule, uzama ukubumba inqanawe ezobuyisa izinsuku zenjabulo kwi-Arrows. "Indlela yokucabanga yomqeqeshi...(ihlukile) njengoba wazi ukuthi ungumqeqeshi onamava, usesisize kakhulu selokhu efikile ngesizini edlule. Emidlalweni engu-12, abekhona kuyona kwiBetway Premiership kubonakele. Uyasisiza kakhulu ngoba thina singabaqeqeshi abasebancane, uyasifaka kule nto. Njengoba eshilo ukuthi sizolwa futhi sizowina okuthize, ngiyakukholwa lokho ngoba wake wakusho ngesikhathi sisadlala siwina iMTN8. Ngakho, azama ukukusho wukuzama ukushintsha indlela yokucabanga kubadlali ngoba sikholwa wukuthi siqine ngokwanele uma udlalela iChiefs, Pirates noma iSundowns. Kodwa

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe U-AKANI Simbine osingathe ngempumelelo iSimbine Classic, ePitoli, usebheke ukuyoyibamba kowe-World Relay Championships, eGaborone, eBotswana, ngempelasonto INSEPHE yomgijimi webanga lika-100m, u-Akani Simbine, ikuqinisekisile ukuthi izobe iyibambe kwi-World Relay Championships ezobanjelwa eBotswana, kule mpelasonto. USimbine (32) ongumsunguli nomhleli weSimbine Classic, okungumjaho wohlobo lwe-track and field ogijinywe okokuqala nonyaka ePilditch Stadium, ePitoli, ngoLwesibili, uzwakalise injabulo nomunyu ngempumelelo yalo mjaho odonse abagijimi abaseqopheleni eliphezulu nezibukeli ebeziphume ngobuningi ukuzowethamela. Uthe okuqale njengephupho kuyena kugcine sekuba yindumezulu yomqhudelwano ogqugquzele abantu abaningi baseNingizimu Afrika ukuthi bakholelwe emaphusheni abo. “Ngijabule ukuthi ube yimpumelelo lo mjaho. Bekugcwele kuchichima ezihlalweni yizibukeli, izingane zibone amaphupho azo efezeka, nabagijimi bakithi bathola ithuba lokuncintisana nezihlabani zabagijimi bamazwe,” kusho uSimbine, oveze isifiso sakhe sokuletha i-Diamond League eNingizimu Afrika ngelinye ilanga. “Ngibonga kakhulu kuwona wonke umuntu ngokukholelwa kuleli phupho lami nokwazi ukuthi into enjengalena ingenzeka. Nginethemba lokuthi singawukhulisa lo mjaho. Lesi kuyesiqalo nje.” Kulo mjaho uSimbine ushaye isikhathi esiwu-9.98 seconds kowandulela owamanqamu ku-100m, okuyisikhathi

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMDLALI wasesiswini kwiKruger Untied, uCelimpilo Ngema, obambe iqhaza elikhulu empulelweni yaleli qembu eselingompethea beMotsepe Foundation Championship UMDLALI wasesiswini kwiKruger United, uCelimpilo “Zidane” Ngema, utusa ukuzikhandla nokusebenza ngokubambisana njengekhubalo lokunqoba isicoco seMotsepe Foundation Championship kwaleli qembu elizogijima kwiBetway Premiership ngesizini ezayo. Yize kusasele imidlalo emibili kusongwe isizini ka-2025/26 yeChampionship, iKruger isivele iyiwinile iligi yalesi sigaba. Iqede ukuqagela ngombango weligi ibhaxabula iBlack Leopards ngo 3-1 ngoMgqibelo KaNyamazane Stadium, KaNyamazane. UNgema (28) waseThubalethu, eMelmoth, ngomunye wabadlali ababambe iqhaza elikhulu empumelelweni yeKruger ayijoyine esuka kuMaZulu ekuqaleni kwesizini. “Ukuzikhandla kwethu nokusebenza ngokubambisana njengabadlali beqembu kugcine kuthela izithelo. Ngakho sonke sithokozile ngokuthi sigcine sikwazile ukufeza umgomo wethu ebesizibekele wona kule sizini obekuyikho ukulwela ukuwina iligi,” kusho uNgema. Lo mdlali oyinjini yasesiswini, ohlukane naMaZulu esedlale amasizini amabili kuwona ubalwa nabadlali abadlale kwiPremiership okubalwa kubona uTercious Malepe, Morne Nel, Wandisile Letlabika, Sipho Sibiya noNtsako Makhubela. “Ukukhushulelwa kwiBetway Premiership kweqembu kusho lukhulu kimina ngoba kunginika elinye ithuba engilithatha

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INGAPHANDLE lomqulu wezolimi obhalwe wuMnuz Nhlanzeko Ngwenya, ozosiza abafundi basemabangeni emfundo aphansi ukuqonda amagama esiNgisi EZIKOLENI zasemakhaya kunenkinga yezingane ezithwala kanzima ezifundweni ezithile, kungekhona ukuthi azikuqondi ezikufundiswayo - kepha ngenxa yokuthi aziwaqondi amagama athile emibuzweni ukuthi aqonde ukuthini ngesiZulu. Usho kanjalo uMnuz Nhlanzeko Ngwenya waseMasundwini, KwaNongoma, elandisa ngomcabango wombono wakhe wosomqulu wamagama esiNgisi ahunyushelwe esiZulwini osihloko sithi ALL Action Assessment Verbs: for English First Additional Language and Mathematical Terminology Lists. Engxoxweni yakhe neSolezwe ngalo mqulu aqale ukuwuhlanganisa ngo-2017, kwaze kwaba wu-2018 - uthe umcabango wawo wamfikela ngokuthi kusukela aqala ukuba uthisha eminyakeni ewu-20 edlule ubeqaphela ukuthi abanye abafundi abami ndawonye emabangeni abakuwona ngoba bengakhaliphile, kepha bahlulwa wukuhumusha amanye amagama asetshenziswayo uma bebuzwa imibuzo ezivivinyweni. UMNUZ Nhlanzeko Ngwenya, obhale umqulu ozosiza ukuhumusha amagama alukhuni esiNgisi “Ngiqale kanjalo ukucwaninga ngamagama okuvame ukuthi anike abafundi inkinga yokungakwazi ukuwahumusha ngendlela efanele ikakhulu esiNgisini naseziBalweni nakwezinye izifundo, ngasebenzisa ulwazi lwami lwezemfundo namava obuthishela ukuqhamuka nezincazelo

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Sports Complex, eRichard Bay, ngenkathi iHungry Lions inenebula iHighbury FC ngo 4-0 eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberh. Kwathi iCasric yabhaxabula i-Upington City ngo 2-0 eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium, e-Upington. Amaqembu amabili azoqeda endaweni yesibili neyesithathu azodlala neliqede endaweni ka-15 kwi-lo yePremiership. IMilford isendaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu awu-53, ilandelwa yiCity endaweni yesithathu neyesine ngamaphuzu awu-51 ngokulinganayo ngokwehlukana, kube yiCasric kweyesihlanu ngawu-49 Lokhu kusho ukuthi imidlalo yangeSonto elizayo, ngekawafawafa kula maqembu alwela ukuya kumaPlay-Offs. I-The Citizens eqeqeshwa uJan Vreman negqishe ngeningi labadlali abanamava okudlala kwiPremiership, izosonga isizini ngomdlalo wasekuhambeni neLeicesterford City ngeSonto, eDobsonville Stadium, eSoweto. IMilford eqeqeshwa uXanti Pupuma isonga isizini ngomdlalo wasekuhambeni neHungry Lions, eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs, e-Upington, iCasric isonge neGomora United eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Kanti iKruger eshaye iGomora ngo 1-0 izolo, izosonga ngomdlalo wasekhaya ne-The Bees FC KaNyamazane Stadium, nokuyilapho ezobe isinikwa khona indebe yayo yeMotsepe Championship. Kanti ngakolunye uhlangothi, isifundazwe iLimpopo sikhungethwe yifu elimnyama njengoba womabili amaqembu amabili akulesi

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: nayo. Uveze ukuthi bahlele ukuhamba nawo amaphara bayowakhombisa omengameli abahlukene, ukuze babone ukuthi izidakamizwa zililimaze kanjani elakuleli. UShansela ehhovisi leSilo, Inkosi uMalusi Zondi, usigxeke kakhulu isigameko sokushiswa komuzi kaNgizwe wathi okwenzekile kuletha ukukhathazeka. "Sicela ukuthi abasemandleni baphenye ngalesi sigameko. Isigameko esifana nalesi siletha ukukhathazeka kakhulu. Nathi siyaxhumana naye uNgizwe ngokwenzekile futhi isimo sisiqaphe ngeso lokhozi futhi sizomeseka kuze kube sekugcineni. Sinxusa ukuthi kube noxolo, ukuthula, ukubumbana kusona sonke isizwe," kusho uZondi. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe bayaphenya ngemuva kokuthungelwa kwezindlu ezintathu eMbumbulu. UNGIZWE Mchunu ufike waphelelwa amandla emzini wakhe oseMbumbulu oshisiwe ngeSonto

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: kusho uRamaphosa Uncome iqhaza lamazwe ase-Afrika asiza elakuleli ngesikhathi kuliwa nobandlululo. "Samukelwa ngezandla ezimhlophe kwamanye amazwe ngesikhathi sicindezelwe. Sabhaciswa kulamazwe, amanye aze afela izono zethu ngenxa yokuthi ayebhacise ababelwela inkululeko. Singabantu abaziwa ngemfudumalo, asikwazi ukubuswa yinzondo ngabantu bakwamanye amazwe, nabo abasisiza ngesikhathi sisenkingeni," kugcizelela uRamaphosa izolo ekhuluma ngesikhathi kugujwa usuku lwenkululeko, eMangaung eFree State. Usho lokhu nje abantu babhukule bakubeka emahlombe abo ukuthi bachithe abantu bokufika kuleli abangenazo izimfanelo ngokuthi babe namamashi, okuzwakalisa ukungahambisani nokuba kwabo kuleli. URamaphosa uthe uyazi ukuthi abanye abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho, bangena kuleli ngenxa yenkohlakalo eyenzeka eMnyangweni wezaseKhaya. Kube nesehlakalo esingabanga namthelela ngesikhathi omunye wabebethamele umcimbi, ezama ukugibela esteji lapho obekukhona khona izikhulu, kubalwa noRamaphosa, uxhakathiswe onogada bamkhiphela ngaphandle. URamaphosa ubale ezinye izinto ezinhle athe ziyenzeka kuleli okubandakanya nendaba yabantu ababoshwayo, ngenxa yeKhomishini kaMadlanga. "Siyalwa nenkohlakalo nabaphula umthetho njengoba sizobabopha bonke abenza okubi. Yenza umsebenzi omuhle iKhomishini kaMadlanga." Ubale nezemfundo, wathi inqwaba yabafundi ifunda mahhala futhi

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: kungokwesibili ethula lo mncintiswano. Uthe lokhu kusho ukuthi kukhona okuhle abakubonayo kuyena ngokumethemba ngethuba elihle kangaka. “Ngicabanga ukuthi amava ami kule ndima yiwona enze ukuthi ngithole leli thuba, engicabanga ukuthi akuzukuba nzima kakhulu njengoba ngike ngasebenza futhi noLawrence phambilini." UMSAKAZI nomethuli wezinhlelo zethelevishini uLamiez Holworthy kwabazophatha izinhlelo zomcimbi wokuklomelisa ngezindondo ama-Metro FM Awards azoba se-ICC, eThekwini kule nyanga Uthe:“Sengikubheke ngabomvu ukuba yingxenye yalo mcimbi ohambisana nomgubho weminyaka ewu-40 ye-Metro FM. Sibheke ukuthi ube sezingeni elifanele, siphinde siqhube umbono wokuhlonipha amaciko njengoba kufakwe neminxa emisha emibili, okamaskandi noweLekompo." Kwi-Black Carpet, exhaswe ngabe-African Fashion International, uDJ Lamiez Holworthy uzobe exoxa namaciko nezihambeli ezizofika emcimbini, bese kuthi umsakazi weMetro FM uZola Mhlongo, uzobe enza izimemezelo emcimbini. Kuvele nokuthi umakadebona emculweni uZakes Bantwini, uzobe ewumqondisi womculo emcimbini. UMSAKAZI nomethuli wezinhlelo zethelevishini uSiyabonga "Scoop Makhathini" Ngwekazi kwabazophatha izinhlelo zomcimbi wokuklomelisa ngezindondo ama-Metro FM Awards, azoba se-ICC, eThekwini kule nyanga Umphathi weMetro FM, uKina Nhlengethwa, uthe

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Izitshudeni eziswele indawo yokuhlala emanyuvesi KUHLUKENE imibono emalungwini ePhalamende, ngesiphakamiso se-EFF sokuthi kujutshwe ikhomishini ezobhekana nenkinga yaminyaka yonke yokushoda kwezikhala zokufunda ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme. Leli qembu likhala ngokuthi izinkumbi zabafundi eziphase u-matric, zigcina sezibhuquza emakhaya ngenxa yokushoda kwezikhala. UMnuz Sihle Lonzi, ilungu le-EFF, ukhale ngokuthi bangaphezu kuka-600 000 abafundi abaphasa u-matric, kodwa amanyuvesi akwazi ukwamukela ababalelwa ku-235 000 kuphela. Uthe amakolishi amakhono amaTVET, akwazi ukwamukela ababalelwa ku-170 000 kuphela. "Lokhu kusho ukuthi babalelwa ku-200 000, abagcina sebebhuquza emakhaya bengasenayo indawo yokufunda. Nango-2024 bangaphezu kuka-200 000 abafundi abangazitholanga izikhala zokufunda. Kucacile ukuthi eminyakeni emibili edlule, bacela ku-500 000 ababhuquza emakhaya ngenxa yokungazitholi izikhala," kusho uLonzi, ngesikhathi kubhungwa ngalesi siphakamiso ePhalamende. UMnuz Mnqobi Msezane weMKP, weseke i-EFF wathi abasuke bephase u-matric baphenduka ondingasithebeni minyaka yonke. "Abanye bayazithola kodwa kunezinkinga zokuthi iNSFAS abayitholi ngesikhathi. Yingakho siyeseka eyokuthi iPhalamende lingenelele kule nkinga okucacayo ukuthi nangeminyaka ezayo, izoqhubeka ngoba abahlelelwa abaphase u-matric." UMnuz Sanele Zondo

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: NGABADLALI beMamelodi Sundowns kwiDDC bejabulela elinye lamagoli muva nje UKUNQOBA kweMamelodi Sundowns umdlalo ebisele ngawo kwiDStv Diski Challenge (DDC) kuwushubise nakakhulu umbango wesicoco seligi ovutha amalangabi phakathi kwaleli qembu laseChloorkop elilele isibili kwi-log ne-Orlando Pirates eqhwakele. ISundowns inqobe ngo 3-1 kwiPolokwane City e-Old Peter Mokaba Stadium ngoLwesibili, okuyibeka ezithendeni zePirates kwi-log njengoba womabili la maqembu esalelwe yimidlalo emithathu ngaphambi kokusonga isizini. Emidlalweni yeligi engu-27, iPirates ihleli esicongweni ngamaphuzu angu-66, bese kuthi emhlane wayo kuhlale iSundowns ngawu-63. Kunzima ukuziba ukuthi lo mbango oqhubeka kwiDDC uthi awufane nalo osesigabeni seBetway Premiership lapho isikwati esikhulu seSundowns sishukana khona nesePirates ngenhloso yokugoduka nezigidi ekupheleni kwesizini. IChiefs, okuyiyona evikela isicoco, ihleli endaweni yesihlanu kwi-log kulandela ukugudluzwa kwayo iSiwelele FC, osekuyiyona ehleli endaweni yesine ngamaphuzu angu-50 emuva kwemidlalo engu-27. Okuqapheleka ngalo mbango wesicoco seDDC ngukuthi iPirates kayinawo uphawini wokuqhuzuka emidlalweni eyisalele ngoba iwini yeSundowns kwiPolokwane ikucacisile ukuthi leli qembu laseChloorkop lizimisele ngokulwa kube sekugcineni. Kuyawushubisa futhi

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UMazwi Kubheka kuthiwa uzifikele yena emaphoyiseni Amaphoyisa aseVosloorus ayakuqinisekisa ukuthi uMazwi Mpumelelo Kubheka, 27, okwabikwa ukuthi udukile ngo-2 Ephreli 2026 utholwe ephephile. Kuthiwa uzethule esiteshini samaphoyisa eVosloorus ngobusuku bangomhla ka-2 Meyi 2026. Ubunikazi bakhe sebuqinisekisiwe futhi uzohlanganiswa nomndeni wakhe ngemuva kokuhlolelwa udokotela. Okwamanje, izimo mayelana necala lomuntu olahlekile zisabonakala ziyingcosana futhi uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka. "Lo muntu uvele esiteshini samaphoyisa eVosloorus ngobusuku bangomhla ka-2 Meyi 2026. Kuqinisekisiwe ukuthi uyena ngempela uzohlanganiswa nomndeni wakhe ngemuva kokuhlolwa impilo," kusho okhulumela amaphoyisa uColonel Dimakatso Nevhuhulwi. Iziphathimandla zithe izimo ngokunyamalala kwakhe azikacaci, njengoba manje kusaphenywa ukuze kutholakale ukuthi kwenzekani phakathi nezinsuku ezicishe zibe ngu-30 enyamalele. "Okwamanje, izimo mayelana necala lomuntu olahlekile azikacaci futhi uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka," kwengeza uNevhuhulwi.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: nami ngoba ngithanda ukugijima nokujima ngaso sonke isikhathi. Bengilokhu ngikhuleka ngibuza uMdali ukuthi kungani kwenzeka kanje kodwa impendulo engiyitholile wukuthi lokhu kuzoba yingxenye yohambo lwethu. Angikwazi ukukhala ngoba ngaqala ibhola ngineminyaka engu-17 ngenxa yakhe uMdali. Ngineminyaka engu-15 ngidlala ibhola," kusho uBarr.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: Ngobe, uthe lo mcimbi uzobe sewenziwa okwesibili. Uthe owokuqala wahamba kahle kakhulu kugcwele izintokazi ezaziliqhamukisa kuzozonke izinkalo. Unxuse wonke amatshitshi ukuba aphume ngobuningi bawo, noma ngabe itshitshi liwuluphi uhlanga. UZamambo uthe inhlosongqangi ngalo mcimbi wukuvumbulula nokuthuthukisa amakhono amatshitshi. Uthe amatshitshi azobe eqhakambisa amakhono ahlukahlukene njengokucula nokunye. Umsunguli nomqondisi waMatshwelele Festival, uLindani "Papa G" Gumede, uthe lona akusiwo umcimbi kodwa wumgubho wesiko lakwaZulu. Ubonge kakhulu izintombi nonomehlo ngokuba yingxenye yomcimbi. Uthe okwenze lo mcimbi wakhuza ibuya yingcindezi yabantu ebebewufuna. Amathikithi aseyatholakala eTicketPro ngemali esukela kukaR150 kuya kuR1000.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMCULI kamaskandi, uBahubhe osanda kukhipha i-albhamu yakhe entsha, ethi Ngiyobalanda Image: Facebook/Bahubhe SA UMASKANDA owenze indumezulu yomcimbi wokwethula i-albhamu yakhe waze wadalula ukuthi usexoshiwe ngaphandle kwenxanxathela yezitolo, iWorkshop eThekwini, uBahubhe, uthi usehlela ukuyoyethula ngakubo. Lesi silomo somculi sethule ngokusemthethweni i-albhamu yaso yakamuva ethi Ngiyobalanda emasontweni amabili edlule, lapho abantu bebebulala inyoka. Emuva komcimbi utshele Isolezwe ukuthi abaphathi beWorkshop - ngenxa yokugcwala kakhulu - bathe sebeyomtholela enye indawo uma ethula umculo wakhe ngokuzayo. I-albhamu ayeyethula yaba nokubambezeleka ukuthi iphume kodwa ekugcineni isiyatholakala. "Bajabulile abalandeli, ngeke ngidlale ngabo ngoba bayayithenga," kusho yena. Uthe unezinhlelo zokuyethula ezindaweni ezahlukene nangakubo yize engakaziphothuli. Uzakwabo emculweni, uKhuzani, ubhale kwiFacebook ukuthi uBahubhe wathi ufuna ukuyokwenza ikhonsathi bukhoma ePlayhouse. Uthe yena noJumbo bazomeseka ngale kokunanaza. UBahubhe uthe: "Sasixoxa nje, mhlawumbe sisazohlala sibuke kahle. Kuyisifiso sami vele kuyohamba kugcine kufikekile. Kuyaphoqa," kusho uBahubhe.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: imiphumela ibingemihle, uma sibuza satshelwa ukuthi yingoba akekho uthisha ogogodile ofundisa leso sifundo. Le nto yandile ezikoleni zethu, kanti umnyango kumele uyisukumele." Nelungu le-EFF uMnuz Mandla Shikwambana, lihambe emazwini kaNksz Maimela, lathi le nkinga yande kakhulu ezikoleni. "Akukhona nje ukuthi othisha abagogodile ekutheni bangafundisa, inkinga wukuthi bafundisa izifundo abangazazi kwabona. Lokhu kudalela abafundi inkinga ngoba bafundiswa ngabantu kwabona abangazi." UMweli uthe bayazama ukuyixazulula le nkinga ngokuthi bajube othisha abafundiswa wuhulumeni, ngaphansi komfundaze iFunza Lushaka. Nokho ukhale ngenkinga yemali, eyenza bangakwazi ukubaqasha labo thisha. "Sigcina sesibadedela ukuthi bahambe bayozifunela umsebenzi noma sibaxhase ngokubafundisa ngoba singenazo izikhala zokubaqasha. Ngokomthetho kumele ngabe siyabaqasha bonke kodwa asikwazi ngenxa yemali," kusho uMweli. Kulo mhlangano kuvele ukuthi babalelwa ku-10 000 othisha abafundiswa ngalo mfundaze, kodwa bangu-2 662 kuphela abaqashiwe. Okunye okuvelile wukuthi iminyango yezifundazwe ibhekene nenkinga enkulu yokungakwazi ukuvala izikhala zabasebenzi ngenxa yemali. Kuphinde kwanxuswa iminyango yezifundazwe ukuthi iyisebenzise yonke imali esuke yabelwe yona ikakhulu eyengqalasizinda

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: singcwatshwe ngokuyimfihlo wumfowabo, uMnuz Musa Malwane, naye ofunelwa uxhaxha lwamacala okubulala nawobugebengu obusemngceleni,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uqinisekise ukuthi lezi zelamani zifunelwa necala lokubulawa kwenyanga edumile eManguzi, uJames ‘God'olulala amankankane’ Mthembu. Uthe isidumbu sikamufi sigcine simbiwa ngokulandela uhlelo olufanele, kanti uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka. Uthe nokucingwa kusaMusa nakho kusaqhubeka, wanxusa abangaba nolwazi ngokuthi uphi, bathinte amaphoyisa.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: kanye nokutholakala nezinsimbi eziyigugu. Lokhu kuboshwa kuyingxenye yemizamo eqhubekayo yabezomthetho yokuhlakaza amanethiwekhi obugebengu abathintekayo ekuhwebeni ngokungemthetho kwezimbiwa ezibalulekile nenkohlakalo. Abasolwa kulindeleke ukuba bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKempton Park, ngoMsombuluko bebhekene namacala angase ahlanganise ukudayisa ngokungemthetho izinsimbi eziyigugu, aphule umthetho, inkohlakalo kanye nokwephula umthetho olawula izinsimbi eziyigugu eNingizimu Afrika. Iqembu lepolitiki elisolwa uFloyd Shivhambu I-Afrika Mayibuye Movement ikwamukele ukuboshwa kwamaphoyisa UMajor General uFiroz Khan no-Ebrahim Kadwa osekunesikhathi eside besolwa ngobugebengu. Lawa maphoyisa asolwa ngamacala anzima ahlanganisa nokusebenzisa budedengu izikhundla zawo esiphoyiseni ukuze kuzuze wona kanye nenkohlakalo ehleliwe. Isitatimende se-Africa Mayibuye ngokuboshwa kwamaphoyisa amabili

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ithenda eyanikwa inkampani kaMatlala. URamaphosa uthe unqume ukumisa uMasemola ukuze kungonakali isithunzi samaphoyisa. "Uma nizokhumbula kahle ngathi kulo nyaka sifuna ukulwa nobugebengu obuhleliwe kanye nodlame. Ngathi ukuze siqede ubugebengu kufanele sibe namaphoyisa aqotho. Kubalulekile ukuthi sibe nabaholi bamaphoyisa abathenjwa abantu." URamaphosa uthe uyamethemba uLieutenant General Dimpane ukuthi uzoyibamba ishisa. "Ngiyamethemba ukuthi uzokwazi ukuzibamba ziqine. Unesipiliyoni emaphoyiseni kanye nakwezinye izinhlaka. Uneminyaka engu-20 esemaphoyiseni. Sifuna ukuthi aqhubeke nokuqinisa umkhankaso wokulwa nobugebengu. Ehlile amacala anodlame. Sibheke ukuthi kwehle isibalo samacala okuhlukumeza ngokobulili." URamaphosa uthe ukumiswa kukaMasemola ngeke kuphazamise impi yokulwa nobugebengu. "Ukubekwa amacala kukaMasemola akufanele kuphazamise ukusebenza kwamaphoyisa. Amaphoyisa akufanele ehlelwe umdlandla, kufanele aqhubeke nokulwa nobugebengu." Image: Siyabulela Duda / GCIS UNobhala jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula, uthe bayakwamukela ukuqokwa kukaLieutenant General Dimpane. Okhulumela iMKP, uMnuz Nhlamulo Ndhela, uthe abamethembi kahle uLieutenant General Dimpane. "Akakaze abe yiphoyisa. Wafika emaphoyiseni ezosebenza kwezokuphathwa kwemali. Ubugebengu budla lubi lapha eNingizimu Afrika, sinenkinga yamaqembu emigulukudu. Sizolwa kanjani

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: naziphi izinselelo, ikakhulukazi ngenkathi ngisanda kufika lana eGoli, lapho engihlangane khona nabantu abaningi abebengaluqondi uhlobo lomuntu engiyilona nendlela engiphila nengiziphatha ngayo. UMCULI we-Afro Pop uNomfundo Moh uzokhipha i-albhamu yakhe entsha yesine esihloko sithi Farm Julia “Ngizocacisa ukuthi izenzo zalaba bantu zingithiye kangakanani nokuthi futhi zingiqinise kangakanani ukuthi ngiqhubeke ngiphile impilo yami ngendlela engazi ukuthi ifanele nengikhuliswe ngayo, engicabanga ukuthi kuzokhuthaza nabanye abantu ukuthi bangazenyezi ngohlobo lwabantu abayilona nendlela abakhuliswe ngayo,” kusho uNomfundo Moh. Eqhuba uthe ubheke kakhulu izingoma okukhona kuzona ethi Uzophumelela, ekhuthaza abantu ukungaliphosi ithawula empilweni ngoba nakhu besabhekene nezimo ezenza ukuthi impilo yabo ingayi phambili noma ingabi yilokhu abakufisayo nabakuhlelayo. “Ikhona futhi enye ingoma engiyenze sengizoqeda ukupheka i-albhamu; yona esihloko sithi Umakhwapheni. Leyo-ke iqukethe umyalezo oveza ukuthi empilweni kuyenzeka ukuthi kube nobudlelwano bothando obuqala ngendlela engahlelekile, bese kuthi ngokuhamba kwesikhathi kucace ukuthi kuningi okuhle okuzovela ngakho.” Le ntokazi, ogama layo lokuzalwa wuNomfundo Ngcobo yaziwa kakhulu ngezingoma zayo okubalwa

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: bukaRamaphosa. Kunesinqumo senkantolo esishoyo ukuthi yiluphi uhlelo okufanele lulandelwe. Thina njenge-IFP asibona abantu abathanda ukubukwa. Siyavumelana ngokuthi kufanele kulandelwe imiyalelo yenkantolo." USomlomo wePhalamende, uNkk Thoko Didiza, ubengakasiphenduli isicelo se-MKP nese-ATM. Phezu kwesicelo se-MKP ne-ATM kuphinde kube nesicelo se-EFF efuna ukuthi iPhalamende lisungule ngokushesha ikomiti elizoqhuba uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, uthe uRamaphosa uzolahlekelwa okuningi uma ekhishwa esikhundleni ngohlelo abaluhlongozayo. "Uma ukhishwa ngalolu hlelo ulahlekelwa imihlomulo etholwa ababengomengameli. Lapha sibala impesheni, izimoto kanye nabasebenzi onikezwa bona uma usuthatha umhlalaphansi." UMalema uthe bazolwa nemizamo kaRamaphosa yokubambezela uhlelo lokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. Kuvela ukuthi uRamaphosa angase aye enkantolo eyophonsela inselelo umbiko wekomiti elalijutshwe yiPhalamende ukuba liphenye lolu daba. "Noma angaya enkantolo sizoya nathi enkantolo. Sizothi lolu daba luyaphuthuma, alulalelwe ngokushesha. Uma ecabanga ukuthi uzosibambezela, uqambe eshilo. Sizofaka isicelo sokuthi udaba lulalelwe ngokushesha. Uzobizwa ukuba azoziphendulela." Ukuze uRamaphosa akhishwe esikhundleni ngalolu hlelo kufanele isiphakamiso sivotelwe u-66% wamalungu ePhalamende. UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: icala lokubulala esiteshini samaphoyisa saseNanda, ithimba loKlebe kwaba yilo eliya endaweni yesigameko. “Kwavela ulwazi lokuthi oyedwa wabasolwa uyiswe emtholampilo wendawo, amaphoyisa ase enikela khona, nokuyilapho afike amfaka ngaphansi kweso lamaphoyisa, kwavela ukuthi unguMnuz Ntuthuko Nzama (27),” kusho uMhlongo. Uveze ukuthi wabe esevela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseNtuzuma emva kwezinsuku ezimbalwa, nokuyilapho asaqhubeka nokuvela khona njengoba esagqunywe esitokisini. Uthe uphenyo lwamaphoyisa luhambe lahamba laveza ukuthi uNzama wayiswa emtholampilo uKhatheni, okuthiwa wafike wazibiza ngoSipho, nokwaholela ekutheni angasheshe aboshwe njengoba zigcine zimkhalela ngoLwesithathu. Uveze ukuthi ngesikhathi kulindeleke ukuthi uKhatheni afake isicelo sebheyili ngoLwesihlanu, uNzama yena uzovela enkantolo efanayo ngoLwesithathu njengoba kuzobe kuqhubeka ukuqulwa kwecala lakhe.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: izitha. Bayahlangana, bebehlangene muva nje eSwatini, lapho bajabulelana kwaba kuhle," kusho uMagwenya. Uthe uma behlangana kuzobe kungekhona ukuthi kuhlangana izitha. "UZuma wayengumengameli wezwe. Angahlangana noma yinini noRamaphosa ngoba unalo ilungelo lokwenza lokhu. URamaphosa uyahlangana nabanye ababengomengameli okubalwa uMnuz Thabo Mbeki. Bayahlangana emihlanganweni ye-ANC, baxoxe." Uphawule nangohambo lukaRamaphosa, lwaseZimbabwe muva nje. "URamaphosa uye eZimbabwe ngoba emenywe nguMengameli wakhona. Wayengazi ukuthi ethimbeni labantu abafica eZimbabwe, kunomlisa ofunwa abomthetho kuleli. Akamazi lo mlisa futhi useyalele abezomthetho ukuthi baqhubeke nomsebenzi wabo ngaphandle kokwesaba. Akukho okungale ayekuyele eZimbabwe," usho kanje.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: kanje. Esigamekweni sesibili esenzeke KwaNongoloza, eMdoni, kushone izelamani zakwaCibane, uSanele (37) noLungelo (30), kwathi kwaDlamini, kwashona uZamokuhle (33). Kulesi sigameko, kuthiwa umlilo ongaziwa wokhele imijondolo yabafi ngokulandelana. UMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi ohambele imindeni yomibili izolo, uthe umnyango uzoyilekelela ngalo lonke usizo eludingayo, okufaka phakathi, izinhlelo zokungcwaba. UButhelezi ubuye waveza ukuthi izolekelelwa ngama-alamu akwazi ukusheshe abike uma kukhona intuthu evumbukayo, wathi lokhu kuzosiza ukuhlenga impilo. Uphinde wayalela izisebenzi zikahulumeni ukuba zibambisane, ziqinisekise ukuthi zilungiswe izidingo umphakathi okhale ngazo wathi zenza isimo sibe nzima kakhulu uma kwehla izigameko zalolu hlobo. Phakathi kwezinto ezibalwe umphakathi kukhona amanzi. “Ubuhlungu obuzwiwe ile mindeni kukhulu kakhulu, sizoqinisekisa ukuthi asigcini nje ngokuzwelana nayo kodwa sizokwenza okuthile,” usho kanje.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ondingasithebeni minyaka yonke. "Abanye bayazithola kodwa kunezinkinga zokuthi iNSFAS abayitholi ngesikhathi. Yingakho siyeseka eyokuthi iPhalamende lingenelele kule nkinga okucacayo ukuthi nangeminyaka ezayo, izoqhubeka ngoba abahlelelwa abaphase u-matric." UMnuz Sanele Zondo we-IFP, uthe abahambisani neyekhomishini hhayi ngoba zingekho izinselelo kodwa bafuna kwandiswe izikhungo zemfundo. "Akufuqwe uhlelo lokufunda ngobuchwepheshe kusalungiswa inkinga yokushoda kwezindawo zokufundela kanjalo nezindawo zokuhlala ezikhungweni zemfundo. Mkhulu umthamo ophuma ku-matric minyaka yonke, uya ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme. Ziyashoda izikhala okwenza abasuke befuna izikhala bagcine sebejikiswa bengazitholile." UMnuz Songezo Zibi weRise Mzansi, uthe:"Le nkinga isazoqhubeka ngoba minyaka yonke siyanda isibalo sabaphasa u-matric. Yingakho kudingeka kwenziwe okuthile ukuze kunqandwe le nkinga yokuthi bagcine sebehleli emakhaya ekubeni ngabe bayafunda." UMnuz Vuyo Zungula we-ATM, uhambe emazwini kaLonzi, wathi kuyadabukisa ukuthi minyaka yonke kuba nabalala ngaphandle ezikhungweni befuna izikhala zokufunda kanjalo nendawo yokuhlala. "Uhulumeni uhluleke ukuhlelela kahle abasuke bephase u-matric ukuthi bazoyaphi. Kumele ibhungwe eyokuthi ilungiswa kanjani le nkinga esiphenduke insakavukela." UNksz Karabo Khakhau we-DA

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe USIHLALO weDurban City, uFarook Kadodia, ephahlwe nguNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uThami Ntuli, umengameli weKZN Sports Confederation, uThami Mchunu, umqeqeshi uPitso Dladla, uMphathiswa wezeMidlalo, uMntomuhle Khawula, nabadlali emcimbini wokuhlonipha leli qembu eSouthern Sun Hotel, eThekwini UMPHATHISWA wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko KwaZulu-Natal, uMntomuhle Khawula, unxuse ukwesekana emaqenjini esifundazwe adlala kwiPremier Soccer League (PSL) ukuze impumelelo yeDurban City yokuzuza isicoco seNedbank Cup ibe yisikhuthazi nakwamanye akulesi sifundazwe. UKhawula ukusho lokhu ekhuluma nabezindaba emcimbini wokubungaza ukunqoba kweCity iNedbank Cup obuseSouthern Sun Hotel, eThekwini, ngeSonto. Lo mcimbi bewuthanyelwe yizikhulu zeCity, okubalwa kuzo usihlalo, uFarook Kadodia, abadlali nethimba labaqeqeshi, abaxhasi beCity, aboMnyango wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, uNdunankulu wesifundazwe, uThami Ntuli, izikhulu zeSafa KwaZulu-Natal nesifunda iTheku neKwaZulu-Natal Sports Confederation. “Eminyakeni ewu-16 isifundazwe sakithi KwaZulu-Natal sagcina ukunqoba indebe, abafana bamaCitizens bakwenzile lokho, basiqeda isomiso sezindebe. Ngakho sibonga kakhulu kumqeqeshi, uPitso Dladla, usihlalo uKadodia (Farook), ithimba labaqeqeshi, nawo wonke umuntu oyingxenye yaleli qembu ofake isandla empumelelweni yalo. Okuqaphelekayo wukuthi yisizini yokuqala le

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umholi we-EFF uJulius Malema Image: Abongile Ginya KUHLWE emini kumholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ngesikhathi egwetshwa iminyaka emihlanu ebhadla ejele. UMalema ulahlwe icala lokuqhumisa isibhamu. Isinqumo sikhishwe iNkantolo yeMantshi e-East London. IMantshi Twanet Oliver iphinde yagweba uMalema iminyaka emibili ebhadla ejele ngecala lokuphula imithetho elawula ukuphathwa kwezibhamu. Lezigwebo uzozidonsa ngesikhathi esisodwa. UMalema uphinde wahlawuliswa o-R20 000 noma isigwebo sezinyanga eziyisithupha ebhadla ejele kwamanye amacala amathathu amlahlile. Inkantolo inqume ukuthi uMalema aphucwe igunya lokuphatha isibhamu. UMalema ufake isicelo sokuphonsela inselelo isinqumo senkantolo. UMalema waqhumisa isibhamu ngesikhathi kunomcimbi wokubungaza iminyaka eyishumi kwasungulwa i-EFF.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UYAQHUBEKA umsebenzi wokuhlolwa komonakalo odalwe yizikhukhula eThekwini naseMgungundlovu. Lokhu kuvezwe yilabo masipala izolo, kulandela izikhukhula ezihlasele ngeSonto ebusuku. Ngokwesitatimende esikhishwe wuMasipala waseMsunduzi, kwaziswe abantu ukuthi umsebenzi wokukhucululwa kwezindawo ezikhahlamezekile uyaqhubeka. UMONAKALO odalwe yizikhukhula Image: ETHEKWINI MUNICIPALITY “Ukuhlolwa komonakalo emawadini ehlukene kumasipala nakho kuyaqhubeka,” kusho isitatimende. Siqhube sathi isimo sezulu esibi, ebesihambisana nemvula, umoya onamandla, ukuduma kwezulu kanjalo nesichotho, siholele ekutheni konakale izinto ezehlukene. Kuzona kubalwe ingqalasizinda, ukuwa kwezihlahla emgwaqweni kanjalo nokuthikamezeka kukagesi ezindaweni ezehlukene. UMONAKALO odalwe yizikhukhula Image: ETHEKWINI MUNICIPALITY “Amathimba kamasipala atshaliwe ezindaweni ezehlukene ukubheka ukuthi ungakanani umonakalo odalekile ukuze umasipala ungenelele ngendlela efanele,” kusho isitatimende. Sithe okwamanje umasipala ubusagxile ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi izindawo ezehlukene ziyakhucululwa, imigwaqo evalekile iyavulwa, bese kubuyiselwa nogesi lapho uhambe khona. UMasipala weTheku uthe izikhukhula zidale omkhulu umonakalo njengoba eminye imigwaqo ivalwe amanzi, kwacekeleka phansi izimoto, kunezihlahla ebezivale imigwaqo. Siveze uthi izindawo ezikhahlamezeke kakhulu kube yiMorningside kanjalo neChatsworth, okubikwe kuzo izigameko ezingu-22. Sithe entshonalanga yeTheku, okukhona

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Leli qembu laseLimpopo liwaphonsele inselelo amaSandawana ngesizini edlule njengoba liwaguqise ngo 1-0 emzuliswaneni wokuqala wangesizini edlule. Ngakho lokhu kwenza le midlalo emibili elizoyidlala namaSandawana ibhekwe kakhulu ukuthi leli qembu lingakwazi yini ukuphinda liphazamise umgqigqo waleli qembu lasePitoli elisazihambela lodwa ngokudla izicoco zePremiership amasizini elandelana kusukela ngesizini ka-2017/2018. Oyisitobha seSundowns, uKhuliso Mudau, ubona kusemqoka kakhulu kubona ukuvuka bazithathe ngowePolokwane. “Lesi yisikhathi sokuthi sibhekane nomdlalo ngamunye, singazifakeli ingcindezi ngokunye okwenzekayo. "Umdlalo esizowudlala nePolokwane City kuzoba ngumdlalo onzima, ikakhulukazi njengoba sizodlala nayo imidlalo emibili ilandelana ngesikhathi esifushane. "Kodwa kusemqoka ukuthi sinqobe kwiPolokwane, sibuyise ithemba silethe nenjabulo kubalandeli bethu ngemuva kokulahla amaphuzu sidlala ngokulingana imidlalo emibili, okuyinto esingajwayele ukuyenza," usho kanje uMudau.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: bangabi nokudideka. Abangathandi ukuya kowezindondo sithe asibenzele i-festival ukuze bajabule nathi. Sibophele abaculi abasezingeni eliphezulu abazobagcina bejabule umcimbi wonke," kuchaza uVictor. Uthe bonke abazohambela le micimbi bazobhema bakholwe njengoba kuzobe kubungazwa umculo wazo zonke izinhlobo. "Kulezi zinsuku abantu ngeke uze ubathinte uma kuza emculweni wePiano, Maskandi, Hip hop neGqom. Sibophele abaculi abahlukene ukuze sijabule nabantu. Abazohambela i-festival bazojabulela ukubona abaculi okukhona kubo uYoung Stunna, Babalwa M, DJ Tira, Lamiez Holworthy, Lerato Kganyago, Khuzani, Big Nuz, Dlala Thukzin nabanye," kusho yena. Uthe uhlelo lomcimbi luzobe luphethwe uSomizi, Tbo Touch noSizwe Dhlomo. I-festival uthe izoqala ngo-2 ntambama kuze kube phakathi kwamabili. Amathikithi alo mcimbi uthe ayatholakala eWebtickets, ePick n Pay naseBoxer ngoR300 noR750 iVIP. Kwenzeka lokhu nje abaculi bamatasa bakhuthaza abalandeli babo ukuthi babavotele eminxeni ehlukene abaqokwe kuyo ukuze bamuke nezindondo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: iNdabase Printing, eyathenga i-stationery ngesikweletu ukuze abafundi bakwazi ukuthola lezi zinsiza. Abafundi bayalelwa ukuthi basebenzise izincwadi ezindala njengoba umnyango wathi ngeke ube nemali yokuzithenga. Nakulo nyaka kubanjwe umoya ngokuthi ngabe umnyango uzokwazi ukuthenga izincwadi ngenxa yemali. Izikhulu zoMnyango zihlale zikuveza ukuthi zibhekene nengwadla yemali emnyangweni. Kwahlula ngisho sekungenelela uNdunankulu wesifundazwe uMnuz Thami Ntuli, noNgqongqoshe kazwelonke womnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, kule nkinga kodwa kwanhlanga zimuka nomoya.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: "Thuli P" Phongolo, eqhamuka esengumapakisha ngo-2023 ekubeni ayeyisilenda eminyakeni eyedlule. Nakuye kwasolwa lolu hlelo lweBBL. Umlingisi wodumo kwiMuvhango, uTebogo Thobejane, waphenduka ihlaya ngesikhathi eveza izithombe zakhe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana engcebeleka eMelika ngo-Agasti nyakenye. Kwaqashelwa ukuthi ama-curve akhe akhenikhiwe kodwa kwahlukana imibono. Yize abanye babemshayela ihlombe ngalokhu kubukeka kodwa iningi lamgxeka. UTebogo ubevele enezinqulu ezinkulu. Intokazi eyake yakhonjwa kuDkt Malusi Gigaba, uCindy Makhathini, yaveza ukuthi yonga uR100 000 ukuze yenze i-BBL. No-DJ wakuleli u-Eva Modika wahlukana no-R65 000 enza iBBL ne-liposuction eThe Clinique Instabul eTurkey ngo-2022. Kulolu hlelo olusemfashinini kusuke kuhlinzwa umzimba ngenhloso yokuwudiya kabusha ngasezinqeni, zithi ukukhukhumala saludiyo. Odokotela abalwenzayo bathi kusetshenziswa amafutha athathwe kwenye ingxenye yomzimba. Lawo mafutha abe esefakwa kulezo zindawo ofuna zithi ukubuya ukuze zithi xaxa futhi zibe yindilinga eqoqekile. Yenzani i-liposuction? Uhlelo olwenziwa ngokuthi kususwe amafutha ndawana thize. Uma kwenziwa lolu hlelo, kufakwa umjovo omunca amafutha asuke enenkani ngesikhathi uzilolonga noma udla ngendlela ehlelekile. Kusuke kungahlosiwe ukunciphisa

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UBUYILE Mdladla obonga umkakhe ngokumfaka enkolweni yobuKrestu KUDUME isiqubulo esithi "wadla Jesu, washweba Sathane" ngesikhathi umlingisi uBuyile Mdladla, onguGabriel Gigaba emdlalweni i-Genesis, edalule ukuthi usengumntwana kaNkulunkulu ozelwe kabusha. UBuyile ukhulume kanje ngesikhathi ekhishelwa eshashalazini kwi-YouTube Channel i-Engineer Your Life with Lungelo K. Uthe wethulwa enkolweni yobuKrestu ngumkakhe aseshadelwe yena iminyaka ewu-15. "Ngishadelwe unkosikazi oyisimangaliso okunguye owangisondeza okholweni. Wangenza ngakuqonda ukubaluleka kokuba yisisebenzi sikaNkulunkulu nobumqoka bokukhonza," usho kanje echaza ngohambo lwakhe. Uthe umkakhe wafika ngesikhathi lapho izinto zimbhedela empilweni, washintsha impilo yakhe. "Ngasengiwumgodi onganukwa nja. Abantu sebezitshela ukuthi ngiwe unomphela, ngeke ngisavuka. Uma ngikhuluma ngabantu, ngikhuluma nangomndeni wami owawusungilahlile. Ngikhuluma ngamalungu omndeni ayengazi ngaphambi kokuhlangana nomkami. Ayengikhuluma kabi." UBuyile uthe uNkulunkulu sekukaningi emtakula ezimweni ezinzima. "Ngake ngalingwa wuSathane emshadweni, ngazithola sengidansa naye uSathane, sengidavuza kwenye indawo kodwa uNkulunkulu wanginikeza ithuba lesibili," kusho uBuyile othe uthando lukaNkulunkulu lwehlela kumkakhe owamxolela emaphutheni akhe. Eqhuba uBuyile uthe ukwamukela uJesu njengoMsindisi kwamsiza nasekukhuzeni ibuya emkhakheni

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: IZITOBHA zeKaizer Chiefs ezihlale zingekho ngenxa yamakhadi noma ukulimala u-Inacio Miguel no-Aden McCarthy NAKUBA imiphumela yakamuva yeKaizer Chiefs kwiBetway Premiership ikhombisa izimpawu zokuvuka ngesikhathi esikahle sesizini kuleli qembu laseNaturena kodwa omunye wamabamba abaqeqeshi, uKhalil Ben Youssef, ubalisa ngezinkinga ezibaphoqa ukushintsha isikimu cishe kuyona yonke imidlalo. Amakhosi anqobe okwesithathu kulandelana kwiligi ngoMsombuluko kwi-Orbit College ngamagoli kaWandile Duba, Mduduzi Shabalala noSiphesihle Ndlovu. Nakuba umphumela we-Orbit ubuyisele iChiefs endaweni yesithathu kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-39 emidlalweni engu-21, okuyisondeza nalapho ifisa ukuqeda khona, kodwa uBen Youssef uqome ukubalisa ngezitobha kunokuthakasela iwini. Umdlalo we-Orbit uqalwe nguGiven Msimango obese kunesikhathi engadlali ngenxa yokulimala, ezovala isikhala sika-Inacio Miguel obengekho ngenxa yesigwebo samakhadi. UNkanyiso Shinga, owafika ekuqaleni kwesizini esuka eqenjini lasePortugal, usabonakale emdlalweni owodwa nawo angawuqedanga ngenxa yokulimala. Abadlali abafana noReeve Frosler, Zitha Kwinika noDillan Solomons badlala kwembalwa baphinde bangabonakali ngenxa yakho belu ukuthinteka. UMiguel no-Aden McCarthy, abajwayele ukudlala ndawonye, bakwabahamba phambili kwiChiefs ngokuwola amakhadi aphuzi kule sizini. Nakuba iChiefs

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMNDENI wakwaMhlongo ozophinde unekele abakuleli impilo yawo njengoba uhlelo oluthi KwaNjomane lukhuza ibuya kuMzansi Wethu USIMANGELE Mhlongo, oqale ukuduma ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngomakaChicken, useveze ukuthi ukuvulela abantu babone izinkinga zabo njengomndeni kwenze baveza isithombe sempilo ephilwa eminye imindeni. Ukusho lokhu njengoba isizini yohlelo oluthi KwaNjomane ikhuza ibuya kuMzansi Wethu ngo-7 ebusuku. USimangele uveze ukuthi ngesikhathi bevela okokuqala njengomndeni impilo yabo yashintsha kakhulu. "Sakhula njengomndeni impilo yethu yashintsha, izinto sathanda ukuzibheka ngenye indlela. Izinselelo esasibhekene nazo zazinzima kakhulu kodwa kwathi uma zivela kwithelevishini izinto zaguquka. Mina njengomuntu owayehamba phambili ezintweni zomndeni ngabhekana nezingqinamba ezihlukene nxazonke, ngenxa yokuthi kwakumele ngithathe izinqumo njengosisi, umama kanye nomholi emndenini nokuyinto engabanga lula," kusho uSimangele. Kule sizini entsha uthe abantu kuzobathusa ukubona ukuthi naye uba nezinkinga ezinkulu abhekana nazo othandweni, nokuyinto eyehlela wonke umuntu. "Kuzocaca ukuthi nakimi izinto azihlali zihamba kahle othandweni, kuya le nale. Kodwa kukho konke ivangeli engihlala ngilikhuthaza ukuthi sihloniphane. Kimina kube nzima ukuthi

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: into yayo ngoba ushintsha kamnandi ngesikhathi esifanele. Uma ngifuna ukuzibambela koodwa bengishintsha ngama-pedal shifters noma kulona igiya. Ngiyazi igenge eningi ithanda ukuzibambela ekushintsheni amagiya ezimotweni zalolu hlobo kodwa angikhali ngalo gearbox. Isatholakala nenoyi-6 speed automatic. Indlela eshesha ngayo ukungena ejubaneni uyezwa ukuthi abasengi ezimithiyo kwaToyota ngalesi sikhathi abathi kuyithatha sona ukuthi ibambe u-100km/h. Uma unganakile ngempela “Ama-RTI Amahle” angahlale ekukhomba eceleni usuhamba ngesivinini esingagunyaziwe ngoba ijubane ilenyusa kalula. Angikhathelele ukuthi uhamba ngo-Eco, Normal noma u-Sport kuyefana. Emakhoneni iya lapho uyikhomba khona ngesiteringi esinesisinjwana futhi kusiza ukuthi idonsa ngawo womane amasondo kanjalo nama-Torsen® limited-slip differential ngaphambili nangemuva. Ubumnandi bayo buphoxwa wubuncane bethangi likaphethroli elingu-50 litres elingakwenza ungapheli egaraji. Ngihambe 363km yaveza ukuthi isengahamba omunye u-56km kade igcwele mfi. Ngaleso sikhathi indlela ebidla ngayo ibingeyimbi njengoba ibingu-9.8l/100km. U-gearbox ozishintshayo ubuwenza kube lula ukuyishayela kunesiminyaminya futhi nendawo yokuphumuza unyawo lwesokunxele inkulu. Njengoba kuyimoto yejubane nje, ithanda ukuzwela kakhulu emabhampini nokwengezelwa ngamasondo amancane anamarimu

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMFUZISELO kaNelson Mandela Image: EThekwini Municipality UMPHATHISWA woMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu KwaZulu-Natal, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi, uhlabe eyokungapheleli komlando ngemifuziselo emibili yabaholi be-ANC esanda kwembulwa eThekwini. UButhelezi usho lokhu ngesikhathi ethula inkulumo yakhe yomcimbi wokuklonyeliswa komasipala abenze kahle KwaZulu-Natal, eDurban International Convention Centre (ICC) ngoLwesihlanu. UButhelezi uthe kayiphelele le mifuziselo uma ungekho owoMntwana uMangosuthu Buthelezi ongasekho, owayengumsunguli we-IFP, aphinde abe nguNdunankulu wesizwe samaZulu. UMFUZISELO ka-OR Tambo Ube esenza isiphakamiso sokuthi iTheku, elakhe le mifuziselo esuse umsindo, lakhe owesithathu woMntwana. Kule mifuziselo kukhona oka-Oliver Reginald Tambo oseNorth Beach, bese kuba okaNelson Mandela osenkundleni yemidlalo iMoses Mabhida. Yomibili yembulwe nguMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa ngasekuqaleni kwale nyanga. UButhelezi uthe umlando wenkululeko yaseNingizimu Afrika ophelele noneqiniso kufanele umhloniphe njengamanye amaqhawe omzabalazo uMntwana waKwaPhindangene ngeqhaza naye alibamba emzabalazweni. “UMntwana waKwaPhindangenewaba yibhuloho phakathi komshoshaphansi we-ANC ka-Tambo eyayisekudingisweni kanjalo nenkululeko entsha kaMandela. UMntwana wenza isiqiniseko sokuthi umzabalazo uyaqhubeka eNingizimu Afrika ngesikhathi uhulumeni wobandlululo ubavale imilomo oTambo noMandela, waba

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMengameli, uCyril Ramaphosa Image: Facebook/ MyANC UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa ukhuthaze ukuhlanzwa kwamadolobha kanye nokuphathwa kahle kwemikhandlu. URamaphosa uthe abantu bakuleli bafanelwe ukuhlala emadolobheni ahlanzekile. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ehola amalungu ekomiti elibhekelele ukusebenza kwansuku zonke kwi-ANC abehambele esifundazweni i-Eastern Cape. Amalungu ekomiti abeyohlola ukuhanjiswa kwezidingo kubantu. URamaphosa uthe kufanele omasipala baqikelele ukuthi amadolobha ahlale ehlanzekile ngaso sonke isikhathi. "Sifuna ukuthi abantu bahlale emadolobheni ahlanzekile. Sifuna ukuthi abantu bahlale emadolobheni angagcwele udoti. Abantu balapha eNingizimu Afrika bangamanono, ngakho bafanelwe ukuhlala ezindaweni ezihlanzekile." URamaphosa uphonsele inselelo abaholi bomasipala ukuba baqinisekise ukuthi baphatha ngobuqotho. "Abantu bafanelwe ukuhlala komasipala abaphethwe ngendlela. Lapha ngibala abaholi bezepolitiki kanye nezikhulu zomkhandlu." Uhambo lwabaholi be-ANC luqale enkonzweni iBantu Church of Christ. Abaholi be-ANC bahambele izindawo ezahlukene ezingaphansi kukaMasipala iNelson Mandela Bay lapho behlole khona izinhlelo zokwakhiwa kwengqalasizinda kagesi, amanzi kanye nokunye. Lo masipala uke wakhungathwa izinkinga zokuhanjiswa kwezidingo. Izinkinga ezikhungethe umasipala zidalwa umbango wezikhundla njengoba kujwayele ukuba noginqigonqo wezikhundla.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: ukuthi kwenzekani,” kusho u-Ouaddou. Ukuhlohla amagoli amaningi kwePirates emdlwalweni wayo neGalaxy yikho okumgeze igilo u-Ouaddou obekhala ngokwehlulwa ngamathuba kwabadlali bakhe emidlalweni edlule. “Ngiyacabanga bekungokokuqala siqedela ngendlela iningi amathuba esiwakhile ngakho namuhla (ngeSonto) kube usuku oluhle kithina. Kubalulekile ukushaya amagoli ngoba ekugcineni angaba wusizo ekupheleni kwesizini ngasohlangothini lomehluko wamagoli," usho kanje. Nakuba u-Ouaddou ejabule ngokuzinikela kwabadlali bakhe kodwa uncome kakhulu uRelebohile Mofokeng oshaye amagoli amathathu kulo mdlalo. Lokhu bekungokokuqala kusukela akhushulelwa esikimini esikhulu ngesizini ka-2022/2023. Ngesizini edlule uwine umklomelo weBetway Premiership Young Player of The Season. “Kubalulekile kuyena kodwa futhi kubalulekile naseqenjini. Lokhu kuzokwenyusa ukuzethemba kuyena, abone ukuthi usengakwazi ukudlala ezingeni eliphezulu. La magoli amathathu awashayile kufanele amkhombise ukuthi akukapheli, kusazofanele aqhubeke asebenze mhlawumbe aphinde ashaye amanye futhi amathathu ngokuzayo," kusho u-Ouaddou. EZimnyama zizobuyela ensimini ngemua kwekhefu leFifa neleNedbank Cup ngomdlalo wasekhaya neLamontville Golden Arrows ngo-Ephreli 7 e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: yeDiski. Leli qembu, eliphekwa ngu-Evangelos Vellios, linyukele endaweni yesithathu kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-34 ngemuva kokwehlula iMagesi ngo 4-1 e-Idas Valley, eStellenbosch, ngoMgqibelo. Akubuzwa ukuthi ukwenyuka kweStellies, esele ngamaphuzu amabili kwiSundowns, kuzoyinika ithemba lokuthi isengafika esicongweni uma kuqhuzuka iPirates ejwayele ukwehluleka ekugcineni. Womabili amaqembu alandela iPirates anaso isipiliyoni sokuwina iligi kodwa eZimnyama zishaya ngomqeqeshi, uRoscoe Krieling, owayiphakamisa indebe kwiSuperSport United eyiphini likaThabo Septhemba. Okudingwa yiPirates wukuqhubeka nokuqoqa amaphuzu ukuze ingaphindwa okujwayelekile, okuwukulahla iligi emidlalweni yokugcina yesizini. Imiphumela yemidlalo yeDStv Diski Challenge: Kaizer Chiefs 0-0 TS Galaxy; Orlando Pirates 2-1 Sekhukhune United; Stellenbosch FC 4-1 Magesi; Richards Bay FC 3-4 Golden Arrows; Chippa United 0-2 Durban City; Siwelele FC 1-2 Mamelodi Sundowns; Marumo Gallants 0-1 AmaZulu; Polokwane City 0-0 Orbit College.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Marawa, ongumphathi weKZN Academy, uthe akangabazi ukuthi uShinga uzoqhakaza eNaturena. "Ngiyamjabulela kakhulu. Angimangali ukuthi ubuyile futhi angikuboni lokhu njengokubuyela emuva. Izinga lePSL liphezulu futhi inamathuba amaningi. Abadlali bafuna ukudlalela iqembu lesizwe futhi babona benethuba elingcono lokuzuza lokho uma bedlala ekhaya. Ngibona kuyisinqumo esihle," kusho uMarawa. Eminyakeni edlule, baningi abadlali abasayine kwiChiefs kubhekwe lukhulu kubona kodwa bagcine behlulekile wukufinyelela ezingeni ebelibhekiwe. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abanye bayahluleka ukumelana nengcindezi yokuthi kumele bawine cishe yonke imidlalo okuyinto efunwa ngabalandeli. "Ngikhulumile naye ngoMsombuluko, ngamtshela ukuthi akagxilise umqondo wakhe emsebenzini ophambi kwakhe nokufanele akwenzele iqembu. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kumele akwazi ukumelana nokuthi abalandeli bazomthanda uma enza kahle kodwa futhi bazomjikela uma engadlali kahle. Kufanele aqine ngokomqondo, akulungele lokho. Abadlali abaningi bayalazi ibhola kodwa abaqinile ngokomqondo. Emuva kwemidlalo embalwa kuyaphela ngabo. Ngakho kumele afunde ukwamukela noma yini," kusho uMarawa. "Okunye kumele akhohlwe yindaba yobukhazikhazi, abheke ekhaya kuqala. Kufanele enze izinto ngokohlelo lwakhe, angaphiki nokuthi abadlali abathize benzani. Makangathathwa

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Kuthatha izinyanga eziyisithupha ukuqeqesha onompempe ngolwazi lwe-VAR,” kusho lo nompempe ongeke adalulwe. . Lo nompempe uqhube wathi okunye okusazodala ubunzima ngokwethulwa kwe-VAR wukuthi amaqembu adlala kwiPremiership kawanazo izinkundla zawo njengoba ziphethwe ngomasipala. “Izinkundla zisetshenziselwa imicimbi ehlukene, kwesinye isikhathi amadili omculo nemicimbi yamaqembu ezepolitiki neminye. Ngakho amakhamera e-VAR angazithola esengcupheni yokucekeleka phansi, ekubeni kubiza ukufakwa kwawo ezinkundleni. Ngakho akukezukuba yinto elula ukuqala ngokushesha ukusebenza kohlelo lwe-VAR eNingizimu Afrika njengoba kucatshangwa.” U-Abdul Ebrahim oyinhloko yonompempe kwiSafa, usanda kucashunwa eyiqinisekisa eyokuqala kwe-VAR ekuqaleni kwesizini ka-2026/2027. Konompempe abaqeqeshelwe i-VAR, kubalwa u-Abongile Tom, Zakhele Siwela, Akhona Makalima, Jelly Chavani, Eugene Mdluli noLuxolo Badi.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: oluphambili njengoMabasa lungaze luhambe eqenjini ngoba ingekho indlela yokulusebenzisa,” kusho uHunt sakugudla u-Ouaddou. “Ngiyavuma akalona uhlobo oluxina izitobha ngoba nathi kasimsebenzisi kanjalo kepha ukumdedela, bengingeke ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi uma umnika ibhola esendaweni ekahle, izobhakuza nakanjani inethi. “Unekhono elivumela zonke izindlela zokudlala, yinqobo nje uma uzomnika ibhola ukuthi enze lokhu adalelwa khona (ukushaya amagoli)." Le nkulumo kaHunt ihamba kweyezinkumbi zabalandeli beBucs ababekhala ngesikhathi ebolekiswa. UMabasa ushaye amagoli angu-50 kwiPirates. Lokhu kumenza asale ngayisishiyagalombili kuBenedict "Tso" Vilakazi ophethe irekhodi leZimnyama ngawu-58. Ukuhamba kwakhe kukhalise nabalandeli bePirates kwazise izama ukugudluza iMamelodi Sundowns esicongweni sebhola laseNingizimu Afrika. NgoJuni, inkontileka kaMabasa nePirates iyaphela okungenzeka kube ngenye yezizathu ezenza uHunt akhulume ngale ndlela kwazise leli qembu laseKapa, lisanda kuphumela obala ngokuthi lingathanda ukumgcina kulona.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: KUMINZE isangoma ebesiyogeza abantu emfuleni waseNanda, enyakatho yeTheku KUMINZE isangoma, okuthiwa besiyohlambulula abantu edamini laseNanda, endaweni yaseSikebheni, eMzinyathi, ngoMsombuluko. Ngokusho komthombo, umufi ongowesifazane, ubehamba nabanye abantu abambalwa beyogezwa. “Uminze engakabagezi. Bekusewuye kuphela obesangene emanzini,” kusho umthombo. Uveze ukuthi isigameko senzeke kusakhanya, nokho umufi abakwazanga ukumhlenga ebebekhona. “Asazi ukuthi bebesukaphi, kodwa akubona abendawo,” kusho umthombo. Ikhansela lendawo, uMnuz Falakhe Gcabashe, lithintwa yiSolezwe, lithe lisanda kuzwa ngodaba, lathi alikakabi nolwazi olugcwele. “Engikutholile wukuthi umufi nalabo abehamba nabo ababona abantu bendawo. Asikabi nalo ulwazi lokuthi bebesuka kuphi nendawo. Okusho ukuthi bebezokwenza lokho ebebezokwenza bese behamba,” kusho uGcabashe. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uSergeant Thenjiswa Ngcobo, uthe amaphoyisa aseNanda avule idokodo lokufa komuntu ukuze liphenywe kulandela ukuminza komuntu edamini laseNanda ngoMsombuluko. “Kusolwa ukuthi owesifazane ubegeza abantu edamini eliseSikebheni ngesikhathi eminza,” kusho uSgt Ngcobo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: bemele amaqembu." Uthe izikhulu zeKhomishini zizohlangana nabaholi be-EFF ngoLwesine. "Yilapho laba baholi silindele ukuthi baveze izikhalazo zabo. Lo mhlangano ucelwe yi-EFF kanti siqhubeka lapho sigcine khona njengoba sihlangana nezinhlaka ezehlukene ngezithinta amalungiselelo okhetho," kuqhuba uNkk Bapela. Uthe bahlale beyivulile iminyango emaqenjini ezepolitiki njengoba kunanekomiti elinawo wonke amaqembu lapho kubhungwa khona ngezinto ezishisa ibunzi ngezokhetho. Uveze ukuthi abafuni abantu ukuthi balahlekelwe ukwethemba iKhomishini. Akuyena kuphela uMalema okhala ngokubanjwa inkunzi okhethweni, kodwa neqembu iMKP likhala esifanayo. Umholi weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, usanda kuphakamisa ukuthi luhlehle ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya ekhala ngokuthi ayikaxazululwa eyemiphumela yango-2024. IMKP neKhomishini baya enkantolo ngenyanga ezayo lapho kuzokakanywa lesi sikhalazo seMKP ngokhetho lwango-2024.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: kahle emoyeni wabo ukuthi le nhlangano isize yafika eminyakeni ewu-40 yaba khona kodwa kusalokhu kunzima ukuthi ifinyelele kubantu ngendlela abafisa ngayo. “Ngenkathi kuqala le nhlangano ngo-1985 inhloso enkulu kwakuwukuthi ibambe iqhaza ekufukuleni nokuthuthukisa imisebenzi yababhali bezincwadi. Kuthe ngokuqhubeka kwesikhathi silokhu siyibambile kuyona - sagcina sibona ukuthi lokho akufezeki ngendlela efanele ngenxa yokuthi besizinze eThekwini kakhulu. Lokhu bekudala ukuthi kube nokuqhelelana nababhali abaningi, kungafinyeleleki kithi,” kusho uSibiya. Ngokwenqubo entsha, Usiba luzoba nezinhlaka ezifundeni ezahlukene okukhona kuzo Ugu oluzoholwa wuyena uSibiya, iLembe elizoholwa uMcambi, eThekwini okuzohola khona uNksz Khumalo, iHarry Gwala ezoholwa wuNksz Dlamini. EMzinyathi uQwabe ozoba yiso lakhona, eMgungundlovu kube wuNdlovu, iKing Cetshwayo iholwe uMkhize, kuthi oThukela, Amajuba, iZululand noMkhanyakude akukabi nammeli. USibiya udalule ukuthi kuzo zonke lezi zifunda bahlele ukuthi benze imicimbi yokuzethula kubantu ngoMashi wonke ukuze kuzokwazeka ukuthi sekunezinhlelo ezinjena eziqalayo, nabo bakwazi ukuthi baqale ubudlelwano nababhali. “Sifuna nokuthi sisize ababhali abasafufusa ukusebenzisa igama namagalelo enhlangano Usiba ukuthola amathuba

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMNUZ Sfiso Meyiwa usole uLongwe Twala ngokuqhuba intwala ngewisa UMFOWABO kaSenzo Meyiwa ongasekho, uMnuz Sfiso Meyiwa, usole uLongwe Twala ngokuqhuba intwala ngewisa, kulandela ukuvumbuka kweheheba le ncwadi okuthiwa ulibhalele unina kamufi. Kule ncwadi - uLongwe oziqhelelanisayo necala - unxusa unina kaMeyiwa, uNkk Ntombifuthi Meyiwa, ukuthi acele ukulaleliswa inkulumo eqoshiwe, okuthiwa ummangalelwa wesibili, uBongani Ntanzi, wagonyuluka kuyo ngokubulala umufi. Kuyona, uLongwe unxusa uNkk Meyiwa ukuthi angavumi ukuthi ayilalele yedwa inkulumo kodwa akobiza abantu abathenjiwe njengoLieutenant-General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi kanjalo neJaji uMbuyiseli Madlanga. UMeyiwa ekhuluma neSolezwe izolo, uthe kuwukubenza iziphukuphuku ukwenza sengathi uyazwelana nabo ngokufa kukaSenzo. “Ekubeni yonke le nto yasuka ngaye, edinwe ukuthi intombi yakhe wayengayitholi, efika nesibhamu,” kusho uSfiso uMeyiwa. Uthe into eyayicika uLongwe ukuthi intombi yakhe yayihambe noMthoko, kuwo-two-by-two, wazitshela ukuthi kulalwe nayo. “Yasuka lapho le nto. Lo mbhedo abawukhulumayo awukho,” usho kanje. Uthe okubuhlungu ukuthi uNtanzi washaywa, washiswa ngogesi ukuze avume icala. “Ngakho akukho okuzoveza ukuthi uNtanzi umsulwa, yize

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: izolo, izosonga ngomdlalo wasekhaya ne-The Bees FC KaNyamazane Stadium, nokuyilapho ezobe isinikwa khona indebe yayo yeMotsepe Championship. Kanti ngakolunye uhlangothi, isifundazwe iLimpopo sikhungethwe yifu elimnyama njengoba womabili amaqembu amabili akulesi sifundazwe egawulwe yizembe, okuyiBaroka FC neBlack Leopards. Phezu kokunqoba kweLeopards ngo 2-1 ishaya iVenda FC izolo, eThohoyandou Stadium kodwa lokho akuyisizanga ngenxa yesibalo samaphuzu. Imiphumela yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: The Bees 1-1 Leicesterford City; Black Leopards 2-1 Venda FC; Cape Town City 1-0 Baroka; Upington City 0-2 Casric Stars; Highbury 0-4 Hungry Lions; Milford FC 2-0 Univ. of Pretoria; Gomora 0-1 Kruger United; Midlands Wanderers 1-1 Lerumo Lions

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: ngamaphuzu awu-38, izodlala ne-Orlando Pirates namuhla ngo-3 ntambama e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, bese ivala noSuthu ngoMeyi 23. Abafana Bes’thende abasendaweni yesishiyagalombili ngamaphuzu awu-37, basenethuba lokuqeda kwi-Top 8 njengoba bezodlala neChippa United namuhla ngo-3 ntambama eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha. Bazosonga isizini ngowasekhaya ne-TS Galaxy ngoMeyi 23, eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: esisanda kubhekana nayo ngoba imiphumela yayo yakamuva iyakufakazela lokhu,” kusho u-Ouaddou. “Ukuzixaka ngokwenziwa yiSundowns ekubeni sinomldlalo onzima njengoweChiefs kungafana nokuzibulala thina sibhekile. “Siyakwazi esikufunayo ekupheleni kwesizini futhi siyaqonda ukuthi ukuze sifike kukona kufanele siqale sidlule ezihibeni ezifana nokubhekana neChiefs esefomini. “Kuyasiphoqa ukuthi sizibambe ziqine kulo mdlalo ngoba iChiefs ihamba ngomgqigqo omuhle ekubeni liselisha igqubu lokuthi sisanda kuyishaya. “Okusemqoka ukukukhumbula ngaso sonke isikhathi ukuthi esingakulawula yilokhu okusezandleni zethu kuphela, bese konke okunye sikubeka kwizidalwa zikanobhutshuzwayo,” kusho u-Ouaddou. Umbango wesicoco phakathi kwePirates eqhwakele ngamaphuzu angu-58 neSundowns elele isibili ngawu-57 kodwa esele ngomdlalo, uya ngokushuba njengoba nemidlalo esele isimbalwa ukuthi kusongwe isizini. Isiyonke imidlalo yeBetway Premiership kule mpelasonto imi kanje: Durban City v Orbit College (Chatsworth Stadium, 7.30pm); Golden Arrows v Siwelele FC (King Zwelithini Stadium, 7.30pm). AmaZulu FC v Chippa United (Moses Mabhida Stadium, 3pm); Sekhukhune United v Marumo Gallants (Peter Mokaba Stadium, 5.30pm). Orlando Pirates v Kaizer Chiefs (FNB Stadium, 3pm);

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UNAMBITHA Mpumlwana osolwa ngokweba i-lipstick UMLINGISI wodumo lukaMawande kwiGenerations, uNambitha Mpumlwana, ubambe umoya ngenxa yecala lokweba abhekene nalo. UNambitha (58) usolwa ngokweba i-lipstick ebiza u-R160 esitolo sakwaDis-Chem eFerndale Mall eRandburg, eGoli, ngoMashi nyakenye. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi lo mlingisi wabanjwa ethatha ngozwane i-lipstick kodwa waphika walala ngomhlane, wazithethelela ngokuthi kukhona ukungaboni ngaso linye. Abaphathi balesi sitolo babe sebebiza amaphoyisa asesiteshini saseRandburg, afika ambopha futhi wabekwa icala lokweba kodwa wakhululwa ngebheyili ka-R1000. Leli phephandaba libuye lathola ukuthi uNambitha wavela okokuqala eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseRandburg ngoMashi 20 lapho engabuzwanga ukuthi icala uyaliphika noma uyalivuma. Ubuye wavela ngoMeyi 2 ngaphambi kokuba icala lakhe lihoxiswe okwesikhashana. Okhulumela uPhiko lezokuShushiswa koMphakathi eGauteng, uPhindi Mjonondwane, utshele Isolezwe ukuthi leli cala lisahoxisiwe okwesikhashana ukunikeza uNambitha isikhathi sokuthamela uhlelo olubizwa nge-diversion programme. Ngamafuphi lolu hlelo elokuhlumelelisa isimilo ngenhloso yokunqanda osuke ebhekene necala ukuba abe nerekhodi lobugebengu noma agwetshwe. Luvamise ukunikezwa abantu abasha nabasuke beqala ukwenza amacala. Umsolwa usebenzela umphakathi noma

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: nangokhalo. Uthe ngisho esebuzwa umastende ukuthi uphi uNksz Zulu, wamphika wathi akamazi. Kuthiwa ngesikhathi ebuzwa ukuthi kwenzeke kanjani ukuthi ingane yakhe itholwe kuye uma engamazi, wangundaza. Kuvela ukuthi zabe sezimkhalela lapho, yize umnyakazo ngecala ungakaze ucaciswe emndenini kamgilwa. “Kube yimuva nje, lapho ngithintwe khona umphenyi omusha, ongitshele ukuthi leli cala lizongena maduze enkantolo, angibeke phansi umoya,” kusho uNksz Ngcobo. Uthe kuze kube yimanje ubuthongo akabazi kwazise ngeke alikhombe ithuna lendodakazi yakhe, athe uzwa egazini ukuthi yabulawa. “Ngisola ukuthi wayibulala ingane yami, wenza ngayo imithi njengoba kuthiwa uyisangoma. Ngisho nezihlobo zakhe zamchaza njengowesifazane ongalungile,” usho kanje. Uthe akufisayo ubulungiswa, kujeziswe lona wesifazane ngesenzo sakhe, bese egonyuluka ukuthi indodakazi yakhe wayigqiba kuphi. Ubike olunye usizi, wathi izingane ezintathu kwezine zikamgilwa akanamandla okuzikhulisa, ucela usizo. “Endala (15) ihlala kubo kayise, lezi ezinye ezintathu okukhona kuzo eneminyaka emibili, eyisithupha kanjalo neyishumi, zihlala nami. Zingabazukulu bami, akukho lapho ngingaziyisa khona kodwa ngiyasizwa. Ngelinye ilanga sike

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UNOZINTI weKaizer Chiefs, uBruce Bvuma, onengcindezi yokulenza elakhe ijezi kuleli qembu laseNaturena Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX PHEZU kokuba unozinti weKaizer Chiefs, uBruce Bvuma, eseyoqeda iminyaka eyishumi edlalela leli qembu kodwa usabhekene nomqansa wokulenza elakhe ijezi eNaturena. UBvuma (30) waqala ukudlalela Amakhosi ngo-Ephreli 2017, eneminyaka engu-21 ebanga ijezi nonozinti abasezingeni eliphezulu okubalwa kubona u-Itumeleng Khune olenze elakhe ijezi iminyaka eminingi eNaturena. Nokho kuze kube manje usadlale imidlalo engu-90 kuyona yonke imiqhudelwano. Ngesikhathi iChiefs imemezela ukuthi uKhune ngeke esadlala, bekubhekwe ukuthi uBvuma oyena ozoqhubeka lapho agcine khona. Nokho ugcine esedliselwa ogageni ngabanye onozinti okunguBrandon Petersen noFiacre Ntwari owathengwa kwiTS Galaxy. Kwamangala abaningi ngesikhathi uBvuma esala ngaphandle esikimini seChiefs esadlala umdlalo wamanqamu weNedbank Cup ne-Orlando Pirates eThekwini nyakenye, ekubeni kukade kunguyena owayevimba njalo. Sekungumlando ukuthi indawo yakhe yathathwa nguPetersen, wasiza Amakhosi aqukula indebe. Njengoba uPetersen engadlali ngenxa yokugula ekuholele ekutheni ahlinzwe, uBvuma unikwe ithuba lokuzibonakalisa. Ukubuya kwakhe kuqondane nomdlalo wabakhaya neZimnyama, wangenelwa ngamagoli amathathu ezakhe

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ukuthi lo thisha ugibele umufi ngamanqindi, kulandela ukuthi amdlalise ngendlela angayithandi. “Sizwa kuthiwa lo thisha waqukula umshini wokugaya amaphepha (printer), umshana wamdlalisa ngelithi ‘uyisigora Sir’. Kuthiwa wavele wabeka phansi umshini, wamngena ngezibhakela,” usho kanje. Uthe emva kwaleso sigameko, ekhaya labo kwafika uthishanhloko, ethi ezokhuluma ngodaba. Uveze ukuthi lwaphetha ngokuthi unina kamufi athi umufi akabuyele esikoleni, afike axolise kuthisha, nokuyinto umfundi okuthiwa wayenza. Nokho kuvela ukuthi ngoLwesihlanu olwandulela uLwesine, umfundi agcine ezibulala ngalo, uthisha wambizela ehhovisi, bangqumuza bobabili. “Asazi ukuthi yini le ayisho kuye njengoba sesithola ukuthi ngoMsombuluko nangoLwesibili wahlala emathoyilethi, wangalubhada ekilasini. NgoLwesithathu walova kanjalo nangoLwesine agcine ezibulala ngalo,” kusho uSantosi. Uthe akukho ncwadi noma myalezo abawubhalelwe umufi ngaphambi kokuba azibulale kodwa umyalezo abawuthole kwiselula, abewuthumelela umngani wakhe ethi: “Bafikile othisha ekhaya kwakhuluywa kodwa mina hhayi ngeke”. Uthe lokhu kubadwebele isithombe esigcwele sokuthi into eholele ekutheni umshana wakhe azibulale, yile mpi ebikhona phakathi kwakhe nothisha. “Sisola ukuthi kukhulu akukhuluma enganeni.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe ISIPHEKEPHEKE seRichards Bay FC, uLindokuhle Zikhali, ongomunye wabadlali abamqoka leli qembu elizothembela kubo ukuthwalisa kanzima iMamelodi Sundowns koweBetway Premiership eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay, kusasa ntambama PHEZU kokuba amehlo amaningi abathandi bebhola laseMzansi ezobe ethe njo emdlalweni wabakhaya baseSoweto phakathi kwe-Orlando Pirates neKaizer Chiefs, kodwa ngemuva kwalo mdlalo wezinkunzi zaseSoweto amehlo azophinde abheke koweRichards Bay FC neMamelodi Sundowns. Ngemuva komdlalo wePirates neChiefs weBetway Premiership e-FNB Stadium, kusasa ngo-3 ntambama, iRichards Bay izogadulisana neSundowns eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay, khona kusasa ngo-5.30 ntambama. Lo mdlalo umqoka kuwona womabili la maqembu ngezizathu ezihlukene. ISundowns esembangweni wesicoco seligi yePremiership ilahle ithuba lokubuyela esicongweni se-log idlala ngokulingana ngo 1-1 neStellenbosch FC ngoLwesithathu. Ngakho amaSandawana anenselelo enkulu yokushintsha umshovo emdlalweni wakusasa neRichards Bay ukugwema ukulahla amanye amaphuzu angaholela ekudliselweni kwawo ogageni yiPirates uma kwenzeka inqoba kwiChiefs kowabakhaya. AmaSandawana asendaweni yesibili kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu awu-57 ngemuva kwePirates esaqhwakele ngawu-58, asenethuba lokugudluza eZimnyama esicongweni uma engawunqoba

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: sebejahwa omashonisa futhi abasakwazi nokuthola imali emabhange. Uthe phambilini iXquel, iyona eyayikhokhelwa yiNSFAS, ukuze ikhokhele omastende abazimele eKZN kodwa yaphucwa la mandla. "Manje sekudingeka umastende axhumane ngqo neNSFAS. Asikwazi ukuxhumana neNSFAS ngoba akukho mnyango obhekele imali esingakwazi ukuxhumana nawo uma singakhokhelwe. Sidukuza ebumnyameni ekubeni yonke into efunwa yiNSFAS sayenza singomastende." Empendulweni ebhekiswe kwiSolezwe ekhishwe ngaphansi kwebamba lesikhulu esiphezulu seNSFAS uMnuz Waseem Carrim, ithe abalesi sikhwama yibona asebengamele uhlelo lokukhokhelwa komastende. Ithe ukuze kungabambezeleki ukukhokhelwa komastende, imininingwane yabo yasemabhange kumele iqinisekiswe (verified) ukuze uhlelo lokukhokhelwa lungabakhahleli. "Inombolo kamazisi noma yokubhaliswa kwebhizinisi, kumele ihambisane ne-akhawunti yasebhange. Isibongo noma igama lenkampani kumele kuhambisane nomnikazi we-akhawunti," kusho iNSFAS. INSFAS ithe isixoxile nezinhlangano ezimele omastende, ngezinselelo ezithinta ukukhahlelwa komastende uma sekumele bakhokhelwe nebhange iFNB, ukuze kucetshiswe omastende ngokumele bakwenze.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMENGAMELI weSkebhe, uMnuz Sibangani Manyathi, wethule inkampani yonogada iSkebhe National Protection Services eZero Lounge eNquthu SELIZOGAYA ngomunye umhlathi enhlanganweni iSkebhe njengoba sekunophiko lonogada. Lokhu kuvele emcimbini wokwethulwa kwenkampani yonogada, Iskebhe National Protection Services, eZero Lounge eNquthu, ngoLwesihlanu. ISkebhe inhlangano eyayisungulelwe ukuqapha ukwebiwa kwezinkomo ezindaweni zaKwaZulu-Natal, njengoba seyilwa nayo yonke inhlobo yobugebengu nakwezinye izifundazwe zakuleli. Ekhuluma kulo mcimbi uMengameli weSkebhe, uMnuz Sibangani Manyathi, uthe inhlosongqangi ngokuqhamuka nale nkampani akukhona ukukhanda imali kodwa ukuqinisa izindlela zokulwa nobugebengu. Uthe abahlosile ukuzophazamisa ukusebenza kwezinye izinkampani zonogada kodwa ukusebenzisana nazo ukunqanda ubugebengu obubhokile kuleli. UManyathi uthe banxuswe ngamalungu eSkebhe ukuba kusungulwe inkampani yonogada. Uthe ngeke onogada babo basebenze eNquthu kuphela kodwa bazosabalala wonke amadolobha nezifundazwe zakuleli. "Uma onogada bethu befuneka eThekwini, bazokuya kuleyo nkampani abadingeka kuyo." Uthe izandla bazivule kunoma wubani ofuna ukusebenzisana nabo, okungaba abanikazi bamapulazi nabamabhizinisi anhlobonhlobo. IPhini likaMengameli weSkebhe, uMnuz Zakhele Mncube, lithe nakuba bezobabhekelela nabantu abangamalungu eSkebhe njengoba besasebenza ngokuvolontiya kodwa

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-Smoke and Mirrors ephelayo, igabe ngezinkakha zabalingisi okubalwa kuzo uMeshack Mavuso, Siyabonga Twala nezinye. Ingomunye wemidlalo lesi siteshi esimemezele ukuthi iyaphela. Eminye yi-Scandal! esidonse iminyaka kanjalo ne-House of Zwide, yomibili ezosongwa ngoJuni. Muva nje, lesi siteshi sishintshe izikhathi le midlalo edlala ngazo. Iqale nge-Kelders Van Geheime, esidlala ngo-7 ebusuku, nayo okulindeleke ukuthi iphele ngo-Agasti. I-House of Zwide eyayidlala ngo-7, isingena ngo-7.30 esikhaleni se-Scandal! esingena ngo-8. Kulandela Isitha ngo-8.30.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Imoto ebihamba abasolwa Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abasolwa abathathu ngesikhathi bejahwa isivinini esikhulu bedubulana nethimba loKlebe iTactical Operations Management Team ezintatha zangoLwesine, eCrystal Park, eBenoni. La malungu athole imininingwane ngabasolwa abebehlela ukuduna imoto nokuthumba umuntu ku-Elm road. Ngezithuba zabo-20:30, amalungu oKlebe e-TOMS abone imoto, i-Opel Astra e-silver grey ngemva nje kokukhipha isisulu sowesifazane ku-Fiat yakhe asifaka emotweni yabo. Kube nokujaha ngesivinini abasolwa bavulela ngenhlamvu bebhekise koklebe. Imoto yabasolwa iphaphalaze yashayisa umgoqo oseceleni yabhajwa khona lapho. Isisulu esithunjiwe sisindile satakulwa singenakulimala. Kushaqwe izibhamu ezimbili.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: izinkabi zashaya ungqimphothwe, zabikela umyeni, uJustice Mudau, ukuthi umkakhe ufuna ukumsoconga. Umyeni wavula icala lobugebengu emaphoyiseni aseNingizimu Afrika. Lokhu kuholele ekuboshweni kwabammangalelwa bobabili. Umshushisi wombuso u-Advocate Riana Williams uveze ubufakazi obethulwe ofakazi boMbuso babuhambisana, buqinisekisa futhi bufakazele ngaphandle kokungabaza ukuthi bobabili abammangalelwa baqala inqubo yokuzama ukubulala. UMbuso uthe uNdlovu uyena oqala ukwenza umnyakazo ngokuthinta izigebengu wabe esehlelela umngani wakhe usizo, kwathi uMudau wazibandakanya nezigebengu wacela kaningi ukuthi kubulawe umyeni wakhe. Inkantolo ithole ukuthi umbuso uliqinisekise ngempumelelo elinye icala lokwakha itulo lokubulala. Icala lihlehliselwe umhla ziyi-15 kuJulayi 2026 ukuze kuhlanganiswe imibiko yangaphambi kwesigwebo kanye nokukhishwa kwesigwebo. Lesi sigwebo siza-nje uNdlovu esevele edonsa odilikajele abayisithupha kulandela ukugwetshwa kwakhe ngoNovemba 2021 ngamacala okubulala amalungu omndeni amahlanu. Lezo zigameko zokubulala zenzelwe inzuzo yemali ngomshwalense kanye nokukhokhelwa kwenqubomgomo yomngcwabo.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, akakungabazi ukuthi iqembu lakhe lizoba ngompetha beBetway Premiership UMPHUMELA ophambene nobulindeleke kwi-Orlando Pirates, eyeke ithuba lokudla isicoco seBetway Premiership ngokucazelana ngamaphuzu neDurban City, uwubufakazi obuqanda ikhanda bokuthi unesisindo esingakanani emahlombe abadlali umthwalo wokuqeda indlala yeminyaka engu-14 leli qembu laseSoweto, lingasazi isicoco seligi. Lawa ngamazwi omqeqeshi wePirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, kulandela ukucazelana ngamaphuzu ngo 0-0 neDurban City ngoMgqibelo, e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto. IBucs ifike kulo mdlalo owandulela owokugcina wesizini idinga amaphuzu amathathu ukuze izoqhwakela esicongweni se-log kwazise ivunwa yizibalo zamagoli uma uyiqhathanisa neMamelodi Sundowns eqhwakele kodwa esiyidlale yonke eyayo. Lo mphumela uphoqa iPirates ukuba ingabuyi nokunye ngaphadle kwewini emdlalweni wayo wokusonga isizini ne-Orbit College FC ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama, eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit. Omunye umphumela ngaphandle kwewini kwi-Orbit, ungasho ukuqhubeka kwendlala yesicoco seligi yeminyaka engu-14 kwiPirates, iSundowns iqukule isicoco seligi okwesishiyagalolunye kulandelana. Ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba abenesithangami nabo emuva komdlalo, u-Ouaddou uqinise idolo abalandeli bePirates ngokuthi iphupho labo kalifile kepha

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IJaecoo J7 SHS engenye yama pług-in hybrid asanda kufika eNingizimu Afrika UKUNYUKA kwentengo kaphethroli kuphoqa abanini bezimoto bacabange ukushintshela ezimotweni ezingama-hybrid kunokuthenga ezihamba ngogesi wodwa, ngokocwaningo olwenziwe yiYazi. IYazi yinkundla yokwenza ucwaningo kusetshenziswa uWhatsApp. Kulezi zinsuku kulokhu kubikwa ukuthi intengo kaphethroli nodizili izonyuka uma kuqala u-Ephreli. Umthelela omkhulu wokunyuka kwentengo kawoyela ongahluziwe ngenxa yempi yeMelika ibambisene ne-Israel abagadla e-Iran. NgoLwesithathu i-IOL ibike ukuthi intengo kadizili kungenzeka inyuke ngemali elinganiselwa ku-R10 ilitha ngo-Ephreli 1. Lokhu kungenza intengo yelitha ibe ngaphezu kuka-R30 okokuqala ngqa emlandweni wakuleli. Intengo yelitha likaphethroli yona kuvela ukuthi izonyuka ngemali engaphansi kancane kuka-R6. Ucwaningo lweYazi lwangoMashi luveze ukuthi abantu abaningi bazimisele ngokushintshela ezimotweni ezingonhliziyombili (ama-hybrid) asebenzisa uphethroli nenjini kagesi. Ama-hybrid ahlukene njengoba kukhona anebhethri elizishaja ngesikhathi imoto ihamba kanti amanye abizwa ngama plug-in hybrid wona ashajwa eziteshini zokushaja, ezingakabi ningi kangako kuleli. Ucwaningo luveze ukuthi ukunqanyulwa kukagesi okuhleliwe nokushoda kwezindawo zokushaja yikho okuvimba abantu ukuthi bakhethe izimoto ezihamba

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ngeke ngibenzele phansi.” Uveze ukuthi kule albhamu unemiyalezo eminingi kodwa isikhathi esiningi ukhonze ukuzidlalela. “Kunengoma nje laphayana ethi: “WeJehova wena ngiyakudlela iZulu ngiyalithatha kube elami.” Uyabo leyo nto iwumdlalo ongawuzwa ngesinxele kodwa kahle hle inhloso yengoma yami wukudlulisa ukuphatheka kabi ukuthi hawu Nkulunkulu wasithathela abantu esibadinga kangaka kusuke sekwenze njani? Ekugcineni ngiyasho ukuthi ngiyadlala njalo ngoba akumele umuntu ayithathe ayifake kuye le nto ngoba kunabantu abamkhonzayo uNkulunkulu nami ngiyamkhonza kodwa ingoma uma uzoyikhipha kumele ikhulumise.” Uphethe ngokuveza ukuthi uhlela ukwenza umcimbi ngakubo uJolivet, ozoba yifestivali yomculo. “Akumele ngithandwe kangaka ezizweni ngakithi ngingabenzeli ubuhle.” UMCULI wokholo, uJumbo, enandisa emcimbini kaBahubhe eWorkshop ngoMgqibelo Image: Bhanyazile TV2

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: kwiPremiership njengoba ngesizini edlule igawulwe yizembe idlala wona amaPlay-Offs kulandela ukuqeda kwayo endaweni ka-15 kwi-log. Imiphumela yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Casric Stars 3-1 Gomora United; Kruger United 2-2 The Bees; Leicesterford City 2-4 Cape Town City; Hungry Lions 0-0 Milford FC; Venda FC 1- 2 Highbury; Lerumo Lions 4-0 Black Leopards; University of Pretoria 6-2 Midlands Wanderers; Baroka FC 0-0 Upington City

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: U-ANDILE Jali owavezwa yiNedbank Cup osephenduke inxusa layo njengoba engaseyena umdlali webhola elikhokhelayo OMUNYE wabadlali okuyohlale kukhulunywa ngabo ebholeni laseNingizimu Afrika, u-Andile “Mhlekazi” Jali, uhlabe ikhwelo kwinjejane esemaqenjini amane asethubeni lokudla isicoco seNedbank Cup ngokubaluleka kokubambisisa leli thuba njengoba enza wagcina esethole amadlelo aluhlaza nokwalandelwa yimpilo entofontofo. Ukusongwa kwemidlalo yamazwe kukhomba ukubuya kweNedbank ngeyandulela eyamanqamu ezodlalelwa ezinkundleni ezahlukene kule mpelasonto. Kuzoqala umdlalo weDurban City neCasric Stars ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambala, eChatsworth Stadium eThekwini, kulandele owe-TS Galaxy neMilford FC kongeSonto ngesikhathi esifanayo, eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Nakuba kunomuzwa wokuthi ukuphuma kwamaqembu athathwa njengamakhulu kwi-Premier Soccer League (PSL) kulo mqhudelwano kulehlisile isasasa kodwa uJali ubona ngendlela ehlukile. “Kuwukubuka ngomqondo ongahluzekile ukuthi umdlalo wamanqamu uzobheda ngoba kubhekene amaqembu angenabo abalandeli abaningi, inhloso enkulu yakwaNedbank wukufukula laba abakudingayo lokho,” kusho uJali kwiSolezwe izolo emini. “Isifiso sami esikhulu ukuthi abadlali, ikakhulukazi abancane abadlalela la maqembu asele kwiNedbank, basebenzise mina njengesibonelo. “Kungenxa yeNedbank Cup abalandeli bebhola laseMzansi

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: kwiPirates, ngakho sekufanele ishaye iChiefs, iwine neminye imidlalo (emine) eyisalele, bese ithandazela inhlanhla yokuwina iligi ngokuthi iSundowns iqhuzuke kowodwa kulena esele njengoba iqhuzukile kwiStellenbosch. "Isenalo ithuba lokuwina iligi iPirates ngokwezibalo, futhi idlala kahle njengamanje, kodwa nenhlanhla isiyayidinga. Ngale kwalokho iyadinga ukuwuwina lo mdlalo wabakhaya ukukhombisa ukuthi iyona inkunzi esakhonya kowabakhaya baseSoweto.” ULEBOHANG Maboe okulindeleke ukuthi ahlanganise iKaizer Chiefs esiswini kowabakhaya Izwi leChiefs embangweni wesicoco Ngokwezibalo iChiefs isenalo ithuba lokunyukela esicongweni kwiBetway Premiership njengoba inamaphuzu angu-46 emidlalweni engu-24. Uma ingayinqoba yonke eyisithupha esele, okuhlanganisa nowabakhaya, ingaqeda isihlanganise amaphuzu angu-64. Ukuze idle isicoco ingadinga ukuthi iPirates neSundowns bashaye udaka emidlalweni yabo esele kwazise bona sebenawo amaphuzu angu-58 nangu-57, ngokwahlukana. Okungephikwe wukuthi Amakhosi azoba nezwi embangweni wesicoco njengoba esazobhekana nawo womabili amaqembu ahamba phambili kwi-log. Ngaphandle kokududulana nePirates kusasa ntambama, asazotholana neSundowns eLoftus Versfeld ngoMeyi 6. Ngokusho kukaMkhize, owagijima kuMakhosi ngemuva kokushiya kwakhe kweZimnyama ngasekuqaleni ko-2000, Amakhosi nawo adinga ukuqala ngokunqoba owakusasa nePirates

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: AZOZIHAMBISELA ngokwawo izikhalazo zawo kuMbhishobhi oMkhulu uMandla Jwara, ophethe iDayosisi yaseThekwini, esontweni lamaRoma aKhatholika, amalungu ePherish yasePinetown, iThe Immaculate Conception Church. Lokhu kuza emva kokuba kumenyezelwe emasontweni amathathu edlule, ukuthi uFata Sifiso Ndlovu onomoya wobungoma ushaywe ngesithende. Incwadi kuthiwa iwakhalise mi izinyembezi amalungu aleli pherishi kuvela ukuthi impelasonto yePhasika kuyobe kungeyokugcina uNdlovu esontisa kuleli bandla. Akuyena yedwa uNdlovu "ofakwa umgxala", njengoba kuvele amalungu epherishi yaseMontclair, akhala esifanayo ngoFata Thembelani Ngcobo, naye okuthiwa unomoya wobungoma, ogudluzwe ngendlela efanayo. Ilungu lepherishi elaziwa kakhulu kwezomculo, uThokozani "Tzozo" Zulu lithe emva kokufundwa kwencwadi ebandleni, eyayazisa amalungu ukuthi uzogcina maduze uFata, kube khona isikhalo esikhulu. “Amalungu ebandla awazange azamukele kahle lezi zindaba. Siphatheke kabi ngoba sisuka kude noFata. Efika la eminyakeni emihlanu edlule, ibandla belinabantu abanela amabhentshi amabili kuphela. Namuhla ligcwele phama isonto ngenxa yakhe,” kusho uTzozo. Uthe uFata ungumholi ohlangabezana nomuntu lapho ekhona, wathi uma umuntu edinga ukwelashwa ngokomoya, uNdlovu uba yilokho. Uma umuntu

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ULERATO Kganyago ongomunye wabasakazi beMetro FM abazophatha uhlelo emcimbini wezindondo walesi siteshi ozoba ngoMgqibelo, eThekwini KUVELA ukuthi zishayana ngamakhanda izikhulu zeSABC nesiteshi iMetro FM, ngokugqoza kokudayiswa kwamathikithi alo mcimbi okulindeleke ukuthi ube se-ICC, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo. Umcimbi amaMetro FM Awards, ukhuze ibuya kulo nyaka ngemuva kwesikhathi eside agcina, njengoba lo mcimbi uke wamiswa iminyaka. Umthombo weSolezwe oyingxenye yethimba elihlela umcimbi, uveze ukuthi abakhangisa umcimbi bezwakalise ukukhathazeka kuqala njengoba abantu bebebonakala bewuthakasela umcimbi uma ufakwe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, okulethe ithemba kusaqalwa. "Kodwa izinto zishintshe sekubhekwa indlela amathikithi ahamba ngayo eTicketpro lapho edayiswa khona, kwacaca ukuthi athengwa kancane okuyinto ebingalindelekile," kusho umthombo. Omunye umthombo uveze ukuthi izikhulu eziphezulu zalo mcimbi zishayana ngamakhanda manje ukubheka enye indlela yokuthi abantu bathenge amathikithi. "Manje kusetshenziswana nemisakazo emikhulu namaphepha eThekwini, ukuthi bakhangise umcimbi njengoba befuna ube sezingeni, kodwa kuyala njengoba manje sisesontweni lokugcina lalo mcimbi. Sekuthenjwe ukuthi ngoLwesihlanu, abanye abantu bazobe beholile ngakho kungenzeka kube khona athengwayo. Nawomcimbi

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UKelebogile "Trivi K" Morake obonakala ohlelweni olukhonjiswa kuMzansi Magic iMageza Want a Wife UBEFUNA indlela ezomenza athembeke kuphathina wakhe uma esemtholile usomatekisi waseSoweto, uKelebogile "Trivi K" Morake (26), ngoLwesihlanu obonakale ohlelweni iMageza Want a Wife, kuMzansi Magic. Lolu hlelo olukhonjiswa ngo-8 ebusuku, uKelebogile uhlangane nabesifazane abaqhamuka emadolobheni ahlukene kuleli nabo abazifunela omaqondana kwezothando. Bonke bazofuna uthando, nokuzothi isonto ngalinye uKelebogile, akhiphe oyedwa kulaba besifazane aze agcine esale nalona amthandayo nazimisele ukuthi amenze unkosikazi wakhe. UKelebogile uthe ubone kungcono athathe enye indlela yokufuna umuntu amthandayo, nazimisele ukuthi athembeke kuye, njengoba efuna kubone izwe lonke ngalokhu akwenzayo ukuthi uqinisile. "Ngaphandle nje kokuthi asinaso isikhathi sokuzikhipha siye ezindaweni la singahlangana khona nabantu esingakha nabo uthando, kuthe uma kuqhamuka ithuba elifana naleli ngabona ukuthi angilisebenzise. Ngizinikele ekutheni ngithole owesifazane ozoba unkosikazi wami ngakhe naye umndeni wami. Ngifuna abantu basazi ukuthi sahlangana kanjani kungakho ngikhethe ukuba yingxenye yalolu hlelo. Ngifuna ukungafihli uma sengimtholile into yethu

author: Sabelo Nsele
