text: esesithathiwe." Ekhuluma ngohlelo abezolwethula, uRamaphosa uveze ukuthi kuzohlomula imindeni engu-220 okwacekelwa phansi imizi yayo ngesikhathi sobandlululo. Le mindeni yahlonzwa ngesikhathi kuneKhomishini yamaQiniso nokuBuyisana, iTruth and Reconciliation Commission. URamaphosa uthe le mindeni izothola uxhaso luka-R40 million. "Abantu abahlomulile bazokwakha noma balungise imizi yabo. Lokhu kuzobuyisa isithunzi esabalahlekela ngesikhathi sobandlululo. Inkululeko yethu ayanele uma abantu abahlukumezeka ngesikhathi sobandlululo bengakathotshwa amanxeba. Ngisho ne-United Nations (inhlangano yezizwe), yavumelana ngokuthi ukuze kube nokuthula emazweni, kufanele basulwe izinyembezi labo abahlukumezeka. Yngakho nathi sithi akube khona okuncane okutholwa abahlukumezeka. Sinxusa abantu abathole izimfanelo zabo ukuthi bazisebenzise kahle." URamaphosa uthe baningi abantu abalahlekelwa ngesikhathi kunodlame eNdwedwe ngeminyaka yo-1980 no-1990. "Abantu bakhishwa emakhaya. Izindlu eziningi zashiswa. Okubuhlungu kakhulu wukuthi abantu abaningi babulawa. Kwahlaselwa ngisho abantu abangenacala ababengazibandakanyi nepolitiki. Udlame lwadonsa isikhathi eside, lwaphazamisa abantu abaningi. Abaningi basahlupheka namanje ngenxa yalo." UNgqongqoshe wezoBulungiswa, uNksz Mmamoloko Kubayi, uthe ingu-400 isiyonke imizi eyacekelwa phansi eNdwedwe. Uthe imizi engu-112 yanikwa uxhaso luka-R21 million,

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: nalabo ababeyizisebenzi. Le nkampani kubikwa ukuthi yathola imali elinganiselwa ku-R26 943 793.19 ngalolu hlelo ngo-2020. Kusolwa ukuthi imali yabe isidluliswa isuka kwa-A and F Consulting yayiswa kuKhulani Quality Contribution, okuyinkampani exhumene nonkosikazi kaMsiska. Umlamu kusolakala ukuthi ubegijima ethola imininingwane yomazisi esetshenziswa ukwenza umkhonyovu wokumangalela abantu abayizipoki nababengabasebenzi bale nkampani. Ngesikhathi sophenyo, i-NPA's Asset Forfeiture Unit yathola incwadi yokumisa ukusebenza kwama-akhawunti asebhange futhi yashaqa izimoto ezinhlanu. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kwalondolozwa izakhiwo ezintathu ezisePitoli, eMiddelburg, naseWhite River, kanye nempahla yasendlini kanye nempahla yasehhovisi. Icala lihlehliselwe umhlaka-20 Julayi 2026, ukuze kuqhutshekwe nophenyo. Izindlu ezishaqwe yiNPA zabammangalelwa

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UBERNARDO Silva odlala isizini yakhe yokugcina kwiMan City Image: MAN CITY/FACEBOOK KUNGASE kuphenduleke imibuzo eminingi kule mpelasonto ngokungase kugcine kwenzekile kule sizini ebholeni lase-England kusuka eqenjini elizogoduka nesicoco sePremier League (PL) phakathi kwe-Arsenal neManchester City, kuya ekutheni iChelsea ingavuka yini emaqandeni kulandela ukuxosha kwayo uLiam Rosenior. IManchester City isiqhwakele kwi-log kulandela iwini yayo eshovele ngayo iBurnley ehlathini, kwiChampionship, maphakathi nesonto. Lo mphumela ugudluze i-Arsenal esicongweni yize amaphuzu elingana (70). Izinto kwiChelsea zimapeketwane kulandela ukuxosha kwayo uRosenior emqashe ngoJanuwari. Kule mpelasonto iChelsea inethuba lokukhohlwa ngeligi njengoba inomdlalo weFA Cup neLeeds United. Imidlalo yeFA Cup kayikuvimbi nokho ukuqhubeka kweyeligi njengoba i-Arsenal izokwamukela iNewcastle emdlalweni oyinika ithuba lokubuyela esicongweni yize izobe iphambili ngomdlalo kwiCity. Manchester City v Southampton (Wembley Stadium, FC Cup semifinal, namuhla ngo-6.15pm) Njengoba iManchester City isihleli esicongweni kwi-log yePL kufanele ukuba izofika ihamba ize iqholoshe kulo mdlalo ebhekene kuwona neqembu elihluleke wukuqoqa amaphuzu agcwele ekhaya emdlalweni weChampionship neBristol City maphakathi

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: izinkonzo zokukhulekela, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, esabhekene namacala. Nakuba kunjalo kodwa lisayibambe ishisa insimbi. Kwavulwa amabandla osaziwayo eThekwini kodwa i-ECC yangaphazamiseka. Kula mabandla kukhona nebandla likaMthunzi Namba eGreyville Primary, elikaZanele Mbokazi eNicol Square nelika-Pastor Andile KaMajola ku-Anton Lembede Street. Isolezwe Ngempelasonto lithole ukuthi i-ECC seyinamalungu angaphezu kuka-20 000 futhi uDube uyilungu leNational Interfaith Council of South Africa (NICSA). Leli bandla limeme bonke abazalwane ukuba bazogubha nabo le ngqophamlando eCentrum Park eThekwini, kusukela ngomhla ka-2 kuya kumhla ka-5 Ephreli. Kubaholi abazobe bekhona kubalwa iMeya yeTheku, uMnuz Cyril Xaba noMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuThutha nokuHlaliswa kwaBantu KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma. Abazalwane bazobuye badumise ngomculo nezihlabani zamaciko ahlukahlukene. Ngo-Ephreli 2, kuzobe kune-Holy Communion, kube Amazwi Ayisikhombisa ngo-Ephreli 3, kube ne-ECC Heritage Day ngo-Ephreli 4, bese imbenge isongwa ngomhla ka-5, nge-Day of Resurrection. IMEYA yaseThekwini, uMnuz Cyril Xaba UMPHATHISWA wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sboniso Duma

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ku-100km/h kuyithatha imizuzwana engu-6.1 kanti ijubane ligcina ku-250km/h. Bengithi uma ngishintsha igiya nginyukela kwelesibili ngizwe kukhala ithayi langaphambili izama ukunamathela bese iyanamathela etiyeleni. Nasemakhoneni ibijika kalula ngejubane. Nomculo obukhala ezipikheni zeHarman Kardon ngike ngathi ukuwukhohlwa sengizwa ukuduma kwayo okumnandi. Nokho kugcina ngaphakathi kuphela ngoba ngathi kwengezwe ngazo izipikha ngoba ngaphandle akukho nhlobo. Kuphethroli ibingakhalisi indlela ebidla ngayo ngoba ihambe iphuza 7.6l/100km. Ngokwamandla ayo ungayibheka njengembangi ye-VW Golf 8.5 GTI yize intengo iyibeka kwiGolf 1.4. MINI Cooper 3-door hatch JCW – R745 574 Iphuma ne-maintenance plan yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-100 000km.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INGXENYE yabalingisi abazogqama emdlalweni weshashalazi osihloko sithi Behind Her Mic - The Musical UBUNZIMA bempilo, ukungakwazi ukumelana nezindleko zansuku zonke nokunye okweyamene nalokho okubhekane namaciko ikakhulu abalingisi - yizona zinto eziba seqhulwini lomyalezo womdlalo weshashalazi osihloko sithi Behind Her Mic - The Musical. Lokho kushiwo wuColleca Madulini, umbhali nomqondisi walo mdlalo ozokhonjiswa bukhoma eWild Coast Casino: Tropical Nites Theatre, ePort Edward, ogwini oluseningizimu yeKwaZulu-Natal ngoMashi 6 ngo-6 kusihlwa nangoMashi 7 ngo-3 ntambama. Engxoxweni neSolezwe Ngempelasonto, uColleca uthe amalungiselelo alo mdlalo ahamba kahle kakhulu njengoba namathikithi okuwubuka aseqalile ukudayisa eComputicket ngo-R100 awezingane no-R150 awabantu abadala. UMLINGISI uThembeka Duma ngomunye wabazogqama emdlalweni weshashalazi osihloko sithi Behind Her Mic- The Musical “Lona wumdlalo oxoxa indaba yomlingisi oqavile uMarry (olingiswa wuThembeka Duma), obhekana nezimo ezihlukene ezithiya impilo yakhe, okuthi nakuba enekhono elimangalisayo kodwa kuhambe kuvele ukuthi kuningi okuthiya impilo yakhe nokungahambi kahle kuyona. “Inhloso yethu enkulu wukugqamisa izingqinamba ezihlukene ezisale zabhekana namaciko emva kokubhoka

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: AMACIKO omculo i-3 Step oJazzworld noThukuthela bemukela enye yezindondo ezinthathu abahlabane ngazo kumaMetro FM Music Awards, abese-ICC, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo ebusuku Image: LIGHT LOUNGE STUDIO UKUNGENISA nokuthandwa komculo omusha womdanso i-3-Step, oyinhlanganisela yeKwaito ne-House, kubonakale ngokuthi kukhonye amaciko enza lolu hlobo lomculo, egadla ephindelela ngokuwola izindondo zamaMetro FM Music Awards. Kulo mcimbi, obukhuza ibuya ihlandla lesi-20 nobekugujwa ngawo iminyaka ewu-40 kwasungulwa isiteshi somsakazo iMetro FM, ubuse-ICC, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo ebusuku - wenziwe kulandelwa indikimba ethi Music Excellence. Emacikweni adle ubhedlu kulokhu kubalwa amaciko eqembu le-3 Step oJazzworld noThukuthela, abahlabane ngezindondo ezintathu ze-Best Produced Album, yi-Best Dance ne-Best Duo/Group nge-albhamu yabo yokuqala ebishisa izikhotha nyakenye, esihloko sithi The Most Wanted. UMCULI uCiza emukela enye yezindondo ezimbili ahlabane ngazo kumaMetro FM Music Awards, abese-ICC, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo ebusuku Image: LIGHT LOUNGE STUDIO Umculi uCiza, ongenise kwezwakala naye nyakenye ngengoma yakhe ethi Isaka, ephrojuswe yibona oJazzworld noThukuthela, yena ukhale wemuka nezindondo ezimbili ze-Best Male Artist neye-Best

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UJoseph “Big Joe” Nyalungu, udutshulwe wabulawa abasolwa abangaziwa emagcekeni ebhizinisi lakhe Ngemuva kokusinda esigamekweni sokudutshulwa ngesonto eyedlule, uJoseph “Big Joe” Nyalungu udutshulwe wabulawa NgoMgqibelo emagcekeni ebhizinisi lakhe eMkhuhlu, eMpumalanga. Kubikwa ukuthi abesilisa ababili baphume emotweni eyiveni emhlophe, bangena emagcekeni ebhizinisi likaJoseph “Big Joe” Nyalungu, 62, eMkhuhlu bamdubula bambulala ngoMeyi 16. Ngokwemibiko, uNyalungu phambilini wasinda kwesinye isigameko ngoMeyi 8 waphuthunyiswa esibhedlela iMatikwana. Le nsizwa yaziwa ngokuba yinkosi yabazibgeli bobhejane abangekho emthethweni yayiyiphoyisa ngaphambi kokwenza lomsebenzi eMpumalanga. UNyalungu ubesematheni eminyakeni edlule kulandela ukuboshwa okumataniswa nokubulawa kobhejane. Amaphoyisa aseMpumalanga akuqinisekisile ukuthi aphume umkhankaso wokuthungatha ababulali kulandela isigameko sokudutshulwa kwendoda eneminyaka engu-62 ubudala eMkhuhlu ngoMgqibelo, ngabo-2.30 ntambama. Okhulumela amaphoyisa aseMpumalanga uColonel Mavela Masondo uthe, ngokolwazi lokuqala, abasolwa ababili baphume evenini emhlophe baqonda kumufi ehlezi nabanye abantu emagcekeni ebhizinisi lakhe. "Isisulu sizame ukubaleka, kodwa abasolwa basilandele futhi kusolakala ukuthi badubule kaningi bebhekise kuso ngaphambi kokuba babaleke endaweni yesigameko ngesivinini esiphezulu ngemoto efanayo." Uthe umufi uhlonzwe

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ukuthi akwaziwa namanje ukuthi uNabi uzobuya nini. "UNabi uyaxhumana neqembu kodwa akukho okukhomba ukuthi usezobuya. Akwaziwa ukuthi uzobuya nini okwamanje. Akukho nokucabangela ukuthi angase ebuye nini," kusho umthombo. Ukwenza kahle kweChiefs engekho uNabi kwamukelwe ngezindlela ezahlukene ngabalandeli ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Kukhona abasho sakuntela ukuthi akasale eseqhubeka ahlale nomkakhe, iqembu libanjwe nguKaze noYoussef. Amakhosi azobuyela enkundleni kusasa uma eseyobhekana neRichards Bay FC emdlalweni wePremiership eFNB Stadium, eNasrec, ngo-7.30 ebusuku. Akubuzwa ukuthi azolwela ukuqhubeka nokuqoqa amaphuzu njengoba ebheke ukwenza kahle kule sizini. IBay ibalwa namaqembu angakawini nowokubika umdlalo weligi kule sizini. Ikhale ngaphansi kwiMarumo Gallants ngo 2-1 kowokuvula weligi ngaphambi kokuthelwa othulini yiLamontville Golden Arrows. Ngaphambi kwemidlalo yeligi, iNatal Rich Boyz yehlulwe yiMamelodi Sundowns ngo 4-0 kuma-quarterfinal eMTN8. Imidlalo yeBetway Premiership Kaizer Chiefs v Richards Bay FC (FNB Stadium, 7.30pm); Orbit College v Sekhukhune United (Dobsonville Stadium, 7.30pm); Durban City v Golden Arrows (Chatsworth Stadium, 7.30pm); Chippa United v TS Galaxy (Buffalo City

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: sizibophisise ngaphambi kokuqala ukuvikela isicoco seyoMhlaba,” kusho uFoote. “Bekuvele kusezinhlelweni zethu ukuwina iChampionship kulo nyaka kodwa esikubheke kakhulu ngukuvikela isicoco sethu soMhlaba nengingangabazi ukuthi kuzoba nzima. “Kusicacele ngendlela esinqobe ngayo iChampionship ukuthi kunamabhawodi amaningi okufanele siwaqinise ngaphambi kokuqala kweNdebe yoMhlaba." INingizimu Afrika iqale umqhudelwano ivele ithwelwe ngeqoma kodwa umdlalo wokugcina ulikhumbuzile leli qembu lesizwe ukuthi kalikafiki kuleli qophela elizitshela ukuthi selikulona. INew Zealand ebambe iqembu lakuleli ngo 29-29 ngoMgqibelo, iqale lo mqhudelwano inganikwe lutho nokufakazelwe ngeminye yemiphumela yayo njengokukhala ngaphansi kwi-Argentina. AmaBhokobhoko amancane wona aqale umqhudelwano evele ethishwe ukuba awudle kwazise abesefomini enhle ukuwedlula wonke amazwe kanti imidlalo ibisekhaya kuwona. INdebe yoMhlaba ka-U/20 izodlalelwa khona eGqeberha, kusukela ngoJulayi 1.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: Letlhaku ukuze inqobe ngo 3-2 kwiChippa United emdlalweni obunzima ngempelasonto edlule e-TUKS Stadium, ePitoli. ISundowns izithola isisempini nje, kuyiwe ekhefini ihamba phambili ngo 2-0 wamagoli kaBennet Mokoena noNtokozo Siquba. Ngokuthatha kancane iChippa kweSundowns, amaChilli Boys abuye aze ashaya amagoli amabili okuphoqe ukuthi kuvele iqhawe elinguLetlhaku ngomzuzu ka-85. Iqembu elivikela isicoco - iChiefs - linqobe ngo 5-1 kwiPolokwane City ngeSonto ekuseni. Kulo mdlalo kuthe kuyiwa ekhefini wabe eseyibeke ebuhleni amahlandla amabili uNaledi Hlongwane nelinye elilodwa likaSteve “Stevie G” Mendes. Esiwombeni sesibili ezinye izihlabani zeChiefs, uNeo Bohloko noMpho Khethang, zishaye amanye amagoli. Yize iChiefs ibukeka ingeke isenza lutho embangweni wesicoco kule sizini kodwa kufanele ukuba abaqeqeshi bayo bayajabula ngefomu eyikhombise inenebula iPolokwane. Eminye imiphumela yeDDC kule mpelasonto ihambe kanje: TS Galaxy 0-3 Durban City Stellenbosch FC 1-2 Sekhukhune United Siwelele FC 1-1 Magesi FC Orbit College 1-0 Golden Arrows Marumo Gallants 2-2 Richards Bay

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Joe "Ferrari" Sibanyoni, uvele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein, eMpumalanga, izolo. USibanyoni uboshelwe icala lokufuna ngodli imali kusomabhizinisi. Ekhuluma nabezindaba, uSibanyoni uthe umsulwa. "Ngiyinceku kaNkulunkulu mina." USibanyoni uthe uzoshumayela ivangeli ejele njengoba eboshiwe. Uboshwe kanye noMnuz Mvimbi Masilela noMnuz Philemon Msiza. Icala labo lihlehliselwe uLwesihlanu. Imenenja kaMasipala waseKurhuleni, uMnuz Kagiso Lerutla, nesikhulu sophiko lwamaphoyisa omkhandlu esimisiwe, uMnuz Julius Mkhwanazi, bavele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi eBoksburg. ULerutla noMkhwanazi babhekene namacala enkohlakalo, ukukhwabanisa nokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Icala labo lihlehliselwe uJuni 9. Umholi weqembu iNational Coloured Congress, uMnuz Fadiel Adams, ubevele eNkantolo yeMantshi ePinetown. U-Adams ubhekene necala lokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Izolo uqhubekile nokufaka isicelo sebheyili, icala lahlehliselwa uLwesihlanu.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Nqobile Khoza wuyena omncane kunabo bonke kwabathweswe iziqu e-UKZN, ngeziqu zakhe ze-Bachelor of Science Degree in Geological Sciences INTOKAZI encane kunazo zonke izitshudeni zemikhakha eyehlukene ezithweswe iziqu e-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN), uNksz Nqobile Khoza, idalule ukuthi ukuqopha lowo mlando sekuyikhuthaze ukuthi iqhube imfundo ize igogode kwezesayensi. UNksz Khoza (20) uthweswe iziqu ze-Bachelor of Science Degree in Geological Sciences, okuyisigaba sempilo asichaze ngokuthi simjabulisile futhi senza ukuthi wazizwa ethobekile futhi eshisekela nokuthi angabe esaphelela kusona - kepha aqhubeke nemfundo yakhe. “Ngijabule kakhulu ngakho futhi kwenza ukuthi ngizizwe ngithobekile kakhulu kozakwethu, ngakho ngiyaziqhenya ngokuthi ngikwaze ukuqopha umlando omuhle kangaka - nengibona ukuthi uzongikhuthaza kakhulu ukuqhubeka ngisebenze kanzima empilweni,” usho kanje. Eqhuba, uthe okumkhuthaze ukwenza lezi zifundo wukuthi unothando lokushisekela ukwazi kabanzi ngomhlaba nakho konke okukuwona, nokuthi kusebenza kanjani. “Bengihlale nginentshisekelo yokwazi ukuthi umhlaba usebenza kanjani, nakho konke okwenzekayo kuwona nangawo ukuthi kwenzeka kanjani nomthelela wakho ezigigabeni zansuku onke esingenawo amandla okuzivimba

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: IMEYA kaMasipala wesiFunda uMgungundlovu, uMnuz Mzi Zuma UMASIPALA wesiFunda uMgungundlovu udingisa umshayeli weloli yamanzi obanjwe oqotsheni edayisa amanzi. IMeya, uMnuz Mzi Zuma, ithe abasafuni ukuphinde babone lo msebenzi esebenza ezindaweni ezingaphansi koMgungundlovu. Umsebenzi uqashwe yinkampani ehlinzeka umasipala ngezimoto zamanzi. UZuma uthe utshele izikhulu zomasipala ukuba zitshele inkampani eqashe lo msebenzi ukuthi akasadingakali eMgungundlovu. Lo msebenzi ubanjwe edayisa amanzi eMaqongqo, ngaphansi koMasipala waseMkhambathini. Ngesikhathi ebanjwa edayisa amanzi, bekufanele ngabe uhlinzeka amanzi ezindaweni ezingaphansi koMasipala waseRichmond. IMaqongqo neRichmond ziqhelelene ngebanga elingaphezu kuka-60 KM kanti lezi zindawo zihlukaniswe yizindawo ezingaphansi koMasipala waseMsunduzi. Umshayeli ubanjwe ethela amanzi emzini yabantu ekhethekile. UZuma uthe umuntu uma efuna ukuthelelwa amanzi emzini wakhe, kufanele awathenge amanzi kwamasipala bese umasipala uthumela imoto ezomthelela leso sibalo samanzi asithengile. Uthe imizi ebithelelwa amanzi ilo mshayeli, ibingazange iwathenge amanzi kumasipala. UZuma uthe abashayeli abadayisa amanzi benza ukuthi abantu bagcine bengawatholi amanzi ngenxa yokuthi abashayeli bawayisa kulabo abasuke bewathengile. "Kunabantu abangawatholi amanzi. Ngesikhathi

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UKHOMISHANA wamaPhoyisa obambile uLiet General Puleng Dimpane Image: PHANDO JIKELO/RSA PARLIAMENT UKUQOKWA kukaLiet General Puleng Dimpane njengebamba esikhundleni sokuba uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa kuZwelonke sekuqubule impikiswano ngokuthi ngabe ukufanele ngokuphelele yini ukumelana nokudingeka kulo msebenzi. ULiet General Dimpane umenyezelwe uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa ngoLwesine, ukuthi usezobamba kulo msebenzi, ngenxa yokumiswa kobekuwona uLiet General Fannie Masemola. UMasemola ubuyiselwe eceleni ngenxa yokuthi ubhekene necala lokwephula umthetho i-Public Finance Management Act of 1999. UMasemola umiswe kusukela ekutheni evele eNkantolo yeMantshi ePitoli ngoLwesibili emva kokuthi ethunyelelwe amaphepha ngenyanga edlule, eyalelwa ukuthi avele enkantolo mayelana nezinsolo abhekene nazo zokwephula umthetho. Ubhekene namacala amane okwephula umthetho mayelana nethenda ka-R360 million yezinsiza kusebenza zezempilo zoPhiko lwamaPhoyisa iSouth African Police Service, okuvela ukuthi yatholwa usomabhizinisi osolwa ngezenzo zobugebengu uMnuz Vusimuzi “Cat” Matlala. Ngaphambi kwalokhu, uLiet General Dimpane wayekade eyiSikhulu esiPhezulu sezeziMali khona oPhikweni lwamaPhoyisa, kanti uke wafakaza kabili, lapho aveza khona ukuthi akakaze abe neqhaza endleleni okwenganyelwa ngayo leyo thenda. Ngenkathi

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UWinnie Ntshaba ongumsunguli wamaRoyalty Soapie Awards Image: Instagram/Winnie Ntshaba AYAQHUBEKA amalungiselelo amaRoyalty Soapie Awards okulindeleke ukuthi abuye nonyaka emuva kokungasingathwa nyakenye ngenxa yezizathu ezahlukene. Le miklomelo yasungulwa nguWinnie Ntshaba ongumlingisi ozakhele udumo kwiGenerations: The Legacy neminye imidlalo. Emuva kwamaSouth African Film and Television Awards abengempelasonto eGoli abalingisi nabasemkhakheni wethelevishini basuke sebebheke wona. Okhulumela abagqugquzeli, uSimphiwe Majola, utshele Isolezwe phambilini ukuthi u-2025 bekungowokucabangisisa nokuhlela izinto kabusha. “Esikhundleni sokujaha ukwenza into engeke ibe sezingeni lethu, sithathe isinqumo sokuhlaba ikhefu silungise bese siqinisa isisekelo. Okubalulekile kithina ukwenza imiklomelo ekhombisa izinga eliphezulu, ethembekile futhi enomthelela omuhle, hhayi ukugcina icala,” kusho uSimphiwe. USimphiwe uphinde washayelwa ebuzwa ngamalungiselelo kulandela ukungamenyezelwa kwabaqokiwe nokuvula ukuvota ngenyanga edlule njengoba kwakushiwo. Ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kwathiwa abantu abalindele uMashi 14 kodwa kwagcina kungenzekanga lutho. Uthe amalungiselelo aqhubeka kahle. "Imiklomelo ihlelelwe uSepthemba futhi konke kusahlelwa ngasese. Imingenelo ihambe kahle futhi ithimba lisebenza ngesigaba esilandelayo," kusho uSimphiwe. Uthe ngokuhamba kwesikhathi bazomemezela usuku lokumenyezelwa kwabaqokiwe,

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: OWAYENGUMSAKAZI woKhozi FM uNgizwe 'Sinqa Semfene' Mchunu UKUTHULA emoyeni nokuphila impilo engenamsindo kubukeka kusazoqhubeka kube ngabakhwekazi empilweni yowayengumsakazi woKhozi FM uNgizwe ‘Sinqe Semfene’ Mchunu, obhekene notalatiya lwezinkinga okubonakala zingamnike thuba lokuphefumula. Lokhu kungenxa yokwanda kwezinkinga ezibhekene noMchunu njengoba kumanje nje kusabatshazwa isihluku esenzeke kushiswa umuzi wakhe oseMbumbulu, ogwini oluseNingizmu yeTheku ngeSonto - wasala uwumlotha, kusha yonke into. Evikini elilodwa kwenzeka konke lokho, inhlangano engenzi nzuzo i-Ahmed Kathrada Foundation nayo isizwakalise ilaka layo, yagxeka uNgizwe ngenkulumo ayenze kwesinye seziqephu zohlelo lwakhe olusesitshini sikaMacG kwiYouTube oluthi Bhinca Nation. Le nhlangano ikhale ngokuthi enye yezinkulumo zikaNgizwe nasuke ebameme ohlelweni lwakhe iwukucwasa ngokwebala futhi yagxeka kakhulu ukuvama kwabo ukusebenzisa igama eliwukucwasa amaNdiya ngokwebala elithi “amakula”. I-Ahmed Kathrada ixwayise nangokuthi iyabona umthelela omubi odalwa yizinkulumo zikaMchunu ezinokucwasa ngokwebala, ekhale ngokuthi kuphehla nokubhebhethekisa izenzo zodlame emphakathini, kangangokuthi uma kunganqandwa kungagcina kudala ukuthi lesi simo singalawuleki. OWAYENGUMSAKAZI woKhozi FM uNgizwe 'Sinqa Semfene' Mchunu Kuleso siqephu uNgizwe waphawula

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UNOBHALA Jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula UNOBHALA Jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula, usole umndeni wosomabhizinisi abafunelwa amacala kuleli, abakwaGupta, njengongqondongqondo emkhankasweni weMKP wokhetho lwango-2024, owawudla lubi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. UMbalula uthe abakwaGupta yibona abapheka umkhankaso weMKP, owawushisa kakhulu enkundleni yezokuxhumana i-Tiktok. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma kwiLekgotla ye-ANC Youth League, eqhubeka eMangaung, eFree State. AbakwaGupta kusolwa ukuthi babezitamuzela kumathenda kuleli ngesikhathi umholi weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, engumengameli wezwe. Lo mndeni walifulathela elakuleli emva kokunindeka ezinsolweni ezenziwa kwiKhomishini eyayiphenya izinsolo zokuLawulwa koMbuso yiDlanzana. UMbalula uthe ubheke ukuthi iMKP iphinde ivimbanise kuzo zonke izinkundla zokuxhumana njengoba ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya seluseMome. "Iqembu likaZuma lalimandla kuTiktok ngoba umkhankaso walo wawuphushwa abakwaGupta. Sebecwilile manje kodwa uzobabona bazobuya njengoba sibheke okhethweni. Uzoze uzibuze ukuthi bavukaphi la bantu? Indlela abanamandla ngayo, benza uze ukhohlwe ukuthi uZuma akuyena owayephethe izwe ngesikhathi kunezinsolo zokulawulwa koMbuso yidlanzana." I-MKP yamangaza abaningi okhethweni lwango-2024, njengoba yaba yiqembu lesithathu ngobukhulu ePhalamende. UMbalula uthe ukugxeka kwabo

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: inhlonipho, wayeyazisa inhlonipho. Ngijabule kakhulu ukuthi kwenziwe umcimbi ofana nalona," kusho uNksz Zondo. UNksz Busisiwe Manqele uthe okunye uNkk Mkhonza abatshela khona ukuthi bakhuthalele imfundo ukuze babe nezinto zabo bangathembeli kwabesilisa, uma sebeganile. "Akagcinanga ngokugcizelela inhlonipho, wathi asizame ukuzenzela okwethu sikhuthalele imfundo njengoba abantu besilisa engafuni sithembele kubo kakhulu. Wayesitshela ukuthi asikhuthaze nenye intsha ize ematshitshini ukuze izofundiswa ngokuziphatha, yazi ukuthi izohamba kanjani empilweni. Namanje noma engasekho, ngiyacela intsha ukuthi ihambe iyohlolwa ngoba ziningi izinto ezifundwa laphayana," kusho yena. UNkk Sibongile Nsibande othathe izintambo kuNkk Mkhonza, uthe ushona nje ngo-2020, kuningi la ayesehambe khona eshintsha indlela izintombi okumele zibukeke ngayo. Uthe imifaniswano egqokwa yizintombi manje ezindaweni ezihlukene yasungulwa yilona wesifazane, neyagcina isigcwele zonke izindawo. "Siyabonga kuNkk Sibonga Dlamini ngokuthi sifike nalo mbono, wasukumela phezulu wathi umcimbi walolu hlobo kumele ube khona, nakhu namhlanje sihlangene lapha. Ngiyacela kuMasipala wesiFunda iZululand nomncane Abaqulusi ukuthi baqhubeke nokuseseka uma kukhona esikucelayo ukuyisa izintombi phambili,"

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: siyosho ngazwi linye ukuthi akangadedelwa nhlobo ngebheyili. Sifuna abolele phakathi,” usho kanje. Umufi kuthiwa ubesanesikhashana esincane efudukele eGoli, ukuyozama amatoho. Kuthiwa ubebuyele izinkonzo zePhasika ngempelasonto edlule, njengoba kuthiwa wahamba wayokhonza impelasonto yonke nezinye izihlobo. Kuthiwa wathi uma ebuya ngeSonto ekuseni, wahlala isikhashana, wase ethi usaya emzini obekuhlala khona isoka lakhe ukuyolanda izingubo zakhe ngoba uselitshele ukuthi abahlukane. Kuthiwa akabange esakwazi nokuzithatha izingubo njengoba kwasuka ingxabano emzini owakhelene nalowo obekuhlala kuwo isoka, lamgwaza, wayowela kuveranda wakwamakhelwane, lapho okuthiwa nakhona lafike lahosha ummese, lase limnquma phambi kwabo. NgoLwesihlanu, kusabalale izinkulumo eziqoshiwe lapho belisho khona ukuthi alizisoli nhlobo ngokumbulala. Lezi zinkulumo kuthiwa belizithumela kwi-group ka-WhatsApp womphakathi, limsola ngokungaziphathi kahle, lathi lalishilo ukuthi lizovele limbulale. Liphinde lathuka namadoda endawo, lathi limbulele ngoba wonke angabafazi. Siye koshicilela amaphoyisa engakaphawuli ngokuboshwa kukamsolwa.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: yindilinga eqoqekile. Yenzani i-liposuction? Uhlelo olwenziwa ngokuthi kususwe amafutha ndawana thize. Uma kwenziwa lolu hlelo, kufakwa umjovo omunca amafutha asuke enenkani ngesikhathi uzilolonga noma udla ngendlela ehlelekile. Kusuke kungahlosiwe ukunciphisa umzimba kodwa ukuguqula izingxenye zomzimba, okuyisisu, amathanga, izingalo nomhlane. Ngamanye amazwi kwi-liposuction kusuke kumuncwa mafutha ekubeni kwi-BBL kusuke kususwa amafutha kwenye ingxenye yomzimba ethuthelwa kwenye. Lezi zinhlelo zibiza malini? ENingizimu Afrika lezi zinhlelo zibiza imali ephakathi kuka-R75 000 kuya kuR100 000 ekubeni eTurkey kuphakathi kuka-R49 000 kuya ku-R70 000. Nakuba kunjalo kodwa udokotela waseGoli ongungoti emkhakheni wokuhlinzwa nokulungisa umzimba kuleli, uDkt Deon Weyers, uthe yena nge-360 Lipo ubiza imali ephakathi kuka-R115 000 noR125 000, kodwa kuya ngezidingo zofuna ukwenziwa nokuthi kumthathe isikhathi esingakanani. Nge-BBL uDkt Wyers uthe uhlelo lonke lubiza imali ephakathi kuka-R125 000 no-R135 000. Yibuphi ubungozi ongabhekana nabo? Ubuhlungu, ukuguquka kwesikhumba, ukutheleleka ngezifo, ukuphathwa yisifo samaphaphu nesenhliziyo uma lezi zinhlelo zenziwe odokotela abayimfundamakhwela.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Kuqwashiswa ngobungozi bokuphazanyiswa okuthile ube ushayela nokungadala izingozi zomgwaqo U-EPHRELI uphawulwa njengenyanga yokuqwashisa abantu ngobungozi bokushayela kukhona okubaphazamisayo, nokuyinto okuthiwa ingenye yezimbangela ezinkulu zezingozi emgwaqweni. Isikhulu senkampani efundisa ukushayela futhi egqugquzela ukuphepha emgwaqweni iMasterDrive, u-Eugene Herbert, sithe imininingwane yezinkampani zemishwalense ikhomba ukuthi ukushayela bese kuba nokukuphazamisayo kwenyusa amathuba okushayisa ngo-60%. “Ngokwe-World Health Organisation, ukusebenzisa iselula ube ushayela kunyusa amathuba okushayisa ngokuphindwe kane. Lokhu kuhlanganisa ukuyibamba ngesandla nokusebenzisa iBluetooth. ENingizimu Afrika, iRoad Traffic Management Corporation (RTMC) ihlale ibalula ukuphazamiseka komshayeli njengokuphambili ezingozini okufa kuzo abantu. Kunzima ukuthola ulwazi oluqondile ngoba emuva kwengozi akulula ukusho kugcwale umlomo ukuthi ingozi idalwe wumshayeli obephazamisekile,” kusho uHerbert. Uthe ucwaningo lososayensi luthi kunzima ukuthi unganaka ngokugcwele izinto ezimbili kanye kanye. Kunalokho umqondo ulokhu ushintsha ngokushesha unaka izinto ozenzayo ngokwahlukana. “Kuleyo mizuzwana unganakile yonke into ingaphuma esandleni. Ngesivinini esingu-120km/h, imoto ihamba ibanga elilinganiselwa ku-33 metres njalo ngomzuzwana. Ukubuka iselula imizuzwana emine kuya kwemihlanu kufana nokuhamba ibanga enkundleni

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-IFP uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa Image: DOCTOR NGCOBO/INDEPENDENT NEWSPAPERS AMALUNGU e-IFP asekhululekile ukugqoka izikibha ezinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. Lesi sinyathelo kuvunyelwane ngaso emhlanganweni woMkhandlu kaZwelonke kwi-IFP, obuseMpangeni, ngeSonto. Kulo mhlangano kuphinde kwavela nokuthi ingqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi beqembu izoba ngonyaka ozayo. Isolezwe lithole ngemithombo yalo ukuthi amalungu eqembu, anikezwe imvume yokuthi afake izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. Phambilini amalungu eqembu abevunyelwe ukufaka izikibha zomsunguli weqembu, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi. Omunye umthombo uveze ukuthi ingqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi beqembu izoba ngonyaka ozayo. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, ukuqinisekisile ukuthi ingqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi be-IFP kuzwelonke nasesifundazweni izoba ngoMashi. Uthe banqume ukuthi zonke izingqungquthela zibe ngonyaka ozayo ukuze kungaphazamiseki umkhankaso wokhetho. I-IFP yagcina ukuba nengqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi beqembu ngo-2019, ngesikhathi uButhelezi edlulisela izintambo kuHlabisa. UHlengwa akazange ayiphendule imibuzo mayelana nokusetshenziswa kobuso bukaHlabisa ezikibheni. Umholi we-IFP ocele ukuba igama lakhe lingadalulwa, uthe ujabulise okwengane ngesikhathi uMkhandlu kaZwelonke uvumelana ngokuthi sezingafakwa izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. "Ngangizibuza ukuthi azigqokwa ngani

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: siyixoxa ngobuqotho, sikhuluma ngento eyenzeka ngempela emiphakathini yangakithi futhi akukho esisaba ukukuvezela umphakathi," kusho uSiphosethu. Uthe akubonga kakhulu abalingisi abazinikele nababukeli. "Sibonga ababukeli okuyibo abantu ababaluleke kakhulu. Ababukeli bayakhuluma ngomdlalo kube nemibono ehlukene, nokuyinto ejabulisayo uma siyibona. Abanye uma siqokwa eminxeni efana nalena ngenxa yothando bayavota singabacelile kungakho umuntu ephethe lezi zindondo manje. Ngiyabonga kakhulu esiteshini iMutlichoice Canal + ngokungithemba ngesikhathi ngilethe umdlalo walolu hlobo kubo, bakholelwa kakhulu kuwo, namanje baphinde basipha enye isizini yesibili nokuyinto enkulu kithi yokuthi siqhubeke sixoxe izindaba zethu," kusho yena. Uthe lesi kuseyisiqalo kulo mkhakha akuwona njengoba iminingi imidlalo azimisele ukuyikhiqiza bese eyibona ikhonjiswa emazweni ahlukene.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: abaqhuba le mibhikisho. "Anginendaba namavoti abo, iMKP ingawathatha uma iwafuna amavoti abo. Angifuni mina ukuvotelwa abantu abafuna ukuthi ngizonde abantu balapha e-Afrika." UBarnes unxuse abantu ukuthi bengamnaki uMalema. UBarnes uthe naye uyahambisana nomkhankaso wokuxosha abokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Lo ogula ngekhanda othi badla intelezi nempesu, uma bekwenza ngakubo, abahambe ngakubo ke. Thina la KwaZulu sithi umuntu nomuntu akabuyele ngakubo. La kwelikaMthaniya sithi umuntu nomuntu akabuyele ngakubo. Uma uyiSulumane buyela ngakini emaSulumaneni amanye eSomalia. Uma ungowaseNigeria hamba ngakini eNigeria. Uma ungowaseZimbabwe hamba ngakini eZimbabwe. Anisenamahloni yini ukuthi selokhu kwathi nhlo iNingizimu Afrika iyahlupheka ngenxa yenu? Sesikhathele." UBarnes uthe nabo beyiNFP bazowujoyina umkhankaso wokuxosha abokufika wanxusa abaholi imibhikisho, uNgizwe Mchunu noNkosikhona "Phakel'uthakathi" Ndabandaba ukuba babameme emkhankasweni. UBarnes ukhuluma kanjena ngoMalema nje lamaqembu ahlela ukubambisana neMKP KwaZulu-Natal ekuketuleni uhulumeni wesifundazwe. I-MKP ihola umkhankaso wokugudluza uhulumeni wokubambisana oholwa i-IFP, iNFP ingababeki benkosi esiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal. Uma lingagcina liphumelela itulo leMKP lokuchitha uhulumeni wesifundazwe kungasho ukuthi izobambisana

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: le nkinga ayichaze njengencane athe unayo ngeBafana. “Konke okwenzeka kwiBafana kufanele sikwamukele kunjengoba kunjalo ngoba kangikholwa ukuthi kukhona okungaphezulu okusengenziwa nguBroos,” kusho uMngqithi. “Kubalulekile ukuqhakambisa iqhaza likaBroos kusukela ethatha umsebenzi kuze kube imanje. Usibuyisile isithunzi seqembu lethu lesizwe ngakho-ke kubalulekile ukuthi simshayele ihlombe. “Yize kunjalo kodwa kunezindawo okuthi uma ngibuka iqembu lesizwe ngisale ngizibuza imibuzo. Umbuzo ohlale usekhanda uthinta izitobha zamaphakathi nendawo eqenjini lesizwe. “Kangicabangi ukuthi iBafana iqine ngokwanele kubadlali basemuva baphakathi nendawo. Uma ngicabanga amava ezitha esizobhekana nazo bese ngiqaphela lokhu engikuqaphela kwiBafana ngisala nginovalo. “Kwezinye izindawo ngibona sikahle njengasohlangothini lwangesokudla khona emuva kodwa futhi kwesokunxele nakhona iyabuya imibuzo uma ibhola selisezitheni,” kusho uMngqithi. Phakathi kwabadlali okubhekwe ukuthi uBroos angabashiyi kwiNdebe yoMhlaba kwabadlala le ndawo uMngqithi akhala ngayo, singabala uMbekezeli “TLB” Mbokazi, Nkosinathi “Bhodlela” Sibisi, Khulumani Ndamane no-Ime Okon. Basekhona nabadlali abafana noSiyabonga Ngezana noGrant Kekana abasengaphoqa lo mqeqeshi ukuthi abakhumbule. UMngqithi wenelisekile ngoKhuliso Mudau noThabang Matuludi kodwa akeneme

text: bebonwa njengabahamba phambili ezweni futhi lokhu uyasigqugquzela umfutho wabo. Sithemba ukuthi sizoqhubeka nalokhu ngesizini entsha." author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: uKini Shandu, ukhonza kwaShembe.Owayeyisihlabani emculweni kamaskandi, uMgqumeni "Idlamanzi" Khumalo, wayekhonza kwaShembe futhi waze waqamba ingoma ethi Inkonzoni. UMgqumeni wazakhela ugazi ngokusungula ushuni osadlisa namanje nokuyiwo ofudunyezwe ngabaculi abaningi. UMengameli weNkatha Freedom Party, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uyiNazaretha benobeyiPhini likaMengameli wamaJaji eKZN, uMjabuliseni Madondo. OwayeyiMantshi kuleli uMthembeni Phineas Mpanza nobenguMphathi woKhozi FM, uBonga Mpanza, bangamaNazaretha. Ngakho uma ukhonza kwaShembe ungazinyezi, uzitshele ukuthi udukile. Unenqwaba yabantu ababalulekile abangamaNazaretha. UNDLUNKULU uNtokozo KaMayisela Zulu

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abasolwa ababili abebefunelwa amacala okubulala. La madoda amataniswa emacaleni amabili okubulala ahlukene enzeke ekuqaleni kwalo nyaka. Kuthiwa amaphoyisa alandele umkhondo wabasolwa emzini oseMhlasini, okuthe uma efika kwaduma izulu lezandla. Kutholakale izibhamu ezimbili endaweni yesigameko.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ukungavuselelwa kwenkontileka entsha yalo mdlalo yikhona okwenze kwaba nesikhala ekutheni umdlalo ungaqophi. "Bagcina ukuqopha ngonyaka odlule, kuthe kuqala unyaka iSABC yangacacisa ukuthi umdlalo iyawuqeda yini noma cha. Kuthe uma sebeqala befuna umdlalo ubuye isikhathi sabe sesihambe kakhulu kungeke kusenzeka ukuthi kusheshe, ukuze iziqephu zidlalwe manje, nezinguquko ezibe khona kulo mdlalo zibe zinkulu njengoba usuhambile ungeke usaqoshwa KwaZulu-Natal usuzogxila eGauteng manje," kusho umthombo. Uthe uma usubuya ziningi izinguquko ezizobonakala kuwo njengoba kukhona abalingisi abasha, abanye beshiyile ngenxa yezinguquko zokuthutha komdlalo. Abalingisi balo mdlalo, uFanele Zulu noNontsikelelo Mthiyane abalingisa izindawo eziphambili, enkundleni yokuxhumana i-Instagram babonge abathandi balo mdlalo ngokubeseka ngesizini yokuqala baveza ukuthi bona basabuya kulo mdlalo.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Sibusiso Mash Mashiloane, Jimmy Nevis, Yussef Dayes, Jazzwrld noThukuthela, Sipho Hotstix Mabuse, Linda Sikhakhane nabanye abaningi. UZoë Modiga obenandisa kwikhonsathi yamahhala yeCTIJF eGreenmarket Square, udlale ingoma entsha okokuqala. Ubhale ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi i-albhamu yakhe entsha izophuma ingakapheli le nyanga UMAKADEBONA uSipho “Hotstix” Mabuse

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: yakwamanye amazwe ingasawufuni umsindo. Okunye engikuqaphelile ukuthi noma ngabe uhamba ngayiphi i-drive mode kodwa ayikuxukuzi noma ayizweli kakhulu emgwaqweni nokuyenza kube yimoto ekahle yansuku zonke. Kuphethroli bathi idla amalitha angu-7.2 ngo-100km ethangini elingu-50 litres. Ekupheleni konyaka odlule ngesikhathi kufika isitokwe sokuqala seGolf 8.5 GTI, kwa-VW kuleli baveza ukuthi abayithengayo wumbala kuphela into abazokwazi ukuyikhetha ngoba ifika isifakwe yonke into. Namanje lokho kusaqhubeka. Akukho ukwengeza imali ukhethe okufunayo. Ngaphambili ifike nama-headlights angama-LED asezingeni eliphezulu. Ahlanganiswa wulayini ogijima ngezansi kobomvu wodumo kwi-grille. Uphawu lwakwa-VW seluyakhanya ngaphambili. Amasondo enyathela ngawo angu-19” abizwa ngeQueenstown futhi akhelwe iGTI kuphela. Ngemuva izinqawe ezimbili ziyacwebezela bese kuba namalambu angamaLED. Okhakhayini into ethandwayo ezimotweni zakwaVW, i-panoramic sunroof nayo ifika ngaphandle kokwengeza imali njengakwendala. I-VW Golf 8.5 GTI ifika namandla anyusiwe angu-195kW Ngaphakathi inezihlalo eziyisikhumba. Ezangaphambili uyakwazi ukuzishisisa noma uzibandise. Okunye okwazi ukukushisisa yisiteringi osekubuyiswe kuso amabhathini akudala aqinile kwazise amakhasimende ayekhala ngacwebezelayo athinteka kalula. Iphinde ibe ne-digital instrument

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ehlale iyithwalisa ubunzima iSundowns, izodlalela ekhaya kuqala neSiwelele FC. Yonke le midlalo iza kwiSundowns nezivivinyo ezinzima kulandela ukukhombisa kwayo izimpawu zokuba buthaka kwazise idlale ngokulingana kwemibili edlule yeligi. Maphakathi nale midlalo yeligi, kukhona owomlenze wokuqala weChampions League ne-AS Far yaseMorocco, ngoMeyi 15. Nakuba ingacentiwe indlela yePirates kodwa eyayo ikhombisa izimpawu zokuthamba yize kungelula ukuqagela umphumela kungakadlalwa. Imidlalo esalele iPirates ngeyeStellenbosch FC, Magesi FC, Durban City ne-Orbit College. UCardoso ukwamukele eMhlathuze ukuthi iBay ibuveze obala ubuthaka beSundowns ikakhulukazi uma behlasela. “IBay ibuveze obala ubuthaka bethu uma sihlasela ngakho-ke siyabonga ukuthi kukhona esikufundile kuwona,” kusho uCardoso sakubhuqa. “Siyasamukela isimo esikusona namaphutha esiwenzile siyawazi ngakho-ke akukho okuzoshintsha ngaphandle kokulungela ukubhekana nesivivinyo esilandelayo,” kushaya uCardoso ngamafuphi. Omunye umdlalo weBetway Premiership onamuhla iSiwelele FC izobhekana neKaizer Chiefs ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eFree State Stadium, eBloemfontein.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: BEKUKUHLE kwethulwa isakhiwo esisha sebandla i-Great Army of Jehovah Ministries eliKwaSwayimane, eMgungundlovu KUBHEKWE ukuthi sibe wusizo emphakathini futhi silekelele ngokubamba iqhaza ezinhlelweni ezihlukene ezizothuthukisa umphakathi isakhiwo esisha sebandla i-Great Army of Jehovah Ministries, esiseMambedwini, KwaSwayimane. Lokho kushiwo wumholi waleli bandla, uMfu Wiseman Vidima, ekhuluma emcimbini wokwethulwa kwesakhiwo sebandla ngokusemthethweni emcimbini obungesonto eledlule, lapho kubuthane khona amalungu ebandla, ubuholi bomphakathi izinhlaka ezizimele nezikahulumeni. “Ngizovula izandla ebantwini bakule ndawo namaphethelo abazofuna ukwenza izinhlelo nemibuthano ehlukene okungaphambene nenqubo kaNkulunkulu ukuthi beze basebenzise le ndlu. Sihlose ukuthi ibe wusizo kubantu bakithi,” usho kanje. UMFU Wiseman Vidima noMfu Vusi Dube bevula ngokusemthethweni isakhiwo esisha sebandla i-Great Army of Jehovah Ministries eliKwaSwayimane, eMgungundlovu Omunye wezihambeli ebezikhona kulo mcimbi,uNkk Nomfundo Mcoyi-Zondo wenkampani yabangcwabi Icebolethu Funerals, nongomunye wabafake isandla ukwakha lesi sakhiwo. Uthe kuhlale kusemkhondweni wabo ukubamba iqhaza ezinhlelweni ezisiza umphakathi. UMFU Vusi Dube ephethe uhlelo emcimbini wokwethula isakhiwo sebandla i-Great Army of Jehovah Ministries eliKwaSwayimane, eMgungundlovu “Sithemba

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: Les, esidayise ngaphezu kwe-platinum eliphindwe kahlanu. UMCULI wama-piano uZee Nxumalo usemenyezelwe yiSpotify njengenxusa lohlelo lwayo lokuqhakambisa amaciko esifazane Uqhubekile nokuhamba phambilini ngengoma yakhe ebishisa izikhotha nyakenye ethi Ngisakuthanda, apike kuyona oPYY Log Drum King no-TBO. Ezikhulumela ngokuthola leli thuba, uZee uthe into abona ukuthi imsize kakhulu ukuze afike kulesi sigaba akusona manje wukwenza umculo wakhe ngendlela afisa ngayo nakholelwa kuyona, wangabe esazixaka kakhulu ngokulandela okushiwo abantu. “Sengifundile ukuthi kumqoka ukuvikela indawo yami nobumina uqobo, okuyinto engenzekanga kalula ngoba ekuqaleni bengihlale ngikhathazeka kakhulu ngokuthi abantu bacabangani ngami. Manje sengizibeka mina phambili nengikuzwa ngaphakathi,” usho kanje. Uthe ithuba alithole manje lisho lukhulu kuyena ngenxa yokuthi libeka ngokusobala ukuthi ukwenza umculo ngendlela ethinta nejabulisa abantu akuphoqi ukuthi ube wubulili obuthile kuphela, kepha kudinga ukuthi wenze okusuka ngaphakathi kuwena zikhathi zonke, nokuthi ukholelwe entweni oyenzayo. UMCULI wama-piano uZee Nxumalo useqokwe yiSpotify ukuba abe yinxusa lohlelo lwayo lokuqhakambisa amaciko esifazane Bekungekhona okokuqala leli ciko lihlonishwa

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UQHAKAMBISA eyokuvikela irekhodi lakhe umshayisibhakela waseNingizimu Afrika, uMxolisi "Nation" Zuma, ozobhekana noFillipus "Energy'' Nghitumbwa waseNambia, okleliswe ezilinganisweni zomhlaba. UZuma (10-0-0) noNghitumbwa (16-2-0) bazobanga ibhande le-WBO Global Super Bantamweight empini ezoba seWindhoek Country Club Resort and Casino ngoMgqibelo. Leli bhande beliphethwe nguNghitumbwa kusukela alithola ehlula ngomngqimuzo womlalisa phansi umshayisibhakela wakuleli, u-Innocent "Tycoon" Mantengu ngo-2021, kodwa waliphucwa nguJohn Riel Casimero wasePhilippines, ngo-2023. UZuma osaziwine ngomngqimuzo womlalisa phansi zonke izimpi asazilwile esibhakeleni esikhokhelayo, uzoba ngumshayisibhakela wesine waseNingizimu Afrika ozobhekana noNghitumbwa osazidlele amahlanga kubona bonke abakuleli asangene nabo eringini. Ngaphandle kukaMantengu, uNghitumbwa wahlula ngomcacamezelo womlalisa phansi uSabelo Ngebiyana wase-Eastern Cape evikela ibhande le-WBO Global Super Bantamweight ngo-2022, wanqoba ngendlela efanayo kuThato Bonokoane empini yebhande le-WBO Africa Global Super Bantamweight ngo-2023. Nakuba uZuma enengcindezi yokuqeda ukukhonya kukaNghitumbwa kubashayisibhakela baseMzansi, ukubeke phambili ubumqoka bokubuya nerekhodi lakhe lingangcolile. Ezimpini ezingu-16 aziwinile uNghitumbwa, ezingu-14 uzinqobe ngomngqimuzo womlalisa phansi. "Kubaluleke kakhulu ukuvikela irekhodi lami ngoba liyangikhulumela. Ukuthi angikaze ngihlulwe

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: wukuthi uDladla akazo iziqu zokuqeqesha ezifanele njengoba ngesizini ezayo bezodlala kwiCaf Confederation Cup. Ngokomthetho weCaf, uDladla ngeke avumeleke ukuhlala ebhentshini njengoba eneziqu zokuqeqesha uCaf B License esikhundleni sezeCaf A noma ezePro License. Lokhu kusho ukuthi iCity izophoqeleka ukuqasha umqeqeshi oneziqu ezifanele, uDladla abuyele esikhundleni sokuba yiphini. “Sizolibuyekeza ithimba labaqeqeshi ngezinhloso ezinhle ngekusasa leqembu. Leli yithimba lesikhashana njengoba singakamqoki ngokugcwele umqeqeshi oyinhloko. "Sesisalelwe yimidlalo emibili ukusonga isizini, ngakho isinqumo ngethimba labaqeqeshi sizosithatha uma kuphela isizini. "Siyazazi izinhlelo esinazo ngesizini ezayo ngakho silinde kuphele isizini kucace ukuthi siyangena kwi-MTN8 noma cha,” kusho uKadodia.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: kuzona zonke izinkampani ezibambisene nathi kuze kube manje njengoba imidlalo sesiyethula. Asingabazi ukuthi ikusasa lazo liyakhanya kulo mkhakha, ngelinye ilanga siyozibona sezisenzela imidlalo emikhulu," kusho uShirley. Uthe imidlalo emifishane njengalena, babonile ukuthi abantu abaningi abangababukeli babo bayayithakasela yingakho bekhethe ukugxila kuyona okwamanje. Uthe bangasho ukuthi sekuyinto abazogxila kuyo isikhathi eside. "Imidlalo emide inawo umthelela wokuthi ababukeli bagcine bengasayithandi kahle, ngakho ukwenza lena emincane esheshe ifike esixazululweni, kuyinto esithe uma sibuka sabona ukuthi iyasisebenzela," kusho yena. Kule midlalo kukhona othi Love At Second Sight, kuwo okulingisa phambili u-Amanda Seome, Nduduzo Zuma, Aluve Mjali noNimrod Nkosi. Omunye umdlalo, uthi Kuningi, kuwo kulingisa phambili uSamkelo Ndlovu, Kay Sibiya, Simphiwe Ngema, Andy Mnguni noRatanang Mogotsi. Eminye ezokhonjiswa kubalwa ethi Amanzi Endlini, Ke Nyala Jwang? Lobola lama 2000, Mamfundisi Bae neminye. Izinkampani eziqophe le midlalo kubalwa kuzona iNgomoya Films, Weldun Media, Pula Bakgaga, Behind the Best neMthakathi Entertainment.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: USUQALILE umjaho wokuhola i-DA KwaZulu-Natal, njengoba ilungu lomkhandlu weNdlu yeziFundazwe ePhalamende, uMnuz Mzamo Billy, selimemezele ukuthi lizongenela umbango wokuhola leli qembu esifundazweni. I-DA izoba nengqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi besifundazwe ngenyanga ezayo futhi amalungu aseqalile ukuphakamisa amagama abantu afuna ukuthi bangenele izikhundla. Izolo uBilly umemezele ukwamukela ukuphakanyiswa kwegama lakhe ukuba lingenele umbango wokuhola isifundazwe. Ukusho lokhu embhalweni awufake ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. "Kuyintokozo ukuba nginazise ukuthi ngivumile ukuba igama lami liphakanyiselwe emjahweni wokuhola i-DA KwaZulu-Natal. Ukuphakanyiswa kwegama lami kwenzeka ngesikhathi esimqoka. Ligaya ngomunye umhlathi lapha esifundazweni njengoba sibona kwanda ukuphatha ngokubambisana ezinhlakeni zikahulumeni. I-DA kufanele ingasali ngemuva." UBilly uthe umkhankaso wakhe uzogxila emaphuzwini amathathu. "Ngifuna ukukhulisa i-DA ifinyelele nasezindaweni engekho kuzona. Ngifuna iKwaZulu-Natal ibe imbumba, lokhu kuzokwenza ngokudala ubumbano ezinhlakeni zeqembu. Ngifuna ukuthi i-DA kube iyona ephathayo ngesikhathi esizayo, kufanele i-DA ibe iqembu abantu abazolethemba ukuthi lingakwazi ukuphatha." Uthe uzohambela ezindaweni ezahlukene esifundazweni lapho ezobe exoxa khona nezithunywa eziya engqungqutheleni. UBilly ubeyikhansela kuMasipala waseThekwini

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Ithemba kuqashwa othisha baka-Grade R Archives BAQALA emsebenzini ngenyanga ezayo, othisha abangu-500 abazofundisa uGrade R KwaZulu-Natal, abaqashwe nguMnyango wezeMfundo esifundazweni. Bese kunesikhathi ibangwa indaba yokuqashwa kothisha abafundisa leli banga kulesi sifundazwe. UMphathiswa woMnyango, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, uthe laba basebenzi baqala ngo-Ephreli 1, emsebenzini, wathi babaqasha ukuze baqinise isisekelo semfundo kulesi sifundazwe. "UMnyango uzibophezele ekulandeleni umthetho wezikole iBela, okubeka kucace ukuthi uGrade R, usuyimpoqo kuleli. Siqinisekisa nokuthi othisha abafundisa leli banga, baneziqu ezifanele kanti abafundi sifuna bafundiswe ngabantu abazinikele," usho kanje. Uthe labo thisha bazokwehlisa nesibalo sabafundi emakilasini kulandelwa umkamo obekiwe wokuthi uthisha oyedwa ufundisa abafundi abangaki ekilasini. "Ukuqinisa esisekelweni semfundo kuzokwenza ukuthi zibe zinhle izithelo emabangeni aphezulu, kubalwa no-matric. Labo thisha bazosiza kakhulu nasezindaweni zasemakhaya, lapho bezovulela khona iminyango abafundi abahlala kulezi zindawo." Uthe bahleli befuna ukuqikelela ukuthi umfundi oqala isikole, uthola imfundo esezingeni. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, kusanothisha abangaqashiwe abahlala bekhala ngokunqaba kwemisebenzi emnyangweni. Iningi labo lize liqhinqe emahhovisi oMnyango

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: sizibophezela ekuholeni ngobuqotho." UNtuli uthe uyazi ukuthi kwesinye isikhathi ukuqondiswa ubugwegwe kwezikhulu kubanjezelwa wukuthi kunemigomo okufanele ilandelwe uma kunohlelo lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe. "Kufanele kube nezingxoxo nezinye izinhlaka ezifana neSpecial Investigating Unit, ukuze kubonakale ukuthi zingaxazululwa kanjani izinkinga ezibambezela ukuqondiswa kobugwegwe. Kufanele kube khona indlela yokusebenzisana ezokwenza ukuthi bathathelwe izinyathelo ngokushesha abathintekayo." UNtuli uphinde watshela izikhulu zeminyango ukuba ziqinisekise ukuthi bakhokhelwa zingakapheli izinsuku ezingu-30, osomabhizinisi abasuke benikwe amathenda. "Umthetho obekwe wuMnyango kaMgcinimafa uthi kufanele iminyango kahulumeni ikhokhele usomabhizinisi zingakapheli izinsuku ezingu-30, ngaphandle uma kunezizathu ezivimba ukuthi umnyango uhlangabezane nalo mnqamulajuqu. Yonke iminyango kahulumeni kufanele ilwele ukuthi ibakhokhela bonke osomabhizinisi zingakapheli izinsuku ezibekiwe. Ukukhokha ngesikhathi kweminyango kahulumeni, kuzokwenza ukuthi amabhizinisi amancane angaphazamiseki kuphinde kudaleke namathuba emisebenzi."

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Galaxy. “Ngesizini edlule sidlale kuma-Play Offs, nakule sizini sisenethuba lokuwadlala yize inhloso yethu enkulu kuwukuwina iligi. NakwiNedbank Cup siyafuna ukwenza kahle, ngakho ngeke sithi sesihambe ibanga elingaka, saze safinyelela kowandulela owamanqamu, bese sizithela ngabandayo ngoba sithi sibheke iligi," kusho uSkelem. author: Zakhele Xaba
text: nabaphathi mayelana nalokho (ukuthi uMbokazi uzoya yini kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ka-Under 20) kodwa ngeke simvimbe umuntu ekudlaleleni iqembu lesizwe,"kusho u-Ouaddou. Umengameli weSouth African Football Association (Safa), uDanny Jordaan, ucashunwe yiSABC ethi unethemba kokuthi iPirates izomdedela uMbokazi. "Asikazi sibe nomdlali wasemuva oseqophelweni eliphezulu kule minyaka (engaphansi kuka-20). Ithuba lokudlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ka-Under 20 likhulu ngoba umhlaba wonke uyayibuka. Ngithemba ukuthi sizobona ngaso linye nePirates,"usho kanje. "Sineqembu eliqinile futhi ngiyathemba ukuthi uMbokazi uzohamba nalo ngoba uma ekhona udonga lwethu lwasemuva luzoqina kakhulu." Abanye abadlali okulindeleke ukuthi bathole indawo esikwatini sikaMdaka nguSmith, Siyabonga Mabena weMamelodi Sundowns noNaledi Hlongwane weKaizer Chiefs.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ukuthi iTheku jikelele linangu-40, kodwa kuwona, kusebenza angu-26, wonke lawa amanye afile. “Mina ngifuna kube khona ozothathelwa izinyathelo kwabama-ambulensi. Nginomuzwa wokuthi bangenzele phansi ngokufika sekwedlule isikhathi baphinde benza nobudedengu bokungawuphathi umbhede wezingane,” kusho uNksz Nxumalo. Uveze eyokuthi umhlengikazi awafonela abama-ambulensi wagcizelela ukuthi lo mbhede awuphathwe futhi ushajwe ngoba isiguli esiyiswa esibhedlela yingane ezalwe ngaphambi kwesikhathi. “Okwenza bafike emva kwesikhathi mina angikwazi futhi angikwazi nokwadala ukuthi bafike bengawuphethe kuthi noma sebewulandile bangawushaji,baze baphoqeleka ukuthi balindwe besawushajile,” usho kanje.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMNUZ S'bu Mpisane eNkantolo eNkulu eThekwini, izolo ASIBANGE sisalalelwa izolo, eNkantolo eNkulu yaseThekwini, isicelo sombango wamafa ophakathi kowayeyiphoyisa likaMasipala weTheku, uMnuz S'bu Mpisane nowayengunkosikazi wakhe, uNksz Shauwn Mkhize. Bekulindeleke ukuthi inkantolo ilalele isicelo sombango wamafa kulandela isehlukaniso somshado esakhishwa yinkantolo ngoNovemba 2024. Nokho kwagcina kungafinyelelwanga ekutheni bazohlukaniselana kanjani amafa. UMpisane ufuna kubuyekezwe izinto ezimbalwa mayelana nokwahlukaniselana kwamafa njengoba babeshade umshado owahlanganisayo. UMpisane obeswenke ngesudi emnyama enemikhono emfishane, ubonakale efika enkantolo ngethemba lokuthi udaba lwakhe luzolalelwa. Nokho ubonakale eqhwetshwa ebizelwa ngaphandle ngabameli bakhe, ukuyongqumuza okuthile, okuthe emva kwesikhathi babonakala bephuma behamba. Ubebukela ezikhululekele ebusweni, engakhombisi kudinwa noma kuphatheka kabi. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi abameli bakhe belulekwe ngokuthi bambhalele incwadi uNksz Mkhize, emphoqa ukuba abekhona enkantolo uma sekulalelwa isicelo sikaMpisane. Ngaleso sizathu icala lagcina lingahlalanga, kwangacaca nokuthi lizophinde lihlale nini. Ngokwamaphepha asenkantolo, uMpisane ufuna kubuyekelwe isigaba sesibili sencwadi yesehlukaniso, ukuze kwengezwe ezinye izinto, eveza eyombango oqhubekayo wempahla abayithola ngesikhathi beshade umshado ohlanganisa amafa.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMLINGISI uRosemary Zimu ozobonakala elingisa emdlalweni oqale izolo othi Strings Attached UMLINGISI, uRosemary Zimu, uthi kumvule amehlo yize eseshadile ukuba semdlalweni othinta ukuhlukumezeka othandweni, njengoba izolo kuqale umdlalo othi Strings Attached, okhonjiswa ngo-8 ebusuku kuMzansi Magic. Kulo mdlalo uRosemary ulingisa indawo ephambili kaLethabo okungowesifazane othandana nowesilisa omhlukumeza ngokumenzisa izinto angazithandi. URosemany uthe indawo kaXolani elingiswa uMelusi Mbhele iveza ukuthi owesifazane angazithola kanjani ethandana nowesilisa onamanga owenza konke ukuze kubukeke sengathi uyamthanda owesifazane anaye kanti ufuna ukufeza izinhloso zakhe. "Umdlalo oveza owesilisa edlala umdlalo womqondo ngowesifazane ozithola esengene shi ezinkingeni ekubeni yena ubezitshela ukuthi uze ngothando. Into esihlala siyibona lena kwabanye abantu, nesithemba ukuthi kukhona abazovuleka amehlo. ULethabo ngowesifazane obheke umndeni wakhe njengoba kunguye osebenzayo kodwa ukuhlangana nalona wesilisa kushintsha izinto eziningi empilweni yakhe," kusho uRosemary. Uphrojusa walo mdlalo, uNthabi Tau wenkampani iRay Content Hub, uthe umdlalo awusungule ngemuva kokubona ukuthi ukuba sothandweni nomuntu okudlala umqondo kuyinto esithe chithi saka, nokuvezwa

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ebidla ngayo ibingeyimbi njengoba ibingu-9.8l/100km. U-gearbox ozishintshayo ubuwenza kube lula ukuyishayela kunesiminyaminya futhi nendawo yokuphumuza unyawo lwesokunxele inkulu. Njengoba kuyimoto yejubane nje, ithanda ukuzwela kakhulu emabhampini nokwengezelwa ngamasondo amancane anamarimu angu-18 inch. Ngizwe nomsinjwana womoya uthanda ukuba mkhulu ngaphakathi ngenxa yamawindi angenawo ama-frame. Izihlalo zeToyota GR Yaris ziyakubamba ukuthi unganyakazi futhi bazehlisile zaba phansi Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Izihlalo bazehlisile kancane uhlala usondelane nomgwaqo. Ngikuthandile ukuthi bayifake ezokuphepha njengokuthi isho uma kunemoto eseceleni, ikusize ukuhlala emzileni kanjalo ne-adaptive cruise control. Indlela eyakhiwe ngayo kunzima ukuzama ukuqalaza eceleni ukuthi kunemoto yini kwi-blind spot. Ukujeqeza esibukweni kuvele kukukhombise ama-hips ayo amakhulu ngemuva. Ngaphakathi ilayisha abagibeli abane yize ngemuva isikhala sisincane njengesebhuthi. Izihlalo zangaphambili ungena zikubambe kube sengathi ugonile. I-touchscreen infotainment system bayenze yabheka ngakumshayeli futhi yehlukile kuneyezinye izimoto zakwaToyota emakethe yakuleli. Iveza ingemuva uma upaka, uxhuma iselula nge-Apple CarPlay yize bekubuye kuhluphe, futhi udlala umsakazo. I-GR Yaris ayinantanga kuleli ngoba ezinye zinkulu kunayo

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUSUKA kwesokunxele usomabhizinisi ne-podcaster u-Amahle-Imvelo Jaxa, umculi weRn'B uLloyiso Gijana, uPhiona Okumu noBryan Johnson beSpotify bekwesinye sezigcawu zokubhunga ngomculo nobuciko ebesiseRosebank, eGoli ngoLwesithathu Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE ILOKHU ikhule njalo inzuzo yemali eyenziwa amaciko akuleli zwe ngokulalelwa komculo wawo kwiSpotify. Izibalo zangonyaka odlule zikhombie ukuthi ukulalelwa komculo wawo kungenise imali ebalelwa ngaphezulu kuka-R504 million, okusho ukwenyuka ngo-28%. Lezi zibalo zihlaluke esigcawini seSpotify saminyaka yonke sokucobelelana ngolwazi lwezomculo nezobuciko i-Loud & Clear, ebesisemahhovisi amasha eSpotify eRosebank, eGoli kuleli sonto. Njengoba iSpotify igubha iminyaka ewu-20 yasungulwa, okuhlanganisa neyisishiyagalombili yethulwa kuleli zwe kusuka ngo-2018, lezi zibalo zikhombise ukukhula okukhulu okukhomba ukuthi amaciko akuleli enza kahle ngokulalelwa komculo wawo. I-Loud & Clear iwuhlelo lwale nkampani eyisizinda sokulalela umculo wamazwe ehlukene emhlabeni, nolwaqala ngo-2021 ngenhloso yokuveza obala izibalo ezikhomba ukuthi umculo wamaciko ulalelwa kangakanani nokuveza ukuthi inzuzo yenziwa kanjani ukuze kungabi nakudideka emacikweni afaka umculo kuyona. Okugqame embikweni walezi zibalo yilokhu okulandelayo: Umqondisi omkhulu weSpotify kwiSub-Saharan

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UPAPA Penny usule isigubhukane ekubeni yilungu leMK Party nasekubeni yilungu laleli qembu ePhalamende UMAKADEBONA emculweni nezikaqedisizingu obesegxile kwezepolitiki, uGezane Eric Kobane, odume ngelikaPapa Penny - ukhale ngobunyoka ebuholini beqembu lezepolitiki uMkhonto Wesizwe Party (MK) ngenkathi esula isigubhukane kulona ngoLwesihlanu. Encwadini yakhe yokwesula ayibhekise kumholi weqembu uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uPapa Penny uthe ukwesula ekubeni yilungu le-MKP nasekubeni yilungu layo ePhalamende kube yisinqumo esingelula neze nesimphule inhliziyo. Uthe wajoyina i-MK Party ngokwakhe ngoba efuna ukukhulula abantu bakuleli zwe, kodwa lokho kwaphazamiseka ngenxa yengxenye ethile yobuholi baleli qembu eLimpopo - akhale ngokuthi idale ukuthi abe nyamanambana emalungwini eqembu. Ukhale nangokuthi ubebhekene nezimpi ebeziqondiswe kuyena, ehlukunyezwa futhi kwenziwa isiqiniseko sokuthi uhlale ezizwa ecindezelekile. Wengeze nangokuthi bekuze kusetshenziswane nabezindaba ukucekela phansi isithunzi sakhe negama lakhe akusebenzele kanzima. UPAPA Penny usule isigubhukane ekubeni yilungu leMK Party nasekubeni yilungu laleli qembu ePhalamende Image: VUYILE MADWANTSI Njengoba ngiwumuntu okhathalele inhlalakahle yabantu neyomphakathi, bengingazibekezelela lezi zimo ukube beziyimbangela yabanye

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: kubasebenzi, abahambi, nengqalasizinda endaweni. "Ngenhloso yokuqinisekisa ukuphepha kwabo bonke abathintekayo, isiphathimandla esilawula imingcele sithathe isinqumo sokumisa ukusebenza emingceleni ethintekile kuze kube yilapho izimo ziba ngcono.. Bonke abasebenzi be-BMA, amalungu eKomidi Lokuphathwa Kwemingcele kanye nezimoto ezisebenza kule mingcele ethintekile zikhishwe njengesinyathelo sokuqapha ezokuphepha," kusho abeBMA ngesitatimende Abahambi abahlose ukungena eSangweni lasePafuri balulekwa ukuthi basebenzise i-Punda Maria Gate njengendawo ephephile. IPunda Maria Gate itholakala cishe kumakhilomitha angu-65 ukusuka ePafuri.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: bengxoxo phakathi kukaLebo M noLearnmore kwi-Instagram. Engxoxweni uchazile ukuthi iNgonyama yigama lokubiza inkosi, hhayi ibhubesi. ULearnmore uphendule ngokuthi kuyiphutha ukuthi uyibona ngale ndlela ngoba inhloso ngamahlaya wukuqala ingxoxo ngakho uLebo M usenethuba lokuthi afundise abantu. Uphinde waveza ukuthi oyisemkhulu bangamaZulu bathuthela eZimbabwe futhi yena uhlale KwaZulu-Natal isikhathi eside. USimphiwe uthe uLebo M uzame ukukhuluma kahle noLearnmore kodwa bangazwana. "Ubemtshela ukuthi angadlala kanjani ngomlando obaluleke kangaka, zathathana. Manje udayisa izimpahla ezinebhubesi, uLebo M useyambopha," kusho uSimphiwe.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe USIYABONGA Mbongo waMajimbos ebanga ibhola noMouhamed Wagne weSenegal emdlalweni we-Afcon Under 17 eMohammed VI Complex, eRabat, ngoLwesine LIVULE ngonyawo oluhle liqoqa amaphuzu aphelele iqembu lesizwe lika-Under 23, Amajimbos, liguqisa iSenegal emdlalweni ka-Group D we-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) Under 17 ngoLwesine kusihlwa eComplex Mohammed VI Pitch 3, eRabat, eMorocco. ISenegal yiyona ebone inethi kuqala ngesiwombe sokuqala ngegoli elivalelwe phakathi uCheik Thior ngomzuzu ka-44. Nokho Amajimbos abuye ngesivuthevuthe ngesiwombe sesibili u-Inganathi Simama eshaya elokulinganisa ngomzuzu ka-48. Ukucindezela kwaMajimbos kuthele izithelo ethola igoli lesibili ngomzuzu ka-55 umkhonto ugwaza ekhaya uThior ezama ukususa umhlola ekhaya. Amajimbos aqhathwe neSenegal, Algeria neGhana kuGroup D. Azobuyela ensimini ngokubhekana ne-Algeria ngeSonto ngo-5 ntambama kulo mqhudelwano we-Afcon U-17 oqale ngoLwesithathu, ozosongwa ngoJuni 2. Kulo mqhudelwano waseMorocco, Amajimbos adinga ukufinyelela kuma-quarterfinal ukuze ezophinda azibekisele indawo koweNdebe yoMhlaba ka-Under 17 ezodlalelwa eQatar, ngoNovemba 19 kuya kuDisemba 13. Nanyakenye leli qembu laMajimbos lafinyelela kowamanqamu kwi-Afcon eyayiseMorocco, lapho laguqiswa khona ngosokhaya

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UJABULILE Majola ozobe enandisa okokuqala kwi-Cape Town International Jazz Festival UMCULI okhulele eGreytown, uJabulile Majola, uthi unovalo ngokuyocula okokuqala emcimbini i-Cape Town International Jazz Festival (CTIJF) ezoba se-Cape Town International Convention Centre izinsuku ezimbili ngoMashi 27, uze uphele ngakusasa. UJabulile usezakhele udumo ngomculo wakhe oxoxa indaba nothakaselwa ngabaningi. Phakathi kwezingoma adume ngazo kubalwa iWoza Mntana, Ujakalasi, Uyinkosi Yamakhosi, Ubhubesi nezinye. “Ngishaywa wuvalo, abantu bengalindela lokho kodwa ngithobekile kakhulu, akwenzeki kunoba wubani,” kusho uJabulile. Ubekhuluma ohlelweni i-Expresso kwi-S3 lapho ebebuzwa ukuthi uyilungiselele kanjani le ndumezulu okuzoba ngeka-23 nonyaka? Uthe ufuna ukuxoxa indaba yakhe ngeqiniso futhi axhumane nabantu. Uyonandisa kwi-CTIJF nje, usanda kusonga umjikelezo oqale eKapa, wahambela izindawo ezahlukene okubalwa kuzo iGqeberha, Makhanda, KuGompo City, Greytown, eThekwini naseSoweto. Kwi-CTIJF uzobe eshiyelana inkundla nezilomo zabaculi abahlukene phakathi kwabo okungoJacob Collier wase-United Kingdom, Abdullah Ibrahim, Nduduzo Makhathini, Manana, Lordkez, Scopion Kings, Yussef Dayes wase-United Kingdom, Jazzwrld noThukuthela, Sibusiso Mash Mashiloane nabanye abaningi. UJabulile uzonandisa

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: BAPHINDE bagqemeka engeqiwa ntwala abalandeli beRichards Bay FC abebekubheke ngabomvu ukubuka leli qembu ligijima eMhlathuze Sports Complex kulandela ukufeyiliswa kwale nkundla yiPremier Soccer League (PSL). IBay ibihlele ukudlala imidlalo yasekhaya yeBetway Premiership yesizini ka-2025/2026, eMhlathuze, kwazise selokhu yanyukela kulesi sigaba izinze eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza. Kwenyuke ithemba lokuthi izobuyela ekhaya ngesikhathi inkundla uMhlathuze Sports Complex ivulwa ngemidlalo yeKZN Premier's Cup ngenyanga edlule. Kule midlalo, abalandeli badele imvula namakhaza bezobuka amaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal adlala kwiPSL egadulisana eMhlathuze. Nokho le midlalo iyona eholele ekutheni konakale utshani kule nkundla. IBay bekufanele idlale umdlalo wokuqala wesizini neMarumo Gallants ngo-Agasti 9, kodwa yagcina ithuthele eMlaza ngenxa yokuthi iPSL ikhala ngokuthi inkundla ayikho esimweni esifanele. Leli qembu eliholwa nguSifiso "Jomo" Biyela likhiphe isitatimende ngaphambi kwalo mdlalo, lazisa abezindaba ukuthi lizobuyela ekhaya uma selibhekene neChippa United ngo-Agasti 26 (kusasa). Nokho lo mdlalo usuzodlalelwa ePrincess Magogo Stadium KwaMashu, ngo-7.30 ebusuku, ngenxa yokuthi inkundla ayikabi sesimweni esifanele. Ukungalungi kwenkudla kuphazamise

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: "Asisekho isikhathi sokudlala. UJulius Malema uyi-political devil. Osopolitiki bayamesaba noMengameli uyamesaba. Asimesabi thina, yinja nje. Yithi esiphethe manje futhi sizolithatha leli zwe siliqondise liqonde ngqo." Uthe izwe lifile ngenxa yezidakamizwa notshwala obubulala intsha. "Izingane zethu zidakwa ubusuku nemini. Zidayisa ngemizimba. Yihlazo elenzeka kuleli zwe," kusho uNgizwe. Yize kungokokuqala bebophana kodwa uMalema noNgizwe abaqali ukuxabana.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: USIPHESIHLE Ndlovu ongomunye wabadlali abathe bangakhuphula ifomu kwiKaizer Chiefs naleli qembu laseNaturena, laqala laqoqa imiphumela encomekayo IZIMPAWU zokuqaqeka kwezinto kwiKaizer Chiefs kazisho ukuthi abaqeqeshi bayo sebezothambisa isandla bavumele ukuthi abadlali benze intando yabo ngoba bayalwazi usizi lokucindezelwa wukungayitholi imiphumela encomekayo. Nakuba ukunqoba kweChiefs kwiGalaxy bekungokokuqala eminyakeni emihlanu edlule kuyona yonke imiqhudelwano kodwa omunye wamabamba abaqeqeshi kuyona, uCedric Kaze, ubeshumayela ivangeli lokungavuvukalelwa ngamakhanda njengoba kungathi isimo semiphumela sesijikile. Iwini yeChiefs kwiGalaxy bekungeyesine kulandelana kwiligi nokuyisondeza nephupho layo lokubuyela kwiCaf Confederation Cup ephume kuyona emidlalweni yamaqoqo kule sizini. “Isikhathi esikusona nomuzwa esiwuzwayo uyasiphoqa ukuba singabe sisathambisa kulokhu esikwenzayo ngoba kusobala ukuthi kusinika izithelo,” kusho uKaze kwabezindaba emuva komdlalo. “Esizokwenza wukusiqinisa nakakhulu isandla kubadlali ngenhloso yokususa kubona umqondo wokuthi izinto sezilungile ngoba luselude ukhalo okusafanele siluhambe ngaphabi kokusongwa kwesizini,” kuqhuba yena. Kunezikhathi lapho iChiefs ebibukeka khona sengathi ihlehla nyova okugqanyiswe yimiphumela emine eyithole ilandelana emiqhudelwaneni ehlanganisa iBetway Premiership nokukhala ngaphandle kwiConfed Cup. Konke

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ngokuthi wayengekho embizweni yangenyanga edlule futhi ubengekho emsebenzini ngenxa yomkhuhlane. UNgwenya ube usihlalo weNgonyama Trust iminyaka, waze waphuma ngo-2023 ngesikhathi iSilo siphakamisa Inkosi Thanduyise kaMpiyezintombi Mzimela ukuba ibe ngusihlalo webhodi. Ukususwa kukaNgwenya kwesikasihlalo weNgonyama Trust kwahlukanisa phakathi amakhosi. Kunamakhosi okukhona kuwo nowayengundunankulu kaZulu ngaleso sikhathi, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi, azwakalisa ukungahambisani nokukhishwa kukaNgwenya. UNgwenya ubambene ngezihluthu enkantolo nebhodi leNgonyama Trust elikhona elimsola ngokuba nesandla ekunyamalaleni kwezigidi zamaRandi ngesikhathi ephethe isikhwama. INkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu isanda kunquma ukuthi uNgwenya akhokhe u-R30 million owaduka ngesikhathi esaphethe kwiNgonyama Trust. Lena yimali uMasipala waseThekwini owawuthenge ngayo umhlaba ongaphansi kweNgonyama Trust eHammarsdale. Ubufakazi obethulwe enkantolo buveze ukuthi uNgwenya wayalela ukuba imali ifakwe kwi-akhawunti yommeli wakhe. Inkantolo yanquma ukuthi kudliwe impahla kaNgwenya. Inkantolo yaphinde yachitha isicelo sikaNgwenya sokuba anikezwe igunya lokuphonsela inselelo isinqumo senkantolo. Ibambene ngezihluthu empini yokulawula iNgonyama Trust. UNgqongqoshe wezoMhlaba, uMnuz Mzwanele Nyhontso, usanda kuzama ukuhlakaza ibhodi leNgomyama Trust kodwa isinqumo sakhe sachithwa yinkantolo. Ngapha iSilo

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ukuthula kuvela lezi zindaba wathi yena ukhethe ukususa izithombe zakhe ngoba kuyisinqumo azithathele yena sona hhayi ngoba kuboshwe uKagiso. Image: Instagram/Cyan Boujee "Ngithathe isinqumo sokuvala ikhasi lami ngoba ngithanda ukwenza lokho ngenxa yokuthi ngifuna ukuthatha ikhefu khona. Ngingakujabulela ukuthi abantu bayeke ukukhuluma izinto ezingekho ngami ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Ngicela ningangixhumanisi nabantu engingahlangani nabo, bese ngithule isikhathi esingangonyaka nilokhu nikhuluma, ningihlanganisa nabesilisa baseVenda, abaseZimbabwe, nemishado engingayazi nithi ngiyingxenye yayo. Angikuthandi lokhu enikwenzayo. Ngiyaphuma ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngizobuya futhi," kuchaza yena. Kwenye yezinkulumonoGogo Skhotheni, uCyan uke wakuveza ukuthi wake waba nokungaboni ngao linye noSithelo njengoba amthathela indoda yakhe. Uthi naye wagcina ngokuthi athathe indoda kaSithelo nokwenzeka bengazi bobabili kodwa bagcina bazi ukuthi kwenzekani. Izolo kuvele izindaba zokuthi ama-akhawunti amabhange kaCyan asevaliwe nathi lokhu akazi ukuthi kudalwa yini. Imizamo yokuthola uSithelo noMawhoo ayiphumelelanga njengoba izingcingo zabo bezingangeni.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-LADYSMITH Black Mambazo ivalelisa ngomculo elungwini layo ebese lithathe umhlalaphansi, u-Albert Mazibuko Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu IBISIYIBONA indlela yayo ingwazi yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, uMdletshe Albert Mazibuko, edlule emhlabeni ngeSonto eledule, emuva kokugula njengoba igcizelele kumfowabo isesibhedlela ukuthi ifuna ukufihlwa kuphi ngaphambi kokuthi kuyenele ngakusasa. UMazibuko (77) ushonele esibhedlela esiseThekwini, emuva kokugula isikhashana. Umfowabo u-Abednigo Mazibuko, oke wacula kwiMambazo ngaphambi kokuthatha umhlalaphansi, uthe uMazibuko wazisholo yena ukuthi ufuna ukufihlwa kubo eNtabamhlophe, Estcourt. “Ubengaqali, wakusho futhi kudala ukuthi uma ehamba ufuna ukuya ekhaya. Nakulokhu esegula ngiyombona esibhedlela kuwuMgqibelo, kanti uzohamba ngeSonto, washo wathi ningibeke eceleni kukamfowethu. Niyabona ngapha eduze kwesango. Ngadumala ngoba mina nginethemba lokuthi lo muntu uzophila, wase ekhuluma amagama anzima asinda kangaka. Wathi ningibeke ekhaya impela, ngifuna ukuya ekhaya eduze kukamfowethu. Usethuse kanti usekhuluma okokugcina,” kusho u-Abednigo. U-Abednigo ubekhuluma esithangamini nabezindaba eClermont, izolo, emzini womsunguli weMambazo ongasekho, uJoseph Shabalala. Uthe umfowabo ugule isikhathi esincane kodwa kwamqinisa waze wahlinzwa. Umchaze njengomuntu obenenhlonipho,

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UKHALA ngezobulungiswa othi zihlinzela ezibini abagilwa bamacala okudlwengulwa asuke ebandakanya abasolwa abayizingane, umndeni wentombazanyana okuthiwa yehlelwa umuga ofanayo nyakenye njengoba kuhoxiswe icala ngesonto eledlule. Kulesi sigameko, okuthiwa senzeka eZwelibomvu KwaNdengezi, ngoSepthemba 4 nyakenye, umgilwa owayeneminyaka emithathu, kuthiwa wadlwengulwa wumsolwa owayeneminyaka engu-12. Kwavela ukuthi umndeni kamgilwa wezwa ngesehlakalo ngosuku okuthiwa senzeka ngalo. Kuthiwa umgilwa watshela isihlobo ukuthi ulimele esithweni sakhe sangasese ngoba umsolwa, okuthiwa wamgagula ngegama, ufake isitho sakhe sangasese kwesakhe. Kwavela ukuthi umsolwa, owayekade ewufihlele umndeni wakhe, wavuma esebuzwa ngesehlakalo, icala lagcina livulwe ngoba umndeni kamgilwa waya esikhungweni iThuthuzela, eChatsworth. Uyise kamgilwa ongeke adalulwe ukumvikela, utshele Isolezwe ukuthi igama lomphenyi wagcina ukulibona ngesikhathi ethunyelelwa umyalezo wokuthi icala liphethwe ubani. “Akakaze angifonele, angikaze ngimbone, angikaze ngizwe lutho oluqhamuka kuye njengomphenyi wecala,” kusho uyise kamgilwa. Uthe yena ayekulindele wukuthi umphenyi asondele kubo njengabazali bakamgilwa, asho ukuthi icala lizohamba kanjani. “Ngimangele sengithunyelelwa i-sms ethi icala selihoxisiwe. Ngizwe ngidinwa futhi ngibone umthetho ungangisizi njengomzali

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: “Kulesi sigungu kukhona abamela abafundi, abazali kanjalo nothisha. Uma kukhona izinguquko ezenziwayo esikoleni, zenziwa emhlanganweni osuke wethanyelwe yilezi zinhlaka. Uma kungabazali abathi akufakwe amakhamera esikoleni, kufanele ukuthi lokho kuvele emaminithini omhlangano okwathathwa kuwo leso sinqumo,” kusho uMalinga. Uthe bona beyiNatu, bayakhathazeka uma kuthikamezeka ukufunda. “Umnyango awungenelele, kungaphazamiseki ukufunda,” kusho uMalinga, othe okunye okungaba yisisombululo wukuthi amakhamera avulwe sekuphume isikole uma kukhalwa ngobugebengu bokwebiwa kwempahla. Uthe abanalwazi lokuthi uthishanhloko umiselweni, nokho wathi umthetho uthi azibalulwe izinsolo amiselwa zona encwadini esuke ithi akamiswe. Khonamanjalo, Isolezwe Ngempelasonto lithinte omunye wabazali, uNksz Xolile Buhlalu ngoLwesine, waveza ukuthi bahambe bayobhikisha ngaphandle kwesikole iBerea Primary lapho betshelwe ukuthi kuhlala khona abahloli. Uthe bafike balalelwa yilungu lePhalamende, elibatshele ukuthi linguRadebe. Uthe ubathembise ukuthi namuhla kuzofika uMphathiswa wezeMfundo uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka azolalela izikhalo zabo. Uveze eyokuthi esikoleni ingidi efakwe abazali isavalile, ukufunda nokufundisa akuqhubeki. Kumanje bahlela ukuthi ngesonto elizayo basivule isikole kuqhubeke ukufundisa kothisha besikhashana abazokhokhelwa abazali. “Laba

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: kukhona izifundo ezintathu ezingafundwa ngenxa yokuthi othisha abekho. Uthe bakhathazekile ngemfundo yabafundi abenza uGrade 4, wathi bayazibuza nokuthi laba bezifundo ezingafundwa emabangeni aphakeme bazobhalani njengoba kuqalwa ukubhalwa kwezivivinyo zokuphela kwekota yokuqala sonyaka. Ubuye waveza nokuthi bengabazali bathola ukuthi isikole sikhokhela umshini wokugaya amaphepha osebenza ebhizinisini lamakhaza likathishanhloko. “Sathola ngalokhu ngo-2023, ngesikhathi kucutshungulwa izitatimende zokusetshenziswa kwemali yesikole. Kwavela ukuthi isikole sikhokhela imishini yokufothokhopha emibili ekubeni esikoleni kukhona owodwa. Kwathi uma sekuphenywa, kwavela ukuthi owesibili usebhizinisini lamakhaza likathishanhloko,” usho kanje. Uveze nokuthi kuneminikelo enikelwa yizinkampani ezizimele ngenhloso yokuthuthukisa isikole, okugcina kungaziwa ukuthi iphelelaphi. “Umnikelo owanikelwa abakwaTransnet ukuthi isikole sakhelwe amathoyilethi owawungu-R100 000 akwaziwa ukuthi washonaphi, awazange akhiwe futhi akakaze aphendule ukuthi washonaphi,” kusho uChiya. Uqhube wathi kukhona omunye futhi ophinde walethwa yinkampani efanayo ukuthi kwakhiwe amakilasi, nawo phinde waphelela emoyeni. Uthe konke lokhu bakubikile ezincwadini abazibhalele uMnyango ezingeni lesifunda kanjalo nesifundazwe. “Sesikhethe ukubhikisha ngoba siyabona ukuthi sibhala izincwadi ezingakaze ziphendulwe muntu. author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe U-DOCTOR Mkhonza no-Ayanda Dlamini abangabaqeqeshi boMvoti FC osethubeni lokuyodlala umdlalo wokuhlunga iqembu elizomela iKwaZulu-Natal kumaPlay-Offs kazwelonke eSafa ABC Motsepe League Image: UMVOTI FC FACEBOOK YIZE izinto zivuna bona ngokuqeda esicongweni kwi-log ka-Stream A weSafa KwaZulu-Natal ABC Motsepe League kodwa umqeqeshi woMvoti FC, uDoctor Mkhonza, ukubeka ngokucacile ukuthi ngeke bawuthathe kancane uMzinto United abazodlala nawo kowokusonga isizini. Umvoti ohlezi esicongweni se-log ngamaphuzu awu-56, udinga iphuzu emdlalweni wokugcina wesizini ka-2025/26, usugadulisana noMzinto eKing Edward Park, eGreytown, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama. INjampela esendaweni yesibili kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-53, kudingeka iwunqobe kumnyama kubomvu umdlalo wayo wokusonga isizini neHellenic ngawo uMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama, eMthunzini Sports Field, eMthunzini, bese ithandazela ukuthi uMvoti uhlulwe wuMzinto. UMzinto osemsileni kwi-log ka-Stream A, akusekho okudlalelayo njengoba usugawulwe yizembe kulesi sigaba. “Ngeke siwuthathe kancane uMzinto ngoba uyiqembu elisekugcineni kwi-log ngoba lokho kungasifaka enkingeni. Sizowuthatha njengomdlalo omqoka okufanele silwele ukuwunqoba,” kusho uMkhonza oqeqesha ngokubambisana no-Ayanda “Cobra” Dlamini. “Indlela esidlale ngayo kule sizini kusukela

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: izikweletu zase zingaphezu kuka-R96 000. ULangeveldt wazise ibhange ukuthi uphelelwe umsebenzi futhi uyaphikisana nokuxoshwa kwakhe eNkantolo Yezabasebenzi. Uphinde wafaka isimangalo kumshwalense wakhe wezikweletu kwaHollard Insurance, ngethemba lokuthi ipholisi izokhokhela izitolimende zakhe. Nokho, uHollard weluleke ngokuthi isimangalo sincike emphumeleni wesimangalo sakhe nomqashi wakhe.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: kodwa labo ithuba elisavuma kubona kufanele baye kofunda. Uma uwumholi kufanele uwazi umsebenzi wezikhulu zomasipala kanye nemithetho ethinta ukuphathwa kwemikhandlu. Ugcina uvuma noma izikhulu sezenza izinto ezingalungile uma ungayazi imithetho." UNgcongo uthe izimeya kufanele ziqinisekise ukulandelwa kwemithetho uma zifuna ukuthola imibiko engenagcobho. "Ngeke uwuthole umbiko ongenagcobho uma ungathembekile. Kufanele uqashe abantu abawaziyo umsebenzi. Omasipala abaningi bathola imibiko enogcobho ngenxa yokuthi abayilandeli imigomo uma besebenzisa imali. Inkinga enkulu ilapha ophikweni okukhishwa kulo amathenda." UNgcongo uthe usaphokophele ukuthola ezinye iziqu zemfundo ephakeme. "Uma uwumholi kubalulekile ukuthi uzithuthukise ngolwazi. Ngesikhathi ngiqokelwa ukuphatha umasipala ngo-2023 ngabona ukuthi kuningi engingakwazi mayelana nokuphathwa komasipala kanye nokusetshenziswa kwemali yomphakathi." UNgcongo uthe uyaqhubeka nezifundo zakhe njengoba manje esenza iMasters. Ebuzwa ukuthi ngabe ufisa ukufinyelela eziqwini zobudokotela yini uthe uzofinyelela uma iNkosi ivuma. UNgcongo uthe bekungelula ukuqhuba iziqu zemfundo ephakeme. "NgesiZulu nje ngingathi ibingitibulisa, namanje ngisaqhubeka nokutibula ngoba ngisaqhubeka nokufunda. Akulula ukucaza isikhathi sakho njengoba bengifunda ngisebenza. Ukuzimisela kwami

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: wabo wenzani uMandisa esebulewe, wayinqaka kuqala inkulumo, ngelithi basingcwabela ingane yethu, akazi ukuthi yini enye esiyifunayo emndenini wabo? Ukudelela kwakhe kuzongiyisa endaweni engingafuni ukuya kuyo,” kusho uDlungele. Nakuba engasikalanga isigwebo asifisela uSosibo ngaphakathi, esekhuluma nabezindaba ngaphandle, uthe ufuna adilikelwe yijele. Uqhube wathi akubajabulisanga okwenziwe uSosibo ngaphakathi enkantolo enqaba ukubuyela ebhokisini. “Inkantolo bekufanele imphoqe ukuthi abuyele ebhokisini,” usho kanje. Ekhumbula isigameko, uthe wafica isigazi emnyango eduze nethangi lamanzi, elinye lisendlini kanti wathi uma ethi uyamthinta umntanakhe, wezwa ikhanda libokozela sengathi kalinamathambo, emzimbeni eluhlaza cwe, ukushaywa.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: okanye u-4Low. Ngike ngayishiya ku-4 Auto obhuqwini ngayibona ilubamba kodwa ngiyizwa ne-traction control ingenelela ukungigcina endleleni. Obhuqwini ibingakhalisi nhlobo ingazweli kakhulu futhi ilinyusa nejubane ngale kokukuthusa ngokuthi ingakuphosa esikhotheni. Akukho lapho sixakeke khona kwadingeka ukuthi sisebenzise i-diff lock kwazise asiziqwalanga izintaba. Angiboni ukuthi ibizoshaya phansi ngoba igabade ilishiye ngo-252mm. Ikwazi nokuzihambela yona uma uyifaka kuX-Trek ongawufanisa ne-cruise control yasobhuqwini. Siphinde sayihloma esihlabathini, okuyindawo ekwazi ukuhamba kuyo ngale kokuxakeka. Esiteringini kunamabhathini okukutshela ukuthi uhamba endaweni enjani njengasesihlabathini, ematsheni nasodakeni Yona ibe isizilungisa ngendlela efanele njengokuthi ithi ukulibamba igiya esihlabathini. KwaKia bathi ngo-100km iphuza amalitha angu-7.8 litres ethangini elingu-80 litres. Ngilunguze ngayibona idla 8.9l/100km. Ngokwami iTasman yiveni elisezingeni nelingase licoshacoshe emakhasimendeni. Izinyanga ezizayo yizona ezizosidweba sicace isithombe sokuthi abashayeli baseNingizimu Afrika bahamba nayo noma bazoqhubeka nokubambelela ezintandokazini zabo iRanger, Hilux okulindeleke entsha maduze neD-Max ethuthukisiwe ezokwethulwa noma yinini.
