author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: 13. IMilford isendaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu awu-53, iCity isendaweni yesithathu ngawu-51 ngokulinganayo neLions enawu-51, kweyesihlanu yiCasric ngawu-49. Leli qembu laseRichards Bay lidinga amaphuzu amathathu noma elilodwa emdlalweni walo wakusasa neLions ukuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs. IStallions, efinyelele kowandulela owamanqamu eNedbank Cup, uma igcina ngokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs kuzobe kungokokuqala kusukela ngesizini ka-2023/24 okwakuyisizini yayo yokuqala kulesi sigaba kulandela ukuthenga isitifiketi seMotsepe Championship kuThongathi FC. “Sihlale isikhathi eside esicongweni se-log kodwa sagcina siphunyukwe yisicoco, ngakho akusasizi ukukhalela ubisi oluchithekile manje. Okumqoka kithina wukulwela ukubuya namaphuzu aphelele e-Upington kwiHungry Lions ukuze sikwazi ukuyodlala kumaPlay-Offs. AmaPlay-Offs sekuyilona themba lethu lokulwela ukungena kwiBetway Premiership,” kusho uNdlabi, odabuka eMmangweni, eLusikisiki. “Siyazi ukuthi sizobhekana nomdlalo onzima kwiHungry Lions nayo edinga amaphuzu njengathi njengoba nayo ilwela ukuyodlala amaPlay-Offs kodwa sizibophezele ngokulwela ukuwunqoba lo mdlalo. Yize sazi ukuthi ukudlala ngokulingana nakho kusengasiphumelelisa ukuyodlala amaPlay-Offs kodwa esizibophezele kukho wukuyolwela ukunqoba ngoba kungasithikameza kusifake engozini ukungena enkundleni sizitshele ukuthi siyodlalela ukudlala ngokulingana.” Ngaphandle komdlalo

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: KULINDELWE izinkumbi zabathandi bobumnandi emcimbini wokwamukelwa kolale isithathu kwiMzansi Big Brother Season 6, uLindokuhle "Bravo B" Nsele. Le nsizwa yaseHlalankosi izobungazwa emcimbini iNongoma Big Night Music Festival eMcebo kaZulu Lodge KwaNongoma namhlanje. Kulo mcimbi kuzobe kunandisa uShenge WaseHlalankosi, Thokozani Langa, Lwah Ndlunkulu, Jumbo, Qwabe Twins, Mayoghurt, Gatsheni, uMzukulu, Ama-NND International, Mdumazi, Jaiva Zimnike, Njabulo Langa, Stabhilithi, Navigator, Mjolisi, Mashelela, Imfezemnyama, Mdabu Ngqulunga, Inkosi Yamagcokama, Mashampula, Cmbero, Mashwabana, Luve Dubezane, Magoqa Womdanso nabanye. Umgqugquzeli walo mcimbi, uBingelela "Bings" Mpanza, uthe bazohlonipha uBravo B ngenxa yokuqhakambisa isifunda saseZululand, ikakhulukazi uNongoma. Uthe nakuba uBravo B engawudlanga umhlanganiso kulo mqhudelwano kodwa ukulala isithathu kwasho lukhulu emphakathini wangakubo. UBingelela uthe bafuna ukumamukela ngezandla ezifudumele nangenhlokomo ukuze abone ukuthi kubo useyiqhawe. Uthe nakuba bemfihlele induku emqubeni ngesipho kodwa unxusa abafuna ukumgixabeza ngezipho ukuba baziphathe ngalolu suku. Ubuye waveza ukuthi kulo mcimbi kuzobuye kuqwashiswe umphakathi ngokuhlukunyezwa kwabantu ngokobulili. UBingelela uthe amathikithi asatholakala ezitolo zakwaShoprite, Pick n Pay,

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, oyifake emdlalweni wamanqamu weCaf Champions League UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns okuke kwaba nezimpawu zokuthi unuka iqaqa kwezinye izingxenye zabalandeli baleli qembu laseChloorkop, uMiguel Cardoso, uzishaya isifuba ngokufica irekhodi likaPitso “Jingles” Mosimane kwiCaf Champions League. UCardoso ufake iSundowns emdlalweni wamanqamu weChampions League ngokuyisiza inqobe ngo 1-0 umdlalo womlenze wesibili wowandulela owamanqamu walo mqhudelwano kwi-Esperance Sportive de Tunis yaseTunisia ngoMgqibelo, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. Nasemdlalweni womlenze wokuqala iSundowns yayinqobe ngo 1-0 okuyifaka ngewini ka 2-0 kowamanqamu weChampions League ne-AS FAR yaseMorocco ngenyanga ezayo. Lo mqeqeshi wasePortugal, ufaka iSundowns lapho kunoju khona nje, nangesizini edlule wenze okufanayo kepha wahluleka ukudla isicooco esagcina sihambe nePyramids FC yase-Egypt. Kuzobe kungokwesithathu kulandelana uCardoso eyingxenye yomdlalo wamanqamu wale ndumezulu yomqhudelwano wase-Afrika kwazise ngesizini ka-2023/2024 wayekhona kodwa esaqeqesha i-Esperance. BekuwuMosimane onerekhodi lokudlala eyamanqamu yeChampions League emithathu ilandelana. Lokhu uMosimane wakwenza ne-Al Ahly yase-Egypt, wanqoba kwemibili waguqa kowodwa. UCardoso uzobe ebheke iwini yakhe yokuqala kwi-AS

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: nalo mbono, wasukumela phezulu wathi umcimbi walolu hlobo kumele ube khona, nakhu namhlanje sihlangene lapha. Ngiyacela kuMasipala wesiFunda iZululand nomncane Abaqulusi ukuthi baqhubeke nokuseseka uma kukhona esikucelayo ukuyisa izintombi phambili," kusho yena. UMnuz Sifiso Mkhwanazi oyiMeya kuMasipala waseBaQulusini, uthe abakwenzayo bakwenzela ukuhlonipha amakhosi akhona. "Siyabonga emndenini wakwaMkhonza nezihlobo zabo ngokusiboleka umama wabo, njengoba ubenomndeni kodwa ubegcwala zonke izindawo lezi ukuze agcine isiko. Likhulu igalelo elibanjwa onomehlo ngakho kumele nathi sibeseke kukhona konke abakwenzayo," kuchaza yena. Kulo mcimbi bekukhona amakhosi, abantwana baseNdlunkulu kaZulu beholwa uMntwana uNkinobho neMeya yaseZululand, uMnuz Micheal Khumalo.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ufica amarimu angu-17 inch, izibuko ezivaleka ngogesi, ama-roof rails, izihlalo ezifakwe isikhumba sokuzakhela, cruise control, indawo yokushaja ngaphandle kwentambo nokunye. Kwi-EX kwengezwe amaLED daytime running lights, idunyiswa ngebhathini, i-screen se-infotainment singu-12 inch, inama-sensor ngaphambili nangemuva nokunye. Eyokugcina i-SX, okuyiyo ebesihamba ngayo, yona inakho konke njengoba inamalambu angamaLED, isihlalo somshayeli esihlelwa ngogesi futhi ezangaphambili ziyafudumala, izipikha zeBose, ambient lighting, smart cruise control, iyasho uma uphuma emzileni, amakhamera aveza umzimba wonke, Apple CarPlay oyixhuma ngaphandle kwentambo nokunye. Indlela eyakhiwe ngayo ngaphakathi yinhle futhi kulula nokungena ezihlalweni zangemuva. Ifuna ube yinono ngoba ngaphambili ngezansi ihlotshiswe ngombala ongathi u-cream nengiwubona uzosheshe ukuveze ukungcola. UMBALA okhanyayo ofakwe esiteringini, kwi-dashboard ngezansi nasezicabheni ungase udonse kalula ukungcola Ngemuva ngiyakuthanda ukuthi bafake izimbobo ezimbili zokushaja nge-USB bese kuthi okhakhayini kube nezokukhipha umoya we-aircon. Kwezokugcina izihlalo kungahlala kahle izingane kodwa ezaphakathi nendawo uyakwazi ukuzisa phambili kancane. Nakhona kunezimbobo zokushaja nezokukhipha umoya we-aircon. author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UMDLALI weKaizer Chiefs, uMfundo Vilakazi, ejabulela igoli alishaye ngesikhathi bebhekene neMagesi FC eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI weKaizer Chiefs, uCedric Kaze, udonse ngendlebe abadlali bakhe ngokuthi bangadudwa wukunqoba imidlalo emibili yeBetway Premiership ilandelana. IChiefs iguqise iMagesi FC ngo 2-0 wamagoli kaWandile Duba noMfundo Vilakazi kowePremiership ngoMgqibelo, eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. Leli qembu lishaya iMagesi nje, belishaye iDurban City ngo 1-0 ngesonto eledlule. Le miphumela ibuyisele Amakhosi emathubeni okuqeda endaweni yesithathu kwi-log yePremiership ezoyinika ilungelo lokubuyela kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo. Amakhosi anqobe le midlalo emibili esebuya esibhaxwini semine ilandelana. "Ngikholwa wukuthi ubunzima esidlule kubona bebudalwa wukulinyalelwa kakhulu ngabadlali nokumiswa ngenxa yamakhadi kodwa ukwenza kahle kwabadlali abamqoka eqenjini emidlalweni ilandelana kuletha uzinzo esiludingayo," kusho uKaze oqeqesha ngokubambisana noKhalil Ben Youssef. "Siyithimba labaqeqeshi besazi ukuthi kungani sibhekene nesimo esinzima futhi okuhle ukuthi sonke besibeke umoya phansi kanti namanje sidinga ukubeka phansi umoya singajabuli kakhulu ngokuwina nje imidlalo emibili. author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: indlebe noJali owagqama kwiBafana Bafana nakwiKV Oostende yaseBelgium, leli phephandaba lixoxe noNthabiseng Matshekga oyinhloko yohlaka olungaphansi kwezokukhangisa kwaNedbank. “Silindele lukhulu kule mpelasonto kumaqembu amane azibeke ethubeni lokugoduka nale nkomishi ehamba nentshontsho lokumela iNingizimu Afrika kwiCaf Confederation Cup,” kusho lesi sikhulu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: omkhulu umonakalo njengoba eminye imigwaqo ivalwe amanzi, kwacekeleka phansi izimoto, kunezihlahla ebezivale imigwaqo. Siveze uthi izindawo ezikhahlamezeke kakhulu kube yiMorningside kanjalo neChatsworth, okubikwe kuzo izigameko ezingu-22. Sithe entshonalanga yeTheku, okukhona kuyo neWestville, kubikwe izigameko ezingu-13, kwathi enyakatho yeTheku okukhona kuyo iNewlands West, kwabikwa eziyisikhombisa. Kunxuswe izakhamuzi ukuthi ziqaphele, zigweme imigwaqo egcwele amanzi kanjalo namabhuloho amafishane agcwele amanzi.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: lokushaya indiva umyalelo weqembu wokuba aseke isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, esasifakwe yiMKP. Ukunikwa ilungelo lokuphonsela inselelo isinqumo kusho ukuthi uNksz Shinga ngeke axoshwe ekubeni yilungu lesiShayamthetho kuze kuphume isinqumo esicelweni sakhe. Ukuxoshwa ekubeni yilungu lesiShayamthetho bekuzosho ukuthi uphunyukwa yisikhundla sokuba umphathiswa. Ukuxoshwa kwakhe bekuzophinde kubeke engcupheni uhulumeni wokubusa ngokubambisana ophethe KwaZulu-Natal. I-NFP ingababeki benkosi ngesihlalo sayo esisodwa kuhulumeni wesifundazwe. Ubuholi beNFP kuzwelonke bufuna ukuthi iqembu lihoxe kuhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal nokungenza ukuthi kube nongqingetshe njengoba amaqembu abusayo ezosala nezihlalo ezingu-40 kwezingu-80 esiShayamthetho. Khonamanjalo, iNFP iphinde yaqoka uXaba ukuba abe unobhala jikelele weqembu. UXaba ubelokhu ebambile kulesi sikhundla kulandela ukuxoshwa kukaMnuz Teddy Thwala, owayekhethwe njengonobhala engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi beqembu eyayingo-2023. UNksz Duduzile Nhlengethwa waqokelwa kwesephini likanobhala jikelele. Lesi sikhundla besiphethwe uNksz Sithembile Msomi.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Siyazwelana kakhulu nabo ngokudlula kwakhe sesihluku,” usho kanje. Imizamo yokuthola umndeni kamufi ayiphumelelanga. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant Colonel Paul Magwaza, uthe amaphoyisa aseRichmond aphenya icala lokubulala emva kokuthi iphoyisa ebelingekho emsebenzini lidutshulwe ngaphakathi endaweni yokucima ukoma. “Iphoyisa elingu-constable lidutshulwe ngesikhathi lizama ukuphenya ngokuqhuma kwesibhamu obekuqhamuka ngaphakathi engaweni yokucima ukoma,” kusho uMagwaza. Uqhube wathi kube sekuzwakala okunye ukuqhuma kwesibhamu kaningi ngaphakathi endaweni yokucima ukoma, kwase kutholakala ukuthi yiphoyisa selidutshuliwe. “Liphuthunyiswe esibhedlela nokuyilapho elifike lashonela khona,” kusho uMagwaza othe isigameko senzeke ezintatha zangeSonto.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUNWE womunye wabagilwa abalinyaziwe UFUNA ubulungiswa owesilisa othi abazukulu bakhe bashaywe kanzima omunye umakhelwane eNew Hanover, eMshwathi, ngasekupheleni kwenyanga edlule. Kulesi sigameko kuthiwa kulimale kanzima ekhanda kanjalo nasemunweni umfundi oneminyaka engu-18 nonengu-16. Ngokusho kukamkhulu wabagilwa, uMnuz Joseph Luthuli, ngoFebhuwari 21, emzini wakhe, kugasele omakhelwane bakhe, befuna esinye isihlobo. “Ngaphuma ngasho ukuthi lo abamfunayo akekho, bathi akusale sekuza mina. Bangixhakathisa, baya nami emzini wabo. Bafika bangivalela, bangibuza ngamaselula nomazisi okulahlekile,” kusho uLuthuli. Uthe wayelokhu echaze njalo ukuthi akukho akwaziyo ngalezi zinto okuthiwa zilahlekile. Uthe kusenjalo, kwaqhamuka abazukulu bakhe bezobheka ukuthi kwenzekani, nokuyilapho abagcina sebehlaselwa khona. “Abantu bakulo muzi babashaya abazukulu bami, omunye walimala ekhanda, omunye walimala emunweni. Kwaphoqa ukuthi baye esibhedlela nokuyilapho abafike balaliswa khona, batishwa,” usho kanje. IKHANDA lomunye wabagilwa abalinyaziwe Uqhube wathi balivulile icala esiteshini samaphoyisa iNew Hanover kodwa kwangaba bikho mnyakazo owenzekayo. Uthe kwathi sebelivulile icala, amaphoyisa abatshela ukuthi kufanele bathathe ifomu, iJ88 baliyise esibhedlela ukuze ligcwaliswe. “Wawagwalisa

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: kusho uMkhize. "Baningi kakhulu abadlule ezandleni zami, ngingababala kushone ilanga. Abanye bebelokhu bebuza bethi ‘uKhabazela kanti uyohlonishwa nini?’ Kodwa-ke bengibatshela ukuthi ngeke ngisine ngiphinde ngizishayele ihlombe. "Akusizi kodwa ukuthi sihlonishwe uma ezweni lethu kusadlalwa leli bhola elingamanga, singakabuyeli ebholeni eliwusikompilo lwethu eNingizimu Afrika, elalidlalwa eminyakeni edlule singakaxoshwa yiFifa ebholeni lomhlaba. "Uma sisenabaqeqeshi abangafuni ukunika abadlali bethu inkululeko yokukhulumisa ibhola njengoba kwakwenza oKaizer Motaung, oChippa Moloi, oJomo Sono, oProfessor Ngubane, no-Ace Mnini nabanye.” UMkhize uthe okunye akufisayo wukuthuthukiswa kwabaqeqeshi abazogxila ekusebenzeni nabadlali abasakhulisa ezikoleni nakososeshini bethu bebhola, abangeke bahalele ukuyoqeqesha emaqenjini ePSL. "Kudingeka abazoqeqesha abadlali abasebancane ngendlela efanele ngokweminyaka yabo yobudala, hhayi abaqeqeshi asebehlulekile ebholeni abazobiza izingane ezino-10 (ubudala) ngezinkomo," uqhube kanje. "Kwamanye amazwe abadlali abasakhula baqeqeshwa ngabaqeqeshi abagogodile ngeziqu zokuqeqesha abadlali abasakhula.” Ube esephonsela inselelo uMnyango wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko ngobumqoka bokugxila ekutshaleni imali ekuthuthukisweni kwebhola emazingeni aphansi esikhundleni sokufaka izigidi zemali kwi-Video Assistant Referee (VAR) ehlongozwa yilo Mnyango oholwa wuGayton

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: wathola khona isidumbu sikamufi, sase zingcwatshwa ngesizotha. Waveza ukushaqeka ngokuthi uMbhele wuye ongumsolwa wokuqala ecaleni, wathi babejwayelene kakhulu nomufi, ehlale efika ekhaya labo ukuzomvakashela. Nokho baveza ukuthi emva kokunyamalala kwakhe, kwaba khona isikhathi lapho kuthiwa noMbhele unyamalele, nokwaba yinto eyabamangaza ukuthi usedukiswa yini kodwa kwangaba bikho osola ukuthi usebalekela ukuthi "uyathinteka" ekufeni kukamufi. Izinsolo zokuthi umufi kukhona ayekuhlanganisa nomkaMbhele umndeni wazichitha, ngelithi wayengumuntu owayezihlonipha, engeke alenze ichilo lokuthi agange nenkosikazi yomuntu. Bathi banethemba lokuthi uma icala seliqhubeka, uMbhele uyosiveza isizathu sangempela esamenza wabulala umufi.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ujoyine abalandeli ababona lo nozinti weChiefs kumfanele ukungena endizeni ebheke eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America (USA). “Umehluko phakathi kokuthi iChiefs ihlale endaweni yesithathu kwi-log nokuthi ingabi ngaphandle kwe-Top 8 yindlela uPetersen ayilwela ngayo kusukela kuqale isizini. “Uqokwe kufanele njengovelele emdlalweni wabakhaya kodwa okwangijabulisa nakakhulu ukuthi akayena unozinti okhuphula izinga uma kuyimidlalo emikhulu kuphela. “Uhlale eyihola njengesibani iChiefs. Okumnandi kakhulu uPetersen akwenze emdlalweni wabakhaya ukuthi uBroos uzibonele ngawakhe," kusho uKhune. “Ofuna ukwazi ukuthi kungani iChiefs yashaywa yiPirates ngo 3-0 kowabakhaya wangoFebhuwari, yingoba uPetersen wayengekho ngenxa yokugula. “Ngokwami kufanele ngabe kayisakhulunywa indaba yokuthi uPetersen uyaya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba noma cha kepha kufanele ngabe kukhulunywa ukuthi ngubani ozoqala imidlalo kwiBafana kweyoMhlaba phakathi kwakhe noRonza (Williams). “Ngiyaziqhenya ngoBrandon (Petersen) ngoba ngiyazazi izingqinamba ake abhekana nazo kwazise kunezingxenye zabalandeli ebezimqhathanisa nonozinti beChiefs baphambilini. “Ungumholi kwiChiefs futhi kufanele kuqokwe yena kowe-Goalkeeper of the Season ngoba ubuqhawe bakhe bufana ncamashi nobalaba abalishayela amagoli amqoka leli qembu."

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: kwathiwa angingangeni ngigamanxe, angibhekane nomsebenzi wami njengoba ngingeyena uphrojusa kodwa ngingumphathi wabaqondisi," kusho uKagiso. Uthe yena ubengangeni kwezemali kulo mdlalo, okuthinta amaholo, ukuqasha noma ukuxosha abasebenzi nabalingisi. "Kusuka uqala umdlalo, kuze kube manje angikaze ngithinte into ehlangene nemali, nokuthi isebenza kanjani kulo mdlalo. Mina okwami kwakuwukuthi ngikhiqize umdlalo osezingeni eliphezulu abantu abazowujabulela, emalini bengingazi lutho, kungakho ngikhethe ukuthi ngiphendule ngalezi zinsolo, esezibhekiswe kimina," kuchaza yena. Ngokusho kwakhe kuyamkhathaza ukuthi abalingisi, abasebenzi nawo wonke umuntu osebenza kulo mdlalo akaholile. Uthe uke wakhuluma nozakwabo abangaphezu kwakhe, abamtshele ukuthi akabheke umsebenzi wakhe. "Kulapho ngithathe isinqumo sokuthi ngixhumane neSABC nezinye izikhulu ezifanele ngoba ngase ngibona ukuthi isimo siya ngokuba sibi kakhulu. Ukungaholelwa kwabasebenzi abazinikele emsebenzini wabo ngakusukumela ngaze ngaxoxa nomunye wophrojusa ukuthi asitholele usizo ukuze kuqhubeke umsebenzi kodwa kwaba nhlanga zimuka nomoya," kuchaza yena. Uthe yize ezinkundleni zokuxhumana abantu besola yena, kodwa akungasolwa yena ngokudliwa kwemali njengoba naye engaholile njengawo wonke umsebenzi. Uthe okumenze

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ISILO uMisuZulu kaZwelithini Image: SIPHAMANDLA MBHELE | KZN DSAC SELUPHINDE lwavutshelwa kabusha uthuthuva lombango wesihlalo sobukhosi bukaZulu, obekucatshangwa ukuthi usuphelile kulandela ukuvumbuka kwenselelo ephonswa uMntwana uMbonisi kaBhekuzulu, ofuna iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ibuyekeze isinqumo esavuna ubukhosi beSilo uMisuzulu kaZwelithini. Ukuvuswa kwaleli cala, kubuyisela iNdlunkulu kwesinye isibindolo sempicabadala yomdonsiswano ngeSihlalo, oklaye abaNtwana bayinhlakanhlaka esabekayo. UMntwana uMbonisi kanye nabanye abaNtwana baseNdlunkulu, bafuna ukuthi iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo, iguqule isinqumo sayo esivuna isinqumo sikaMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, sokuvuma ukuqokwa kweSilo. INkantolo yoMthethosisekelo yachitha isicelo sikaMntwana uMbonisi nabanye sokuba baphonsele inselelo isinqumo seNkantolo yaMacala aDlulisiwe, esivuna uRamaphosa, ngoFebhuwari. Ngesikhathi kuphuma lesi sinqumo, abaningi babezitshela ukuthi sebefike kwangqingetshe labo abaphikisa ukuqokwa kweSilo njengoba iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ingeyokugcina. Manje uMntwana uMbonisi nahambisana nabo, bafuna ukuthi inkantolo ibavumele ukuthi baphonsele inselelo isinqumo seNkantolo yaMacala aDlulisiwe. Encwadini efungelwe, uMntwana uMbonisi usayibhedlile indaba yokuthi akuzange kulandelwe imigomo ngesikhathi kuhlonzwa iSilo. "URamaphosa kwakungafanele avume ukuqokwa kweSilo ngoba wayazi ukuthi kunombango wesihlalo sobukhosi. Kwakunezikhalazo ngesikhathi uRamaphosa evuma

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: abadlali abadala abenele ukuze bezocathulisa abancane," kusho uMere. "Abadlali abadala benza umsebenzi omkhulu ngaphakathi eqenjini, bayazi ukuthi kungani bekhona. Bahlala becabangela imindeni yabo ngoba bayazi ukuthi sesiyaphela isikhathi sabo esigabeni esiphezulu. Ngakho bazama ukwelula isikhathi sabo enkundleni ekubeni abadlali abancane bayazi ukuthi kuneqembu elisazobasayinisa okuyinto embi. Uma usuqala ukukholwa ukuthi kukhona abazokuthatha, wayeka ukujabulela ikhaya lakho, uzoshayeka. Sibabonile abadlali abaphezulu abadlale eNdebeni yoMhlaba nasemaqenjini amakhulu, emuva kokuphuma kuwona, akasekho obafunayo." Nakuba isaqhubeka eyokushaywa ngesithende kwabadlali abadala kodwa akhona amaqembu avuna izithelo zokudlalisa abancane emaqenjini ePremiership. Emaqenjini ashintshele kwinjejane kukhona i-Orlando Pirates eshaya ngoMbekezeli Mbokazi (20), Relebohile Mofokeng (20) asebephenduke abadlali beBafana Bafana.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: phezu kolwazi lokuthi ngayizolo, amaphoyisa athole imoto eyiveni, i-NP200, ebiphantshelwe yisondo esigodini saseMntentweni, bude buduze nedolobha i-Port Shepstone. “Athe le moto ayithole ingenamuntu phakathi, isele dengwane. Athi uma eyibheka ngemumva, athola kukhona inqwaba yenyama nezinhloko. Athi uma eyongikhombisa, nebala ngathola ukuthi yizo izinkomo zami lezi engithi zidukile,” usho kanje. Uthe amaphoyisa aqhubeke amtshela ukuthi athe uma ephenya ngale moto etholakele, kwavela ukuthi yayibikwe ukuthi yebiwe esiteshini samaphoyisa i-Durban Central nyakenye. "Ngiphatheke kabi ngokuthi sintshontshelwe imfuyo ngale ndlela. Sifisa amaphoyisa enze kangcono ngamacala okwebiwa kwemfuyo ngoba siyawabika ngethemba lokuthi kukhona abazoboshwa kodwa uphenyo lwakhona luphelele emoyeni,” kusho uCele. Uthe njengoba yena elahlekelwe yimfuyo, ungowesibili emndenini ukulahlekelwa esikhathini esiyizinyanga ezimbalwa. “Umalume wami ubulawelwe ezine ngasekupheleni konyaka odlule. Nezakhe zabulawa ngendlela efanayo emadlelweni. Yena-ke akazange athole namkhondo. Naye wabika emaphoyiseni kodwa icala laphelela emoyeni,” kubeka uCele. Uthe uma ekhumbula kahle, lesi yisigameko sesithathu esikhathini esingangezinyanga eziyisishiyagalombili. “Zibulawelwa endaweni eyodwa, nokwenza sicabange ukuthi amasela

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: njengoba ibibhekene nesimo esingesihle sezimali. Kuthe uma sekuvela lezi zindaba ekubeni imali le nkampani yanikwa yonke kwashiwo ukuthi abakwenza akulungile, kungcono nabo bamiswe emsebenzini kuze kube kuphela uphenyo oseluqalile ngaphakathi,” kusho umthombo. Uthe kumanje izikhulu ezikhona azazi nokuthi zithathe siphi isinqumo, mayelana nokuqeda lo mdlalo unomphela zifake omunye noma ziphinde zithole enye inkampani ezoqhubeka nawo. “Okwamanje akucaci ukuthi isiphi isinqumo okumele sithathwe abaphathi njengoba abanye befuna ukuqeda ngalo mdlalo kodwa kusabhekwa izindlela ezihlukene ukuze kuphunywe nesinqumo okuyiso,” kuchaza umthombo. Esitatimendeni eyasikhipha iSABC yaveza ukuthi ngeke ize inabe noma idalule izivumelwano ababenazo nale nkampani kodwa okwamanje isabheka izindlela ezinye zazo okuwukuthatha le nkampani baye enkantolo njengoba bona bayikhokhela yonke imali yayo. UKagiso Modupe, okunguye umnikazi wale nkampani, waveza ukuthi akazani nokudliwa kwezimali njengoba yena wanikeza ozakwabo amandla okuthi bakhiqize umdlalo yena bagcina bemenza umqondisi. author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: SIKE sagqekezwa isikole uMkhumbane Secondary kulandela udweshu ngokufakwa kwamakhamera UKUGQEKEZWA kwesikole uMkhumbane Secondary, eChesterville, kunike abazali isizathu esiqinile sokuthi angabe esathintwa ngempela amakhamera asuse umsindo ngenyanga edlule kulesi sikole. Lokhu kuvele ngesikhathi Isolezwe lixoxa nomunye wabazali, ukubheka ukuthi sihamba kanjani isimo selokhu kubuyelwe esikoleni, kulandela ukuphazamiseka kokufunda amasonto amathathu. Umzali, uNksz Xolile Buhlalu, uveze ukuthi sigqekeziwe isikole ngoMashi 10, kodwa abasolwa abathathu abavezwa amakhamera, bagcina bengathathanga lutho. “La makhamera angafunwa ngothisha beSadtu noMnyango wezeMfundo, yiwo aveze kahle ukuthi abasolwa babebathathu, kanti omunye wabo, sizwa kuthiwa abamaziyo sebeshilo ukuthi ungubani. Lokhu kusinikeze esinye isizathu esiqinile singabazali sokuthi bubaluleke ngani ubukhona bawo,” kusho uNksz Buhlalu. Uthe uthishanhloko obambile njengoba esamisiwe obekhona phambilini, ukuqonda ngokuphelele ukukhathazeka kwabazali ngobugebengu esikoleni. UNksz Buhlalu uthe ngaleso sizathu uthishanhloko ubalalele bengabazali uma bethi awangakhishwa. author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI weDurban City, uPitso Dladla, nowe-TS Galaxy, uBernard Parker, okuyibona abazobe behola la maqembu kowamanqamu eNedbank Cup kusihlwa ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane NGAPHANDLE kokuthi ukufinyelela kweDurban City kowamanqamu weNedbank Cup yinto ebingacatshangwa yiningi lezingqapheli nabathandi bebhola jikelele baseNingizimu Afrika njengoba kuyisizini yayo yokuqala esigabeni seBetway Premiership, kungase kube yingqophamlando nakumqeqeshi wayo imbala, uPitso Dladla. UDladla (47), ongumqeqeshi osabambile kwiCity, uzohlala ebhentshini njengenhloko yabaqeqeshi njengoba bezobhekana ne-TS Galaxy kowamanqamu weNedbank Cup namuhla ngo-6 ntambama, ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Lo mqeqeshi ubanjiswe izintambo zokuqeqesha ekuqaleni kukaFebhuwari ngemuva kokuxoshwa kukaSinethemba Badela. Usethubeni lokuba ngumqeqeshi waKwaZulu-Natal ozoqeda isomiso seminyaka engu-16 sezindebe emaqenjini akulesi sifundazwe. Usethubeni futhi lokuziqophela owakhe umlando ngokuba ngumqeqeshi wokuqala waleli qembu laseThekwini ozonqoba indebe kwiPremiership. “Asizikhathazi ngemidlalo yethu emithathu esingenzanga kahle kuyona ngaphambi kwalo mdlalo wamanqamu esizowudlala ne-TS Galaxy. Umdlalo womkhumulajezi wehlukile kunomdlalo weligi, ngakho umdlalo wamanqamu esiya kuwo sizowuthatha ngendlela ehlukile,” kusho uDladla. author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMphathiswa wezeMpilo obebambele undunankulu, uNksz Nomagugu Simelane, iphini lemeya kuMasipala waseNdwedwe, uNkk Zandile Siwetu-Thoolsi, imeya kuMasipala waseNdwedwe, uMnuz Sam Mfeka, uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, imeya kaMasipala wesifunda Ilembe uMnuz Thobani Shandu, uNgqongqoshe wezoBulungiswa, uNksz Mmamoloko Kubayi nephini likangqongqhse wezoBulungiswa, uMnuz Andries Nel UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa, uthe usalucubungula udaba lukaKhomishana wamaPhoyisa obhekene necala, uGeneral Fannie Masemola. URamaphosa uthe uzokwenza isimemezelo uma eseqedile ukubheka. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba abebehambele uhlelo lokudluliselwa koxhaso lokuvusa imizi eyacekelwa phansi ngesikhathi sobandlululo, eNdwedwe, izolo. UMasemola usengcupheni yokumiswa ngenxa yokuthi ubhekene necala elithinta ithenda kaR360 million, eyanikwa inkampani kasomabhizinisi obhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusumuzi 'Cat' Matlala. UMasemola ubhekene necala lokwephula imigomo yokuphathwa kwemali yomphakathi.Uzovela enkantolo ngo-Ephreli 21. "Udaba lukaMasemola silusingethe futhi sizolulungisa. Sizokwenza isimemezelo uma kukhona isinqumo esesithathiwe." Ekhuluma ngohlelo abezolwethula, uRamaphosa uveze ukuthi kuzohlomula imindeni engu-220 okwacekelwa phansi imizi yayo ngesikhathi sobandlululo. author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMASOJA Msiza odlala indawo kaNkunzi Mhlongo kuZalo Image: Facebook/Uzalo IKHULUNYELWA emakhoneni eyokuhamba kwesilomo somlingisi woZalo, uMasoja Msiza, kulo mdlalo wakwiSABC 1. UMasoja udlala indawo ephambili kaNkunzebomvu “Nkunzi” Mhlongo, emdlalweni okhonjiswa ngo-8.30 ebusuku, phakathi nesonto. Isolezwe lithole ngemithombo yalo engaphakathi kuZalo, ukuthi akucaci kahle ngekusasa likaMasoja oseneminyaka eyibambile emdlalweni. “UMasoja uyahamba futhi asimazi ukuthi uya kuphi,” kusho umthombo. Omunye umthombo ongazani nowokuqala, uthe naye uzwe ngandlebenye yize kungekho osephumele obala waqinisekisa. “Ngizwe kukhulunywa emaphaseji kodwa anginaso isiqiniseko,” kusho yena. Muva nje, kusanda kuqala isizini entsha ka-12 yoZalo olwaqala ngo-2015, lugxile emindenini emibili wakwaMdletshe nowakwaXulu. Kulezi zinsuku emdlalweni uNkunzi uboshiwe kulandela ukuboshelwa icala lokubanjwa kwenkunzi imali eyatholakala kwakhe. Ngokwamazwibela omdlalo ayo yonke inyanga, kuvela ukuthi uNkunzi usazoqhubeka nokuba sejele. Omunye umlingisi woZalo owanyamalala ngokuboshwa nguNothando Ngcobo olingisa indawo kaHlelo. Imizamo yokuthola ukuphawula kweSABC naboZalo ayiphumelelanga njengoba bengayiphendulanga imiyalezo abathunyelelwe yona. Nokho ngesikhathi uMasoja ethintwa, ukuphikile ukuthi akaseyona ingxenye yoZalo. “Asiyiyeke lapho, angihambi.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ukuba akhankasele i-ANC nabayimele okhethweni. Ngisho nalabo abanobulungu be-SACP baphoqelekile ukuthi bakhankasele i-ANC. Abangeke baphumele obala ukuthi bazokhankasela i-ANC, sizothatha ngokuthi bazokhankasela elinye biqembu. Abakhankasela iqembu elincintisana ne-ANC bazothathelwa izinyathelo. "Uma ujutshwe esikhundleni kuhulumeni sizokuthathela izinyathelo okubalwa kuzo ukuthi sikukhiphe esikhundleni. Sizokukhipha esikhundleni ngoba uzokube ukhankasela iqembu elibanga ne-ANC okhethweni, nokuyinto ephambene nemigomo ye-ANC." UMbalula uthe amalungu e-SACP angeke axoshwe kwi-ANC. "Siyasihlonipha isinqumo se-SACP sokungenela ukhetho. Angeke silwe namaKhomanisi emkhankasweni wethu. Asinankinga namalungu e-SACP. I-SACP inabaholi abanohlonze abanye babo bajutshwe ezikhundleni kuhulumeni. Amanye amalungu e-SACP anombono ohlukile ngodaba lokungenela ukhetho. "Asikho empini. Into nje okufanele abantu bakhethe ukuthi bazokhankasela liphi iqembu. Awukwazi ukukhankasela womabili amaqembu. Kufanele ukhethe iqembu elilodwa. Awukwazi ukuthi namhlanje uzokhankasela i-ANC, uvuke kusasa usukhankasela i-SACP." UMbalula uthe bayoze bayibone emva kokhetho i-SACP. "Mhlawumbe le nto sizoyixoxa emva kokhetho. Uma sekuphume imiphumela yokhetho mhlawumbe sizobona ukuthi singakwazi yini ukusebenzisana ne-SACP. Ngeke uphinde usizwe sikhuluma ngale ndaba."

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: USTHEMBISO "SK" Khoza uzobanga ukushisa kwiSitha The Enemy ULUNGA Mofokeng esejoyine iSkeem Saam IMIDLALO uZalo kuSABC 1 neThonga kuMzansi Magic kufanele izibambe ziqine njengoba izimbangi zayo kwi-e.tv, Isitha The Enemy, ziqinise isikimu ngesilomo somlingisi waseThekwini, uSthembiso "SK" Khoza. Isolezwe Ngempelasonto lithole ukuthi indawo ezolingiswa wu-SK izosusa ukushisa njengoba ezojola nentombi yomuntu. Izindaba zokujoyinwa kwalo mdlalo yilesi silomo esaduma ngokuba uShaka Khoza kwi-The Queen, ziqinisekiswe ngokhulumela abakwa-e.tv, uTshegofatso Kolotse. Uthe uSK uzobe elingisa indawo kaSabelo, ozofika kulo mdlalo ezoxova. Eqhuba uTshegofatso, uthe uSK uzoba phakathi kodweshu oluzothinta umndeni wakwaSokhulu, Gumede nowakwaMabuza. Leli phephandaba libuye lathola ukuthi uSabelo uzofike aqhubeke lapho agcina khona nentokazi eyayiyisinqandamathe sakhe uNandi, okuyindawo elingiswa wuSibonginkosi Tenza. Okuzodala umsindo omkhulu wukuthi uNandi usothandweni oluvutha amalangabi noSolomzi, okuyindawo elingiswa wuSenzokuhle Radebe. Kulindeleke ukuthi ukushisa kuqale ngesikhathi uSabelo evela ngoMsombuluko. Khonamanjalo, umdlalo osakazwa kwiSABC 1 phakathi nezinsuku ngo-7.30 ebusuku, iSkeem Saam, uqinise amabhawodi ngokulanda uLunga Mofokeng. Le nsizwa eyaduma kakhulu

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: USALE ekhathazekile umqeqeshi weHollywoodbets Sharks, u-JP Pietersen, ngesikhathi beguqiswa yi-Ospreys kwu-URC UKULIMALA kwesilomo seHollywoodbets Sharks, u-Ethan Hooker, kufane nokungena kukasawoti esilondeni saleli qembu laseThekwini, ebesivele sibhibha ngenxa yomphumela obuqeda amathuba alo okuba yingxenye yemidlalo yomkhumulajezi we-United Rugby Championship (URC) eliwuthole ngempelasonto. Lokhu kushiwo ngumqeqeshi weSharks, u-JP Pietersen, ekutshela abezindaba kulandela ukuguqa kwezakhe ngo 21-17 kwi-Ospreys yaseWales, ekuhambeni ngoMgqibelo. Ukuguqa kweSharks kuwaqeda nya amathuba ayo okudlulela emidlalweni yomkhumulajezi kwazise igebe elikhona phakathi kwayo neqembu lokugcina (kwazoqhubeka iVodacom Bulls) likhulu ekubeni nemidlalo esele isimbalwa (3). Bekusobala kulo mdlalo ukuthi iSharks ibe nebhadi okufakazelwa wukuthola kwayo ama-try amathathu njenge-Ospreys kodwa yahlulwa ama-conversion. Iqiniso ukuthi leli qembu laseThekwini, lizenzele phansi. Ama-try amabili eSharks ashaywe nguPhepsi Buthelezi neyodwa kaHooker kodwa lo mdlali wamaBhokobhoko akazange awuqede umdlalo. Lokhu kunanelwe yinkulumo kaPietersen kwabezindaba lapho ekhale khona ngamaphutha nokulimala kukaHooker. “Nakulokhu siphinde sazenzela phansi emdlalweni obungekho lukhuni kangako ukuthi besingashaywa kuwona,” kusho uPietersen. “Okubuhlungu kakhulu ngukulinyalelwa nguHooker olinyazwe

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: efilimini esihloko sithi Isivumelwano. Wadlala indawo kaMkabayi emdlalweni ozigcawugcawu wethelevishini uShaka Zulu. Emuva kwalokho walingisa emdlalweni owuchungechunge kaDuma Ndlovu uMuvhango. Ngenxa yeqhaza lakhe emkhakheni wezokulingisa, uCynthia uhlonishwe ngomklomelo weLifetime Achievement kumaSouth African Film and TV Awards (Saftas) nakumaSimon Mabhunu Sabela TV and Film Awards. Ushiye emhlabeni amadodakazi akhe uSihle nosaziwayo wethelevishini uNonhle Thema namadodana u-Ayanda noBanele Thema kanye nabazukulu nesizukulwane. Ngokwesitatimende somndeni, imininingwane ngezinhlelo zomngcwabo zisazimenyezelwa. UCYNTHIA SHANGE noNONHLE THEMA UCYNTHIA Shange elingisa indawo kaMaButhelezi, unina kaThandaza (Sindi Dlathu) kuMuvhango UCNTHIA SHANGE noNONHLE THEMA

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: BEKUHLOBISWA kahle amabhokisi anamathambo abalandwe emazweni ase-Europe abafihlwe izolo, eNorthern Cape Image: X/PresidencySA IMINDENI iphethe amabhokisi anamathambo ezihlobo abuyiselwe kuleli esuswa eHunterian Museum, eNyuvesi yaseGlasgow eScotland, nakwiZiko Museum. Angcwatshwe kabusha izolo, eNorthern Cape Image: X/PresidencySA UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa useyalele amazwe ase-Europe, ukuthi abuyise konke okungamagugu akushaqa kuleli ukuze ayokwenza ngakho ucwaningo aphinde akugcina emanyuvesi nasezindaweni ezigcina amagugu kulawo mazwe. URamaphosa uthe bakufuna konke kubalwa namathambo ambiwa abantu kwayobukiswa ngakho emhlabeni. "Sifuna yonke into eyashaqwa ngezikhathi zakudala, kwayiswa emazweni e-Europe ukuze kuyogcinwa kuphinde kwenziwe nocwaningo. Kwambiwa kungafanele amathambo abantu ukuze kuyobukiswa ngakho ezindaweni ezigcina amagugu kulawa mazwe. Siwafuna wonke la magugu ngoba ngawethu, abuyele kuleli ngoba angumlando oveza ubuthina," kusho uRamaphosa. Ukusho lokhu izolo, ngesikhathi kungcwatshwa kabusha amathambo abangu-63, besizwe samaKhoi namaSan, ababegcinwe ezikhungweni zemfundo ezehlukene kanjalo nasezindaweni zamagugu njengaseHunterian Museum, eNyuvesi yaseGlasgow eScotland, nakwiZiko Museum. La magugu afihlwe kabusha eKinderlê Monument, eSteinkopf, eNorthern Cape. "Umoya wabasuswa kuleli ngokungemthetho ubungakutholi ukuphumula

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UKAPUTENI weBafana Bafana, uRonwen Williams, elihola ngengoma leli qembu lesizwe ngaphambi komdlalo walo wobungani nePanama, eKapa OMUNYE wabadlali basesiswini ababeqavile kwiBafana Bafana eminyakeni edlule, u-Andile Jali, ulibona lingavuthiwe ngokugcwele iqembu lesizwe likaHugo Broos ukuthi selingahamba ibanga elide kwiNdebe yoMhlaba eqala ezinyangeni ezimbili eMexico, Canada nase-United States (USA). Muva nje, iBafana izwane amandla nePanama emidlalweni emibili emshiye engeneme ngokugcwele uJali osanda kutshela Isolezwe ukuthi wayibona ingavuthiwe ngokwanele. Kufanele ukuba uBroos akasalali ethatha ebeka, kwazise uzoqala ngoJuni, lo mqhudelwano lapho beqhathwe khona neMexico, Korea republic neCzechia kuGroup A. Emuva kokuthi uJali owadlalela iBafana amahlandla angu-45, eyibuke ibambana iphinde ishaywe yiPanama eThekwini naseKapa muva nje, wasala nomuzwa wokuthi ngeke ihambe ibanga elide kulo mqhudelwano. “Kukhona umlilo engangiwulindele kule midlalo kodwa engingawubonanga uphuma emehlweni abadlali abayolwela izwe labo esigabeni somhlaba,” kusho uJali. “Ngokwami ngabona iPanama ingcono kakhulu ngasheshe ngawehlisa umoya ngebanga esizolihamba kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. “Kangigxeki muntu kodwa mhlawumbe kukhona induku abasayithukuse emqubeni kusukela kumqeqeshi

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: epulazini likaRamaphosa. Kuningi okungavela uma kungase kuphenywe ngemali eyangena neyaphuma kuma-akhawunti abanye abasolwa." URamaphosa uvulelwe icala lokwehluleka ukubika ngobugebengu, elokuqamba amanga efungile kanye nelenkohlakalo. Udaba lokuntshontshwa kwemali epulazini likaRamaphosa luqale phansi emva kwesinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosiseklo sangesonto eledlule. Inkantolo yachitha isinqumo sePhalamende sokunqaba ukwamukela umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwamadola aseMelika epulazini likaRamaphosa. Umbiko wethimba elaliholwa owayeyiJaji, uSandile Ngcobo, wathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona imigomo uRamaphosa ayiphula. Isinqumo senkantolo sesenze ukuthi iPhalamende liqhubeke nohlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Amaqembu ezepolitiki afuna uRamaphosa akhishwe esikhundleni. Amalungu esigungu esiphezulu kwi-ANC abenomhlangano oyisipesheli, izolo ebusuku lapho ebhunge khona ngalolu daba. Amalungu amaningi e-ANC ayameseka uRamaphosa kodwa kukhona afuna ukuthi ehle esikhundleni.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ISouth African Health Products Regulatory Authority (SAHPRA) igunyaze ukusebenza kwe-Lenacapavir, okungumjovo wezinyanga eziyisithupha wokugwema i-HIV KUNENHLANSI yethemba ngempi ebhekiswe kwi-HIV eNingizimu Afrika, njengoba sekufike umjovo ozosiza ukuvikela abangakasuleleki ngaleli gciwane. Lo mjovo, i-Lenacapavir, uzosiza ngokuvikela abangakahaqwa yigciwane ukuthi lingabe lisabangena. Abangakasuleleki bazojovwa kabili ngonyaka. UMnyango wezeMpilo umemezele ukuthi ifikile imijovo engu-37 920 ye-Lenacapavir kuleli. Okhulumela uMnyango, uMnuz Foster Mohale, uthe abantu bazojova kabili ngonyaka. "Umuntu uzojova kanye ezinyangeni eziyisithupha, aphinde ajove ezinyangeni eziyisithupha ezilandelayo ukuze angasulelekile nge-HIV. Inhloso ukwehlisa abantu abahaqwa yileli gciwane." Uthe bahlose ukuvikela izingane ezincane zamantombazane, abesifazane abasebancane kanjalo nabesilisa abalala nabanye besilisa. "Sihlose nokuvikela nabadayisa ngomzimba nabanye. Sifuna ukukucacisa ukuthi lo mjovo uzovikela abangakahaqeki, awulona ikhambi lokulapha ingculazi." Uthe maduzane bazowethula emphakathini lo mjovo kanti kulindeleke uthulwe ngumengameli wezwe. I-DA ikwamukele ukufika kwawo, yathi uzosiza kakhulu empini yeHIV kuleli. Ithe abangakahaqeki bazovikeleka ekutheni bangasuleleki ngaleli gciwane. "Elakuleli linesibalo esiphezulu sabantu abane-HIV emhlabeni jikelele. Babalelwa ku-8 million

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UKUTHOLA isibhaxu kwamaqembu abebanga ukuhlala esicongweni seDStv Diski Challenge, kuweze ngelibanzi i-Orlando Pirates esiqhwekele. IPirates iqoqe amaphuzu amathathu ngokwehlula iTS Galaxy ngo 2-0 ngoMgqibelo, yahlala esicongweni se-log ngamaphuzu angu-10 emidlalweni emine. Bekubhekwe ukuthi iKaizer Chiefs, Mamelodi Sundowns neStellenbosch bazocosha amaphuzu emidlalweni yabo yayizolo, bayigudluze iPirates engayiqalanga kahle sizini ka-2025/2026. Nokho kuyiweze ngelibanzi ukuthola isibhaxu izolo kwalezi zimbangi esezike zayiwina iligi yeDiski. iChiefs yehlulwe ngaMaZulu ngo 1-0 ekhaya, iStellenbosch yaphuma inqina kamabuyaze kwiSiwelele, ishaywa ngo 3-0, kwathi iSundowns yakhala ngaphansi kwiRichards Bay ngo 1-0. AmaZulu neBay basezithendeni zePirates ngamaphuzu ayisishiyagalolunye iqembu ngalinye. IPirates engakaze iyiwine iligi yeDiski, ishaya ngomqeqeshi omusha, uRoscoe Krieling, owayiqukula le ndebe ngo-2023 eyiphini likaThabo September kwiSuperSport United. Akubuzwa ukuthi le ndebe ilindelwe kakhulu emahhovisi eZimnyama. Umqeqeshi ogqamise abadlali abaningi bePirates abanye asebeyibamba esikimini seBetway Premiership, uJoseph Makhanya, ugudluziwe kwesokupheka iqembu leDiski emuva kokwehluleka ukuwina iligi kumasizini amathathu. Nokho, ukhiqize abadlali abanekhono okubalwa kubona uRelebohile Mofokeng, Mohau Nkota

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: ndondo ngayo - nokuyinto ecacisa ngokusobala ukuthi amagalelo ami ayabonakala emculweni phezu kweminyaka engaphezu kwa-20 ngikhona,” usho kanje. Eqhuba, uthe into emkhalise kakhulu izinyembezi ngenkathi emukela indondo - wukuthi bese kuyisikhathi eside kakhulu ekule ndima yomculo kepha kulokhu kukuncane kakhulu okukhombisa ukuthi abantu neziphathimandla bayawubona umsebenzi awenzayo. “Lokhu kuyangikhuthaza ukuthi ngiqhubeke ngizikhandle ngomsebenzi wami womculo engibusiswe wuNkulunkulu ngawo. Ngithemba ukuthi kuzokhuthaza amaciko eza emva kwami ukukhuthala nokuma njalo ezimweni ezinzima ukuthola akufunayo,” kusho uStogie T. UStogie T udabuka eTanzania, wase eduma emculweni esezinze eNingizimu Afrika. Igama lakhe lokuzalwa wuTumi Molekane kanti uqale ukugqama endimeni yomculo eseyingxenye yeqembu le-hip hop eselahlakazeka iTumi and The Volume. Ngaphandle kwale ngoma ethi Four Horsemen ekwi-albhamu kaStogie T yanyakenye, ethi Anomy amanye ama-albhamu akhe athi Return of The King (2015), i-Stogie T (2016), i-Honey and Pain (2018), ne-The Empire of Sheep yango-2020.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: BASWELE amaphiko abadlali be-Orlando Pirates emuva kokuthi uTshegofatso Mabasa eshaye phakathi iphenathi eqinisekise ukuthi bazodlala kowamanqamu weMTN8 Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMDLALO weMamelodi Sundowns ne-Orlando Pirates kwiMTN8, uqubule imizwa eyahlukene yabalandeli ngabaqeqeshi bala maqembu. Abazifela ngeZimnyama bebemdinelwe u-Abdeslam Ouaddou ngaphambi kwalo mdlalo eziwunqobe ngo 4-1 kumaphenathi ngenxa yokwehluleka kwazo ukucosha amaphuzu emidlalweni yeBetway Premiership nokubeka ngaphandle kwakhe izintandokazi zabadlali. Nokho uligezile igama lakhe ngoMgqibelo, ePitoli, efaka leli qembu kowamanqamu weMTN8 esizobhekana kuwona neStellenbosch. Ngasohlangothini lweSundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, ujikelwe ngabalandeli, bafuna ukumthela isibhaxu ngesikhathi ibhasi leqembu liphuma enkundleni. Ukugxekwa kwakhe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kukhomba ukuthi abalandeli abasamfuni eChloorkop. Nakuba bebengakugqamisi lokhu kodwa bebeyikhulumela phansi eyokuthi abaneme ngokwehlulweka kwakhe ukuwina iCaf Champions League.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: kwiBetway Premiership ngesizini ka-2024/2025. Emidlalweni engu-10 yePremiership, usangenelwe ngamagoli ayisihlanu. Abanye onozinti bePirates nguSiyabonga Dladla (24) no-Ethan Visagie (23) abasuka kwiDStv Diski Challenge. UButhelezi noDladla yibona abashintshana ngokuhlala ebhetshini kwiPirates. "Ubalulekile umsebenzi owenziwa ngonozinti nsuku zonke. Indawo yonozinti ikhethekile. Umqondo wonozinti ukhethekile. Ngijwayele ukuthi onozinti basemhlabeni wabo bodwa. Asikwazi ukubaqhathanisa nabo bonke abadlali. Nakuba nabo bengabadlali kodwa banendlela ehlukile yokucabanga. Kufanele sixhumane babo, sibathembe, sibaqinise. Ngiyazi ukuthi nginonozinti abane abaseqophelweni eliphezulu,"kusho u-Ouaddou. Okwamanje uSipho wenza kahle kakhulu. Indawo yonozinti ibalulekile kimina, akulula ukushintsha ngoba uma siqinile kuyona futhi singangenelwa ngamagoli, akulula ukushintsha. Kodwa engingakusho wukuthi nginonozinti abahle, abasebenza kanzima futhi abagxile emsebenzini wabo. Ngijabule kakhulu ngabo, uButhelezi, uDladla noVisagie, benza umsebenzi omuhle eqenjini." IPirates ephume ekuseni kwiCaf Champions League, izobhekana neMarumo Gallants emdlalweni wamanqamu weCarling Knockout ngoDisemba 6 ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Ngaphambi kwalokho, izodlala emithathu yeligi neChippa United (Novemba 25), Durban City (Novemba 29) neRichards Bay (Disemba 2).

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: OSAZIWAYO bakuleli abavaleleke eDubai, e-United Arab Emirates (UAE), ngenxa yokumiswa kwamabhanoyi, bacela usizo njengoba kuqhubeka impi eqale ngempelasonto. I-Israel ngokubambisana ne-United States of America (USA) bahlasele i-Iran. Esinye sezizathu ezivelayo wukuthi bavimba i-Iran ukuthi ikwazi ukwakha izikhali zenuzi nabakubona kungaba yingozi njengoba ubudlelwano bayo nala mazwe bungebuhle. I-Iran iziphindiselele ngokuqhumisa amazwe anobudlelwano ne-USA okubalwa ne-United Arab Emirates, lapho kunenkambu yamasosha ayo khona. Umsakazi ophinde abe ngumethuli wezinhlelo zethelevishini, uSpitch Nzawumbi, ulokhu ebhala ezinkundleni zokuxhumana njengoba eseDubai. NgoMgqibelo, ubhale kwiFacebook ukuthi uvalelekile. Unxuse abezindaba ukuthi bamthinte ngoba bayahlaselwa. Izolo, uSpitch oke wethula uhlelo i-Unfollowed kuShowmax, ubhale ukuthi: “Ngiphephile.” Image: Instagram/Spitch Nzawumbi Omunye usaziwayo u-Eva Modika, ukhiphe isitatimende ethi uthwele kanzima. Uthe uhambe eyosebenza futhi eyogubha nosoku lwakhe lokuzalwa. “Bengiqashwe eDubai njengoDJ nosaziwayo wakwithelevishini. Ngenxa yesimo esiqhubekayo, imicimbi iphazamisekile futhi kwamiswa wonke amabhanoyi. Ngenxa yalokhu sengilahlekelwe yimali elinganiselwa ku-R250 000,” kubhala u-Eva. Uthe unxusa uMengameli wezwe noMnyango wezobuDlelwano namaZwe oMhlaba, ukuba bangenelele

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: KUKHALWA ngothisha abavela kwamanye amazwe, asebeqashelwe ukufundisa izilimi zakuleli, ekubeni kunothisha ababhuquza emakhaya abangasebenzi. Lesi sikhalo sivezwe amalungu ePhalamende, akhale ngokuthi kwezinye izifundazwe kuqashwe othisha abavela kwamanye amazwe, abafundisa izifundo ezithathwa njengezingadingi ubuchule obuthile. UMqondisi jikelele eMnyangweni weMfundo eyisiSekelo uMnuz Mathanzima Mweli, uthe utholile ukuthi kwezinye izifundazwe othisha abavela kwamanye amazwe bafundisa izilimi zomdabu. "Sike saba nenkinga yokuthi sidinga othisha abazofundisa izifundo ezifana neMaths neSayensi. Othisha bakwamanye amazwe kumele bathathwe uma bezofundisa lezi zifundo hhayi ukuthi bafundise izilimi zakuleli. Kwezinye izifundazwe engizihambele, ngithole ukuthi othisha bakwamanye amazwe abafundisi izifundo ezifana neMaths neSayensi, kodwa sebefundisa izifundo ezingadingi ubuchule namava athile ezifana nezilimi. Ngiyavumelana nabathi kumele kulezi zikhala kufakwe othisha bakuleli abangasebenzi," kusho uMweli, ekhuluma emhlanganweni wekomiti muva nje. UMnuz Siphetho Mkhize weqembu iMKP, ukhale ngokuthi baningi othisha abavela kwamanye amazwe abangafundisi izifundo ezifana neMaths neSayensi. "Kumele kuqashwe inqwaba yothisha bakuleli abahleli emakhaya ngoba bengenawo umsebenzi. Akukwazi ukuthi ezifundweni ezifana nezingadingi ubuchule

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Izimoto ezinikelwe umnyango kaCogta UTHATHWE emalini yezinye izinhlelo zoMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambinsana kanye neziNdaba zoMdabu KwaZulu-Natal u-R 19 million okuthengwe ngawo izingqovungqovu zezimoto ezinikwe imikhandlu yamakhosi angu-30 KwaZulu-Natal. Ingxenye yemali ethenge lezi zimoto ezingundaba mlonyeni bekuhlelwe ukuthi kuholelwe abasebenzi abebezoqashwa umnyango. Lokhu kuqukethwe empendulweni ebhalwe phansi yoMphathiswa woMnyango, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi, obephendula imibuzo yelungu leDA, uNksz Marlaine Nair. UButhelezi uveze ukuthi banqume ukuthi imali bathenge ngayo izimoto ngenxa yokubambezeleka kohlelo lokuqashwa kwabasebenzi abebezoholelwa ngale mali. Enye imali bekufanele ithenge imishini yamakhompyutha. "Sithathe yonke le mali engazange isebenze sabe sesithenga izimoto, asizange sisebenzise ngokweqile isabelomali soMnyango." UButhelezi uthe bazoqhubeka nokuthenga izimoto ezizonikelwa emikhandlwini yamakhosi. Uveze ukuthi izimoto zohlobo lweFord Everest ezingu-12 ebiza u-R772 259 ngayinye, kanye nama-GWM P300 D/C angu-18 abiza u-R563 494 ngayinye. UNksz Nair uthe usephinde wabhalela uButhelezi eminye imibuzo. Uthe bafuna ukwazi ukuthi izimoto azithengangwa yini ngemali ebibekelwe ukulekelela omasipala noma ukubhekana nezinhlekelele. UNksz Nair uthe bafuna ukwazi ukuthi

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: SINYOMFE izinhlelo zamaqembu eBetway Premiership isinqumo seCape Town Spurs sokumangalela abadlali okuvela ukuthi sebesayine kwiKaizer Chiefs nakuMaZulu ngokwehlukana. Nakuba sekwaziwa ukuthi iChiefs isisayinise uLuke Baartam no-Asanele Velebayi kodwa ayikabamemezeli ngenxa yokuthi abaphathi beSpurs bafake isimangalo ekomitini eliqondisa ubugwegwe lePremier Soccer League (PSL) ikhala ngendlela abahambe ngayo ekubeni besanezinkontileka. Yisimo esifanayo kuMaZulu asayinise uLiam Bern obekufanele amethule kwabezindaba kuleli sonto. ISpurs, egawulwe yizembe kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship, ifuna babuyele kuyona njengoba isiqalile ukuziqeqeshela ukuqala kwesizini ye-ABC Motsepe League. Ngokomthetho wePSL, umdlali osedlala kumaligi eSouth African Football Association (Safa) akayisayini inkontileka. Lokhu kusho ukuthi uBaartman, Velebayi noBern sebangama-amesha. Nokho iSpurs izwakala ifuna inkokhelo ngala badlali ebakhulisile futhi ifuna amaqembu abafunayo asondele kuyona kuxoxwe kunokubathatha bhusende. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi seliqalile ukuqulwa icala likaBaartman kodwa kushaye isikhathi sokushicilela kungakaveli ukuthi lihamba kanjani. Kodwa kuvelile ukuthi lizobuyela ngoMsombuluko. Icala likaVelebayi kulindeleke ukuthi lingene ngoJulayi 31. Kubahluleli abakuleli kulele cala, kukhona uZola Majavu wePSL, Siboniso Gaxa owayengumdlali

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: afinyelele kulezi zibalo akuzo manje," kusho uNtencane. Kule albhamu uthe akwenzile okuhlukile wukuthi abheke ukuthi abalandeli bakhe bafunani ezingomeni zakhe bese eyakusebenzisa. "Angiyishintshanga indlela engicula ngayo, kodwa ngibheke emuva lokho abalandeli bami ababethe angikwenze ezingomeni zami, ngempela ngikwenzile lokho njengoba kukhona ushuni omusha engiqhamuke nawo wesimanje. Ngibheke uthando okuyinto wonke umuntu ayithandayo nesikholelwayo kuyona sonke, ngacula ngalo, yingakho lezi zingoma ezimbili kubonakala sengathi yizona ezidlisa kakhulu kule albhamu," kusho yena. Uthe le albhamu bekumele iphume ngoDisemba, kodwa wabona ukuthi akahlehlise ukuyikhipha, okuyinto angazisoli ngayo. NgoDisemba uthe basuke bebaningi abaculi abakhipha izingoma, kodwa naye isikhathi akhiphe ngaso kuye kube ngesikahle. Ubonge abantu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ikakhulukazi iTikTok, athe kubo bengabaculi ifike yenza omkhulu umehluko ngokwenza izingoma zabo zifinyelele kubantu balula.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: kuMzansi Magic futhi luzocacisa konke abafuna ukukwazi ngempilo yami yangasese, umculo nokunye okuningi," kusho uLondie ngamafuphi. Le ntokazi ikhuluma kanjena nje, isanda kuba sematheni njengoba ngesonto eledlule, igxekwe abaningi ikhuluma kabi ngomzimba wenye intokazi ezakhele igama ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, uDineo Moloisane. Abaningi bamgxekile uLondie ngokukhuluma kabi ngomunye wesifazane, wagcina exolisile ngamazwi awakhulumile, wathi uyalibona iphutha lakhe. Kodwa ukukhuluma akuphelanga njengoba uDineo ephinde waveza ukuthi uLondie uyamsongela enkundleni yokuxhumana uWhatsApp, okuyinto uLondie ayiphikile wathi ingamanga. Esitatimendeni asikhiphile, uLondie uthe inombolo okuthiwa isetshenziswa uyena ukuthumela le miyalezo, akuseyona ayisebenzisayo. “Ngifuna ukukubeka ngikucacise ukuthi lokhu osekuvela manje kokuthi ngithumelela le ntokazi imiyalezo yokuyisabisa, akulona iqiniso. Mina Londie angikaze ngithumele imiyalezo yokusabisa muntu. Okunye engifuna ukukucacisa, ngiyanxusa ukuthi akekho umuntu oseke waxhumana nami ngalezi zinsolo futhi anginazo nami izinombolo zomuntu okuthiwa ngiyamsabisa," kusho uLondi kulesi sitatimende. Laba kuvela ukuthi impi yabo imayelana nombango wesoka.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: lwabantu abazowamela. Aba maningi amacala okwadingeka siwaxazulule ayethinta abantu abazojutshwa amaqembu okhethweni lwango-2024," kusho uMamabolo izolo ngesikhathi bekhuluma ngamalungiselelo okhetho, ekomitini loMnyango wezaseKhaya ePhalamende. NgoJuni 20 no-21, 2026 kuzovulelwa abantu ukuthi babhalisele ukuvota. Mayelana nosuku lokhetho kusalindwe uNgqongqoshe wokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu kuleli, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, ukuthi amemezele usuku. UHlabisa kulindeleke ukuthi amemezele usuku lokhetho ngaphambi kokuphela kukaJuni. Ukhetho kulindeleke ukuthi lube ngoNovemba noma uJanuwari.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: owayeshaya impempe emdlalweni wamanqamu we-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) phakathi kweMorocco neSenegal ngoJanuwari, eMorocco. Sekungumlando ukuthi kulo mdlalo wamanqamu we-Afcon kwaba nezidubedube ngenxa yezinqumo zakhe ezishaqisayo. Kusolwa yena ngokuvumela iSenegal ibuyele enkundleni ngemuva kokuphuma enkundleni kulandela ukubeka kwakhe iphenathi. Kumanje kusalindwe isinqumo se-Court of Arbitration for Sport (CAS) ngemuva kokuba iSenegal idlulise isikhalo ikhala ngesinqumo seCaf sokunika iMorocco indebe ye-Afcon ekubeni kuyiyona iSenegal eyanqoba ngo 1-0 kowamanqamu. Ngokusho kwe-Morocco World News, imithombo engaphakathi kwi-Caf iqinisekisile komunye umthombo wezindaba waseMorocco, i-El Botola, ukuthi la maqembu azodlala owamanqamu weChampions League anemibuzo ngokuqokwa kukaNdala. Ikomiti le-Caf eliqoka onompempe likuqinisekisile ngeSonto ukuthi uNdala nguyena ozodlalisa owamanqamu weChampions League, azolekelelwe ngabakhaya bakhe uJulien Ngila noGradiel Munia njengabasizi bakanompempe. UJesse Moise uzoba yi-fourth official. U-Ahme Abdelaziz waseSudan uzoqhoqhobala i-Video Assistant Referee (VAR), esizwa ngu-Ahmed Shelmani waseLibya noDiana Chikotscha waseZambia.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: njengoba banda abantu abathakasela le albhamu,” usho kanje. UMCULI kamaskandi uNtencane usematheni kulezi zinsuku nge-albhamu yakhe yesithupha esihloko sithi Awuyiphumuze Eqhuba, uthe kumthathe cishe izinyanga ezinhlanu ukupheka le albhamu, wase eyinonga nangokusebenzisana namaciko ambalwa awapike kuyona okubalwa kuwona oMzukulu, Zamambo Mkhize, Shenge WaseHlalankosi, Izingane Zoma, KaMaphanga, Zondi Zone, Ingcweti noFreddie Gwala. “Ngiyihlanganise ngikhetha ezingomeni eziwu-28 ebengizenzela ukuhlunga kuzona, kanti yinhle ngokuthi ididiyele imiyalezo eminingi nekhuluma ngezimo ezahlukene ngempilo jikelele okwenza ukuthi kube lula ukuthi umuntu nomuntu kube nengoma ayithakaselayo kuyona, engithemba ukuthi izoqhubeka yenze kahle ukuze nami ngikhuthale,” kusho uNtencane. UNtencane udabuka eGreytown, kanti igama lakhe lokuzalwa wuSenzo Zondi. Uqale ukugqama emculweni nge-albhamu yakhe yokuqala ethi Uboya Enkomeni yango-2019, yelanywa ngethi Incane Lembobo ngo-2021, kube ngethi Isivulwe Yonke yango-2023, ngethi Alingeni yango-2024 neyanyakenye ethi Khotha La: A Tribute To Mjikijelwa.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UNGQONGQOSHE weMfundo eyiSisekelo uNksz Siviwe Gwarube SILULELWE inyanga ezayo esokuphawula ngemigomo ethinta isifundo somlando, iHistory ezikoleni zakuleli. Bekumele kuvalwe ngeSonto ukuphawula ngemigomo ethinta lesi sifundo kodwa uNgqongqoshe weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, walula isikhathi. Umnyango ufuna abantu baphawule ngemigomo kulesi sifundo, kusuka kuGrade 4 kuya kuGrade 12. Okhulumela umnyango, uMnuz Terence Khala, uthe silulwe ngezinsuku ezingu-30, isikhathi sokuthi umphakathi uphawule ngemigomo. "Manje sekuzovalwa ngoMeyi 19, 2026 ukwamukela ukuphawula komphakathi ngemigomo. Lokhu sikwenze emuva kokuba bebebaningi, abasafuna ithuba lokuphawula," usho kanje. Ugqugquzele abasafuna ukuphawula ukuthi bakwenze lokhu ngokushesha. "Siwumnyango sifuna ukuthi lesi sifundo sifundise abafundi ukucabanga ngendlela ehlukile, baphinde bafundiswe ngomlando wezwe." Inyunyana yothisha iSadtu, ifuna ukuthi kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngomlando wase-Afrika. Le nyunyana isamile ekutheni ifuna lesi sifundo sibe yimpoqo kubona bonke abafundi. UNobhala Jikelele weSadtu, uDkt Mugwena Maluleke, uthe bebelokhu besho ukuthi bafuna kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngomlando othinta izwekazi i-Afrika, hhayi amazwe aphesheya. "Sifuna kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngezinto ezithinta i-Afrika, kungagxilwa kakhulu

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: nayo noma bazoqhubeka nokubambelela ezintandokazini zabo iRanger, Hilux okulindeleke entsha maduze neD-Max ethuthukisiwe ezokwethulwa noma yinini. author: Zakhele Xaba
text: okuwukulimala okujwayele ukuhlalisa ngaphandle abadlali izinyanga ezibalelwa kweziyisithupha. Kubadlali ababuya kulokhu kulimala eMzansi, kubalwa uThemba Zwane weMamelodi Sundowns osanda kubuyela enkundleni noSibusiso Vilakazi osewaphanyeke emgibeni amakhokho. Njengoba sekusele izinyanga eziyisihlanu kusongwe isizini, kungenzeka uNduli abuye sekusele imidlalo embalwa. USIHLE Nduli ekhipha omunye wemiklomelo emqhudelwaneni wakhe, iSihle Nduli Tournament, ngenyanga ngoDisemba Image: Isithombe:FACEBOOK/SIHLE NDULI Ukulimala kukaNduli kusho ukuthi iPirates kuzofanele ithembele kuMakhaula, Thalente Mbatha, Masindi Nemtajela noSimphiwe Selepe esiswini. EZimnyama zisemkhankasweni wokuwina isicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership ngaphansi komqeqeshi, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou. Kuyiwe ekhefini le-Afcon zihleli ezicongweni se-log ngamaphuzu angu-28 emuva kwemidlalo engu-12. Zilandelwa yiMamelodi Sundowns ngawu-26 emuva kwemidlalo engu-13. Njengoba kungamaholidi, uNduli ubuyisele emphakathini wangakubo eMthwalulwe ngomqhudelwano, iSihle Nduli Tournament, obunesiteki sika-R60 000. Iqembu i-Eleven Touches iyona ekhale yemuka nendebe.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: ukuthi zilandelelwe ngokungachemi,” usho kanje. Izolo iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo inqume ukuthi iPhalamende laphula umthetho ngenkathi livota ngo-2022, liphikisa isigatshana somthetho u-Section 89 - okwakubikwe ngawo izinsolo zokwephula umthetho ezibhekiswe kuRamaphosa - okwavela wukuthi kwatholakala izishaqane zemali epulazini lakhe ePhala Phala, eLimpopo, ngo-2020. INkantolo ithole ukuthi leso sinqumo sePhalamende sasingafanele, futhi asihambisani nhlobo nomthetho, yase inquma ukuthi lowo mbiko wangaleso sikhathi uhoxiswe, bese kuvulwa ithuba lokuthi udaba lulandelelwe futhi luphenywe kabusha. Leli cala belidliuliselwe eNkantolo yi-EFF ne-African Transformation Movement, bekhala ngokuthi iKomiti lePhalamende lasheshe lanquma ngalolu daba kungakabi yisikhathi esifanele. Ngakho lesi sinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo sisho ukuthi manje kuzodingeka ukuthi iKomiti lePhalamende liphinde licubungule kabusha bese linquma ukuthi isisombululo kuzofinyelelwa kanjani kusona. Umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, uthe bayasamukela isinqumo athi bathemba ukuthi sizosiza ukuthi kwenzeke ubulungiswa kuvele obala ugcobho ngodaba lukaMengameli. “Kufanele abantu bazi ukuthi kwenzekani ePhala Phala ukuze bazinqumele sebenolwazi oluphelele ukuthi ngokhetho oluzayo bavotela isigebengu noma cha,” kusho uMalema.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: INGAPHANDLE lenxanxathela yezitolo eseMpangeni eqanjwe ngeNkosi uMangosuthu Buthelezi IVUKWE umunyu Inkosi yakwaButhelezi, uZuzifa kaMangosuthu Buthelezi, kuvulwa inxanxathela yezitolo eqanjwe ngenkosi eyizalayo, uMangosuthu kaMathola Buthelezi. Inkosi Zuzifa ithe ukuvulwa kwenxanxathela yezitolo kuyenze yazibuza ukuthi kazi ibizozizwa kanjani inkosi ukuba isekhona? Inxanxathela yezitolo eseMpangeni, ivulwe izolo. "Ngizwe kubuhlungu uma sengiyibona isiphelele. Ngifikelwe umunyu, ngezwa ngifikelwa izinyembezi ezincane. Ngizibuzile ukuthi kaze ubezothini uMntwana ukuba besingena naye lapha, esebona inxanxathela yezitolo inegama lakhe." Inkosi okuqanjwe ngayo inxanxathela yezitolo yayingundunankulu kaZulu futhi iwumsunguli we-IFP. Inkosi uZuzifa ithe kubajabulisile ukuba ubaba wabo ahlonishwe ngale ndlela. "Namhlanje sithi ncinci kamjoli. Nezingane ezincane ziyobuza ukuthi ubani lona okuqanjwe ngaye inxanxathela yezitolo, bese sizichazela." Inkosi ithe ifisa ukuthi inxanxathela yezitolo ithuthukise abantu bendawo. "Ngifisa ukuthi izitshalo ezizodayiswa lapha zithengwe ebantwini bendawo. Sifuna ukubona amadumbe, ubhatata nokunye okutshalwe ngabantu bendawo kulethwa ngamaloli ukuba kuzodayiswa lapha. Le nto angiyisho nje ngoba nakhu nginandisa kodwa ngiyikhuluma le nto ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi le

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: esikhulu nesidala kangaka futhi esiwusizo emphakathini waseDundee, Glencoe, Newcastle nakwezinye izindawo ezakhele iDundee - kubukeka singenandaba nenhlalonhle, ukuphepha nokuhlanzeka okubalulekile ezigulini ezelashelwa khona. “Ngifisa ukuthi kube nezinyathelo ezithathwayo ngalesi simo ngoba asikwazi ukuqhubeka sisebenzise isibhedlela esisesimeni esishayisa amahloni ngale ndlela. Lesi simo senza ukuthi singakhululeki ukuyisa abathandiweyo bethu bayokwelashelwa kusona,” usho kanje. Kuthintwa okhulumela uMnyango wezeMpilo KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Nathi Olifant, ukuzwa ukuphawula kwabo ngalolu daba, ushaye ngezimfishane wathi uMnyango awukwazi ukuphawula ngodaba oluthinta isiguli esishonele ekhaya, hhayi esibhedlela. Ebuzwa ngesimo sesibhedlela, uthe bewuMnyango abakwazi ukuphawula ngalokho.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: zenjabulo lapho Amakhosi ayaziwa ngokuqoqa izindebe ebholeni laseNingizimu Afrika. Ngesizini ka-2024/2025, iChiefs iqede indlala yeminyaka eyisishiyagalolunye ngokuwina iNebank Cup yehlula izimbangi i-Orlando Pirates eMabhida. Iqembu lezinkakha laseKZN nalo ligqishe ngenqwaba yabadlali abanyakazisa iNingizimu Afrika eminyakeni eyedlule. Kulaba badlali kubalwa uSiyabonga "Nsimbi" Sangweni owayengukaputeni we-Orlando Pirates, Thanduyise Khuboni owadlala koweNdebe yoMhlaba ka-2010 eMzansi, Sibusiso Zuma owadlala iminyaka eDenmark esuka kwiPirates, Njabulo Manqana wodumo kwiLamontville Golden Arrows eyawina iMTN8 ngo-2009 noPhumlani Mkhize owadlalela zombili izinkunzi zaseSoweto okuyiChiefs nePirates. Isikwati sezinkakha zeChiefs simi kanje: Onozinti: Brian Baloyi, Brilliant Khuzwayo Abasemuva: Cyril Nzama,Tefu Mashamaite, Morgan Gould, Tsepo Masilela, Derrick Spencer, Tinashe Nengomasha, Willard Katsande Abasesiswini: Siphiwe Tshabalala, Reneilwe Letsholonyane, Doctor Khumalo, Thuso Phala, Stanton Fredericks, Mandla Masango, Josta Dladla Abagadli: Siyabonga Nomvethe, David Radebe, Colins Mbesuma Umqeqeshi: Thabo Mooki Iphini lomqeqeshi: Lucas Radebe Isikwati sezinkakha zaseKZN simi kanje: Onozinti:Thokozani Ndlovu, Siyabonga Mbatha Abasemuva:Siyanda Zwane, Musa Mntakwenda, Siyabonga Sangweni, Bryce Moon, Japhet Zwane, Simphiwe Vezi,

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Abammangalelwa ngesikhathi bevele enkantolo yeMantshi eKempton Park Usomabhizinisi uTariq Downes, oyiNhloko yezoBunhloli ophikweni lwamaPhoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika (SAPS) uMajor-General Feroz Khan, kanye neNhloko yesiFundazwe saseGauteng yeDirectorate for Priority Crime Investigation (DPCI), uMajor-General Ebrahim Ahmed Kadwa, bavele okokuqala phambi kweNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKempton Park ngoMsombuluko bebhekene namacala amabili okuphula umthetho owengamele ukuphathwa komcebo wezimbiwa kanye nokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Banikezwe ibheyili ka-R20 000 umuntu ngamunye ngaphansi kwemibandela yokuthi bangaphazamisi uphenyo noma baxhumane nofakazi. Kudingeka futhi ukuthi banikeze anaseshi izincwadi zabo zezokuvakash kungakashayi umhlaka-12 Meyi. Laba bobathathu kumele bazise umseshi kungakapheli amahora angama-72 uma behlose ukuhamba. Icala lihlehliselwe umhlaka-14 Julayi ukuze kuzoqhutshekwa nophenyo. UMbuso awuzange uphikisane nokunikezwa kwebheyili. UKhan uboshwe ngeSonto kulandela ukugasela kwamaphoyisa efulethini lakhe eHoughton. La macala asukela esehlakalweni sangomhla zi-5 kuNhlaba wezi-2021, lapho uDownes kusolwa ukuthi watholakala negolide elingu-75.9 grams, lenani elilinganiselwa ku-R62 836, esikhumulweni sezindiza i-OR Tambo International. Ngesikhathi ephonswa imibuzo, kuthiwa wathi uliphethe ngenxa yomsebenzi awenzayo womshoshaphansi oxhumene nezikhulu

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: kubo uKing Sifiso okhonjwa kwiVuma FM, uZeal Dladla osekwiJozi FM, uMhlonishwa Sibisi, uphrojusa wezinhlelo zezenkolo uLungisani Simelane nobenguphrojusa wezobuchwepheshe kulesi siteshi, uBonga "Sphongo" Dladla. USgqemeza uthe kungamampunge ukuthi uzihambele kulo msakazo. Uveze ukuthi inkontileka yakhe ayivuselelwanga kulo nyaka, hhayi ukuthi uzicelele ukushiya. Ukusho lokhu esitatimendeni asikhiphe kuleli sonto, emuva kokwenza uhlelo lwakhe lokugcina kulo msakazo. Uthe kummangazile ukubona kwabezindaba ukuthi ubefuna ukushintsha uhlelo alwenzayo ngenxa yomsebenzi wobufundisi. Kodwa uthe abaphathi abayingenanga eyokuvuselela inkontileka yakhe. "Ngize ngaxhumana nezikhulu eziphezulu ngendlela udaba lwenkontileka yami olusingathwe ngayo. Okungimangazayo ukubona kwabezindaba kuthiwa ngizicelele ukuhamba, okungelona iqiniso. Ngingasho nje ukuthi ukungavuselelwa kwenkontileka yami, kukhona okungahambanga kahle njengoba kwenzeka izinto engingaziqondi. Okwaholela ekutheni kuthathwe lesi sinqumo yikhona engikhala ngakho, yingakho ngaze ngatshela abaphathi e-SABC. Ngiyasihlonipha isinqumo abasithatha kodwa indlela okuhanjiswe ngayo iyona engingajabule ngayo," kusho uSgqemeza. UMsweli obebika ngesimo sasemigwaqweni, uthe uDuma uthe engezwa ukuthi ukhishiwe ohlwini lwabasebenzi boKhozi, waxhasa umsebenzi wokumemezela ngesiminyaminya ekhasini lakhe likaFacebook

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMREPHA uBig Zulu uzogubha usuku lwakhe lokuzalwa nomndeni wakubo UMREPHA waseBergville, uSiyabonga "Big Zulu" Nene, uzogubha ukuqeda iminyaka engu-40 azalwa nomphakathi wangakubo ngo-Ephreli 4. UBig Zulu uthe lo mcimbi uzobe ukubo egcekeni esigodini sasoBonjaneni, eMazizini, eBergville. "Ngizobe ngibonga nje impilo ukuthi uMdali ungigcinile, wangibusisa kwaze kwafika la. Ngizobe ngihlabile." Sezizine izinkomo asephekiswe ngazo selokhu ememezele usuku lwalo mcimbi. Kwasebemphekise ngezinkomo, kubalwa umculi we-house, uMalungelo Sir noBenny Spice okhiphe ezintathu. UBig Zulu waveza ukuthi wakhula kubo kudliwa imbuya ngothi kangangoba wayehamba ngezinyawo ngisho kunongqoqwane, kulele iqhwa ezintabeni zoKhahlamba. Uqale ukondla kubo ngokushayela amatekisi. Ube esengena emculweni we-hip hop ebukela komrepha abanjengoPro Kid. Njengamanje ungomunye womrepha abangaconsi phansi ngezingoma ezithi Imali Eningi, Home, Khaya, Home Sweet Home, AmaMillion, Umuzi eSandton nezinye. Usenenkampani iNkabi Records ephethe uLwah Ndlunkulu, Siya Ntuli, Xowla, Fanatic SA nabanye. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, uzobe enandisa kwi-Mr Somatekisi Live In Concert ePlayhouse Opera Theatre eThekwini, namhlanje kusukela ngo-6 ebusuku. Kulo

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Lenyukile izinga labangasebenzi kuleli Image: Ron Lach/Pexels PHEZU kokuba linyukile izinga labantu abangasebenzi kuleli, kodwa kunenhlansi yethemba KwaZulu-Natal kunyuka isibalo sabantu abatohozayo. Izinga lokungasebenzi linyuke laya ku-32.7% ekoteni yokuqala ka-2026, lisuka ku-31.4% ekoteni yesine yango-2025. Lezi zibalo zimenyezelwe nguMnuz Risenga Maluleke, iStatistician-General kwiStats SA, izolo. UMaluleke uthe kulahleke imisebenzi engu-345 000, kanti sesimi ku-16.8 million isibalo sabantu abasebenzayo kuleli. "I-KZN yisona sodwa isifundazwe esinyukelwe izinga labantu abasebenzayo ngabangu-6 000. Isifundazwe esehlelwe kakhulu yizinga labasebenzayo yiNorth West ngabangu-80 000, kulandele iGauteng ngabangu-67 000 neMpumalanga ngabangu-54 000." Uthe sinyukile nesibalo sentsha eneminyaka engu-15 kuya ku-24, engasebenzi. "Lingu-60.9% izinga lentsha eneminyaka engu-15 kuya ku-24 engasebenzi kuleli. Sinyuke saya ku-8.1 million isibalo sabantu abangasebenzi kuleli. Intsha iyona ebhekene nengwadla yokungasebenzi," usho kanje. Uthe kwabaneminyaka engu-25 kuya ku-34, izinga lokungasebenzi limi ku-40.6%. Ukhale nangokuthi sinyukile nesibalo salabo abalahle ithemba lokuthola umsebenzi saya ku-3.9 million. Uqhube wathi kuseva ukuyamamisa ukwehla kwemisebenzi nempi eqhubeka eMiddle East. Iqembu

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: wabanjwa ngoDisemba 2025 eNorth West, emva kokubalekela ingalo yomthetho ngaboJuni 2024, kulandela ukudedelwa kwakhe ngebheyili. Isolezwe labhala udaba ngokuthi amaphoyisa ayamfuna, udaba lwafundwa yiphoyisa laseNorth West elalingumakhelwane wakhe, lathinta umphenyi waseCato Manor, lasho ukuthi: “Nangu la endaweni yokucima ukoma, uphuza utshwala, ubuka nebhola,” kwaba wukubanjwa kwakhe.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: KWEMBULWE izipoki ezibhubhudla imali esikhwameni esixhasa izitshudeni ngemali yokufunda ezikhungweni zemfundo, i-National Students' Financial Aid Scheme (NSFAS), ekubeni kuvela ukuthi sezafa. Lezi zipoki zivundululwe embikweni kaMcwaningi Mabhuku Jikelele, oveze ukuthi zingu-822 izipoki okutholakale ukuthi ziyahlomula kulesi sikhwama, ekubeni ulwazi lwaseMnyangweni wezaseKhaya, luveza ukuthi zendela koyisemkhulu. UNgqongqoshe weMfundo ePhakeme, uMnuz Buti Manamela, useyalele abalesi sikhwama ukuthi baqale uphenyo. Uthe kumele basebenzisane nophiko oluphenya amacala enkohlakalo, i-SIU ukuze kutholakale abenza lo mkhonyovu. "Umbiko uveza ukuthi lezi zipoki ziyaqhubeka nokuxhaswa yi-NSFAS ekubeni zingaphili ngokoMnyango wezaseKhaya. Asifuni ngomuso kube nento efuze le yingakho kumele kuphenywe." Uthe lo mbiko ubuye waveza ukuthi kunezitshudeni ezevile ku-14 000, ezihlomula oxhasweni ngendlela engafanele. "Imindeni yalezi zitshudeni ihola imali engaphezu kwebekiwe ukuze uxhaswe. Kodwa nazo ziyaqhubeka nokuhlomula ngendlela engafanele." Uthe kuphinde kwatholwa nezitshudeni ezingu-321, ezihlomulayo ekubeni zihlomula nasesibonelelweni sabangasebenzi kuleli, esingu-R370 ngenyanga. "Konke lokhu uhlelo lwe-NSFAS luhlulekile ukukubika ukuthi kunezitshudeni ezithola uxhaso kungafanele. Okunye kunabaxhasiwe ekubeni bafeyila, ekubeni umgomo

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Silwa nje ngoba sibonile kuphulwa ilungelo labafundi lokuthola imfundo," kuqhuba uNksz Caluza. Uthe uma umnyango uphambana nalo myalelo, kuyobe sekusho ukuthi usuphula umthetho. "Sililinde ngabomvu leli qhinga lomnyango ngoba uma uhluleka ukuhlangabezana nomyalelo wenkantolo, lokho kuyobe kusho ukuphula umthetho. Besifuna uphoqwe ukuze uhlinzeke izidingo zabafundi kanjalo nezothisha," usho kanje. Sekunesikhathi izinyunyana zothisha zilwa nomnyango ngendaba yama-Norms and Standards. Minyaka yonke umnyango uhlale uhluleka ukukhokha le mali ngesikhathi. Ezinye zezikole zisakweletwa imali yeminyaka wezimali edlule ngenxa yokuthi umnyango uyahluleka ukuyikhokha. Zicishe zavulwa ngaphandle kwezinsiza kufunda izikole zesifundazwe kulo nyaka. Lokhu kwenziwa ngukuthi umnyango ubuhluleka ukuthenga izincwadi ne-stationery. Ugcine uthenga i-stationery ngomzuzu wokugcina emuva kokuveza ukuthi awunayo imali yokuthenga lezi zinsiza. Kwakhona ukuthi i-stationery sigcine sifikile ezikoleni, kwasiza inkampani esabalalisa lezi zincwadi, iNdabase Printing, eyathenga i-stationery ngesikweletu ukuze abafundi bakwazi ukuthola lezi zinsiza. Abafundi bayalelwa ukuthi basebenzise izincwadi ezindala njengoba umnyango wathi ngeke ube nemali yokuzithenga. Nakulo nyaka kubanjwe umoya ngokuthi ngabe

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: amathenda akhishwa yiminyango. Yingakho sifuna lo Mnyango uphenye ngaphambi kokuba ngithathe izinyathelo," kuqhuba uNksz Gwarube. Uxwayise ngokuthi uzothathela abathintekayo izinyathelo uma kutholakala ukuthi kukhona okungahanjiswanga kahle ngesikhathi kukhishwa le thenda. "Uma uphenyo lukaMgcinimafa luveza ukuthi kukhona okungahambanga kahle, ngeke nginanaze ukuthatha izinyathelo kubona bonke abathintekayo." Imibiko yabezindaba iveza ukuthi le thenda ka-R1.6 billion, ibihlose ukuqinisa isisekelo semfundo yakuleli. Le nkampani okuthiwa yathola ingxenye kule thenda yokugaya lezi zincwadi, ibizohlomula ngo-R285 million. Iqembu i-ActionSA lixwayise ngokuthi inkohlakalo eMnyangweni ibeka engcupheni ukuhlinzekwa kwemfundo esezingeni. Leli qembu lithe liyayeseka eyophenyo, lathi kudingeka kutholakale ubuqiniso bezinsolo ezivezwayo ngale thenda. "UMnyango kumele uthole ukuthi yahlomula kanjani inkampani eyasungulwa emuva kokukhishwa kwethenda. Sifuna uMnyango kaMgcinimafa uphuthumise uphenyo ukuze kuqedwe ungabazane olukhona," kusho leli qembu. I-DA ithe iyayeseka eyophenyo, yazwakalisa ukukhathazeka ngekusasa labafundi nenkohlakalo eyenziwa yizikhulu zoMnyango. "Abafundi kudingeka bathole izincwadi ezisezingeni kanti leli qembu lizokulwela ukuthi lokhu kwenzeke. Sifuna ukwazi ukuthi kungani inkampani engenawo amava aziwayo

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe USIHLALO nomqeqeshi weMilford FC, uXanti Pupuma, olubalubela ukubona owanqamu weNedbank Cup udlalwa ngamaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal USEPHUMELE obala ngesifiso sakhe sokubona amaqembu amabili aKwaZulu-Natal edlana imilala emdlalweni wamanqamu eNedbank Cup usihlalo nomqeqeshi weMilford FC, uXanti Pupuma, ezakhe ezizodudulana ne-TS Galaxy kowandulela owamanqamu. IMilford izodlalela ekuhambeni neGalaxy eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga, ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama. IDurban City izoba ngosokhaya kwiCasric Stars komunye wowandulela eChatsworth Stadium, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama. IMilford neCasric badlala kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship, kanti kumanje babalwa namaqembu asembangweni wesicoco seligi yalesi sigaba esiphakela eseBetway Premieship. Ephawula ngokubhekana neGalaxy, uPupuma ubona kungase kube yikhubalo kwezakhe ukuthi bayogadulisana neqembu akholwa wukuthi akukho okutheni elikwaziyo ngabo. “Sibabonile ukuthi badlala kanjani. Badlala ngokusebenzisa umfutho kodwa okuyinto esingeke sihluleke ukumelana nayo. Angicabangi kukhona okuningi abakwaziyo ngathi. Ngakho nginethemba lokuthi oNkulunkulu bebhola bazosibheka,” kusho uPupuma ekhuluma nabezindaba esingamini nabezindaba eMhlathuze Sports Complex. UPupuma akakufihli ukulobizela kwakhe ukubhekana neCity uma kwenzeka kwenzeka ethela othulini iGalaxy esibayeni sayo eSolomon

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, uthi ukuboshelwa kwakhe icala lokuqhumisa isibhamu kumenza abe sezingeni lezingqalabutho ze-ANC ezaboshelwa amacala ezepolitiki abala kuzo owayengumengameli wokuqala ngaphansi koMbuso wentando yeningi, uMnuz Nelson Mandela, owayengumholi we-ANC, uMnuz Oliver Tambo, kanye nowayengunobhala jikele we-ANC, uMnuz Walter Sisulu. UMalema uthe uma kuwukuthi ugcinwa ngempela ephoqiwe ukuthi akayodonsa isigwebo ejele kuyomele aboshwe ejele elisesiqhingini okwakugcinwe kulo uMandela nezinye izishoshovu, iRobben Island. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma emcimbini wethimba lentsha ye-EFF elijutshwe ukuba liqhube umkhankaso wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. UMalema wagwetshwa iminyaka emihlanu ebhadla ejele ngecala lokuqhumisa isibhamu. Usiphonsela inselelo isigwebo sakhe. Uthe ngeke ehle esikhundleni ngoba elahlwe icala lezepolitiki. "Ngiboshelwe icala lezepolitiki. Ngiboshelwe into engayenza eqenjini lezepolitiki. Uma befuna ukungibopha kufanele bavule iRobbeni Island. Ngeke ngiyogqunywa nezigebengu ejele. Angisona isigebengu. Mina ngisezingeni loMandela, Sisulu noTambo. Angiyena utsotsi. Mina abangibambanga ngintshontsha, angibulalanga muntu. Ngenza into ephathelene nepolitiki emcimbini weqembu lezepolitiki. Manje bafuna ukungibophela lokho." UMalema

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UGWETSHWE udilikajele uNtuthuko Sosibo ngecala lokubulala unina wengane owayengumfundi Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI UTHOLE ubuthongo okokuqala ngqa ngoLwesihlanu, uyise womfundi owabulawa yisoka lakhe ngesihluku eSiqungeni, eMthwalume, ngoJulayi 2024, umbulali egixabezwa ngodilikajele. Lokhu kuze emva kokuthi iNkantolo yesiFunda saseScottburgh, imgwebe udilikajele uNtuthuko Sosibo (29) ngokushaya, abulale uNksz Mandisa Cele (20). Iphinde yanquma nokuthi akumfanele ukuba nesibhamu. Uyise kamufi, uMnuz Mzwandile Dlungele, utshele Isolezwe ukuthi ubengasabazi ubuthongo obuphelele kusukela kwabulawa indodakazi yakhe. “Bengilala cishe ngabo-8 ebusuku, phakathi namabili buphele ubuthongo, ngiqwashe kuze kucishe kuse. Uma icala liya enkantolo bekuvele kube nzima kakhulu,” kusho uDlungele. Uthe isigwebo inkantolo esinike umbulali sibagculisile bewumndeni. Uthe nakuba singeke simbuyise umntanakhe kodwa kuyabajabulisa ukuthi usazoke abhadle ejele ngobuhlungu abazwisa bona. “Isihlukumeze kakhulu into ayenza lo mfana kodwa isigwebo asinikiwe sisigculisile. Besivele sifuna ukuthi athole isigwebo esinzima,” kusho uDlungele. “Ngilale ubuthongo, into ebesengingasayazi. Bengihlale ngibikelwa njalo uma kuzoyiwa enkantolo. Ngizoke ngilale ngiphumule ngoba inkantolo igcine ibenzile ubulungiswa,” usho kanje.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ingawi bhu phansi," kusho umthombo weSolezwe. Bathe bakhethe ukungabi yingxenye yabaxhasa lo mcimbi ngenxa yokuthi udla izindodla zemali. "Miningi imicimbi iDStv engeke isaba yingxenye yayo ngenxa yokuthi ivaliwe ekutheni ibe abaxhasi bayo. Imicimbi yezindondo ebijwayele ukuba khona yeMzansi Magic, neyesiteshi sesibhunu ikykNET, yonke kuthiwa izovalwa ngoba ayikho inzuzo eyingenisa esiteshini. Neminye ebiyenziwa yinkampani kuvezwa izinhlelo neminye emikhulu, nayo ivaliwe ngenxa yokuncishiswa kwezindleko," kuphetha umthombo. Kuthiwa iCanal+ lokhu ayikwenzi nje kuleli kuphela kodwa nakwamanye amazwe ase-Afrika babhekene nenkinga efanayo yokunciphisa izindleko bese bezama ukungenisa inzuzo. Kwenzeka lokhu nje basanda kuvala isiteshi iShowmax, ebesibukwa ngokukhokhelwa, naso abakhale ngokuthi sidla imali eningi njengoba kuqashwe izikhulu nabasebenzi abakhokhelwa imali eshisiwe kodwa naso ayikho imali esiyingenisayo. Elinye lamaphephandaba angempelasonto, liveze ukuthi iCanal+ ihlela ukuthi ngo-2030 ibe isibuyise imali engu €400 million (R7.5 billion), ngokunciphisa ukuxhasa imicimbi ehlukene edla imali eshisiwe.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: iKwaZulu-Natal neGauteng. Abaholi be-IFP isike yabashaya le nduku Ngesikhathi owayengusihlalo we-IFP, uNkk Zanele kaMagwaza-Msibi, esungula iNFP, i-IFP yalahlekelwa inqwaba yomasipala okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya lwango-2011. I-IFP yasala nomasipala ababili nje kuphela. Uma abaholi be-IFP bengabhekile ingase ibaphinde le nduku. Sekunesikhathi eside ikhulunyelwa phansi eyoqhekeko kwi-IFP. Mumva nje nengane encane isiyabona ukuthi kunomfantu onqabayo ukuvaleka nodalwa abathile abafuna ubuholi obehlukile ngaphakathi kwi-IFP. Lokhu kugqame kakhulu ngesikhathi kusabalala inkulumo eqoshiwe ephehla udlame yelungu lesiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal elinguSihlalo woPhiko lwentsha kwi-IFP KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. Kule nkulumo uMaphisa ukhuluma nelungu le-IFP, uNksz Lindi Ndlovu, elizwakala lithi ngeke lisigqoke isikibha esinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. Kule nkulumo uNksz Ndlovu ukhala ngokubanjwa ngophondo kohlangothi lwabo emhlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. Yile nkulumo efakazela ukuthi kunezinhlangothi ezimbili ezinezifiso ezingefani. UNksz Ndlovu uzwakala ethi abaholi abasohlangothini lwabo bavinjwa nangamatshe emigwaqweni ukuze bengayi emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. UMaphisa uphendula ngokuthi akufanele abasohlangothini lwabo bavume ukudlala abasohlangothini ababanga nalo. UMaphisa uze asho nokusho

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UHAMBE uphethe izipho ezihlukene umndeni kaNkk Thezani Mkhonza owaba unomehlo wokuqala eVryheid, ngoMgqibelo, obekwenziwe umcimbi wokumkhumbula, lapho iMeya yaseBaqulusini, uMnuz Sifiso Mkhwanazi, imbonge lona wesifazane ngokuzinikela ZIVEZE ukuthi wazikhuthaza ukuthi zihloniphe wonke umuntu emhlabeni ezihlangana naye izintombi ezaba nenhlanhla yokuqeqeshwa nguNkk Thezile Mkhonza, izolo okube nesikhumbuzo sakhe eCecil Emmet, eVryheid. UNkk Mkhonza ongasekho, waba owokuqala ukuba unomehlo ohlola izintombi kule ndawo. Isikhumbuzo sakhe besihanjelwe yizintombi aqala ukuzihlola, umndeni wakhe, amakhosi nabomndeni waseNdlunkulu kaZulu. BEZIPHUME ngobuningi bazo izintombi ngoMgqibelo, eVryheid, kukhunjula unomehlo wokuqala kuleli dolobha, uNkk Thezani Mkhonza UNksz Anami Zondo ongomunye wezintombi ebezikhona, uthe noma sebekhulile kodwa angeke aze akukhohlwe abakufundiswa yilona wesifazane besuka emakhaya ahlukene. "Noma sengiganile, ngahamba ngaya kude ngomsebenzi, ngeke ngikulibale umama uMkhonza ayesitshela khona, ikakhulukazi okuthinta inhlonipho, wayeyazisa inhlonipho. Ngijabule kakhulu ukuthi kwenziwe umcimbi ofana nalona," kusho uNksz Zondo. UNksz Busisiwe Manqele uthe okunye uNkk Mkhonza abatshela khona ukuthi bakhuthalele imfundo ukuze babe nezinto zabo bangathembeli

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: abasolwa kuthiwa bebehamba ngeVolkswagen Polo eluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka. Kwi-video esabalele ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, le ntokazi ibonakala imi phakathi kwezimoto ezimbili ngesikhathi ehlaselwa. Owesilisa uqhamuka ngemuva kwakhe, avulele ngenhlamvu, kuthi uma ewela phansi, adubule ngezinye ngaphambi kokuba abaleke. Okhulumela amaphoyisa aseGauteng, uNoxolo Khweza, ukuqinisekisile ukuthi likhona icala lokubulala elibhalisiwe, kanti bekungakaboshwa muntu. "Imbangela yalokhu kubulala ayikaziwa. Uphenyo lusaqhubeka, akekho osaboshiwe okwamanje," kusho uKhweza.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: Ngizwe Mchunu NGIZWE MCHUNU Image: Itumeleng English IYASHUBA impi yamazwi phakathi kukamengameli wamabhinca, uNgizwe Mchunu nomsakazo ongaphansi kweSABC, iMetro FM, ngenxa yokuqokwa kwabaculi bakamaskandi kumaMetro FM Music Awards. Ekhuluma kwiBhinca Nation, esakazwa kwiPodcast and Chill Network kaMacG, uNgizwe ukhale ngokufakwa kukaKhuzani, Sminofu, Mzukulu noMafikizolo abaqokwe kwiBest Maskandi. UMafikizolo ubuye wafakwa kwiBest Song of the Year nakwiViral Video Challenge kwathi uNkeshemba wafakwa kwiBest New Artist. UNgizwe uthe ubengeke akhale ukuba laba baculi baqokwe komunye umqhudelwano, hhayi womsakazo ongagunyaziwe ukudlala umculo kamaskandi. Uthe balwe baze banqamuka izandla befuna umculo kamaskandi udlalwe eziteshini zesilungu kodwa kwanhlanga zimuka nomoya ngenxa yelayisense engayivumeli. "Njengoba beza lapha eKZN bafuna ukudla imali yaseKZN. Udoti le nto eyenziwayo yokuthi kuthathwe omaskanda bethu bafakwe enkohlakalweni yeMetro FM eyazi kahle ukuthi into enobubhinca, enobuZulu nesiko ayiyifuni." UNgizwe uthe iMetro FM iqoke omaskanda ngoba ifuna ukuxhaphaza amabhinca. Uthe iMetro ifuna ukugcwalisa i-ICC ngoba iyazi ukuthi amabhinca azoza ngobuningi bawo ezobona amaqhawe

author: Charles Khuzwayo
