text: ZIYIKHALELE inyanga yaseThekwini ngenxa yokuhamba ngesivinini esiphezulu INYANGA yodumo yaseThekwini ziyikhalele emuva kokuba amafutha enyengelezi engayisebenzelanga kade igijima ngesivinini sika-171 km/h endaweni ka-120km/h ePark Rynie ku-N2 muva nje.Isolezwe liligodlile igama layo njengoba ingakaveli enkantolo. Ngokusho kwekhasi likaFacebook loMnyango wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, le nyanga ebuye ibe wumfundisi webandla lamaZayoni, imiswe amaphoyisa eRTI maqede yademalayisa , yaphinde yashwabula. "Isibona ukuthi iyaboshwa, kubonakale kushunqa izintuli inyangambhishobhi idla phansi, ishiya isithunzi. AmaRTI Amahle angehlulwa lutho asebenzise ubuchule ukuze kugcine wona." Siqhuba isitatimende somnyango sithe sekungumlando ukuthi le nyanga kuphinde kwayibhedela ngesikhathi ibanjwa kwenye indawo futhi ihamba ngesivinini ingazi nokuthi lidumephi. "AmaRTI Amahle ayiphonse umbuzo othi #NenzaniLaEzweni, yathi idla phansi kanti kuyashibilika-kwabheda kanjalo, yaboshwa." Isitatimende sithe le nyanga engene yathi shi nakwipolitiki nasekuhleleni imicimbi izovela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseScottburgh ngoLwesibili.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uthe ukuvumbuka kweqembu iMKP, kwabaphuca iqatha emlonyeni okhethweni lwango-2024, njengoba ekholelwa ukuthi babezozidlela amahlanga KwaZulu-Natal, ukuba lalingekho iqembu eliholwa owayengumengameli wezwe, uMnuz Jacob Zuma. UHlabisa uthe ukuvumbuka kweMKP sekusele kancane kufike ukhetho, kwaphendula amatafula. Ukusho lokhu izolo, ngesikhathi enengxoxo nabamaphephandaba angaphansi kwe-Independent Media. I-MKP iyona eyahamba phambili KwaZulu-Natal njengoba yathola u-45%, yalandelwa i-IFP yona eyathola u-18%. UHlabisa uthe ukube ayivelanga iMKP, alikho elinye iqembu elalizomelana nabo KwaZulu-Natal. "Ngesikhathi kuyiwa okhethweni lwango-2024, i-IFP yayikhombisa ukukhula. Ukube yayingekho iMKP sasizonqoba ngamalengiso. I-DA kunezindawo engakwazi ukukhula kuzona lapha KwaZulu-Natal. I-ANC yona aziyihambeli kahle izinto lapha KwaZulu-Natal. Ingakho yalahlekelwa isifundazwe okhethweni olwedlule. Yasuka ku-54% yathola u-17%. Bonke la bantu abavotela iMKP, babengeke bavote okhethweni olwedlule." UHlabisa uthe kwabamangaza okwenziwa yiMKP okhethweni njengoba babengabhekile ukuthi ingahamba phambili ngamavoti KwaZulu-Natal. "Okwenzeke okhethweni olwedlule kusivule amehlo. I-MKP yaya okhethweni ingahlelekile. Nani nazibonela, kwakufike kumenyezelwe ukuthi iMKP izoba nomcimbi wokukhankasela ukhetho, uthi uyezwa

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, okubhekwe ukuthi aqhamuke neqhinga lokuqoqa amaphuzu kwi-Orbit College abazobhekana nayo kusasa emdlalweni weBetway Premiership Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX KUBUKEKA sezidlulile izivunguvungu ebezihlasele umqeqeshi weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, othwale kanzima emasontweni adlule abalandeli bemfuna ukumthela isibhaxu ngenxa yokubhimba kwezinto kuleli qembu laseChloorkop. Ukuhluleka kweSundowns ukuwina izindebe ezimbili zokuqala zesizini okuMTN8 neCarling Knockout kubadinile abalandeli. Enye intukuthelo idalwe wukuba sengcupheni yokuphuma kwamaBrazilians kwiCaf Champions League. Nokho sekungumlando ukuthi leli qembu lidlulele kuma-quarterfinal emuva kokwehlula iMC Alger yase-Algeria. Empeleni lo mdlalo yiwona oshintshe konke kwiSundowns, yabuyela endleleni yokudlala eyaziwa ngayo, yathela isibhaxu i-Orlando Pirates. Nokho emasontweni adlule, ikhishwe yiTS Galaxy kwiNedbank Cup. KwiBetway Premiership, isiwine imidlalo eyisithupha ilandelana. AmaBrazilians asesicongweni se-log lapho ebambene khona ngamaphuzu angu-44 nePirates. UCardoso uvumile ukuthi udlule ebunzimeni ezinyangeni ezedlule. Lo mqeqeshi wasePortugal uwine umklomelo weBetway Premiership Coach of the Month kaJanuwari noFebhuwari. "Angikaze ngizizwe sengathi sekungilahlekele ukulawula iqembu. Kuyaziwa ukuthi uma ungawini, imimoya ayifani kunoma

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: lwadonsa isikhathi eside, lwaphazamisa abantu abaningi. Abaningi basahlupheka namanje ngenxa yalo." UNgqongqoshe wezoBulungiswa, uNksz Mmamoloko Kubayi, uthe ingu-400 isiyonke imizi eyacekelwa phansi eNdwedwe. Uthe imizi engu-112 yanikwa uxhaso luka-R21 million, wathi eminye imizi eyathinteka abakatholakali abantu abaqondene nayo. "Okunye esikwenzayo wukunikeza uxhaso lwezemfundo ezinganeni zasemindenini eyathinteka. Ngizwile ukuthi kunezikhalo zokuthi kukhona izingane ezazihlonziwe kodwa ezagcina zingalutholanga uxhaso. Sizokulungisa lokho ngoba sesizwile ukuthi kunenkinga," kusho uKubayi.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMREPHA wodumo lwengoma ethi Imali Eningi, uSiyabonga "Big Zulu" Nene, ukhuza udlambedlu kubaculi bakamaskandi kulandela ukuvela kwengxabano eyaqubuka phakathi kwabo ngo-2023. Kuleli sonto kuvele okushaqisayo ngokwaholela ekubhidlikeni kweqembu lebhola labaculi bakamaskandi, iMaskandi FC. Kukhona abadalule ukuthi ngesikhathi omaskanda bekhishwa emqhudelwaneni weJammin To Soccer ezinkundleni zaseTsakane ngoJulayi 2024, bafika ezindlini zokushintshela baxabana kabi kangangoba kwaze kwathukwana, kwanukwana futhi kwakhishelwana nezibhamu. Kubuye kwavela nezindaba zokuthi umculi kamaskandi uKhwezi "Smomoza" Mkhize wayeyinkukhu nempaka noMalahle Sibiya emuva kokuba elale no"mfazi" wakhe. UBig Zulu uqale ngokuxolisa ngokugxambukela ezindabeni zeqembu lebhola likamaskandi ekubeni yena ekwele-hip hop maqede wathi kufanele abantu bazi ukuthi ebholeni kuyenzeka abantu banyukelwe wumoya enkundleni. "Kuyenzeka ukuthi kuphakame umoya enkundleni, ningaboni ngaso linye. Yinto ekhona, nami ngaphambana nabanye abadlali njengomfwethu uDumi (Mkokstad) kodwa ngoba kwakuyinto yebhola, ngabuye ngaxolisa. Impilo iyaqhubeka." UBig Zulu uthe kusuke kungeyona inzondo yeqiniso. "Bafowethu ibiyinhle kakhulu into ebeniyenzile, ukubambisana kudlalwe kube mnandi. Ngane zakwethu ayehle imimoya, sibuye sibambisane. Sibuyele

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ukuqashwa kwabantu abavela kwamanye amazwe. Abanye osomabhizinisi baphula imithetho yezwe ngokuqasha abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho ukuze babakhokhele imali encane." UNksz Sizophila Mkhizwe we-ANC, ugxeke ukushiswa kwezitolo nodlame wathi bayahambisana nekhwelo leSilo, lokuthi kumele amamashi abe nokuthula. "Izinkinga zomphakathi akumele zibuswe ngosomathuba. Uhulumeni unezinhlelo zokubuyisela emuva abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Kuvakashelwa namabhizinisi kubhekwe abantu abaqashiwe khona abavela kwamanye amazwe ukuthi ngabe bakuleli ngokusemthethweni," usho kanje. UMnuz Mzamo Billy we-DA, uthe le nkinga ayivumbikanga manje, wathi isineminyaka ikhona. "Inkinga isuka kude ngaphansi kwe-ANC, imingcele ingaqashiwe ngendlela efanele. Inkohlakalo edla lubi kanjalo nezinye izinto okubalwa nokwehliswa kwesabelomali. Akumele kuvunyelwe umphakathi uzithathele umthetho ngezandla." UMphathiswa wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi, uNksz Mbali Shinga we-NFP, uthe inkinga yabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho kumele ilungiswe kulandelwe umthetho. "Sifuna abantu abakuleli balandele imithetho yezwe."

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ABADLALI beKaizer Chiefs nabe-Orlando Pirates bephakanyelwa yimimoya ngesikhathi kuqhubeka umdlalo wabakhaya ngeSonto e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec Orlando Pirates (0) 1 KUFANE nokuthi iKaizer Chiefs ifaka usawoti esilondeni se-Orlando Pirates kulandela ukuyiphazamisa ngomphumela ka 1-1 weBetway Premiership ovune iMamelodi Sundowns embangweni wesicoco seligi. IChiefs ivule inkundla ngegoli likaPule Mmodi esiwombeni sesibili kodwa walinganisa eduze uKamogelo Sebelebele emdlalweni obungeSonto ntambama, e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. Ngaphandle kokulimala kukaTshepang Moremi akukho okutheni okwenzeke esiwombeni sokuqala salo mdlalo oqale ulindelwe ngabomvu. IPirates iyona ebifika kaningi kuvalwe amehlo ezintini zeChiefs kodwa kunqabe uBrandon Petersen obala ukhasha esiwombeni sokuqala nakwesesibili. UMoremi, okungangatshazwa ukuthi uzohamba noHugo Broos (obekhona enkundleni) kwiNdebe yoMhlaba, akazange asiqede isiwombe sokuqala ngenxa yokulimala indawo yakhe yathathwa nguPatrick Maswanganyi. Ngaphandle kokubona uMoremi ethinteka kufanele ukuba uBroos ubuqaphelile ubuqhawe bukaPetersen, owakhinyabezwa wukugula ngaphambi komdlalo wabakhaya wangasekupheleni kukaFebhuwari, endleleni yakhe eyayibheke kwiBafana. Emuva komdlalo uPetersen utshele abakwaSuperSport ukuthi yize eyicabanga indaba yeBafana neNdebe yoMhlaba kodwa okusemqoka kuyena wukusiza iChiefs.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMOSHE Ndiki izolo oqale ukwethula uhlelo oluthi, Suxoka kuMzansi Magic UBONGA uNkulunkulu ngokuqhubeka emvulela amathuba emkhakheni wokwethula izinhlelo uMoshe Ndiki, emuva kokuba isiteshi iMzansi Magic, simemezele ukubuya kohlelo oluthi Suxoka, ngo-7 ebusuku. Lolu hlelo isizini yalo yesine eze nezinguquko, ibiyethulwa uMotlatsi Mafatshe kuphela kodwa kule sizini kuzoba nabethuli ababili. UMoshe kumanje ungumethuli wohlelo olusha oluthi Mgidi Moms, olungena ngeSonto ngo-6 ntambama, nalo lusanda kuqala kulesi siteshi. Le nsizwa yase-Eastern Cape, iveze ukuthi iyakholelwa ekutheni abantu kumele bangamdeli uNkulunkulu njengoba nayo ikholelwa ekutheni konke okuhle okwenzeka empilweni yayo, kungexa Yakhe. "Angazi nokuthi ngithini ngokuthola ithuba elifana naleli futhi ngisanda kubonakala kolunye uhlelo. Kusho lukhulu kimi ukuba yingxenye yalolu hlelo njengoba sizophenya amahlazo abantu abawenzayo becabanga ukuthi akukho okuzohlala obala ngelinye ilanga. Ngakho olunye uhlelo lolu oluzosiza abantu bakuleli ezinkingeni abafuna ukuxazululelwa zona, engicabanga ukuthi abantu bazoluthakasela kakhulu," kusho uMoshe. Uthe okunye akubhekile wukusebenza kahle noMotlatsi, asemaze iminyaka eminingi kule ndima abakuyo,

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: abizwa endaweni yesehlo, afika umufi esephuthunyiswe esibhedlela, abuza imibuzo ngokwenzekile kumnikazi womuzi, kwavulwa icala, wathi abasolwa banele babona ukuthi umufi uselimele kanzima, babaleka endaweni. “Kwaphela izinsuku ezimbalwa bengekho endaweni kodwa babuye babuya. Sathi singcwaba base bebuyile, abangaboshwa,” kusho uMtambo. Uqhube wathi babelokhu belindele ukuthi bazoboshwa kodwa kwangenzeka lokho. “Okusiphatha kabi ukuthi sekuze kwaphela cishe unyaka bezihambela ngokukhululeka emphakathini, sabantu abangaze benze lutho. Thina ngapha salahlekelwa othandiweyo ngenxa yabo,” kusho uMtambo. Uthe okubaphatha kabi ukuthi bayazizwa izinkulumo abasolwa abazikhuluma emphakathini, lapho beqhosha ngokuthi akukho mnyakazo ozoke wenzeke ngecala ngoba bona bawakhokhela imali amaphoyisa. Uthe abazi ukuthi le nkulumo iyiqiniso kangakanani kodwa uma bebuka okwenzeka ecaleni, limi ndawonye, basola sengathi iyiqiniso. “Esikukhalelayo ubulungiswa. Sesifisa ukuthi kungenelele noMkhwanazi (uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa eKZN, uLt-General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi) ngoba usizo asilutholanga emaphoyiseni ebesiwathembile,” usho kanje. Amaphoyisa athe ayiveli imininingwane eqondene nalolu daba ngokwenombolo yecala Isolezwe ebeliyinikwe umndeni.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UTony Liu oyisikhulu esiphezulu sakwaChery South Africa Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu ISIKHULU sakwaChery South Africa, uTony Liu, sithi banezinhlelo ezinkulu zokufukula imboni yezezimoto eNingizimu Afrika njengoba ngoJuni bezothatha ngokusemthethweni ifemu obekungeyakwaNissan, eseRosslyn, ePitoli. Le nkampani ithenge ifemu kulandela isimemezelo seNissan emhlabeni jikelele sokuthi izama ukunciphisa izindleko ngokuchitha ezinye zezinto zayo okuhlanganisa nezindawo zokukhiqiza. ULiu, obesingathe isidlo sasebusuku nabezindaba eWuhu, eChina, kuleli sonto lapho bekuneChery International Business Summit, uthe bazoba yinkampani ezobamba elikhulu iqhaza eNingizimu Afrika ngenxa yefemu yabo entsha. “Ekupheleni kukaJuni sizomemezela ukuthi yimalini esizoyitshala siphinde siveze nezinhlelo zethu. Asidayisi izimoto ezimbalwa kuphela kodwa ikusasa lethu libeka phambili abantu baseNingizimu Afrika. Sizofaka esikhulu isandla ekufukuleni umphakathi. Nami ngizoba yisakhamuzi saseNingizimu Afrika njengani,” kusho uLiu. Uqhube wathi kuningi iNingizimu Afrika neChina abangakwenza ngokubambisana. “Kuningi futhi esingakwenza kule mboni yezezimoto, hhayi kuphela kwaChery kodwa ngisho imboni yonke. Ngikhuluma ngezimoto ezingama-new energy vehicle nokuhlinzekwa kwamaphathi yizinkampani zendawo.” Uthe bake bahlangana noMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa nePhini

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ubudlelwano. Lo mcimbi oyingxenye ye-Offramp Experience, wandulela iWorship Experience ngakusasa ebusuku endaweni efanayo. Kuzobe sekuvalwa ngendumezulu Ugu Jazz Festival ngoJuni 27 kuyona le nkundla lapho kuzobe kufakwe khona ubhazabhaza wetende elikhombisa isibhakabhaka futhi elivulwe emaceleni. Kuzobe kushiyelana inkundla uMawhoo, Olefied Khetha, Don Laka, Ernie Smith, Siphokazi, Mondli Ngcobo, Naledi Aphiwe, Mawelele, Danya Devs nabanye. Amathikithi ayo yonke le micimbi aqala kuR200 eTicketpro, Spar, Pick n Pay naseBoxer.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: emuva, abadabuka ePakistan naseMalawi. Uveze nokuthi bazokwandisa isibalo sabasebenza ophikweni lwabokufika eMnyangweni. UMnuz Sihle Ngubane weMKP ufunde uhlu lwezikhalazo ezivela kubasebenzi besifazane abasebenza ophikweni olubhekele abokufika. "Bakhala ngokuhlukumezeka, ukungahlinzekwa ngezinsiza ezifana nozankosi nama-pepper spray ekubeni besuke behambisa abokufika besilisa ezinkantolo. Bakhala ngokuthukwa, bahlukunyezwe nangakwezobulili baphinde bangaphephi uma behambisa laba besilisa abangokufika," usho kanje. UMncwabe uthe bakhona nabesilisa abane abasebenza kulolu phiko ehhovisi laseMngeni, eThekwini. "Sizokwandisa abasebenzi abangu-10 kulolu phiko, cishe ezinyangeni ezimbalwa ezizayo sizobe sesisandisile isibalo sabasebenzi ukuze kwehle umthwalo. Abokufika esibashiya emngceleni eyakhelene nesifundazwe, basuke bevela eLesotho naseSwaziland," kusho uMncwabe. Umqondisi jikelele eMnyangweni, uMnuz Tommy Makhode, uthe udaba lwezikhalazo zabasebenzi besifazane eMngeni, yinto abangayithatheli phansi bewuMnyango. Kulo mhlangano kubuye kwavela izikhalazo ngezinkinga emahhovisi ahlukene oMnyango. Phakathi kwezikhalo yindaba yokungabi sesimweni esihle sokusebenzela kulawa mahhovisi, abantu ababamba olayini eMnyango bashiswe yilanga baphinde banethwe yimvula, kanjalo nabahamba amabanga amade uma beyoshaya omazisi eJozini. Kuvele ukuthi amanye alawa mahhovisi okubalwa elisePinetown naseMgungundlovu,

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: 1008617120__20260430__0 ULehlogonolo Chauke, odume ngelikaShebeshxt ULehlohonolo “Shebeshxt” Chauke (31) uvele okokuqala eNkantolo yesiFunda ePolokwane ngamacala okugebenga nokutholakala nezibhamu ezingekho emthethweni nokuzama ukubulala. Ubhekene namacala angu-20 esewonke, amanye awo inqwaba yokuzama ukubulala. Udaba luhlehliselwe umhla ka-28 Meyi 2026 ukuze kuvunyelwe umbuso ukuthi uqedele ukudalula okuqukethwe emadokodweni abekwe endaweni eyodwa. Umsolwa ugqunywe esitokisini kusukela aboshwa ngonyaka odlule. Uzohlala esitokisini. UFadiel Adams evele enkantolo yeMantshi ePinetown Umholi weqembu lezepolitiki i-NCC nelungu lePhalamende, uFadiel Adams, unikezwe ibheyili ka-R10 000. Icala lihlehliselwe umhlaka-14 Agasti 2026 ukuze kuqhutshekwe nokuqhubeka. Njengengxenye yemibandela yebheyili, ummangalelwa uyalwa ukuba angaxhumani, ngokuqondile noma ngokungaqondile, nanoma ibaphi ofakazi boMbuso kanye/noma ukushushiswa. Ummangalelwa uyalelwa ukuba azibike mathupha eHhovisi Lamaphoyisa aseMitchells Plain Police Station phakathi kwehora le-06h00 no-20h00 njalo ngoLwesibili nangoMgqibelo, kusalindwe ukuphothulwa kwalolu daba. USOMATEKISI uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni nasolwa nabo uMvimbi Daniel Masilela noPhilemon Msiza namhlanje bajoyinwe umsolwa wesine ozinikele emaphoyiseni uBafana Sindane. Namhlanje babuyele enkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein, eMpumalanga icala lahlehliselwa uMsombuluko. Abammangalelwa

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: bane kumbe bahlanu okufanele bangasali kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. “Kasinawo amandla okuphikisa uBroos ngezizathu zakhe kodwa uPetersen ngokwami wayevele ekulungele ukuba yingxenye yeBafana engakaxinwa nawukugula. “Ngicabanga ukuthi yinto efanayo nakuCross, Maboe noMonyane kodwa siyamethemba umqeqeshi." IFifa inqume ukuthi izikwati zeNdebe yoMhlaba ezisazophundlwa zithunyelwe kuyona ngoMeyi 13. UBroos uzomemezela isikwati sabadlali abangu-55 emasontweni azayo. IFifa inqume ukuthi wonke amaqembu adedele abadlali ngoMeyi 26. NgoJuni 1 iFifa ilindele ukuthi wonke amaqembu ayinike uhla lwabadlali abangu-23 kuya ku-26 azodlala ngabo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: uma esekhethe ukushiya akuyona inkinga, indaba ingaba yimbi uma kukhona osebukela phansi umsebenzi ongaka." Uthe leli qembu linabantu abadlulile ku-70 abaphilisa imindeni yabo ngalo. "Siyohlezi sileseka ngoba liveze amakhono abantu esingabazi. Liyisikhungo sokwakha esikhiqize abaculi abaseqophelweni eliphezulu. Uyamuzwa nje umculi odlule kulona, ngisho esezimele." Uthe ngoba basuka ndawonye futhi sebekhulile ababonise abantwana ukuthi izinto nezinkinga zisombululwa kanjani. "Abazokwenza manje bazi ukuthi kuwumlando nawo oyosala ngabo emhlabeni, ufundwe yizizukulwane, abanye baqophe imidlalo yamafilimu ngendlela abalusingethe ngayo lolu daba. Singabefundisi siyabakhulekela futhi siyohlezi siyeseka iJoyous Celebration kukho konke. Bakhumbule negama Joyous Celebration, ngakho akukho sitha okumele sivunyelwe ukuxova le njabulo yamakholwa nethuthukisa amakhono kangaka," kuphetha uPastor Ntombela osondelene kakhulu naleli qembu njengoba lake lamyisa naphesheya kwezilwandle ngesikhathi liqopha i-albhamu eyayithi Live At Potter's House, eDallas, Texas ngo-2017.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-Volkswagen Polo Vivo eyakhiwa efemini yakwaVW Group Africa eGqeberha ABASHAYELI bamaPolo Vivo balulekwe ngabakhiqizi bayo kwaVolkswagen Group Africa ngendlela yokuwapaka ukuze kuzogwemeka ukuthi angazihambeli kulandela ukutholakala kwenkinga kwi-handbrake. IPolo Vivo ikhiqizwa efemini yale nkampani eseKariega, eGqeberha, e-Eastern Cape. I-VW itshele iNational Consumer Commission ukuthi icela bonke abathenge amaPolo Vivo phakathi kukaFebhuwari 2025 noFebhuwari nonyaka ukuba bawahambise emagaraji ukuze ezohlolwa futhi alungiswe. Izimoto ezithintekayo zingu-25 729. Kutholakale ukuthi kungenzeka i-handbrake ingabambi kahle nokungaholela ekutheni izehlele yona. “Lokhu kungadala ingozi, kakhulukazi uma imoto ipake endaweni enyukelayo.” Abashayeli abahamba ngezinamagiya azishintshayo balulekwe ngokuthi bayifake kuP uma bepaka noma ku-1 kulabo abahamba ngeno-gearbox oshintshwayo. Banxuswe ukuthi bangapaki endaweni eyehlelayo noma enyukayo kuze kuba iyahlolwa. Bacelwe ukuba bahambise izimoto ngokushesha emagaraji akwaVW ukuba ziyohlolwa futhi zilungiswe nokuyinto ezokwenziwa mahhala. I-Volkswagen ithe nayo izobafonela abanikazi bezimoto ezithintekayo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ULONDIE London neMzansi Magic asebememezele izindaba zokuza kohlelo ngempilo yakhe Image: Image: Instagram @londie_london_official KULINDELEKE ukuthi luqale maduzane uhlelo oluzophendula imibuzo abantu abakade baba nayo, ngentokazi yaKwaNongoma kodwa ezinze eGoli, uLondie London. ULondie neMzansi Magic bamemezele ukuthi kungekudala kuzoqala uhlelo ngempilo yale ntokazi oluthi Life with Londi. Kulolu hlelo, baveze kancane ukuthi kuzophenduleka imibuzo ehlukene ngezinto ebezilokhu zivela ngale ntokazi, ezinkundleni nakwezinye izinhlelo uLondie ake aba yingxenye yazo. Le ntokazi ike yabonakala ezinhlelweni okukhona kuzo i-The Real Housewives of Durban, ne-The Real Housewives Ultimate Girls Trip: South Africa. ULondie uthe usekubheke ngabomvu ukuthi abalandeli bakhe babone ukuthi ubaphatheleni ohlelweni oluthinta yena ngqo. "Okwamanje yize umuntu engeke aveze okuningi kodwa ngithi abantu abangithandayo abalindele okuningi, okunye abakade bezibuza ngami, uhlelo luyeza kuMzansi Magic futhi luzocacisa konke abafuna ukukwazi ngempilo yami yangasese, umculo nokunye okuningi," kusho uLondie ngamafuphi. Le ntokazi ikhuluma kanjena nje, isanda kuba sematheni njengoba ngesonto eledlule, igxekwe abaningi ikhuluma

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: ezinhle nezimqoka abazidingayo empilweni, ngakho kuzohlale kusemqoka ukuthi lokho kuhlale kuqhakambiseka minyaka yonke nangezikhathi zonke ezweni nasemhlabeni jikelele. Umculo wakulo mdlalo wabhalwa wuye uMbongeni (Ngema) noHugh Masekela (naye ongasekho emhlabeni), umdanso wahlelwa wuMichael Peters noMbongeni (Ngema), nophrojusa bemisebenzi eyahlukene kuwona oDavid Barkham, Kirk D’Amico, Sudhr Pragjee, Helena Spring, Sanjeev Singh, David Thompson naye u-Anant (Singh) nomqondisi uDarrell James Roodt.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: iNkabi Records ephethe uLwah Ndlunkulu, Siya Ntuli, Xowla, Fanatic SA nabanye. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, uzobe enandisa kwi-Mr Somatekisi Live In Concert ePlayhouse Opera Theatre eThekwini, namhlanje kusukela ngo-6 ebusuku. Kulo mcimbi uBig Zulu uzobe eshiyelana inkundla noKhuzani, Lwah Ndlunkulu, Aymos, Xowla, Blaq Diamond, Musiholiq, Starr Healer, Siya Ntuli, Zakwe, Fanatic SA neNdlondlo Emnyama. Amathikithi atholakala eWebtickets, Pick n Pay nasezitolo zakwaBoxer ngemali esukela ku-R200 kuya ku-R300.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: KWENZEKE obekufiswa ngumqeqeshi, uHugo Broos, iBafana Bafana yehlula iZambia emdlalweni wobungani eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha, ngoMgqibelo ntambama. Amagoli eBafana ashaywe ngu-Oswin Appollis, Mohau Nkota noSiphephelo Sithole ngokwahlukana kweziwombe. EleZambia libekwe enethini nguSabobo Banda sekusele amanenjana kuphele umdlalo. Lo mdlalo bekungowokugcina wokuzicijela umqhudelwano i-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) ozoqala ngenyanga ezayo eMorocco. UBroos ubewusebenzisela ukubhekisisa abadlali azothembela kuwona lo mqhudelwano iBafana eqede kuwona endaweni yesithathu e-Ivory Coast nyakenye. Maphakathi nesonto, lo mqeqeshi waseBelgium utshele abezindaba ukuthi ufuna ukuwina kwiZambia ukuze ezofika eshayela phezulu eMorocco. Kulo mdlalo unike ithuba abadlali abaningi okubalwa kubona unozinti uSipho Chaine noThabang Matuludi obanga ijezi noKhuliso Mudau emuva kwesokudla. Emuva komdlalo, uBroos uthe:" Bekufanele sikwenze lokho ngoba bekungokokugcina sinethuba lokukwenza. Yikho ngesikhathi sekhefu sishintshe kakhulu. Bekungekuhle eqenjini kodwa kujwayelekile uma kufanele kungene abadlali abasha. Kuyadina kuwona wonke umuntu kodwa kulungile. Asidlalanga kahle namuhla kodwa bekuzikhathi ezinhle. Uma senza okufanele sikwenze, sibheka phambili, siphasa phambili, bekusenza sibe

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: U-DJ Sbu ukhuze ibuya ohlelweni lwakhe I-SABC ikuchithile ukuthi ukunyamalala komsakazi wohlelo lwasekuseni kwiRadio 2000, uSbusiso "DJ Sbu" Leope, kuhlangene nokuvela kwegama lakhe kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga. U-DJ Sbu ubengazwakali emoyeni kusukela ekuqaleni kwesonto esiphuma kulo. Oyinhloko yezokuXhumana kwa-SABC, uMmoni Ngubane, uthe bayakuqinisekisa ukuthi uDJ Sbu ubengekho emoyeni kusukela ngoLwesibili. Nakuba engacacisanga ukuthi yini ebangele ukuthi engazwakali emoyeni kodwa uthe ukunyamalala kwakhe emoyeni akuhlangene nokwenzeka kwikhomishini. "Iziphathimandla zingakuqinisekisa ukuthi uDJ Sbu uzobuyela emoyeni ngoMsombuluko (esho owanamhlanje)," kuphetha uMmoni. Ukungazwakali kwephimbo lalesi silomo kwi-Big Breakfast Show (BBS) with DJ Sbu, kwenze abanye abalaleli bashaya amakhala, basola ukuthi izikhulu zeRadio 2000 zimmisile emuva kokuba igama lakhe lithinteke enkohlakalweni. U-DJ Sbu uzichithile izinsolo ezimyamanisa nenkohlakalo kuMasipala waseKurhuleni ezenziwe yiNhloko yezoMthetho emisiwe kulo masipala, u-Advocate Kemi Behari, ngesikhathi ivele kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga ngoMsombuluko odlule. UBehari ubethula ubufakazi ngokugxambukela kosopolitiki ecaleni lokuqondisa ubugwegwe kowayeyisikhulu esiphezulu, uLesiba Mojapelo. Uthe uDJ Sbu nowayenguzakwabo kwiTS Records futhi oyilungu le-ANC, uThembinkosi “TK”

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: akukho mfundi ozobhikishela othisha abangafuni ngamabomu ukufundisa. Baphinde bakubeka kwacaca ukuthi amakhamera awayi ndawo futhi nothishanhloko bafuna aqhubeke nokuhola isikole. Umzali, uMnuz Smanga Mkhwanazi, ugxeke eyomhloli okhethe ukuthumela umyalezo ngesigungu sesikole (SGB), wathi ngesikhathi begcina ukukhuluma naye kwakuvunyelwane ngokuthi uzobuya msalofu azoletha izimpendulo kubona bengabazali. Ubasole ngokuthi bathathe isinqumo bodwa bengabazisile bona bengabazali, wathi bona bamile kwelokuthi amakhamera awaphumi futhi noNgobese bamdinga ebuyile. “Amakhamera awangakhishwa, akubuyiswe uNgobese. Uma kungenzeki lokho, isikole ngeke sivulwe. Okwesithathu uNgcobo (uMnuz Nkosinathi - oyinhloko yoMnyango wezeMfundo esifundazweni) noMsomi (umhloli) sibadinga la,” kusho uMkhwanazi. Uqhube wathi bathatha lezi zinqumo nje, ezabo izingane zifunda ezikoleni ezizimele ezinawo lawa makhamera kodwa bathi awakhishwe eMkhumbane Secondary. Omunye umzali, uNksz Nonhlanhla Magundu, uthe uMnyango ungasihlinzeka isikole ngezinsiza ezifana nothisha nokunye kodwa isikole ngesabazali nomphakathi. “Isikole ngesethu. Okusho ukuthi njengoba bemise uNgobese izinyanga ezintathu, nathi sizode sizoma la kuze kuphele lezo zinyanga, kuze kubuyiswe uNgobese,” usho kanje. Omunye umzali, uNksz Xolile

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: uMotaung Jr, Jessica Motaung, Kemiso Motaung noBobby Motaung. "Ngokwami umuntu owayephethe iqembu, asivaleki isikhala sakhe. UChincha Guluva kusukela ekulisunguleni nasekuliphatheni, kuze kuba uyalishiya manje. Akulula (ukuvala isikhala sakhe). Eminyakeni edlule, iChiefs ibisebenza ngaphandle kwesikhulu esiphezulu, bekuhlala kungusihlalo nabaqondisi ezindaweni ezihlukene. Ngicabanga ukuthi okungaxazulula izinkinga wukuba nesikhulu esiphezulu esizokwengamela konke, nabo bonke abasebenzayo," kusho uBaloyi ekhuluma ekhasini leSoccerbeat kwiYouTube. "Kuphakathi kokuthi omunye wabo, uMotaung Jr, Jessica, Kemiso noBobby, ukusithatha lesi sikhundla ngoba ngicabanga ukuthi kunesikhala esikhona esidinga ukuvalwa... Kungaba ngowesilisa noma owesifazane othatha isikhundla sokuba yisikhulu esiphezulu, bonke basebenze ngaphansi kwakhe ngoba okwamanje kunesikhala esingabonakali ngamehlo enyama uma ungaphandle. Kodwa uma uqala ukubheka ukuthi yini inkinga kwiChiefs, uyabona ukuthi lena ngenye yazo, yisikhala esashiywa ngusihlalo ongasekho ngokugcwele njengoba bekwenzeka. Omunye wabo kufanele athathe isikhala sesikhulu esiphezulu, bonke babike kuyena. Lowo muntu uyena ozodlulisela izinto ebhodini, kubalandeli nakubona bonke abantu." IChiefs izobuyela enkundleni ngoMgqibelo isiyobhekana ne-Orbit College emdlalweni wePremiership eNelson Mandela Bay

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Isiphithiphithi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana uVusi Nova ezingcwaba UVusi Nova, ucasule abalandeli bakhe bebezibuza ukuthi kazi abaphuthelwa yini isimemezelo sokushona kwakhe ngesikhathi bebona ama-video ezungeza ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ebonakalisa umngcwabo wakhe. Okuthuse abaningi ukubona imibhalo yenkampani yakwaCebolethu iyingxenye yalo mngcwbo, kodwa kwehle amaphaphu sekucaca kubantu cha akufiwe, kodwa lo mculi uqopha ivideo. Kubikwa ukuthi konke lokhu bekwenzelwa ingoma azoyidedela ethi, "Lapho Ngifa," ekhuluma ngendlela afuna ukungcwatshwa ngayo. Indlela eqoshwe ngayo ikhalisa abaningi ngoba kunezithombe zakhe, abangani bakhe ababonakala bekhala, bephethe ibhokisi lakhe lomngcwabo kukhona nomngani wakhe omkhulu uMoshe Ndiki ongumethuli wezinhlelo obekhuluma kulo ngcwabo ngomngani wakhe. Abanye osaziwayo ababonakala kule vidiyo kubalwa abalingisi uLuthuli Dlamini, u-Anele Matoti, u-Ayanda Makayi nomlingisi u-Andile Nebulana, nabanye osaziwayo endimeni yezokungcebeleka. Lo mngcwabo uqoshwe emathuneni aseFourways Memorial Par, eyaziwa njengendawo yokuphumula yabantu abaqavile, okuhlanganisa namalungu omndeni wakwaMandela. Ukukhethwa kwendawo kwengeze uvalo kubantu bethi hawu akasekho ngempela, kodwa akukaze kuvele isimemezelo sokudlula kwakhe emhlabeni. Ngenkathi abanye abalandeli bencome isiqondiso

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ebolekiwe no-Etiosa Ighodaro ohlale isikhathi eside engadlali ngenxa yokulimala. Umqeqeshi weChiefs, uKhalil Ben Youssef, uncome uMorris ngokungena ashaye igoli emdlalweni omqoka. "UMorris ngomunye wabadlali bethu futhi ubesebenza kanzima eziqeqesha. Besilinde isikhathi esifanele sokumfaka futhi ngicabanga ukuthi lesi bekuyiso sokumfaka esikimini. Sikuxoxile naye ubumqoka balo mdlalo. Kuyakhombisa ukuthi umdlali ngamunye esimbizayo ukulungele ukusebenzela iqembu," kusho uBen Youssef. IChiefs isalelwe yimidlalo emibili ngaphambi kokusonga isizini yePremiership ka-2025/2026, ngemidlalo emibili yaseThekwini. NgoMgqibelo izobhekana naMaZulu eMoses Mabhida Stadium, isonge kuyona le nkundla neChippa United ngoMeyi 23. Emuva kwalokho, kulindeleke ukuthi izikhulu zimemezele izinguquko kubadlali nakubaqeqeshi.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: bakhale kakhulu ngokuhamba kuka-Ayanda Msweli, naye oveze ukuthi usezokwenza ezemigwaqo bukhona ekhasini lakhe kwiFacebook. Izolo ekuseni ngesikhathi enza lokhu izibalo ziveze ukuthi abantu bayameseka kulolu hambo lwakhe aseluqalile. UKing Sfiso ngoMsombuluko kuvele izindaba zokuthi ushiye isigubhukane njengoba ebenikwe usuku olulodwa lokusakaza. Lokhu kuthiwa akumjabulisanga wakhetha ukushiya ngokuphelele kulo msakazo. Isolezwe lihoshe ngomthombo walo ukuthi izinguquko ezithinta uKing Sfiso, zenzeke ngomzuzu wokugcina, okwenze abaphathi bashayana ngamakhanda.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: U-ALBERT Mazibuko odlule emhlabeni ngeSonto emuva kokugula UMFELANDAWONYE wezinyunyana zamaciko KwaZulu-Natal, iCultural and Creative Industries Federation of South Africa (Ccifsa), usuphakamise ukuthi ihlonishwe ngomngcwabo osezingeni lesifundazwe, ingwazi yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, u-Albert Mazibuko, edlule emhlabeni ngeSonto emuva kokugula. UMazibuko (77), ushonele esibhedlela esiseThekwini emuva kokuxinwa wukugula. Ushona nje, bese kunguyena yedwa obeneminyaka eqenjini njengoba ajoyina ngo-1969. USihlalo weCcifsa eKZN, uThokozani "T'zozo" Zulu, uthe ukudlula emhlabeni kukaMazibuko kubalimazile njengoba bebefunda lukhulu kuye njengamaciko. "Ukuba khona kweMambazo kuthathe iKZN neNingizimu Afrika kwayigqamisa emhlabeni jikelele. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi obaba uMazibuko bayizingqalabutho ezawina amaGrammy hhayi kanye, hhayi kabili, hhayi kathathu kodwa kahlanu. Silahlekelwe kakhulu njengamaciko. Abafowethu beMambazo abalahlekelwe bodwa kodwa silahlekelwe sonke ngoba besibukela kakhulu kubaba nozakwabo," kusho uT'zozo. Uthe ngenxa yamagalelo akhe bebebona kufanele ukuthi ahlonishwe ngomngcwabo kahulumeni. "Siyafisa ukuthi uNdunankulu waseKZN, akuhloniphe ukufihlwa kwakhe kube nesithunzi abekwe ngokusezingeni lesifundazwe," kubeka uT'zozo. Okhulumela uNdunankulu,uThami Ntuli, uMnuz Bongani Gina, uthe umndeni kumele ubhalele ihhovisi likandunankulu incwadi,

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: yaMacala aDlulisiwe. Encwadini efungelwe, uMntwana uMbonisi usayibhedlile indaba yokuthi akuzange kulandelwe imigomo ngesikhathi kuhlonzwa iSilo. "URamaphosa kwakungafanele avume ukuqokwa kweSilo ngoba wayazi ukuthi kunombango wesihlalo sobukhosi. Kwakunezikhalazo ngesikhathi uRamaphosa evuma ukuqokwa kweSilo." UMntwana uMbonisi uthe kuningi okuzokonakala uma bengagcina bengavunyelwanga ukuthi benze izethulo. "Lana sikhuluma ngodaba olubalulekile oluthinta isizwe esikhulu. Abantu babona iNkantolo eNkulu ePitoli ichitha isinqumo sikaRamaphosa sokuvuma ukuqokwa kweSilo, baphinde babona iNkantolo yaMacala aDlulisiwe ivuna uRamaphosa. Manje abantu bafuna ukubona isiphetho." Uthe: "UMntwana uMbonisi uwumfowabo weSilo esakhothama, uGoodwill Zwelithini kaBhekuzulu. UMntwana uMbonisi weseka uMntwana uBuzabazi Mbuzeli kaZwelithini embangweni wesihlalo." Phakathi kwabantwana abafake isicelo kukhona abaNtwana beSilo sakwaKhethomthandayo, uMathuba, Vulindlela, Mxolisi noMntwana uLindiwe. Okhulumela iSilo, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, uthe bebenethemba lokuthi isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo, sawuqeda umbango wesihlalo sobukhosi. "Kuyajabhisa ngoba imibango kade yayiba khona endlunkulu, kwaze kwaba khona lapho kubulawana khona. Njengoba ubukhosi busekhona namanje, kusho khona ukuthi kwakubuye kufike isikhathi lapho kuhlalwa phansi, kuxoxiswane. Iyangixaka lena yabafowethu

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: uthe njengoba bebuya ihlandla lesishiyagalolunye kulo nyaka ngalo mncintiswano babheke ukwamukela onobuhle abawu-30 abazobahlukanisa kabili ngokwemikhakha yeminyaka yabo okungowe-Teen ongenelwa ngabano-15 kuya ku-32, nowama-Senior ongenelwa onobuhle abaneminyaka ewu-19 kuya ku-34. Ukungenela nonyaka kuvalwa ngoMeyi 16. “Sesivele sesivulile ngokusemthethweni imingenelo yalo nyaka esibheke ukuthi sizame ukwenza kube khona onobuhle asebezele esizobanika ithuba lokuzibonakalisa ukuthi yikuphi okuhle abangeza nakho kulo mncintiswano. Nokho kumele sisho ukuthi ngeke sibathambisele isandla konke sizozama ukukwenza ngendlela eqondile nenobulungiswa,” kusho uNksz Msweli. “Nanokuthi njengoba ngiwumuntu osebenzisa kakhulu izinkundla zokuxhumana bese kukaningi ngiqaphela ukugxekwa kubuye kukhulunywe kabi ngabantu besifazana abanezingane, engicabanga ukuthi leli thuba lizokwenza ukuthi bazibonakalise,” kusho yena. UNELISA Khumalo ophethe isicoco sika-Miss KZN Queen 2026 U-Miss KZN Queen usuvule iminyango futhi wathuthukisa onobuhle abehlukene endimeni kubalwa u-Ayanda Thabethe owawunqoba ngo-2020, nowalala isibili kuMiss SA ngo-2022, Anelisa Nxele noSibusisiwe Zwane abangena kwi-Top 30 yawo uMiss SA ngo-2023. Konobuhle abanqobe lo mncintiswano eminyakeni edlule kukhona uSithabile Mnyandu ngo-2018,

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UTHANDOH Gumede ongumsunguli werobhothi elinguthisha wazozonke izifundo, u-Iris UNOBUHLE wakwaMnqobokazi, eHluhluwe, uThandoh "BS" Gumede, uzobonakala nezinkakha zabalingisi emdlalweni omusha ozongena esikhaleni seScandal! ku-etv. Isolezwe Ngempelasonto lithole ukuthi uThandoh uzobe elingisa noRami Chuene noSindi Dlathu kulo mdlalo osihloko sithi Four Of Us. Ethintwa uThandoh, obuye aziwe ngelikaMaka-Iris, ukuqinisekisile ukuthi uzovela kulo mdlalo esebenza endaweni yokucwalwa izinwele. Unxuse ukungandi ngamagama ngenxa yesivumelwano asisayine nabadidiyeli. Inkonyane izobe ingathuki isisinga kuThando njengoba eseke walingisa emidlalweni Empini, Muvhango nasesikhangisweni sakwa-Assupol. "Ukulingisa ngisuka kude nakho njengoba ngakuqala ngisafunda e-University of Zululand futhi umkhakha engiwuthandayo. Okungichaza ngokulingisa ukuthi kuyangivumela ukuba ngizichaze futhi kuyindlela yokushaywa wumoya nokubuyisa amandla emuva kokusebenza kanzima kwezobuchwepheshe." UThandoh uphethe isicoco sikaMiss Tech Universe asiwina eqhathwe nezintokazi zamazwe ngamazwe ezingongoti kwezobuchwepheshe emcimbini waseThailand. Ngaphambi kokuhlabana ngalesi sicoco, wayeqale waqwaqwada izintokazi zase-Afrika kuMiss Dot Africa. Ngo-2024 uThando ube esesungula irobhothi elibizwa ngo-Iris elisebenza njengothisha nelinolwazi lwazo zonke izifundo ezenziwa kusukela kuGrade 1 kuya emanyuvesi akuleli

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UTHOMAS Gumede okhuza ibuya ekulingiseni ngomdlalo wamahlaya ozokhonjiswa kwiSABC1 othi Msebenzi UZOKHULUMA ngezingqinamba abazali ababhekana nazo ngenxa yezingane ezibafaka ezinkingeni ezehlukene umdlalo wamahlaya othi Msebenzi, ozoqala kwiSABC1 ngeSonto ngo-7.30 ebusuku. Kulo mdlalo oqoshelwe eSoweto kulingisa phambili umbhali obuye abe ngumqondisi wemidlalo emikhulu uThomas Gumede. UThomas uzobe elingisa indawo ephambili kaMsebenzi, okungowesilisa oneminyaka engu-30, onolimi olushelelayo, ongenandaba nokuthola umsebenzi oqondile nowenza konke okusemandleni ukubalekela izinkinga anazo zemali. Ekhuluma ngale ndawo uThomas uthe uMsebenzi, usebenzisa izindlela ezingaqondile ukuze athole inkece njengoba enamabhanoyi afake kuwo omakhelwane bakhe abangani nabomndeni wakhe. "UMsebenzi wumuntu nje esingathi akabalaleli abanye. Wenza izinto ngoba azi ukuthi uyakwazi ukubagoqa kalula kodwa lokhu kubuye kususe umsindo ngenxa yokuthi ukwenza ebantwini abazanayo nabasondelene kakhulu bese kuba nemiphumela naye abengayilindele.Yindawo lena ezohambisana nempilo yemindeni eminingi ngenxa yentsha ephila impilo efana nse neyalona wesilisa," kusho uThomas. Kulo mdlalo kuvele ukuthi omunye umlingisi ozogqama uDuduzile Ngcobo ozobe elingisa indawo kaMaGumede, ongunina kaMsebenzi. UMaGumede kuvela

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: emidlalweni yanamuhla. Khonamanjalo: ICasric Stars izibuyisele embangweni wesicoco ngokunenebula iHighbur ngo 3-0 izolo ntambama, eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Lo mphumela usho ukuthi iCasric isinamaphuzu awu-43, nokuyibeka endaweni yesihlanu kwi-log. Imiphumela yayizolo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Midlands Wanderers 2-1 Upington City; Black Leopards 0-0 The Bees; Casric Stars 3-0 Highbury Hungry Lions v Univ. of Pretoria (Mxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium); Venda FC v Milford FC (Thohoyandou Stadium); Leicesterford City v Lerumo Lions (Dobsonville Stadium); Kruger United v Cape Town City (KaNyamazane Stadium); Baroka FC v Gomora United (Global Stadium)

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: komdlalo, u-Ouaddou, uthe uyakholwa ukuthi nakanjani bazowuqedela eMbombela umsebenzi ngempelasonto ezayo. "Ekuqaleni kwesizini ngasho ukuthi umbango weligi uzoqhubeka kuze kube wusuku lokugcina. Angikhathazekile kodwa ngijabhile ngoba asiwinanga. Kodwa masiyeni emdlalweni wokugcina siyoqukula indebe. Sekuphele iminyaka eminingi iPirates ingayiwini iligi futhi lokho kubonakele ngamatata enkundleni. Kubafana bami ngifuna ukuthi hambani niyothatha isicoco ngempelasonto ezayo,"kusho u-Ouaddou kwiSupersport. Enkundleni, iPirates ifake ingcindezi kusukela ekuqaleni komdlalo kodwa ukuqina kodonga lwasemuva lweCity lwenze abagadli beZimnyama bathwala kanzima.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UZOLA Luthuli oyi-kit manager yeDurban City asewe evuka nayo iminyaka ewu-22 njengoba eseze wanqoba nayo indebe yeNedbank Cup UKUNQOBA indebe yeNedbank Cup kweDurban City kumele nakanjani kube yisikhuthazi nesiqalo sezinto ezinhle emaqenjini aKwaZulu-Natal, adlala kwiBetway Premiership. Lowo ngumbono kaZola “Mzolisto” Luthuli oyi-kit manager yeDurban City engompetha besizini ka-2025/2026 beNedbank Cup ngokuguqisa i-TS Galaxy ngo 2-1 ngoMgqibelo, ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. ICity eqede isomiso seminyaka engu-17 sokunganqobi izindebe kwamaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal, yaqeda ishobolo leminyaka ewu-54 lokubhekwa yisambane kwamaqembu akulesi sifundazwe kwiNedbank kusukela wasungulwa ngo-1971, usabizwa nge-Life Challenge. “Le mpumelelo yeDurban City kumele nakanjani ibe yisikhuthazi emaqenjini aKwaZulu-Natal ekwenzeni okufanayo nawo njengoba sesenzile siyiDurban City ngokuwina le ndebe. "Sinamaqembu amane adlala kwiBetway Premiership, namabili adlala kwiMotsepe Championship, angingabazi ukuthi wonke la maqembu azokhuthazeka ekulweleni impumelelo ngokwehlukana kwawo,” kusho uLuthuli, osewe evuka naleli qembu iminyaka kusukela lisabizwa ngeMaritzburg United. “Empeleni kule sizini amaqembu aseKZN enza kahle njengoba lingekho nelilodwa phakathi kwawo elivika izembe

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ukuthi ayozikhalela phambi kwekomiti elibheke ukusebenza kwansuku zonke kwiNFP. Ukoxoshwa kukaNksz Shinga kusho ukuthi uzophunyukwa yisikhundla sokuba uMphathiswa nesokuba ilungu lesiShayamthetho. UXaba uthe luzoqala maduze uhlelo lokuqoka ozongena esikhundleni sikaNksz Shinga. Umthombo osondelene noNksz Shinga, uthe luselude ukhalo oluzohanjwa. Umthombo uthe uNksz Shinga ngeke ajahe ukuya enkantolo. "Umthetho weqembu umnika igunya lokuthi aphonsele inselelo isinqumo ekomitini elibhekele ukusebenza kwansuku zonke kwiNFP. Uzoqala ayilwe ngaphakathi ngaphambi kokuthi agijimele enkantolo." Imizamo yokuthola ukuphawula kukaNksz Shinga ayizange iphumelele njengoba ucingo lwakhe belukhala lungabanjwa futhi engazange awuphendule umyalezo awuthunyelwe. Sekunesikhathi eside uNksz Shinga elengelwa yizembe. Ubuholi beqembu baqale bazama ukumkhipha esiShayamthetho ngonyaka owedlule, lapho babuphakamisa khona ukufaka umholi weqembu, uMnuz Ivan Barnes, esikhundleni sakhe. Lo mzamo awuzange uphumelele njengoba kwatholakala ukuthi ubuholi beqembu, abuzange bulandele imigomo ngesikhathi buzama ukuhoxisa uNksz Shinga. Emva kwalokho ubuholi bamisa ubulungu bukaNksz Shinga kodwa bahluleka ukummisa emsebenzini wakhe wokuba ilungu lesiShayamthetho. Ubuholi beNFP bufuna iqembu lihoxe kuhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Ungqongqoshe weMfundo ephakeme uButi Manamela Image: Ayanda Ndamane / IOL KUSHAYISANA imibono kwaqubuka nemvunge ngokufakwa ngaphansi komlawuli kwesikhwama esixhasa izitshudeni ngemali yokufunda ezikhungweni zemfundo, iNational Students' Financial Aid Scheme (NSFAS). Imvunge iqutshulwa ukuthi sekuphenduke insakavukela ukufakwa ngaphansi kwabalawuli abahlukene kwalesi sikhwama kepha izinkinga zingaxazululeki. UNgqongqoshe weMfundo ePhakeme, uMnuz Buti Manamela, ujube uSolwazi Hlengani Mathebula njengomlawuli walesi sikhwama. Ukwenze lokhu ngoba efuna ukuthi kube nozinzo ekulawulweni kwalesi sikhwama, kulandela ukusula kwamanye amalungu ebhodi, kubalwa ibamba likasihlalo. I-DA isinxuse uManamela ukuthi avele ePhalamende azochaza kabanzi ngezingqinamba ekulawulweni kwalesi sikhwama esixhasa izinkumbi zezitshudeni. I-EFF Youth Command ikugxekile ukujutshwa kukaMathebula, yathi kunezinsolo zokungaphathi kahle esekwa-SARS. "Kuyaqhubeka ukulawulwa kwe-NSFAS njengoba bekwenzeka naphambilini kusaphethe abanye oNgqongqoshe. Kushiya imibuzo ukuqoka umuntu olandelwe yifu elimnyama lapho ayesebenza khona, bese kuthiwa akengamele isikhwama esibaluleke kangaka," kusho i-EFFYC. Inhlangano emele imikhandlu yezitshudeni emanyuvesi, i-South African Union of Students' (SAUS), ihambisana ne-EFFYC ekuchitheni ukuqokwa kukaMathebula. Ithe UManamela akazange axhumane nezinhlaka ezifanele

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: kube iyona ephathayo ngesikhathi esizayo, kufanele i-DA ibe iqembu abantu abazolethemba ukuthi lingakwazi ukuphatha." Uthe uzohambela ezindaweni ezahlukene esifundazweni lapho ezobe exoxa khona nezithunywa eziya engqungqutheleni. UBilly ubeyikhansela kuMasipala waseThekwini ngaphambi kokuthi aye ePhalamende. Akukacaci ukuthi bangaki abazongenela umbango wokuhola i-DA esifundazweni. Igama elivelayo embangweni elephini lomholi we-DA esifundazweni, uMnuz Sithembiso Ngema. UNgema ubengakaphumeli obala ukuthi uzowungenela yini umjaho. Umholi okhona njengamanje, uMnuz Francois Rodgers, umemezele ukuthi usethi khumu. Khonamanjalo: I-DA izoqoka ubuholi bayo bukazwelonke engqungqutheleni engempelasonto. Kulindeleke ukuthi iMeya kaMasipala waseKapa, uMnuz Geordin Gwyn Hill-Lewis, izidlele amahlanga embangweni wokuhola i-DA. UHill-Lewis uzophonsela inselelo ikhansela lakuMasipala waseSedibeng, uMnuz Sibusiso Dyonase. Umholi ophethe njengamanje, uMnuz John Steenhuisen, wahoxa emjahweni wezikhundla.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: kwamaphoyisa, okuvele ukuthi u-80% wazo owamaphoyisa abulawe engekho emsebenzini. “Lena yinkinga enkulu nesenginqume ukuthi ngibambisane nophiko lwamaphoyisa ukuzama ukunqanda ukubhebhetheka kwazo. Okunye okusikhathaza kakhulu yizibhamu ezisetshenziselwa ukubulala, ukuphanga nokwenza ubugebengu obuhleliwe. Yingakho sizothatha izinyathelo zokuthi lezo zibhamu zitholakale futhi kugwenywe ukuthi ziwelele ezandleni ezingafanele,” kusho uCachalia. Mayelana nezigameko zokuhlukumeza okweyamene nobulili nokuhlukunyezwa kwabesifazane nezingane, osekuvele kumenyezelwe ukuthi kuyinhlekelele ezweni - uCachalia uthe sekuvele kunemizamo abaphezu kwayo yokuthi kulungiswe futhi kugwenywe ukubhebhetheka kwakho. Udalule nokuthi ngoMashi 6 bazoba nomhlangano nezinhlaka ezahlukene ezibhekele ubugebengu ezweni ukuze kubhungwe ngezinye izindlela zokunqanda ubugebengu ezweni. “Luselude uhambo okumele siluhambe ukulwa nalesi simo, futhi siyathembisa nokuthi ngeke siliphose ithawula kuze kube wukuthi siyayinqoba le mpi ezweni ngoba inhloso yethu wukuthi iNingizimu Afrika kugcine kuyizwe okuphephile ukuba kulona,” kusho yena.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ABAQEQESHI ababanjiswe umsebenzi kwiKaizer Chiefs uCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef NGAPHANSI kobuholi obubanjiswe uKhalil Ben Youssef waseTunisia noCedric Kaze waseBurundi, iKaizer Chiefs isemgqeni wokuqoqa isibalo samaphuzu esikhulu kunawo wonke amasizini kusukela yawina isicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership ngeka-2014-2015 iqeqeshwa nguStuart Baxter. Nakuba umgqigqo weChiefs wokungehlulwa emidlalweni eyisikhombisa yeligi unqanyulwe yiSiwelele FC ngoLwesithathu kodwa leli qembu laseNaturena lisenethuba lokuqeda isizini nesibalo samaphuzu osekuneminyaka engu-11 lagcina ukufika kusona. Ngesikhathi iChiefs imemezela ukuthi kuzoqhubeka uBen Youssef noKaze emuva kokuxosha uNasreddine Nabi, kwakuhlukene imibono ngenxa yamava alaba baqeqeshi abebefike omunye ezosiza lo mqeqeshi waseTunisia, omunye ezomtolikela. Njengoba isizini isiyela emaphethelweni, isinqumo seChiefs sokugcina uBen Youssef noKaze sibukeka njengesasiphusile ngenxa yendawo iqembu elikuyona kwi-log nesibalo samaphuzu. Kumasizini amabili adlule, iChiefs ihlulwe wukungena kwi-Top 8 kodwa kulokhu isibalwa namaqembu azodlala kwiMTN8 ngesizini ezayo ekubeni isasalelwe yimidlalo emine kuphele isizini yePremiership. Ngaphezu kwalokho, inethuba lokubuyela kwiCaf Confederation eyidlale kule sizini ngenxa yokuwina iNedbank Cup ngedlule. UBen Youssef noKaze

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UNOZINTI weKaizer Chiefs wokuqina, uBrandon Petersen, okuvela ukuthi akusensuku zatshwala ukuthi abonakale enkundleni KUQINISEKISWE izindaba ezimnandi kwabasondelene neKaizer Chiefs ngokusondela kwesikhathi sokubuya enkundleni kukanozinti wayo wokuqina, uBrandon Petersen, okuzitolika ngokuphephuka kwejezi kuBruce Bvuma ovele unyamanambana kwezinye izingxenye zabalandeli ngenxa yamaphutha asobala emidlalweni yakamuva. UPetersen nguyena owaqala isizini ezintini zeChiefs ngaphambi kokuxinwa wukugula okwamqala ngaphambi komdlalo wabakhaya ne-Orlando Pirates ngasekupheleni kukaFebhuwari nonyaka. Ngesikhathi ijezi lisekuyena lo nozinti ongukaputeni kwiChiefs, leli qembu laseNaturena lalibalwa namanye okunzima ukuthola amagoli kuwona. Ubufakazi balokhu busekutheni ngesikhathi uPetersen engeniswa esibhedlela okwalandelwa wukuhlinzwa, wayesenqabe namagoli amahlandla angu-11 emidlalweni yeligi engu-16. Indawo kaPetersen ibivalwe ngoBvuma ofike wabhekana nobunzima kwazise iChiefs ithole imiphumela emibi ilandelana ngoba sekunguyena osezintini. Yize iChiefs inezinkinga kodwa amaphutha akhe agqame kakhulu ngoba uqhubekile nokuwenza ngisho iqembu selishintsha ukuqala linqoba imidlalo yeligi emithathu ilandelana. Emidlalweni yeChiefs emihlanu yeligi evinjwe nguBvuma kusukela kwagula uPetersen, usengenelwe ngamagoli amahlanu okubalwa namathathu amngenela kowokuqala (nePirates). Ukubuyisa kweChiefs isithunzi kwakamuva

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ukuthuthukisa izinhlelo zakuleli kwa-eMedia, ugcizelele ukuthi izinguquko abazenzayo manje zingumbono abanawo walesi siteshi ukusithatha ezingeni elikuso manje basibeke kwelinye. "Ukwethula izinhlelo ezimbili kusho ukukhula kakhulu kwemidlalo esiba nayo ngezikhathi esizithatha njengokuthi zibalulekile ebusuku la iningi labantu lisuke selizibukela amathelevishini. Okusijabulisa kakhulu ukuthi sisebenze nezinkampani ezimbili ezinkulu esezenze imidlalo ehlonishwe ngezindondo kuleli nakwamanye amazwe, bathembise ukusiziza nathi siqhubeke nokuvula amathuba omsebenzi entsheni yakithi futhi kuphinde kugqame nezinto ezihlukene ezenzeka emiphakathini yakithi,” kusho uHelga. Uthe njengesiteshi bazinike ekutheni balethe imidlalo nezinhlelo ezizodala ukuthi abantu baxoxe emphakathini futhi zigcine abalandeli abaningi. Umdlalo othi eGagasini wona ukhiqizwa inkampani iStained Glass TV omunye wabaphathi bayo okunguPepsi Pokane. UPokane uveze ukuthi lo mdlalo wona ugxile entsheni efuna ukwakha igama ayo endimeni yomculo nokuyinto engezi kalula njengoba kukhona izingqinamba ehlangana nazo endleleni nokuyinto ezobonakala kulo mdlalo. Abalingisi balo mdlalo bona kulindeleke ukuthi bethulwe kuleli sonto.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: bafike benze lo monakalo kodwa engingakusho wukuthi ngibonga ukuthi izingane ziphephile nonkosikazi, okwamanje basendaweni engaziwa muntu. Mina ngiwumuntu onedlozi elinzima kakhulu, into enjena ibingeke ivele yenzeke nje emzini wobabamkhulu ngakho ngithi abenzi bokubi bazobanjwa," kusho uNgizwe. Uzakwabo abambisene naye kulo mkhankaso, uNkosikhona "Phakelumthakathi" Ndabandaba, uthe ngeke kubanqinde amandla ukushiswa komuzi kaNgizwe njengoba abakwenzayo kuwukulwa nabantu bangaphandle abakuleli abenza izinto ezingalungile. "Thina sifuna ukuqeda amaphara, siqede ukuhlukunyezwa kwezingane ezincane. Ngesonto elidlule, sithole ingane yentombazane eneminyaka engu-13 inengane ihlala nendoda eneminyaka engu-48 yangaphandle. Izingane zethu seziphenduke amaphara ngenxa yezidakamizwa ezidayiswa yilaba bantu ngakho sifuna ukuqeda lokho, asicwasi," kusho yena. Uthe kusasa bazoya e-ICC embukisweni iToursim Indaba lapho kuzobe kunomengameli bomhlaba khona ukuze bahlale phansi nabo babatshele ukuthi abacwasi muntu kodwa yini abalwa nayo. Uveze ukuthi bahlele ukuhamba nawo amaphara bayowakhombisa omengameli abahlukene, ukuze babone ukuthi izidakamizwa zililimaze kanjani elakuleli. UShansela ehhovisi leSilo, Inkosi uMalusi Zondi, usigxeke kakhulu isigameko sokushiswa komuzi kaNgizwe wathi

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Okunye i-GEMS ekhale ngakho yinkohlakalo edla lubi, njengoba amanye amalungu elalisa izihlobo zawo ezingeyona ingxenye ye-GEMS, bese kudingeka lesi sikhwama sikhokhe. Izinyunyana zikhale ngokuthi i-GEMS ibuye ingafuni ukukhokha. UButhelezi empendulweni, uthe i-GEMS iyakhokha uma kungukuthi kuyahambisana nemigomo ebekiwe ethinta ezempilo. "Uma kwenzeka i-GEMS inqaba ukukhokha, kusuke kufaka izinto ezehlukene okubalwa ukusebenzisa izibhedlela ezingeyona ingxenye yezikhungo ezikhokhelwa yilesi sikhwama. Kokunye kusuke kungazange kutholakale imvume ngaphambi kokuba ogulayo angeniswe esibhedlela." Uthe kokunye kusuke kunemininingwane engaphelele noma ezinye izinto okumele zikhokhelwe ezisuke zingekho ngaphansi ezikhavwe yilesi sikhwama. Uveze nokuthi nyakenye, i-GEMS ikhokhele izindleko ezibalelwa ku-R67 billion, ekubeni amalungu akhokha u-R65 billion. Ubalule nokuthi abalesi sikhwama basebenzisa u-R10 billion, ukukhava izindleko ukuze imali ezokhokhwa amalungu inganyuswa kakhulu. UButhelezi uthe ziyaqhubeka izingxoxo phakathi kwezinyunyana ezingaphansi komfelandawonye iCosatu neFedusa, ngokunyuswa kwemali.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: okuthize, ngiyakukholwa lokho ngoba wake wakusho ngesikhathi sisadlala siwina iMTN8. Ngakho, azama ukukusho wukuzama ukushintsha indlela yokucabanga kubadlali ngoba sikholwa wukuthi siqine ngokwanele uma udlalela iChiefs, Pirates noma iSundowns. Kodwa eqinisweni, uma usaphefumula useqophelweni elifanele lokulwa nanoma ngabe yini enyakazayo," kusho uBilankulu. I-Arrows isayinise inqwaba yabafana abasebancane okubalwa kubona abayisithupha abaphuma kwiMidlands Wanderers enyukele kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship noSanele "Figo" Radebe obedlalela iRoyal AM ngesizini edlule. "Sidlala ngejubane. Uma ubheka kubadlali esibasayinisile phambili, kukhona ijubane. Ngakho akukhona ukuthi sinciphisa iminyaka yobudala eqenjini kodwa sidinga ijubane uma siphethe ibhola noma lingekho kithina ngoba uma ucindezela phambili udinga ukudlova nejubane. Yileso isizathu esiholele ekutheni iqembu livumelane ngokusayinisa abadlali abasebancane. Lokho kuzosinika isikhathi esanele sokubaphumuza ngoba isizini izoba yinde nemidlalo eminingi. Ngakho abadlali abasebancane bayashesha ukubuyela esimeni,"kusho uBilankulu. "Sinazo izifiso, sinakho esizibekele khona siyiqembu. Asikho kwiMTN8 okusho ukuthi sizolwela izindebe ezintathu kule sizini. Ngiqinisekile ukuthi sizolwa kahle futhi ngiyafunga ukuthi kukhona esizobuya nakho ekupheleni

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: MK Party/ Facebook AQASHWE ngelokhozi yizinhlaka zokuphepha nezinhloli amamashi athe chithi saka okuzwakalisa ukungenami ngabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho ukuze kungagcini sekuqubuka udlame kuphinde nezibhelu ezenzeka ngo-2021. Lokhu kuvezwe okhulumela uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa izolo, uMnuz Vincent Magwenya, esithangamini nabezindaba eKapa. Uthe uRamaphosa uthola ukwelulekwa cishe njalo ngabezokuphepha ngalawa mamashi. "Aqashwe ngelokhozi ukuthi kungagcini sekuphinda isehlakalo sangoJulayi 2021, lapho kwacekelwa khona impahla kwatatshwa nempahla ezitolo. Kujutshwe abezomthetho ukuthi baqaphe okwenzekayo. Kuqiniswe uphiko lwamaphoyisa aqapha izibhelu kanjalo nezobunhloli kuleli selokhu kwenzeka izibhelu zango-2021 ," kusho uMagwenya. Kwadaleka umonakalo omkhulu emnothweni wezwe kwashona nenqwaba yabantu ngezibhelu zango-2021, ikakhulu KwaZulu-Natal naseGauteng. Muva nje andile amamashi aholwa izishoshovu zomphakathi ezingeneme njengoba izolo eThekwini bekukhona ukhukhulelangoqo wemashi eye nasePhoyinti, okungesinye sesizinda okugcwele kuso abantu bokufika kuleli dolobha. UMagwenya uphinde wachitha eyokuthi abantu bakuleli, banenzondo nabantu bokufika kuleli. "UMengameli ube nezingxoxo nomengameli waseMozambique uMnuz Daniel Chapo, wamqinisekisa ukuthi abantu bakuleli banemfudumalo futhi ababazondi abantu bakwamanye amazwe. Into okumele

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: yami, kepha ngaphokophela ngoba ngangifisa ukuthi ngiphumelele ngemfundo yami. Kuphela ngizwela laba engangichithwe nabo ngalowa nyaka. Iningi labo lagcina lingalitholalanga ithuba elatholwa yimina ngoba nami ngasukuma, ngangafela ngaphakathi,” kusho uNksz Nkwanyana okumanje uqhubeka nemfundo yakhe njengoba esenza i-Advanced Diploma in Public Management and Administration khona e-DUT.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ubehola ubufakazi bukamgilwa, obukanina kanjalo noninakhulu. Nodokotela owaxilonga umgilwa naye ubethulie obakhe ubufakazi. Ngesikhathi uGovender ecindezela eyokuthi umdlwenguli anikwe isigwebo esiqinile ugqamise eyokuthi izigameko zokudlwengulwa kwabantu kule ndawo zithe chithi saka. Wachaza isigameko njengesinokuhlukumeza amalungelo omzimba womuntu okufaka phakathi ukumehlisa isithunzi. Uphinde wethula phambi kwenkantolo isitatimende esibhalwe umgilwa, ngaphansi kweso likaNkk Nokukhanya Mkhize, oyiCourt Preparation Officer, lapho echaza kabanzi ukuthi yamhlukumeza kangakanani indaba yokunukubezwa. Kusona umgilwa uveze ukuthi ulahlekelwe ukubethemba abantu besilisa kanjalo nasebudlelwaneni emva kwesigameko, wathi emva kokwenzeka kwaso, impilo yakhe yavele yashintsha unomphela.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: Itumeleng English LIYALA ukugoba uphondo iqembu iMKP, ehlabela phambili necala lokukhalaza ngemiphumela yokhetho lwango-2024, emva kokuhlangana nezikhulu zeKhomishini yezoKhetho kuleli, i-Independent Electoral Commission (IEC). Ubuholi beMKP buhlangane nezikhulu zale khomishini ngoMsombuluko eNkandla, lapho bekubhungwa ngezinto ezehlukene ezithinta ukhetho. Lo mhlangano ubuholwa umengameli weMKP uMnuz Jacob Zuma, noSihlalo we-IEC uMnuz Mosotho Moepya. Okhulumela iMKP uMnuz Nhlamulo Ndhlela, uthe kulo mhlangano kuxoxwe ngezinto ezehlukene ezithinta ukhetho wathi zombili izinhlangothi zavumelana ukuthi ziphinde zibambe ezinye izingxoxo ngomuso. "Asijiki ekutheni siyaqhubeka necala esalifaka elithinta ukubanjwa inkunzi okhethweni lwango-2024. Okuseqhulwini esikhalaza ngakho ukwebiwa nokukhwatshaniswa kwamavoti, okwenziwa yi-IEC," usho kanje. Uthe bakwenza lokhu ukuvikela abantu bakuleli wathi bafuna izinhlaka ezigqugquzela intando yeningi ukuthi zenze izinto ngokuvuleleka. UMoepya uthe ezinye izinto abazange bafinyelele esivumelwaneni emhlanganweni wathi basazobamba eminye imihlangano neMKP ukuze baqhubeke nezingxoxo. "Asivumelananga ngezinto ezithile, kakade intando yeningi injalo. Sizobuye sihlangane sixoxe ngezinye izinto ezisalile kulo mhlangano," usho kanje. Uthe njengoba bebehlangene neMKP, bebesaqhuba umkhankaso

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: sizathu uthishanhloko ubalalele bengabazali uma bethi awangakhishwa. Uveze ukuthi ngoLwesithathu olwedlule, uMnyango uthumele uchwepheshe okuvele ukuthi ubezowakhipha. “Nokho uthole abazali bengangaye esangweni lesikole, basondela eduze ukuzwa ukuthi uzokwenzani, ngesikhathi engena ngaphakathi,” kusho uNksz Buhlalu, othe ugcine ehamba engawakhiphanga, emva kokubalalela ngokuthi awusizo emuva kokugqekezwa ezinsukwini ezimbalwa ezedlule. Uveze ukuthi ngokwabo isikole sisaqhubeka kahle ngothisha betoho. “Laba abalaxaza ukufundisa izingane zethu, abakabuyi. Basavuka bayovala amahhovisi ezemfundo eTruro. Izingane zethu zisafundiswa yilaba abakhokhelwa abazali. Sibona konke kuhamba kahle ngoba bazifundisa ngisho nangezimpelasonto ukuzama ukubuyisa isikhathi esilahlekile,” usho kanje. Uqhube wathi njengamanje baphezu kwezinhlelo zokucela uMnyango ukuthi usale usubaqasha ngokugcwele ngoba bayithathela phezulu imfundo yezingane zabo. “Laba abakhetha ukuvele bazishiye esithubeni izingane zethu ngenxa yamakhamera ekubeni ekhona ezikoleni zabadla izambane likapondo lapho kufunda khona ezabo, asisabadingi esikoleni sethu,” usho kanje. Kusuke omkhulu umsindo kulesi sikole ngasekupheleni kukaJanuwari, othisha abangu-22 beSadtu belaxaza ukufundisa. Phakathi kwezikhalo zabo, kwakungukuthi bafuna akhishwe amakhamera abefakwe emakilasini. Kwavela ukuthi

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: uma sengivela kaningi ngokuqhubeka komdlalo manje,” kusho yena. UMLINGISI uNhlanhla Kunene uthembisa ukushubisa izinto kwisizini yesibili yeLaw, Love & Betrayal, ezokhonjiswa kuMzansi Magic nakwiShowmax ngenyanga ezayo Eqhuba, uthe nakuba izinselelo zokuphambana kwemibono phakathi kwakhe nodadewabo zizoshukumisa umdlalo, kodwa futhi zizogqamisa okuningi ngenhlalo yemindeni nokuthi ukungezwani emindenini kunamthelela muni empilweni yawo yansuku zonke. Uthe nakuba engeke avele kuzona zonke iziqephu zesizini yesibili, kepha lapho ezobe evela khona kuzobonakala ngombala, futhi yilapho ababukeli bezobona khona ukuthi unezilonda nobuhlungu obungakanani enhliziyweni yakhe. “Uthe: “Engikujabulele kakhulu ngokukhula kwale ndawo engiyilingisayo wukuthi ihluke kakhulu kwengijwayele ukukulingisa, futhi ngikuthokozele nokusebenza eduze noBaba uNimrod Nkosi, ongubaba wami ngokomdlalo - ngoba ungomunye wabalingisi abadala, futhi engibahloniphayo nengikhule ngikhuthazwa yimisebenzi yabo emihle.” Abanye abalingisi abazogqama kwisizini yesibili yeLaw, Love & Betrayal uShannon Esra (Sandra Stein), Sparky Xulu (Sakhile Nxusa), Katlego Lebohang (Bokang Mokgotso) no-Anelisa Phewa (James Makaula).

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Afrika. Uthe uMthethosisekelo, obhalwe ngaphakathi ukuthi iNingizimu Afrika eyawo wonke umuntu ohlala kuyo, ngaphandle ibhalwe ukuthi uMthethosisekelo waseNingizomu Afrika, okusho ukuthi okungaphakathi kukhuluma ngabakuleli. “Lokhu kusho ukuthi ikhuluma ngabantu baseNingizimu Afrika hhayi abantu bakwenye indawo. Abantu abayeke ukuhlanekezela uMthethosisekkelo wethu,” kusho uPhakela. Uqhube wathi bazokulwela ukuthi uMthethosisekelo ukusuka manje kubhekwe phambili uyashintshwa. “Ngeke sivume ukuthi uMalema athi abokufika abangenamaphepha, abenzelwe amaphepha ngoba nakhu yena evikela ibhizinisi lakhe elingaphandle kwezwe esingazi ukuthi lisemthethweni yini njengoba sizwa kuthiwa bakha ugwayi ongekho emthethweni,” kusho uPhakela. Usole uMalema ngokuthi ufike athi abantu abazithathele umhlaba, uma sebekwenzile lokho, kuphinde kuthunyelwe inkampani yakhe yonogadla iyobabhidlizela Uthe njengoba abokufika bezibeka beba amakhosi, yingoba bezwa amanzi ngobhoko. Abebekhaphe uNgizwe, bebehambe becula iculo elithi: “UMalema uyadelela, akashaywanga.”

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Njengezimoto eziningi ezilayisha abagibeli abayisikhombisa, uma izihlalo zime zonke isikhala sokulayisha impahla siba yimbijana. Nokho uma zilele sikhulu futhi ngichazwa wukuthi ungayipaka ihlehla ungaxwayi ukuthi uzolayisha kanjani. Phela ukwazi ukuvula ewindini langemuva ulayishe kodwa uma uthanda uyivula yonke ibhuthi ngebhathini. Ngingakakhohlwa, ebhuthini kunembobo yokufaka i-twin-plug. Uma sibuyela ngaphakathi izihlalo ziyisikhumba esintofontofo. Ezangaphambili uyakwazi ukuziqandisa noma uzifudumeze. Ngemuva uma unqena ukuzishayelela awuphuthwa yilutho ngoba nezakhona ziyafudumala. Amazinga omoya ophuma ngemuva uzihlelela wena, kunezimbobo zokushaja nge-USB futhi yize idimile ngemuva uma uthanda unyusa amakhethini abantu basale bezibuza ukuthi ngabe wubani ophakathi. Ngaphambili kune-touchscreen infotainment system yeMark Levinson enkulu engu-14 inch okulula ukuyisebenzisa. Iveza inkombandlela, uxhuma iselula nge-Apple CarPlay futhi uma userobhothini ikuvezela lonke ingaphandle noma uma upaka. Izipikha zeMark Levinson zikhala kamnandi. Yize amabhathini eyingcosana, okuningi kwenziwa kwi-screen njengokuhlela amazinga okushisa kodwa kusobala ukuthi akuyona into engasusa amehlo akho emgwaqweni. Okunye okwazi ukukushintsha amazinga okushisa, yisiteringi esifudumalayo. Iphinde ibe nendawo yokuqandisa iziphuzo

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Kumele ngigqame nami kule mpi," kusho uKunene. Ithuba elitholwe nguKunene lokulwela ibhande lomhlaba esisindweni seMini-Flyweight liyivela kancane kwazise akekho umshayisibhakela waseKZN owake wawina ngisho ibhande laseMzansi kulesi sisindo. "Leli thuba lifike kahle ngisesimeni esihle nangokomoya, kungekho okungikhathazayo futhi ngisanda kuwina ibhande le-WBF ngoMashi. Ngiyazi ukuthi KwaZulu-Natal akekho umshayisibhakela owake wawina ibhande lomhlaba esisindweni esincane. Ngiyajabula kakhulu ukuthi ngithole leli thuba ngoba ibhande le-IBO yibhande lomhlaba. Leli thuba lizoshintsha impilo yami futhi alehleli noma ngubani. Ngaphezu kwalokho, lizoletha ushintsho eKZN futhi lizongakhela igama emphakathini eDundee. Okukhulu wukuthi ngizoba yisibonelo entsheni yangakithi ukuze ibone ukuthi kuyaphileka ngezemidlalo,"usho kanje. Nakuba uKunene egcwele ukuzeithemba kodwa kumele agawule abheke kuTyirha owawina ibhande le-SA light Flyweight empini yesine eqale isibhakela esikhokhelayo ngo-2018. "Ngiyazi ukuthi bona bazitshela ukuthi bathole ibhokisa elisezingeni eliphansi abazozenzela kulona. Lokho ngeke kwenzeke. Ifulegi leKwaZulu-Natal ngizoliphakamisela phezulu, iDundee ngifuna ukuyibeka phezulu. Ngizokubeka eceleni ukuthi ngikhule ngibukela kuyena. Ayikho inhlonipho engizomnika yona eringini. Ngiyazi

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: engu-205Nm. Le njini eyi-three cylinder futhi ejwayelekile kwezinye izimoto zale nkampani, ino-gearbox oyi-6 speed automatic. Sinqamula ezintabeni nasemajikeni emigwaqo ebheke eHartbeespoort, eNorth West, ibizwakala inamandla enele sihamba sibabili phakathi. Nokudlula ezinye izimoto bekungabi yinto enzima ngoba ibiphendula indlela ebenginyathela ngayo. Ngiyizwe intofontofo ngaphandle komoya wangaphandle obuthanda ukuba nomsinjwana ngaphakathi. KwaCitroën bathi iphephile ngoba bayifake ama-airbag ayisithupha, Electronic Stability Programme (ESP), ayihlehli uma usuka nendaweni enyukelayo, iyasho uma umoya wehla emasondweni, ABS nokunye. Ngaphakathi iCitroën Basalt ine-touchscreen infotainment system engu-10 inch exhume kuyo iselula nye-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto ngaphandle kwentambo KwaCitroën bathi uma ubusezinhlelweni zokuthenga iSuzuki Fronx okanye umzala wayo iToyota Starlet Cross, yima wo ngoba iBasalt yimbangi yazo. Ngendlela abayethemba ngayo ukuthi amakhasimende azoyamukela kahle, babheke ukuthi kuphele unyaka kudayiswe angaphezu kuka-1 300.
