author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: lwakhe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Ngishaywa amahloni okuthi angazi nokuthi ubani osengena ngesikhathi eyengena ngaso. Engibabona benza ukuthi ngingayikhohlwa udu yithimba lohlelo lwasekuseni phakathi nesonto. Ngike ngibone uBongani Mtolo, Sli Langa noGabriel Sithole bezama ukuthi babe sematheni. Ngithanda indlela abamukela ngayo izimenywa zabo ohlelweni. Basuke benengxoxo nesimenywa kube sengathi bakhuluma nomngani hhayi umuntu abazomhlohla imibuzo. Lokho kwenza ingxoxo ibe mnandi ngoba isimenywa siyakhululeka sivuleleke njengoba sike sibone nakuma-podcast. Emasontweni adlule bameme abantu abasemehlweni omphakathi abahlukene njengoDJ Twitty, T’zozo, Bab’Dokotela, Hlomla Dandala nabanye. EkaHlomla bayenza kamnandi ngoba ngaphambi kokuya emoyeni bazikhipha naye beyodla bexoxa kwafikwa emoyeni sekungathi kuzozikhulumela abantu abazanayo. Konke lokhu bakuqopha bakufake kwiYouTube nokuheha wonke umuntu – othanda umsakazo nothanda ama-podcast. Yinto enhle le abayenzayo futhi sengathi bengaqhubeka nayo.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: ezithiya amaciko othi Ikhefu with Mbali Malimela “Ngenkathi ngifaka isicelo sokuxhaswa ngabesikhwama esixhasa imisebenzi yobuciko, iNational Arts Council, nokuyibona ababambe iqhaza elikhulu ekutheni lo mbono uqhubeke manje, ngakuveza ngokusobala ukuthi ngihlose ukusiza kakhulu amaciko esifazane ukuthi athole ithuba lokubhodla nokubhoboka ngezimo ezihlukene eziwahluphayo endimeni. IMBONGI uSindiswa Zulu ingomunye wabazonandisa emcimbini wokubhunga ngezingqinamba ezithiya amaciko othi Ikhefu with Mbali Malimela “Nokho akuzukuphelela lapho futhi njengoba ngifisa nokuthi lo mbono uqhubeke ube wusizo nasebantwini nje emphakathini ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi sibaningi kakhulu esibhekene nezimo ezenza kube lula ukuthi umuntu aphose ithawula empilweni, engithemba ukuthi leli thuba lizokwenza umehluko wokunqanda ukudloba isimo sokudikibala esinaso,” kulandisa yena. UMELULEKI wezengqondo ozimele, uTholinhlanhla Dlamini-Ngcoya, ungesinye sezikhulumi ezizobe zikhona embuthaneni wokubhunga ngezinkinga ezithiya amaciko Kulo mcimbi uMbali uzobe engahambi yedwa, njengoba kuzoba khona ozakwabo kule ndima okubalwa kubona imbongi uSindiswa Zulu, uLuleka Mhlanzi naye obhala futhi ahaye izinkondlo, kube wuDemima Nokusa Buthelezi ozobe enzisa futhi ecebisa izethameli izindlela

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: U-ADEN McCarthy weKaizer Chiefs evimba uThemba Zwane weMamelodi Sundowns emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX IKAIZER Chiefs iqinise ithemba le-Orlando Pirates lokuwina isicoco seligi ibambana neMamelodi Sundowns ngo 1-1 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. IChiefs ibekwe phambili nguFlavio da Silva esiwombeni sokuqala, waphendula uBrayan Leon weSundowns kwesesibili. IChiefs ingene enkundleni izolwela ukubambelela endaweni yesithathu kwi-log ukuze izongena kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, iSundowns ibibheke ukunweba igebe lamaphuzu esicongweni njengoba imiswe kabi yiPirates esisele ngamathathu ekubeni isele nangomdlalo. Ukubamba iSundowns kweChiefs kusize yona kwayisondeza kwiCaf kodwa kuhlomulise kakhulu iPirates esidinga ukuwina imidlalo yayo emithathu, izibeke ethubeni elihle lokuwina isicoco seligi osekuneminyaka siyiphunyuka. Uma iSundowns, enamaphuzu angu-65, iwina imidlalo emibili eyisalele, izogcina inamaphuzu angu-71 okuyisibalo esifanayo iPirates, elandela ngawu-62, engafinyelela kusona uma ingaqoqa amaphuzu ayisishiyagalolunye emidlalweni emithathu yokugcina. Lokhu kusho ukuthi kungagcina kubalwa amagoli ukuze kutholakale umakhonya wesizini ka-2025/2026. Enkundleni iChiefs

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: zibe yingxenye yomcimbi okokuqala. Njengoba sesiqalile ukumemezela izinhlelo lokhu kusho ukuthi akusekho ukubheka emuva, sesiqale sona isikhathi somcimbi wezindondo walo nyaka,” kuchaza uHloni. Uthe ukuphumela kwamanye amazwe kuseyindlela yokukhulisa umcimbi ukuze ungagcini kuleli kuphela. “Sifuna ukukhulisa umcimbi, kungabukeki sengathi owakuleli kuphela, awuvulelekile nakwabanye, kithina ke lokhu kusho ukukhula. Simema ngisho abathandi balo mcimbi kuwona wonke umhlaba ukuthi babe yingxenye yawo ngokuqoka abantu abafuna ukubabona beqhudelana kuwo. Sifuna ukwaziwa emhlabeni nakuzo zonke izindawo esiya kuzona negalelo lethu libonakale,” kusho yena. UXoliswa Nduneni-Ngema ongumphathi weJoburg Theatre, eGauteng, lapho umcimbi ubanjwa khona minyaka yonke uthe kuyabajabulisa ukuba yingxenye yomcimbi walolu hlobo ongasagcini nje kuphela kuleli kodwa osuzokwaziwa i-Afrika yonke. Uthe ukuvuleleka kokuqokwa kwabazoqhudelana kulo nyaka kuyindlela entsha umcimbi ozoba iyona kusukela manje uqhubeke ubungaze impumelelo yomuntu wesifazane emikhakheni ehlukene.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abantu abahlanu abasolwa ngokuzingela obhejane ngokungemthetho ngesikhathi bedubulana namaphoyisa eHluhluwe ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. Amaphoyisa aqoqe lwazi lwezobunhloli ukuthi abasolwa bebehamba emgwaqeni u-R618 bebheke esiqiwini. Kuwo lo mgwaqo kube nesivimbamgwaqo kumiswa futhi kuseshwa izimoto okuthe uma abasolwa befika kule ndawo kwaduma izulu lezandla phakathi kwamaphoyisa nabasolwa. Abasolwa abahlanu badutshulwe bafa, batholakala nesibhamu sokuzingela nesithulisi namavolovolo amabili. Alikho iphoyisa elilimale ngesikhathi sokudubulana.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: kwiMagesi. “Okungenzekanga kwebesikuhlelile wukuqoqa amaphuzu agcwele emdlalweni wokugcina ekhaya kodwa konke okunye kusesemgqeni. “Sikwenze konke obekudingeka ukuqinisekisa ukuthi sijabulisa abalandeli bethu ngamaphuzu agcwele ngempelasonto edlule kodwa kwaphika. “Akukho engikhala ngakho ngaphandle kwesitha esifike sihlelile ukuthi sizovala emuva. “Lokhu kusiphazamisile ekutheni sivale ngamaphuzu agcwele phambi kwabalandeli abasithwale cishe isizini yonke. Kokunye isabambe ngakho. Umsebenzi osihlalele emdlalweni wokugcina siyawazi," kusho uSibisi. “Kasidingi ukutshelwa ngokulindeleke kithina singabadlali ngempelasonto. Ngifisa ukuthi bangadikibali abalandeli ngabakubone emdlalweni odlule ngoba owokusonga isizini uzobe wehlukile. “Ngalokhu kangisho ukuthi sizoya ngobuso kwi-Orbit esaziyo ukuthi kukhona ekulwelayo kepha sizodlalisa okweqembu ebelivele lingadedeli lupho ngesikhathi isizini iqhubeka. “Sizokwenza njengoba besenza isizini yonke sigxile kwesihlele ukukwenza bese sibheka amaphutha esitha ukuthi singawenza kanjani ukuthi asebenzele thina." UBhodlela (30) unethuba lokuhamba ezinyathelweni zokaputeni abanomlando wokuphakamisa inkomishi ehamba nesicoco seligi njengoJohn Moeti ongasekho owakwenza ngesizini ka-1993-1994, Mbulelo “OJ” Mabizela (2002-2003) noLucky “Phinda Mzala” Lekgwathi okunguyena owagcina ngo-2020-2011 nango-2011-2012. UMabizela wayeneminyaka engu-22 ubudala ngesikhathi equkula

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UKEALEBOGA Masango osengene emculweni emuva kokufakwa ugqozi umnewabo UMLINGISI onguBuhle Thabethe kwiGenesis noBuhle Kunene kwiYoungins, uKealeboga Masango, useveze ikhono abengaziwa ngalo. UKealeboga (22) waseMlaza ukhiphe izingoma eseziqalile ukuchaza abantu abaningi. Le ntokazi izibule ngomucu osihloko sithi Never Show Me Off yalandela nge-EP ethi A Love That Made Me Hate You. "Ngijabule kodwa nginovadlwana." Uthe umculo yinto ebisondele kakhulu enhliziyweni yakhe isikhathi eside. "Ngizizwa ngibusisekile ngokuthi lesi sikhathi sigcine sifikile ukuba ngabelane nani ngawo." Ucashunwe ethi wafakwa ugqozi nofuqufuqu lokucula ngumfowabo obedlala yonke inhlobo yomculo. Uthe umnewabo owamsondeza kuzo zonke izinhlobo zomculo. Eqhuba uKealeboga uthe kumthathe iminyaka engaphezu kweyisithupha ezama ukuveza leli khono njengoba izingoma eqale ukuzibhala kusukela ngo-2020. Uveze ukuthi izingoma eziqukethwe kuleli cwecwe zigxile ezehlakalweni adlule kuzo, okubalwa kuzo ubuhlungu, uthando nokuxakeka. Uthe selokhu lo msebenzi uphumile, abantu bawamukele ngezandla ezifudumele. UKealeboga uqale ekulingiseni okukhokhelayo eseneminyaka engu-16 ngesikhathi elingisa indawo kaZinhle Ngobese emdlalweni owawusakazwa kwi-e.tv iRhythm City kusukela ngo-2019.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ABANYE babadlali beMamelodi Sundowns abamfakela itwetwe umqeqeshi we-Esperance Sportive de Tunis, uPatrice Beaumelle, UMQEQESHI we-Esperance Sportive de Tunis, uPatrice Beaumelle, ukufanise nokushukana neqembu lesizwe ukudlala neMamelodi Sundowns ababanga nayo indawo emdlalweni wamanqamu weCAF Champions League. Lo mqeqeshi waseFrance ukusho lokhu kwabezindaba sakwamukela ukuthi iSundowns ikhombisa izimpawu zokungabambeki kulo mqhudelwano kule sizini. Ngempelasonto edlule, iSundowns inqobe okokuqala eRandes, eTunisia, lapho iwine khona ngo 1-0 emdlalweni womlenze wokuqala walo mdlalo ozokhipha iqembu elizodlulela kowamanqamu. I-Esperance enomlando wokukhipha iSundowns esigabeni esifanayo kumasizini amabili adlule, inethuba lokulungisa iphutha langeledlule emdlalweni womlenze wesibili ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. UBeaumelle uchaze iSundowns njengeqembu elingadlisela ogageni amaqembu esizwe amaningi yingakho kulukhuni satshe ukubhekana nayo. “Abadlali bami bebedonswe ngendlebe ukuthi bangalokothi bazame ukuxina unozinti weSundowns (uRonwen Williams) uma eqala ibhola ngoba ubungozi baleli qembu obukhulu buqala kuyena,” kusho uBeaumelle. “Angazi ukuthi bakhohlwe kanjani abadlali bami bakwenza lokhu ihlandla elilodwa kodwa futhi kulapho iSundowns ethole khona igoli.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: KUNTWELA ezansi ngezikhalazo zabasebenzi bakahulumeni abafuna ukuvunyelwa ukuthi bajoyine noma iyiphi i-medical aid kuleli, bangaphoqwa ukuba yingxenye yeGovernment Employees Medical Scheme (GEMS) kuphela ukuze baxhaswe. Isikhalazo sabo sizobhungwa ezingeni likahulumeni, njengoba abaholi bezinyunyana zabasebenzi bekhalaze kwiPhini likaMengameli wezwe, uMnuz Paul Mashatile izolo, ngokubiza kuka-GEMS, ngesikhathi evula umhlangano weNational Economic Development and Labour Council (NEDLAC), ePitoli. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi izinyunyana zamashela i-GEMS, zikhala ngokunyuswa kwemali ngo-9.5% kulo nyaka. Izinyunyana zifuna kwehliswe imali, kubuyekezwe kabusha ibhodi le-GEMS kuphinde kwenziwe uphenyo ngokusebenza kwemali kulesi sikhwama. "Abaholi bathe angiyithinte eyokunyuswa kwemali yi-GEMS. Asikayixoxi futhi asikasithathi isinqumo mayelana nodaba lwe-GEMS, lokuthi sivumele abasebenzi ukuthi bazikhethele. Bakhalile ngokuthi abasebenzi abasakwazi ukumelana nokunyuka kwemali yi-GEMS yingakho befuna ukuzikhethela," kusho uMashatile. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi abasebenzi uma bengewona amalungu ka-GEMS abalutholi uxhaso kuhulumeni njengoba lesi sikhwama sasungulelwa ukubahlinzeka ngosizo lwezempilo olungambi eqolo. Iningi labasebenzi lifuna ukuvunyelwa ukujoyina ezinye izinkampani zama-medical aids kuleli kodwa baqhubeke nokuxhaswa nguhulumeni, njengoba enza ku-GEMS. Uthe abamile

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Ku-Super Era kuboshelwe i-JVW FC, University of Fort Hare, Tshwane University of Technology (TUT), Richmond United Ladies, City Lads FC, First Touch Ladies neRamatlaohle FC. Le ligi kazwelonke yebhola labesifazane okuyiyona enkulu eNingizimu Afrika nephakela ngabadlali iqembu lesizwe lakuleli, iBanyana Banyana, yasungulwa ngo-2019 ngamaqembu angu-12. Amaqembu azodla umhlanganiso ku-Super Rise no-Super Era azodlala amaPlay-Offs okuhlunga iqembu elingompetha bakazwelonke beSuper League ekupheleni kwesizini ngoNovemba. Oyisikhulu esiphezulu kwiSafa, uLydia Monyepao, uthe lezi zinguquko kuhloswe ngazo ukwenza ibhola labesifazane ligqame liphinde limaketheke. “Amaqembu akuGroup A awezukuba nalo ithuba lokudlala namaqembu kaGroup B kuze kube sekupheleni kwesizini sekudlala ama-Play Off,” kusho uMonyepao izolo, kwethulwa iHollywoodbets Super League. “Sizokwenyusa izinga lokubukwa kwemidlalo ngokuba nemidlalo nama-festival (imidlalo edlalwa ngosuku olulodwa enkundleni eyodwa). Lokhu okusho ukuthi uma ukhuluma ngesibalo sezibukeli ezihambela imidlalo yebhola labesifazane, sizobona izibukeli eziningi, ezinye ezizobe zibuka kumabonakude. Lokho kuzonika bonke abadlali ithuba lokubonakala kumabonakude.”

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Amaphoyisa aseFree State Unit ayaqhubeka nokuphenya ngesigameko sokudubula esenzeke ngoLwesine, 14 May 2026, ku-R76 phakathi kwe-Tweeling ne-Reitz. Lesi sigameko siholele ekutheni kushone abantu abane kwathi oyedwa walimala kanzima. Abashonile bahlonzwe kahle yizihlobo zabo okunguLekiba Likhetho (24), Rebone Moeketsi (26), Pule Latela (32) noTshepang Cecilia Letsoha (27). Bonke abashonile badabuka ezweni laseLesotho. Isisulu esisindile sisalashwa esibhedlela ngenxa yokulimala kabi. Akekho osaboshiwe okwamanje, uphenyo lusaqhubeka. Amaphoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika anxusa noma yiliphi ilungu lomphakathi elizibonele kwenzeka lesi sigameko noma ongaba nolwazi olungasiza uphenyo ukuthi athinte uKaputeni Sandile Dladla ku-073 226 6788 noma 082 466 8530. Ulwazi ungaluthumela ngokungaziwa ku-#CrimeStop ku-08600 10111App noma ku-#MySAPSApp.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: ezikoleni ezweni, lokho kufakazelwa wukuthi ngokomthetho, kumele ngabe amagumbi okufundela aba nezingane eziwu-35 igumbi ngalinye, kepha kwezinye izikole kuba nabafundi abawu-60, ngisho nangaphezulu." Uthe:“Konke lokho kuwuphawu lokuthi inkulu kakhulu inkinga ekhona, kangangokuthi kwezinye izikole kuyenzeka ukuthi kube nothisha abaze baphoqeleke ukufundisa izifundo abangaqeqeshelwe ukuzifundisa ngenxa yokungabi namali kukahulumeni.” Eqhuba, uthe ocwaningweni olwenziwe yiStellenbosch University ngo-2022 kuya ku-2024, kwavela ukuthi enye futhi inkinga ekhona wukuthi kunenqwaba yabantu abaqeqeshelwe umkhakha wobuthishela, kodwa bagabe ngezifundo ezingasadingeki kangako ezikoleni. “Nokuthi futhi kunenkinga yothisha abaqeqeshelwe ukufundisa izifundo zasemabangeni aphezulu ekubeni kube kusobala ukuthi othisha abadingeka kakhulu abazofundisa emabangeni aphansi, okubonakala abantu abaningi bekushalazela lokho,” kusho uMyende. Udalule nokuthi izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme, kumele zibuyekeze indlela ezihlele ngayo izifundo zobuthishela, zingabe zisaxutshwa ngendlela eyenza ukuthi ngisho umuntu esefunde wagogoda kepha kube lukhuni satshe ukuthola umsebenzi ngesicucu sakhe. “Akukhuthazwe izingane ukukhetha imikhakha efanele, nezozisiza ukukwazi ukuziphilisa nokuba wusizo ezidingweni zesikhathi esiphila kusona manje. Akungabi lula ukuthi umuntu avele

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKOSIKHONA Ndabandaba owaziwa ngelikaPhakel'umthakathi uzovela eNkantolo KwaNongoma namhlanje ngecala alivulelwe ngowokufika USAZIWAYO ongaconsi phansi ebantwini abakhonze isintu, uNkosikhona Ndabandaba owaziwa ngelikaPhakel’umthakathi, usedalule ukuthi ukwenze ngabomu ukuthukusa izindaba zecala avulelwe lona. UPhakel’umthakathi usho kanje ekhuluma neSolezwe ngombhalo awunameke ekhasini lakhe likaFacebook izolo, lapho eveze khona ukuthi namhlanje uzovela eNkantolo yaKwaNongoma ngecala alivulelwe wumuntu wokufika, lokuthi angasondeli eduze kwakhe. Uthe sekuphele amasonto amathathu manje azi ngalolu daba njengoba waziswa ngalo maphakathi nenyanga edlule, ngesikhathi kufika abakwasidlodlo kuyena bezomazisa ukuthi kunomuntu othile ongowokufika kuleli zwe, omvulele leli cala elinamhlanje. “Nokho okwangidida kakhulu wukuthi kungani amaphoyisa engafikanga qathatha nalowo muntu kimina ukuze ngimbone ukuthi ungubani, kwase kungidida nokuthi kungani bala baphetha ukungichazela ukuthi wubani lowo muntu ngoba phela ecaleni elinjena, kuvame ukuthi kube kanjalo,” usho kanje. Uthe nokho uzonikela enkantolo ukuyozizwela mathupha ukuthi cala lini abekwe lona, nokuthi wubani omvulele lona. “Kodwa futhi ngiyakuqinisekisa ukuthi akuzukuba bikho dlame oluzophazamisa ukusebenza komthetho futhi nginxusa ukuthi

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: abasohlangothini lwabo bavume ukudlala abantu abakolunye uhlangothi. "Nina nibaningi oLundi, bona bancane. Kumele engabe nibancisha umoya wokuphefumula. Bashayeni emhlanganweni ngoba bancane." Uqhuba athi bekufanele kusuke umuntu ohambisana nabo afike aqhumise impama emhlanganweni okuvinjwe kuwo umholi osohlangothini lwabo. "Bekufanele kufike kuthiwe doti muni lona owenzeka lana? Kuqhume impama kuqhume isibhakela, nibafokofise." Owesifazane uzwakala ethi kade ayethengelwa izikibha ezinobuso bomuntu ambiza ngalo baba. Kukholakala ukuthi izikibha azishoyo zinobuso bukaHlabisa. Owesifazane uzwakala ethi akasoze azigqoke. Akukhona okokuqala uMaphisa engena obishini ngenkulumo eqoshiwe. Ngesikhathi eseyimeya kuMasipala waseBaQulusini wadilizwa emva kokuba kusabalale inkulumo eqoshiwe enamagama alumelayo. Imizamo yokuthola ukuphawula kukaMaphisa ayizange iphumelele njengoba ucingo lwakhe belukhala lungabanjwa futhi engazange awuphendule umbuzo awuthunyelelwe. Umholi we-IFP ocele ukuba igama lakhe lingadalulwa unxuse ubuholi be-IFP ukuba buthathele uMaphisa izinyathelo zokuqondiswa ubugwegwe. "Yini eyenza ukuthi abantu abadelela kangaka bangathathelwa izinyathelo? Abantu bakhuluma umathanda nje. Yihlazo leli. Inkulumo yakhe ayakhi futhi ihlukanisa iqembu phakathi. Ukhuluma indaba yokuthi obani basaba obani.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UTOYA Delazy enomkhulu wakhe uMntwana waKwaPhindangene ngo-2019 KUSINDA kwehlela kumzukulu woMntwana waKwaPhindangene futhi ongumsunguli weNkatha Freedom Party, uNontokozo "Toya Delazy" Buthelezi, njengoba esecela inkongozelo kubantu bakuleli ukuze abuyele ekhaya. Kushaqeke abaningi ngesikhathi lo mculi wodumo lwengoma ethi Pump It Up ethi uswele imali yokuyokhangisa ngecwecwe lakhe elizayo kwiPodcast and Chill with MacG. "Ngimenywe kwiPodcast & Chill manje inkinga wukuthi ngiphesheya kwezilwandle futhi iKerosene imba eqolo ngenxa yempi (ngiya kanye onyakeni ekhaya) - ningakwazi ukungixhasa ngemali yebhanoyi?" Uthe ubezokwenza le ngxoxo ngosizo lwezinkundla zokuxhumana kodwa akufani nokuba se-studio. "Nikwenzile kuJacinta ukuxosha abadayisa emgwaqweni. Ngifuna ukuxosha abacindezeli kule ndima yethu. Benza izinto ezibulale amaciko amaningi avelele." Nakuba kunjalo i-EP iyaphuma ngoMeyi 20. "Ngizimele futhi ngitshala imali kimi ngqo. Ngihlala kude ngoba ngavalwa kodwa ngizophinde ngizame. NgiwuToya Delazy futhi ngake ngaba wumculi omkhulu e-Afrika. Manje ngiwumculi ongaqondakali e-Afrika." Yize uToya Delazy abelindele ukuthola uxhaso kodwa bavele bamtinyela, bethi akasebenzise imali yefa likamkhulu wakhe.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: Amagoli oSuthu ashaywe nguThapelo Matlhoko noNkosikhona Radebe, aweBabina Noko ashaywa ngu-Olerato Mandi noBright Ndlovu. Le miphumela ishiye iChiefs endaweni yesithathu ngamaphuzu angu-39 emidlalweni engu-21, Usuthu lusendaweni yesine ngamaphuzu angu-38 emidlalweni engu-23 neSekhukhune kweyesihlanu ngamaphuzu angu-35 emidlalweni engu-23. I-Orbit isasengozini yokugawulwa yizembe kwazise isendaweni ka-15 ngamaphuzu angu-18 emidlalweni engu-23. Iyishiya ngamaphuzu amane iMagesi FC esemsileni, ekubeni leli qembu laseLimpopo lisadlale imidlalo engu-21.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: sizobe sikhona bese sibuya nombiko ogcwele ngayo. Ngesikhathi isalindiwe, kwaToyota benze okuvame ukwenziwa ngamakholwa, okuwukulinda uMfundisi ngeculo. Iculo kulokhu yiLegend 55 okuyiyona ndlela kwaToyota abavalelisa ngayo iHilux eqale ukudayisa kuleli ngo-2016. Kusuka ngo-2004, kwaToyota bakha iHilux yokugubha iminyaka engu-35 bayibiza ngeLegend 35. Abaphindanga babheka emuva ngoba balokhu benza amanye amaLegend okuyi-40, 45, 50 njengoba beku-55 nje. Benze isiqiniseko sokuthi ungadideki nakancane ukuthi yiyo ngokuyiqopha igama layo ezindaweni eziningi. Ulithola ezicabheni ngaphambili, kwi-styling bar esihlukile kunamanye amaHilux nangemuva esikhenkeni. Ngingakangeni phakathi, khona ngaphandle, ukuze yehluke kwezinye bayenze yacwebezela kwi-grille, ezibukweni nasezimbanjeni zezicabha. Yize iToyota Hilux ngaphakathi ibukeka indala kunezimbangi kodwa yakhiwe yaqina ukuze ihlale iminyaka Amarimu angu-18 inch bese kuthi esikhenkeni kube nerabha ukuze sivikeleke uma ulayishe impahla engase iklwebhe. Ngiyakuthanda ukuthi uyakwazi ukusikhiya isikhenke impahla ivikeleke ngaphakathi njengoba kune-roller shutter kodwa engasebenzi ngogesi. Uma usungena ngaphakathi awusoze ukhohlwe ukuthi uhamba ngani ngoba nakhona iqoshwe ezindaweni eziningi uLegend 55. Ngaphakathi futhi

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ABE-Democratic Alliance (DA) bafuna ukuthi iyobhungwa ephalamende eyezingane ezikhulelwayo ezikoleni Image: JENNIFER BRUCE I-DA ifuna kubizwe umhlangano ophuthumayo ohlanganisa iminyango ehlukene kahulumeni, okubalwa nezinhlaka zokuphepha nezokushushiswa komphakathi, ukuze kubhungwe ngesihlava sokukhulelwa kwezingane kuleli. Leli qembu libhalele uSihlalo wekomiti labesiFazane, iNtsha nabaPhila nokuKhubazeka ePhalamende, ukuze abize umhlangano ofaka iminyango ehlukene okubalwa oweMfundo eyisiSekelo, owezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi, owezeMpilo, amaphoyisa kanjalo nophiko lwezokuShushisa kuleli, iNational Prosecuting Authority. Okhulumela i-DA eMnyangweni wezabesiFazane, iNtsha nabaPhila nokuKhubazeka, uNksz Angel Khanyile, uthe bakhathazekile ngesihlava sokukhulelwa kwezingane. Uthe ziyashaqisa izibalo zezingane ezikhulelwe KwaZulu-Natal, onyakenimali u-2025/26. "Izibalo ziveza ukuthi zingu-421 izingane ezineminyaka engu-10 kuya ku-14 ezikhuleliwe esifundazweni onyakenimali u-2025/2026. Lokhu kusho ukuthi izingane ezintathu zikhulelwa ezinsukwini ezimbili," kusho uNksz Khanyile. Uthe lezi zibalo zikhomba ukuhlukunyezwa kwezingane kuleli. "Kulo mhlangano kumele yonke iminyango iveze iqhaza layo ekulweni nalesi sihlava. Kudingeka kube nokubambisana kweminyango ukuze kulandelelwe amacala asuke ebikiwe agcina egweba abathintekayo." Uthe umthetho ucacile ukuthi ingane eneminyaka engu-12 ayikwazi ukuvuma ukuya

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: Biyela, ekhumbula ubunzima adlule kubo empilweni ngenkathi ethweswa iziqu zobuthishela e-UKZN Eqhuba, uthe okunye okwafana nokuthela usawoti esilondeni wukuthi ukhulele ekhaya ebelingamile kahle emalini, kangangokuthi kwesinye isikhathi ubeya esikoleni engadlile. “Impilo ibe nzima ngokuphindiwe sengifeyila u-matric, okwenza ngazizwa ngiyisahluleki futhi kwenza ukuthi ngiqale nokukholwa yizinto ezimbi ezazishiwo abantu ngami. Konke lokho kwacishe kwaqeda nya ngempilo yami,” kusho uNksz Biyela. Uthe emva kwalokho wahlala ekhaya iminyaka embalwa, esakhulisa umntwana futhi ezama nokukhokha umoya. Wagcina ebuyele esikoleni waze waphasa u-matric ayesewenza okwesibili ngo-2020. Lokho kwamsiza ukuqhubeka nemfundo yakhe enyuvesi. Nalapho bekungelula neze njengoba bekumele ukuthi abhekane nomthwalo wokufunda, ebe ekhulisa umntwana. Ukubhimba kwemali kwakungamnike thuba kodwa waphokophela ngoba efisa ukusebenzisa imfundo ukucaba indlela yekusasa elihle. “Ngifuna ukuthi izingane zami zikhule zazi ukuthi noma ngabe kunzima kangakanani empilweni yakho, kepha akumele ukuthi uphonse ithawula - futhi ngifuna nokukhombisa abantu ukuthi ukuzala usemncane akukuhle kodwa akukuvimbi ukufeza amaphupho akho,” usho kanje.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: sebezithathile izinqumo ngekusasa labo. Kulaba badlali kukhona uSibongiseni "Ox" Mthethwa oyibamba enkabeni yenkundla, Dillan Solomons, Pule Mmodi, Gaston Sirino noTashreeq Morris, UBrandon Petersen kunamahlebezi okuthi usegixabezwe ngenye inkontileka. Kuvele ukuthi uNkosingiphile Ngcobo, Glody Lilepo noReeve Frosler banikezwe ezinye izinkontileka ezizophela ngo-2027. Nakuba iChiefs yenze kahle kule sizini kodwa kungabe izigwaza ngowayo uma ingazitshela ukuthi akusekho ekudlalelayo kwazise aMaZulu afuna ukuqinisekisa ukuthi awasuki endaweni yesine kwi-log ukuze kufezeke isifiso sikamengameli wawo, uSandile Zungu. UNgcobo uthe balindele umdlalo onzima eMabhida. "Senza okujwayelekile ukulungiselela umdlalo, sicija neqhinga lethu nabaqeqeshi. Kufanele sisebenze kanzima ngoba ngeke kube wumdlalo olula. Siyazi ukuthi AmaZulu angaba yingozi kangakanani njengoba ephekwa ngumqeqeshi u-Arthur (Zwane). Ngakho silindele umdlalo onzima futhi sikulungele ukulwela ukuwina," kusho uNgcobo kwi-website yeChiefs. Nakuba Amakhosi ezoqeda isizini engawinanga neyokubika indebe, okubalwa iNedbank Cup ebiyivikela, kodwa akubuzwa ukuthi abalandeli banelisekile ngokubuyela kweqembu labo kwiCaf. Ngesizini edlule, iChiefs izibekisele indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngokunqoba iNedbank Cup. "Kumnandi ukwazi

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Offences Unit (FCS) Estcourt, basebenza ngokuzikhandla ukuze baqinisekise ukuthi uKhumalo unikezwa isigwebo esinzima. Uthe lokhu bakwenze ukukhombisa ukuthi ezobulungiswa ziyazinikela ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi abesifazane nezingane abangenamandla okuzivikela, umthetho uyabavikela. “Abenzi bobubi bayajeziswa ngezenzo zabo. Lesi sigwebo sizothumela umyalezo oqinile wokuthi ukuhlukumeza ngokobulili kanjalo nobugebengu obunodlame ngeke kubekezelelwe,” usho kanje.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ahlonishwe ngomngcwabo kahulumeni. "Siyafisa ukuthi uNdunankulu waseKZN, akuhloniphe ukufihlwa kwakhe kube nesithunzi abekwe ngokusezingeni lesifundazwe," kubeka uT'zozo. Okhulumela uNdunankulu,uThami Ntuli, uMnuz Bongani Gina, uthe umndeni kumele ubhalele ihhovisi likandunankulu incwadi, ubeke ukuthi ungajabula uma ehlonishwa ngomngcwabo kahulumeni ngenxa yamava akhe. "UNdunankulu uzobe esethatha incwadi abhalele umengameli wezwe asho ukuthi njengeKZN silahlekelwe yingqalabutho ekanje futhi nathi njengesifundazwe sibona kufanele ukuthi ihlonishwe ngomngcwabo kahulumeni," kusho uGina. Okhulumela iMambazo, uXolani Majozi, uthe bazolinda uMphathiswa wezobuCiko namaSiko KwaZulu-Natal uMnuz Mntomuhle Khawula, ukuthi ahlanganise amehlo nomndeni kusasa bese bethola umhlahlandlela. "Okwamanje ayikho inkulumo enjalo esike yavela ngoba besilinde kufike umphathiswa, mhlawumbe kube wuye ophakamisayo ngokubona kwakhe," kusho uMajozi. UMajozi ubuye waqinisekisa ukuthi usuku lomngcwabo kuzoba wu-Ephreli 18, lapho edabuka khona e-Estcourt. Uthe indawo isazoqinisekiswa. Uphinde wachaza nangegama lokuqala likaMazibuko, okunguMdletshe. "Empeleni igama lakhe wuMudliwetshe kodwa kwathi uma eya eMnyangweni wezaseKhaya kwathiwa ayikho into enjalo, unguMdletshe." Uphethe ngokubonga imiyalezo yenduduzo elokhu ingena ilakanyana. "Iyasiduduza kakhulu imiyalezo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: elingalazi eMnyangweni ngodaba lwamakhamera, lase linquma ukuthi angakhishwa. Lokhu kusijabulisile ngoba yikho ebesikufuna futhi nabazali bajabule kakhulu ngoba bebevele belwela ukuthi angakhishwa,” usho kanje. Uthe selokhu luqalile ukukhulunywa nokususa umsindo olwamakhamera, bebelokhu bemile kwelithi awangakhishwa ngoba awusizo kubafundi nothisha kulesi sikole, okuthiwa sinenkinga yokungenelwa yizigebengu mihla namalanga. Uthe abanalo ulwazi lokuthi kuzokwenzekani ngenqwaba yothisha beSadtu abalaxaza ukufundisa. Labo thisha bafunga bagomela ukuthi ngeke babuye ukuzofundisa uma amakhamera engakakhishwa. “Asazi ke ukuthi bazokwenzenjani njengoba isinqumile inkantolo ukuthi awangakhishwa amakhamera,” usho kanje. Ubasole ngokuthi uma babenganeme ngamakhamera afakwe emakilasini, kwakufanele bakhulume nenyunyana yabo ingenelele, bangashiyi abafundi esithubeni. Uthe abakuthola kubazali abasadiniwe namanje, ukuthi abasabafuni ngisho bangashintsha umqondo bathi bayabuya, wathi kusukela balaxaza ukufundisa labo thisha bathola abetoho abakhokhelwa yibo, kusaqhubeka bona. “Esesikufisa ukuthi uMnyango ungenelele ekutheni kuqashwe ngokugcwele labo thisha ababambile njengamanje,” usho kanje. Kulesi sikole kugcine kumiswa uthishanhloko, uMnuz Ntokozo Ngobese, izinyanga ezintathu. Nakuba uMnyango ugcizelele eyokuthi ummisele ukungaziphathi kahle emsebenzini,

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: emagumbini okufundela kusuka ekuseni kuze kuyoshona ilanga. ELINYE lamagumbi okufundela aseKhulani Junior Primary, eMaphephetheni okukhalwa ngokuthi aminyene abafundi bagcwele ngokweqile “Kuyethusa nokuthi ngisho uthishomkhulu imbala akanalo ihhovisi lakhe, okuphoqa ukuthi asebenzise indlu kanogada engasesangweni lesikole ukwenza eminye imisebenzi yakhe yansuku zonke. Konke lokhu kuyasikhathaza kakhulu siwumphakathi, futhi nabo othisha akubagculisi ukusebenzela esimeni esinjena ikakhulu ngoba sekukaningi lolu daba lubikwa eMnyangweni wezeMfundo esifundazweni kepha awukho umehluko,” kulanda umthombo. Kubikwe nokuthi ngisho noma kunemihlangano yabazali, kuphoqeleka ukuthi uthishomkhulu afake itende elizokwanela bonke abazali ngenxa yokuthi amagumbi esikole ngeke abamumathe bonke njengoba lingekho futhi ihholo lokubhekela izinhlelo ezinjalo. “Yisimo esibi nesingabekezeleleki, esifisa ukuthi kube khona okwenzekayo ngaso ngoba lesi sikole siwusizo kakhulu emphakathini ngoba sakhiwe eduze nomphakathi futhi senza ukuthi kube lula ebantwini ukufaka izingane zabo zifunde kusona,” usho kanje. Umthombo ukhale nangokuthi sekuyisikhathi eside kakhulu behlalele ethembeni lokuthi izinto zizolunga, njengoba sekuke kwenzeka kaningana phambilini ukuthi kufike abantu abasuke bezohlola isimo, bathembise

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: noReeve Frosler, Zitha Kwinika noDillan Solomons badlala kwembalwa baphinde bangabonakali ngenxa yakho belu ukuthinteka. UMiguel no-Aden McCarthy, abajwayele ukudlala ndawonye, bakwabahamba phambili kwiChiefs ngokuwola amakhadi aphuzi kule sizini. Nakuba iChiefs ibalwa namaqembu angawadedeli kalula amagoli kodwa uBen Youssef uveze ukuthi banenkinga yabadlali basemuva abahlale bengekho. “Njengoba sesiqedile ne-Orbit emqondweni wethu sekuduma ukuthi ukuthi sizosimisa kanjani isikimu somdlalo olandelayo neTS Galaxy,” kusho uBen Youssef kwabezindaba. “Izinkinga zethu ziqala ngokungabinaso isikimu esaziwayo ikakhulukazi emuva. Imbangela yalokhu wukuthi imidlalo yethu cishe yonke iphela sekukhona umdlali wasemuva olimele kumbe osethole ikhadi elimkhipha kolandelayo. “Lokhu sekuze kwasiqhatha nabalandeli abasisola ngokusishintsha njalo isikimu ikakhulukazi kubadlali basemuva. Kusukela kuqale isizini iChiefs idlala ngaphandle kwesinye sezitobha zayo ezingcono uRushwin (Dortley) ngenxa yakho belu ukulimala. “Ngaphezulu kwalokhu, kwiChiefs kuhlale kukhona umdlali wasemuva okufanele eqiwe yijezi cishe masonto onke ngenxa yezigwebo zamakhadi. Sizama ngakho konke okusemandleni ukusigwema lesi simo esisihlupha ezitobheni kodwa silokhu sisilandele njalo. “Isifiso sethu wukuba nesikimu esiqondile

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abantu ababili okusolwa ukuthi yizigebengu ebezihlomile ngesikhathi bedubulana namaphoyisa eSydenham ngoLwesine ntambama. Amaphoyisa azibonele isigameko sokugetshengwa kuBurnwood Road lapho abasolwa abathathu, abebeshayela iKia sedan emhlophe, bebegebenga owesilisa impahla yakhe. Abasolwa asukume abona ukuthi kukhona amaphoyisa, bashaya bachitha ngemoto. Ngesikhathi abasolwa bebaleka, omoto yabo ishayisane netekisi base beyishiya. Babaleke ngezinyawo bedubula bebhekise emaphoyiseni, kwadutshulwana. Abasolwa ababili badutshulwe balimala kabi, oyedwa waboshwa. Uzobhekana necala lokubamba inkunzi ehlomile nelokuzama ukubulala emaphoyiseni. Alikho iphoyisa elilimale ngesikhathi sokudubulana.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMDUDUZI Shabalala ejabulela igoli alishaye ngesikhathi benqoba i-Orbit College FC ngo 3-1 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership. I-KAIZER Chiefs iphilise iphupho layo lokubuyela kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngokubuya seliyoshona, inqoba ngembudlu kwi-Orbit College FC emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngoMsombuluko ntambama, eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha. Ngale wini, iChiefs eyithole kade ilandela emuva, ilishiye liphila iphupho layo lokubuyela emidlalweni yase-Afrika, njengoba ebeshilo omunye wamabamba abaqeqeshi bayo, uKhalil Ben Youssef, ngaphambi komdlalo. Inkundla ivulwe ngegoli nguMbulelo Wagaba ngomzuzu ka-22 ngaphambi kokulinganisa kukaWandile Duba ngoka-42. Amaketango eChiefs aze aqaqeka ngomzuzu ka-68, lapho uMduduzi Shabalala eyibeke khona ebuhleni ngegoli athe angalishaya wakhishwa. UNdlovu ushaye elesithathu akhelwa nguFlavio Da Silva abebesanda kungena naye. Komunye umdlalo weBetway Premiership obusePrincess Magogo Stadium, KwaMashu, AmaZulu FC neSekhukhune United badlale ngokulingana ngo 2-2. Amagoli oSuthu ashaywe nguThapelo Matlhoko noNkosikhona Radebe, aweBabina Noko ashaywa ngu-Olerato Mandi noBright Ndlovu. Le miphumela ishiye iChiefs endaweni yesithathu ngamaphuzu angu-39 emidlalweni engu-21, Usuthu lusendaweni yesine ngamaphuzu angu-38 emidlalweni

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: ukufaka izingane zabo zifunde kusona,” usho kanje. Umthombo ukhale nangokuthi sekuyisikhathi eside kakhulu behlalele ethembeni lokuthi izinto zizolunga, njengoba sekuke kwenzeka kaningana phambilini ukuthi kufike abantu abasuke bezohlola isimo, bathembise ukubuya bezolungisa kodwa bangabe besabuya. Kuthintwa uNkk Nokukhanya Makhoba wakhona kule ndawo, noke waba sesigungwini esilawula ukusebenza kwesikole iminyaka engaphezu kwewu-10, uvumile ukuthi isimo sesikole siya ngokuya siba sibi kakhulu ikakhulu ngenxa yokuthi minyaka yonke kwanda abafundi abazofunda kusona, okusho ukwanda komthwalo nengcindezi kothisha. “Sifisa ukuthi okungenani kutholakale amagumbi okufundela angomahambanendlwana ukuze kuphunguke umthwalo kothisha abanomthwalo wokufundisa inqwaba yezingane eziminyene endaweni eyodwa. Kanti kwalokho kukodwa nje kuyisimo esingaba yingozi empilweni yezingane ukuthi zibuthane endaweni ongakwazi nokuphefumula kahle kuyona ikakhulu njengoba nelanga lishisa kangaka kulezi zinsuku,” kusho uNkk Makhoba. Isolezwe lizame kaningi ukuxhumana nokhulumela uMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Muzi Mahlambi, kepha ucingo lwakhe belungabanjwa kwaze kwaphela cishe izinsuku ezine engayiphenduli imiyalezo abethunyelelwe yona kwi-WhatsApp yakhe, ekubeni kubonakala ukuthi uyifundile.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: okumele sisiqinise," kusho uHlomuka. Uthe bafuna ukuphucula nemiphumela ka-matric ukuze isifundazwe silokhu siqhubeka nokwenza kahle. UHlomuka uthe bafuqa nezifundo zobuchwepheshe okubalwa i-Coding and Robotics. "Ngalezi zifundo silungiselela abafundi kwezithinta ubuchwepheshe. Kunesidingo sokuthi izifundo ezifundwayo zihambisane nokudingwa wumnotho." UHlomuka uthe bayabalalela othisha, abafundi kanjalo nabazali bese bakha uhlelo oluzobhekana nabakudingayo. "Siyabhekana nohlelo lokuthuthukisa othisha kanjalo nengqalasizinda ezikoleni. Imali eyabelwe umnyango kumele ithuthukise abafundi kanjalo nezikole." Usho lokhu nje kuhlale kukhalwa ngokuhluleka komnyango ukulungisa ingqalasizinda ezikoleni ngenxa yezinkinga zemali. Le nkinga yenza umnyango ungakwazi ukukhokhela ngesikhathi osonkontileka osebenza nabo. Umnyango uhluleke ukuthenga izincwadi zokufunda ezikoleni nyakenye. Ukwazi ukuthenga i-stationery. Namhlanje iSadtu izoba senkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu lapho ifuna kuphoqwe umnyango ukuthi uthenge izincwadi nezinye izinsiza. Okunye ifuna umnyango ufake imali yezikole eyaziwa ngama-Norms and Standards. Minyaka yonke izinyunyana zihlale zilwa nomnyango ngendaba yemali yezikole engafakwa ngesikhathi. Le mali isetshenziselwa ukulungisa izinto ezincane ezonakele ezikoleni okubalwa nokukhokhela ugesi namanzi.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: esandleni. "Bangamaqhawe abantu ababhukulile, bahola amamashi okukhala ngesihlava sokwanda kwabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Batshengise ukuthanda nokukhathalela izwe labo ngokusukumela inkinga abayibona ikhula," usho kanje. Ukhale ngokuthi abantu bakuleli balinda amahora amade emitholampilo nasezibhedlela ngenxa yokugcwala kwabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UMnuz Mongezi Twala we-EFF okunguye ophakamise ukuthi kubhungwe ngalesi sihlava, usole ukungabikhona kobuholi obuqotho ezweni ngalesi sihlava esihlasele ezweni. "Yingakho abantu bebhukulile bazihola bona ngoba bebona ukuthi abukho ubuholi kuleli. Sinenkinga yemingcele kuleli, abantu bakwazi ukuzingenela baphume noma yikanjani," kusho uTwala. UMphathiswa wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, uMnuz Mntomuhle Khawula weqembu i-IFP, uthe uhulumeni unomkhankaso wokulwa neyabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho njengoba kunomkhankaso wokukhuculula le nkinga. Uthe kunomkhankaso oholwa nguNdunankulu, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, othi "engangeni ngesango iyafohla", olwa nale nkinga yabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Kunemithetho ecacile ezweni ethinta ukuqashwa kwabantu abavela kwamanye amazwe. Abanye osomabhizinisi baphula imithetho yezwe ngokuqasha abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho ukuze babakhokhele imali encane." UNksz Sizophila Mkhizwe we-ANC, ugxeke ukushiswa kwezitolo nodlame wathi bayahambisana nekhwelo leSilo,

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: kusho uBiyela. Uthe uMkhwanazi umchoma uphaphe lwegwalagwala ngokuba umholi oqotho, wathi lokhu uye akubone uma kuvela izinsolo zokuthi kukhona amaphoyisa aphule umthetho. NeMeya yeTheku uMnuz Cyril Xaba, ithe ibambe ngakho ngokubuyiselwa esikhundleni kukaMkhwanazi, yathi ufike ngesikhathi esihle belungiselela izinhlelo zamaholidi ePhasika. Ne-ActionSA ikwamukele ukubuyela kukaMkhwanazi yathi uyisithenjwa sabantu empini yobugebengu.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: eminingi ngesizini edlule. Udlalile kowamanqamu eNedbank Cup (ngesizini edlule), kule sizini udlale imidlalo eminingi futhi ungumdlali osebenza ngokuzikhandla, oziqeqesha zonke izinsuku ngomoya ofanayo nomfutho ofanayo futhi ngiyathanda ukusho kubadlali ukuthi izinto ezinhle zenzeka kubantu abenza kahle. Ngijabule ngokwenzeka kuyena futhi kumfanele konke lokhu okwenzekayo kuyena," kusho uKaze. Amakhosi asezibekisele indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo, azosonga isizini ngokudlala neChippa United ngoMgqibelo, ngo-3 ntambama eMoses Mabhida Stadium.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UTREVOR Noah enozakwabo u-Eugene Khoza noNtosh Madlingozi kwiBafunny Bafunny KUBHEKWE ngabomvu ukumenyezelwa kohlu losomahlaya bakuleli abazoboshelwa eqenjini lesizwe iBafunny Bafunny. Ngokusho komsunguli nokaputeni waleli qembu, uTrevor Noah, iBafunny Bafunny izohlekisa ochungechungeni lwemicimbi ezokuba kuleli ngoSepthemba walo nyaka. UTrevor ubuye waqoka uzakwabo u-Eugene Khoza weWhat Now Podcast nomqeqeshi waleli qembu uNtosh Madlingozi. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi leli qembu lesizwe lizoqala ukuhlekisa izethameli emcimbini oseSunBet Arena ePitoli ngoSepthemba 5 bese lidlulela eGrandWest Arena eCape Town ngoSepthemba 26. "INingizimu Afrika iyakudinga ukuhleka, ngakho neSavanna ngiletha iqembu ukuba lenze lokho. IBafunny Bafunny iqembu lesizwe losomahlaya. Kuzoba nemicimbi emihlanu, emadolobheni amathathu ngoSepthemba 2026. Ngiphethe u-Eugene Khoza oseqinisekisiwe nabanye osomahlaya bakuleli abaningi nabakwamanye amazwe abasazomenyezelwa." Uthe usazohlanganisa amakhanda nephini lakhe kanye nomqeqeshi ukumemezela abanye osomahlaya abazobe bebabophele kulolu chungechunge. UTrevor, oseke wahlabana amahlandla amabili kuma-Emmy Awards, uzohlekisa okokuqala kuleli kwiFestival of Comedy ekubeni ayegcine ukunandisa kwiSavanna Presents Trevor Noah Live in South Africa Tour ngoSepthemba 2023.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuphenywa ngephoyisa elibulale intombi Amaphoyisa aseMpumalanga avule icala lokubulala kanye nedokodo lophenyo ukuze kuphenywe ngemuva kokuthi iphoyisa, 53, lidubule labulala umngani walo wesifazane, 39, ngaphambi kokuthi lizidubule ngesibhamu eGrootvlei, eMpumalanga ngoMgqibelo, Mashi 2026. Kubikwa ukuthi uKaputeni wamaphoyisa esiteshini saseBethal waya emzini womngani wakhe wesifazane eGrootvlei wamfica enodadewabo. Kuthe uma benqaba ukumvulela uKapteni wephula iwindi wangena endlini. Kuthiwa uqhubekile waxosha usisi wasala nomngani wesifazane. Udade wahamba wayofuna usizo kwabikelwa amaphoyisa. Ngesikhathi amaphoyisa efika afice uKapteni nomngani wakhe wesifazane bedindilizile benamanxeba okudutshulwa. Bobabili kuthiwa bashonele endaweni yesigameko. Kutholakale isibhamu somsebenzi okungesikapteni lo oseshonile.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: U-VIGGY noVirginia Qwabe bazokwethula i-albhamu yabo entsha ngoMgqibelo IZINTOKAZI ezazakhela ugazi kuma-Idols SA ngo-2019, uViggy noVirginia Qwabe, zibuye ngenkani emculweni we-Afro pop. La matshitshi asahamba uMkhosi woMhlanga futhi asezibiza ngamaQ Twins azokhipha i-albhamu yawo yesibili esihloko sithi Imicabango ngoJanuwari 30. Ngokubambisana la mawele aKwaDukuza, ameme abathandi bobumnandi ukuba baphelele ngobuningi babo emcimbini oyisendlalelo wokwethulwa kwaleli cwecwe (listening session) eThe Villa eWaterfront, ku-98 Mahatma Gandhi Road eThekwini, namhlanje ngo-7 ebusuku. Banxuse izithameli ukuba ziswenke ngezingubo ezimhlophe. Kuleli cwecwe kuboshelwe abaculi abahlukahlukene okubalwa kubo uNomfundo Moh engomeni ethi Ezinkingeni, uMawhoo engomeni ethi Ukuthula, uMjolisi noZamambo abapikwe engomeni ethi Baphi, uShandesh noBlaq Major bapikwe engomeni ethi Bekumnandi, uNaledi Aphiwe engomeni ethi Uthando, uBeast RSA, Dladla Mshunqisi noDJ Fuzeh baboshelwe engomeni ethi Impilo. Lezi zintokazi ziphinde zapika u-Exclusive Drumz noTee Jay eculweni elithi Imali.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: namaphepha eThekwini, ukuthi bakhangise umcimbi njengoba befuna ube sezingeni, kodwa kuyala njengoba manje sisesontweni lokugcina lalo mcimbi. Sekuthenjwe ukuthi ngoLwesihlanu, abanye abantu bazobe beholile ngakho kungenzeka kube khona athengwayo. Nawomcimbi osePeople's Park nakhona yiso leso njengoba amathikithi engahambi yize abaculi abazobe bekhona bedonsa amehlo," kuchaza umthombo. Uveze ukuthi abanye basola ukuthi umcimbi awukhangiswanga ngendlela njengoba bekumele kuhanjelwe emalokishini, ukutshela abantu ngawo. Uthe kunalokho kuvele kwayiwa ezindaweni ezimbalwa ezindaweni zokuzijabulisa edolobheni eThekwini, nokuyinto abaningi abangayinakanga. Okhulumela iSABC uMmoni Ngubane, uthunyelelwe i-email agcine engaphendulanga kuyo ukuzwa izinhlelo zalo mcimbi. Ukuvotela bonke abaculi abaqokwe kuwona kuvalwe ngeSonto. NgoLwesihlanu kulindeleke ukuthi kube nemicimbi ehlukene ukundlalela omkhulu ngoMgqibelo. NgoMgqibelo kuzoba nosePeople's Park, nase-ICC. Kuyona kulindeleke ukuthi kunandise abaculi okukhona kubo uYoung Stuna, DJ Tira, Goldmax, Mthandeni SK, Benny Maverick, Sammy K, Umafikizolo, Khuzani nabanye. Uhlelo emcimbini omkhulu luyobe luphethwe uLerato Kganyago noLawrence Maleka.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: yeqembu eladla isicoco seWafcon kodwa nakulesi esahamba ibanga elide kwiNdebe yoMhlaba wayekhona. “Kumhluphile ukulimala kodwa ngaphandle kwakho ngabe kade afike emidlalweni engu-100 kwiBanyana,” kusho lo mqeqeshi ngalesi sitobha. Akuyena uMbane yedwa osethubeni lokushaya isibalo esimqoka semidlalo kwiBanyana kwazise noKarabo Dhlamini uzodlala owakhe ka-50 uma enikwe ithuba kule midlalo ne-Algeria. “Ngesikhathi ngiya noDhlamini kwiNdebe yoMhlaba eminyakeni edlule, kwaba khona abebethi ngiyahlanya ngoba wayesemncane kodwa ngangibona ithuba lokumkhulisa nangempela usengomunye wabadlali abamqoka eqenjini. “Ngaphandle kokuphakamisa isandla ngaso sonke isikhathi uma edingeka, uDhlamini ukwazile ukusisiza ezindaweni eziningi futhi uphiwe uma ibhola lisezinyaweni kuyena,” kusho u-Ellis. UMbane unethuba lokujoyina izinkakha zeBanyana ezayidlalela amahlandla angu-100 nangaphezulu njengoJanine Van Wyk (185), Noko Matlou (174), Nothando Vilakazi (132), Rifiloe Jane (107) noJermaine Seopesenywe (100).

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa usethobela umthetho ngodaba lwePhala Phala UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa, usedalule ukuthi uyasemukela futhi uyasihlonipha isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo enqume ukuthi iPhalamende alilusingathanga ngendlela efanele udaba lwePhala Phala. Ekhulunyelwa wumkhulumeli wakhe uMnuz Vincent Magwenya, uRamaphosa uthe umile ekutheni akekho umuntu ongaphezu komthetho, nokuthi lezi zinsolo ezibhekiswe kuyena kumele zilandelelwe ngokomthetho, ngokungachemi futhi kungancikwa ohlangothini oluthile. “UMengameli usesibonile isinqumo esithathwe yiNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo kuleli cala ebelidluliselwe phambilini ngabe-Economic Freedom Fighters, besebenzisa isigatshana somthetho u-Section 89. Ngakho uMengameli uyasihlonipha isinqumo futhi uyazibophezela ukuthi uzolandela konke okushiwo wumthetho wezwe,” kusho uMagwenya. Eqhuba, uthe uRamaphosa uzibophezele ungokukhipha usizo olungase ludingeke kuyena ukuze lolu daba lusingatheke ngendlela efanele futhi ezogculisa abathintekayo kulona. “URamaphosa umile ekutheni akekho umuntu onamandla ngaphezu komthetho, nokuthi zonke izinsolo ezibhekiswe kuye kumele ukuthi zilandelelwe ngokungachemi,” usho kanje. Izolo iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo inqume ukuthi iPhalamende laphula umthetho ngenkathi livota ngo-2022, liphikisa isigatshana somthetho u-Section 89 - okwakubikwe ngawo izinsolo zokwephula umthetho ezibhekiswe kuRamaphosa -

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UKUNGACACI kokuthi idokodo lisezandleni zikabani, kuholele ekutheni lihlehliselwe uLwesithathu oluzayo, icala lokubulawa ngesihluku kowesilisa waseKoffee Farm, KwaNdengezi. UMnuz Kholwani Cele (34) kuthiwa washaywa waze wafa, isidumbu sakhe sabelethiswa itshe, sase siyophonswa emfuleni uMngeni. Wayegcine ukubonwa ephila ngo-Okthoba 23, nyakenye, ephuma emsebenzini, egoduka. NgoJanuwari nonyaka, kwaqale kwaboshwa umakhelwane, uMnuz Sibongiseni Johannes Mbhele, kwase kulandela kamumva abasolwa ngokuthi wayebambisene nabo enza icala, oMnuz Bongumusa Mkhonto noMnuz Sboniso Phungula, nabo abangabendawo. Izolo, uMbuso wenze isicelo sokuthi lihlehliswe icala ukuze kuqhutshekwe nophenyo. Phakathi kwalo, kuvele ukuthi idokodo lecala alikho phambi kwenkantolo futhi akuqondakali ngokugcwele ukuthi likuliphi ihhovisi. Kuvele ukuthi ngesikhathi lihlehla icala phambilini, nakhona lalingekho idokodo, kwavela ukuthi likudokotela ohlola ingqondo. Kwathiwa kulindeleke ukuthi abhale umbiko, awengeze edokodweni emva kokuhlola isimo somqondo kaMbhele. Phambilini, kwakukade kuphume umyalelo wokuthi ayohlolwa ingqondo kulandela ukuvela kolwazi lokuthi wake wathikamezeka eminyakeni eminingi edlule. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi lo mbiko noma umphumela wokuhlolwa kwakhe awukaze ubuye ukuzokwethulwa enkantolo ukuthi udokotela

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: U-TBO Touch nozakwabo ethula nabo uhlelo i-The Touchdown. Kusuka kwekunxele nguLindi Mtshali, Tbo Touch, LootLove noMorena Mothupi UMSAKAZI wohlelo lwantambama phakathi nesonto kwiMetro FM, uTbo Touch, udalule ukuthi usayine inkontileka entsha nalesi siteshi. Lesi silomo somsakazi sethula uhlelo i-The Touchdown noLootLove, Lindi Mtshali noMorena Mothupi njalo ngo-3 kuya ku-6 ntambama. Ngokujwayelekile iziteshi ezingaphansi kweSABC zijwayele ukwenza izinguquko ezinhlelweni uma kuqala u-Ephreli. Njengoba sekubalwa izinsuku ngaphambi kokuphela kwenyanga, baningi ababhekile ukuthi yini ezokwenzeka. Nokho uTbo Touch uqede ukuqagela ngekusasa lakhe nozakwabo ohlelweni lwangoLwesihlanu. Uthe ubusisiwe ngokusebenza nethimba abambisene nalo ohlelweni ngaphambi kokusho ukuthi bayisizathu sokuthi inkontileka yakhe ivuseleliwe. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, ithimba leMetro FM lilungiselela ukutheleka eThekwini, ngenyanga ezayo. Phakathi kuka-Ephreli 22 no-26 kuhlelwe imicimbi ehlukene ehambisana nemiklomelo amaMetro FM Music Awards abuya kuleli dolobha iminyaka emithathu ezayo. Abaqokiwe emiklomelweni ezoba seNkosi Albert Luthuli International Convention Centre ngo-Ephreli 26, basanda kumenyezelwa futhi ukuvota kuyaqhubeka.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UMDLALI wasesiswini kwiKaizer Chiefs, uThabo Cele, umqeqeshi waleli qembu ohlabeke umxhwele ngaye ngemuva kwesikhathi engadlali UMQEQESHI weKaizer Chiefs, uCedric Kaze, uhlabeke umxhwele ngendlela uThabo Cele noGastin Sirino abadlale ngayo emdlalweni weBetway Premiership nePolokwane City ophele zibambene ngo 0-0 e-Old Peter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoMgqibelo. Ukudlala kweChiefs ngokulingana nePolokwane kuphazamise umgqigqo wayo wokunqoba imidlalo emihlanu ilandelana. UCele odlale endaweni kaSiphesihle Ndlovu, bekungokokuqala kule sizini eba sesikimini esiqala umdlalo, wawudlala wawuqeda. Ngaphambi komdlalo wangoMgqibelo nePolokwane, lo mdlali wasesiswini odabuka KwaMashu, eThekwini, ubonakale okokuqala ngoLwesithathu, engena esuka ebhentshini iChiefs ibhaxabula iMagesi FC ngo 4-1. Kanti ngaphambi kwalokho, wayegcine ukubonakala ngoFebhuwari kowabakhaya baseSoweto owanqotshwa yiPirates ibhaxabula iChiefs ngo 3-0. Kanti uSirino ongene esuka ebhentshini kowePolokwane, wayegcine ukudlala ngoMashi Amakhosi edlala neMagesi kowomzuliswano wokuqala. "Bangabadlali abaneqhaza elibalulekile eqenjini, yize sinesikwati esikhulu. "Badlale kahle kakhulu, futhi ukuncintisana kuhle phakathi kwabadlali eqenjini, wonke umuntu usebenza ngokuzikhandla ukuthola ijezi," kusho uKaze oqeqesha ngokubambisana noKhalil Ben Youssef. Ebuzwa ngokudlalisa

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: wuSenzokuhle Radebe. Kulindeleke ukuthi ukushisa kuqale ngesikhathi uSabelo evela ngoMsombuluko. Khonamanjalo, umdlalo osakazwa kwiSABC 1 phakathi nezinsuku ngo-7.30 ebusuku, iSkeem Saam, uqinise amabhawodi ngokulanda uLunga Mofokeng. Le nsizwa eyaduma kakhulu kwiThe River ingu-Andile Dikana, izodlala indawo kaQhomane, ozobe eteketiswa ngelika-Mr Q. ULunga uzobe elingisa indawo kathisha waseTurf High osemncane futhi onogazi. Naye kulindeleke ukuba abe nogazi kubafundi nakothisha kodwa abuye abe nesigcwagcwa kwazobanyathela amakhona.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: zihambe kahle. Kuthe uma ngithola le ndawo ngase ngiyipakishile imithwalo yami ngiya kwelinye izwe kodwa sekusele usuku ngihambe ngafonelwa kwathiwa umsebenzi ngiwutholile, ngajabula kakhulu ngabona ukuthi ukholo lwami lungisebenzele," kusho u-Andile. Uthe indawo kaMapholoba, ibe nzima kakhulu kuye njengoba kumele akhulume ngezindlela ezihlukene nokuyinto engelula. "Abantu bazomthanda uMapholoba ngoba ungumuntu oyisigebengu esiphinde kube sengathi silungile uma sibona abantu abaningi, kodwa kulabo esibhekane nabo, kunzima kakhulu. Umdlalo lengithi mina ezinyangeni ezintathu ezizayo uzoba mkhulu kakhulu, futhi kuningi abantu abazokufunda kuwo ngenxa yezinto ezizokwenzeka ," kusho yena. Uthe kuningi okumehlele empilweni futhi ukuthatha isinqumo ngempilo yakhe kwenze washiya izinto ezindala. UMxhakaza uzakhele udumo ngokulingisa kwiTaxi Bosses, Housekeepers, Isibaya, The Righ, Gog' Helen nakwiZone 14.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: amabili kuwona ubalwa nabadlali abadlale kwiPremiership okubalwa kubona uTercious Malepe, Morne Nel, Wandisile Letlabika, Sipho Sibiya noNtsako Makhubela. “Ukukhushulelwa kwiBetway Premiership kweqembu kusho lukhulu kimina ngoba kunginika elinye ithuba engilithatha njengethuba lesibili lokuthi ngibuyele ekudlaleni esigabeni seBetway okuyisigaba esifiswa yiwo wonke umdlali odlala ibhola elikhokhelayo. Ngizimisele ukulibamba ngazo zombili leli thuba, ngiqhubeke nokuzimisela,"kusho uNgema. IKruger ivule igebe lamaphuzu ayisishiyagalombili phakathi kwayo neMilford FC esendaweni yesibili ngawu-50. Izodlala neGomora United eMalamulele Stadium, eMalamulele, ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama. Emdlalweni wokugcina izodlala ne-The Bees ekhaya. “Nakuba sesazi ukuthi singompetha beligi kodwa sisazoqhubeka sidlale ngokuzimisela nakule midlalo emibili esisalele, siziqophele owethu umlando ngokuqeda isizini ngamaphuzu amaningi.” usho kanje uNgema. Ngesizini edlule iDurban City inqobe iligi yeMotsepe Championship ngamaphuzu awu-58, kanti iKruger isethubeni lokwedlula irekhodi lamaphuzu awu-62 leThanda Royal Zulu eyanqoba ngawo isicoco seChampionship ngesizini ka-2016/17.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: US'PHOKUHLE Luthuli okhala ngabamxina ngama-nudes ezinkundleni zokuxhumana UMSAKAZI weGagasi FM futhi olingisa kuZalo, uS'phokuhle Luthuli, ubhoboke ngokumxosha ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Ekhuluma kwiPodcast, Radio & Stuff, uS'phokuhle (23) uthe ubalekiswa ngabesifazane abahlale bemxina ngama-nudes (izithombe benqunu). "Angifuni ukuqamba amanga. Yingakho ngithi izinkundla zokuxhumana angizikhonzile ngoba kwesinye isikhathi ukuthi uyangena kwi-Instagram, sekunama-nudes ongawazi ukuthi aqhamukaphi. Avele avumbuke nje ama-nudes." Uthe uvamise ukushaya amakhala uma ezithela emananazini abantu besifazane ngoba ubengawatholi engakadumi. US'phokuhle, osakaza Umsindo Take Over ngoMgqibelo, uthe okumshaqisa kakhulu ukuthi amanye ama-nudes avela kubantu besifazane abashadile futhi abanye basuke bengazifihlile ebusweni. "Ngithuka abanye sengihlangana nabo. Amahloni ababa nawo uma sebengibona." Abanye basuke belindele ukubona umuntu wesilisa omude kodwa bashaqeke sebethola ukuthi ungumfana omfishane. Uthe abanye abantu besifazane bafike bamcele izinombolo ngoba bethi benzela izingane zabo. "Inkinga uma ngike ngabona into ethi view once sesigejene. Yini lena oyisendayo ofuna ngiyibone ngedwa futhi kanye. Uma ngike ngaphuma kuyo angisayiboni." US'phokuhle uthe okumenza angangeni ezilingweni

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: zikaMchunu ezinokucwasa ngokwebala, ekhale ngokuthi kuphehla nokubhebhethekisa izenzo zodlame emphakathini, kangangokuthi uma kunganqandwa kungagcina kudala ukuthi lesi simo singalawuleki. OWAYENGUMSAKAZI woKhozi FM uNgizwe 'Sinqa Semfene' Mchunu Kuleso siqephu uNgizwe waphawula wathi: “Uyabona nje amaChina anomqondo ofanayo nowamak**la. AmaNdiya asehlale kuleli zwe iminyaka engaphezu kuka-150, ehlukumeza abantu bakithi ezimbonini nasezinkampanini ezahlukene ahola kuzona.” Owayeyisihambeli sakhe ngalelo langa, uNota Baloyi, yena waphendula wathi: “Uqinisile, futhi amaNdiya ayenalo ithuba lokuthi aphindele ezweni lawo, kwakumele akwenze lokho kusukela ngabo-1924 kuya ku-1931.” Khona lapho futhi, kuleli sonto iNkantolo ePhakeme yasePitoli ivale uNgizwe ukuthi aqhubeke akhulume izinkulumo ezihlambalazayo ngomholi we-Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF), uMnuz Julius Malema - obemvulele icala lokuhlambalaza nelokumcekela phansi isithunzi. Lokhu kusukela ekutheni uMchunu ubesolwa ngokuthi wathi ekhuluma kwesinye sezithangami zabezindaba, waveza izinsolo zokuthi uMalema wathola imalii ewu-R60 million kubantu bokufika baseNigeria abashushumbisa izidakamizwa kuleli zwe. Wadalula nokuthi uMalema angenza noma yini ukusiza ukuvikela abantu bokufika abakuleli zwe ngokungemthetho ngoba kukhona abamfumbathisa khona.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: zikahulumeni ngokungaphumeleli kwesifiso sabo sokuthi imashi yabo ihambe ngasePhoyinti, wathi zazibathembisile ezingxoxweni ukuthi uma bengayi kule ndawo, kuzofika uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa esifundazweni, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi azokhuluma nabo, asho ukuthi yini ezokwenziwa ngenkinga yabokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho? "Sabanika imizila emine, yonke eyayizodlula ePhoyinti. Sasinesizathu salokho. Izidakamizwa zigcwele laphaya, ukudayiswa komzimba kubuzwa laphaya, abokufika abangene ngokungemthetho kuleli, bagcwele khona, ngisho nalabo abadelelayo bakhona," kusho uNkk Ngobese-Zuma. Uthe ngisho nezibhedlela kanjalo nezikole okuvela ukuthi zigcwele abokufika, zikuleya ndawo. "Ngesikhathi sikhuluma nabo, sasikubeke kwacaca ukuthi sifuna ukudlula laphaya. Kunezakhiwo ezikuleya ndawo ezithathwe yibo ngodli. Besifuna ukudlula ngakhona, sibakhumbuze ukuthi yizwe lethu leli," usho kanje. Uthe bayafisa ukwazi ukuthi yini le engaka evikelwa amaphoyisa kuleya ndawo? Uqhube wathi kubajabhisile ukuthi uMkhwanazi angabonwa, wakhala nangokuthi ngisho neMeya yedolobha, uMnuz Cyril Xaba, ibingabonwa. Umsunguli we-ActionSA, uMnuz Herman Mashaba, uthe indaba yabokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho isinesikhathi ilimaza elakuleli, wathi okwenziwa yi-March and March kanjalo nezinye izinhlaka zomphakathi bakushayela elikhulu ihlombe.
